anthropology.en: The study of anthropology helps us understand how different cultures develop and change over time.
anthropology.zh: 人类学研究帮助我们理解不同文化如何发展和变化。

anti.en: The anti-government protests drew thousands of participants from various regions of the country.
anti.zh: 反政府抗议活动吸引了来自全国各地的数千名参与者。

antibiotic.en: Overusing antibiotic medication can lead to resistant bacteria that are much harder to treat.
antibiotic.zh: 过度使用抗生素药物可能导致耐药细菌，使治疗变得更加困难。

antibiotics.en: Doctors are concerned that antibiotics are being prescribed too frequently for minor illnesses.
antibiotics.zh: 医生们担心抗生素被过于频繁地用于治疗轻微疾病。

antibody.en: The human body naturally produces antibodies to fight against specific diseases and infections.
antibody.zh: 人体自然产生抗体来对抗特定的疾病和感染。

anticipate.en: City planners need to anticipate population growth when designing new transportation systems.
anticipate.zh: 城市规划者在设计新的交通系统时需要预测人口增长。

anticipated.en: The anticipated arrival of the new shopping mall has significantly increased property values in the area.
anticipated.zh: 新购物中心的预期到来已显著提高了该地区的房产价值。

anticipation.en: There is growing anticipation about the upcoming international climate change conference next month.
anticipation.zh: 人们对下个月即将举行的国际气候变化会议越来越期待。

antigen.en: Antigens trigger the immune system to produce antibodies that can neutralize harmful substances.
antigen.zh: 抗原触发免疫系统产生能够中和有害物质的抗体。

antivirus.en: Installing reliable antivirus software is essential to protect computers from malware and cyber attacks.
antivirus.zh: 安装可靠的杀毒软件对于保护计算机免受恶意软件和网络攻击至关重要。

anxiety.en: Many students experience significant anxiety before important examinations like the IELTS test.
anxiety.zh: 许多学生在雅思考试等重要考试前会经历严重的焦虑。

anxious.en: Parents are often anxious about their children's academic performance and future career prospects.
anxious.zh: 父母们经常对孩子的学业成绩和未来职业前景感到焦虑。

any.en: If you have any questions about the course requirements, please contact the academic advisor immediately.
any.zh: 如果您对课程要求有任何疑问，请立即联系学术顾问。

anybody.en: In modern democratic societies, anybody can pursue higher education regardless of their social background.
anybody.zh: 在现代民主社会中，任何人都可以追求高等教育，无论其社会背景如何。

anymore.en: Traditional methods of farming are not used anymore in many technologically advanced countries.
anymore.zh: 在许多技术先进的国家，传统农业方法已不再使用。

anyone.en: In modern society, anyone who wishes to succeed must adapt to rapidly changing technological advancements today.
anyone.zh: 在现代社会，任何想要成功的人都必须适应当今迅速变化的技术进步。

anything.en: The modern art museum offers anything from ancient artifacts to cutting-edge digital installations.
anything.zh: 这座现代艺术博物馆提供从古代文物到尖端数字装置的各种展品。

anytime.en: With online learning platforms, students can access educational materials anytime and anywhere they prefer.
anytime.zh: 通过在线学习平台，学生可以随时随地获取学习材料。

anyway.en: I was going to be late for the meeting anyway, so I decided to stop for coffee first.
anyway.zh: 反正我要开会迟到了，所以我决定先去买杯咖啡。

anywhere.en: Modern communication technology allows people to work from anywhere in the world with internet access.
anywhere.zh: 现代通信技术使人们可以在世界任何有网络的地方工作。

apart.en: Apart from the initial cost, maintaining this advanced technology requires significant ongoing investment and specialized technical support.
apart.zh: 除了初始成本外，维护这项先进技术需要大量的持续投资和专门的技术支持。

apart from.en: Apart from academic qualifications, employers increasingly value practical work experience and soft skills.
apart from.zh: 除了学历资格外，雇主越来越重视实际工作经验和软技能。

apartment.en: The new apartment complex near the university offers modern amenities including a gym and study rooms.
apartment.zh: 大学附近的新公寓大楼提供现代化的设施，包括健身房和学习室。

apartments.en: Many young professionals prefer renting apartments in city centers to be close to their workplaces.
apartments.zh: 许多年轻专业人士喜欢在城市中心租公寓，以便离工作地点更近。

apes.en: Studies of apes have provided valuable insights into the evolution of human behavior and social structures.
apes.zh: 对类人猿的研究为了解人类行为和社会结构的演变提供了宝贵的见解。

abroad.en: Many students choose to study abroad to gain international experience and improve their career prospects.
abroad.zh: 许多学生选择出国学习以获得国际经验并改善职业前景。

absence.en: The absence of evidence makes it difficult to draw any firm conclusions about the phenomenon.
absence.zh: 证据的缺失使得很难对这一现象得出任何确定的结论。

absent.en: The professor noted that several students were absent from the lecture on climate change.
absent.zh: 教授注意到有几个学生缺席了关于气候变化的讲座。

absolute.en: There is no absolute answer to this complex question because it depends entirely on the context.
absolute.zh: 这个复杂的问题没有绝对的答案，因为它完全取决于上下文。

absolutely.en: The government should absolutely invest more in renewable energy to combat environmental degradation.
absolutely.zh: 政府绝对应该加大对可再生能源的投资以应对环境退化。

absorb.en: Plants absorb carbon dioxide from the atmosphere during photosynthesis, which is crucial for maintaining the balance of gases.
absorb.zh: 植物在光合作用过程中从大气中吸收二氧化碳，这对于维持气体平衡至关重要。

abstract.en: Understanding abstract concepts in mathematics requires strong logical reasoning skills and the ability to visualize complex theoretical structures effectively.
abstract.zh: 理解数学中的抽象概念需要强大的逻辑推理能力和有效可视化复杂理论结构的能力。

abundance.en: An abundance of natural resources has contributed significantly to the country's economic development.
abundance.zh: 丰富的自然资源为该国的经济发展做出了重大贡献。

abundant.en: The region possesses abundant natural resources, which significantly contribute to its rapid economic growth and development.
abundant.zh: 该地区拥有丰富的自然资源，这对其快速的经济增长和发展做出了重大贡献。

abuse.en: The abuse of social media can have serious consequences for young people's mental health.
abuse.zh: 社交媒体的滥用可能对年轻人的心理健康造成严重影响。

academia.en: After working in the private sector, she decided to return to academia to pursue research.
academia.zh: 在私营部门工作后，她决定回到学术界从事研究。

academic.en: University libraries provide essential resources that support the academic research required for writing high-quality dissertations and publishing papers.
academic.zh: 大学图书馆提供必要的资源，支持撰写高质量论文和发表论文所需的学术研究。

academy.en: He was elected as a member of the Academy of Sciences for his groundbreaking research.
academy.zh: 他因开创性研究被选为科学院院士。

accelerate.en: Technological advances have accelerated the pace of globalization in recent decades.
accelerate.zh: 科技进步加速了近几十年的全球化进程。

acceleration.en: The acceleration of urban development has led to increased environmental concerns.
acceleration.zh: 城市发展的加速引发了更多的环境担忧。

accent.en: Some international students find it challenging to understand regional accents when communicating with locals.
accent.zh: 一些国际学生在与当地人交流时发现理解地区口音很有挑战性。

accept.en: Many consumers find it difficult to accept new technologies without proper evidence supporting their significant long-term benefits.
accept.zh: 许多消费者发现很难接受新技术，除非有适当的证据支持其显著的长期利益。

acceptable.en: The acceptable level of noise in residential areas should be strictly regulated by local authorities.
acceptable.zh: 居民区的可接受噪音水平应由当地政府严格监管。

acceptance.en: The growing acceptance of electric vehicles is transforming the automotive industry worldwide.
acceptance.zh: 电动汽车越来越被接受正在改变全球汽车行业。

access.en: Universal access to high-speed internet is essential for bridging the digital divide between rural and urban communities.
access.zh: 普遍获取高速互联网对于缩小城乡社区之间的数字鸿沟至关重要。

accessed.en: The online library can be accessed by students using their university login credentials.
accessed.zh: 学生可以使用大学登录凭据访问在线图书馆。

accesses.en: The system automatically accesses user preferences to provide personalized recommendations.
accesses.zh: 系统自动访问用户偏好以提供个性化推荐。

accessibility.en: Governments should prioritize the accessibility of public buildings for people with disabilities.
accessibility.zh: 政府应该优先考虑公共建筑对残疾人的无障碍设施。

accessible.en: The museum aims to make its exhibitions more accessible to visitors from diverse backgrounds.
accessible.zh: 博物馆旨在使其展览更容易被来自不同背景的游客所接受。

accessing.en: Many students are concerned about accessing reliable information when conducting online research.
accessing.zh: 许多学生在进行在线研究时担心获取可靠信息的问题。

affected.en: Many traditional communities have been significantly affected by the rapid pace of globalization.
affected.zh: 许多传统社区受到了快速全球化的显著影响。

affecting.en: The aging population is affecting healthcare systems and pension schemes in many countries.
affecting.zh: 人口老龄化正在影响许多国家的医疗保健系统和养老金计划。

affection.en: Studies show that elderly people who receive affection from family members tend to live longer.
affection.zh: 研究表明，得到家人关爱的老年人往往寿命更长。

affective.en: The affective dimension of education, including emotions and attitudes, plays a crucial role in learning.
affective.zh: 教育的情感维度，包括情绪和态度，在学习中起着至关重要的作用。

affects.en: Climate change affects agricultural output and threatens food security in developing nations.
affects.zh: 气候变化影响农业产量，威胁着发展中国家的粮食安全。

afflicted.en: The coastal region has been afflicted by severe flooding for the third consecutive year.
afflicted.zh: 沿海地区已经连续第三年遭受严重洪灾。

affluent.en: Affluent societies often consume more resources and generate greater amounts of waste.
affluent.zh: 富裕社会往往消耗更多资源，产生更多废物。

afford.en: Many families cannot afford to purchase homes in city centers due to rapidly increasing property prices and living costs.
afford.zh: 由于房价和生活成本迅速上涨，许多家庭无法负担在市中心购买住房的费用。

affordability.en: The government must address the affordability of housing to help low-income earners.
affordability.zh: 政府必须解决住房负担能力问题，以帮助低收入者。

afraid.en: Some students are afraid to express their opinions in classroom discussions.
afraid.zh: 一些学生害怕在课堂讨论中表达自己的观点。

after.en: After completing their studies, many graduates seek employment in urban areas.
after.zh: 完成学业后，许多毕业生在城市地区寻找工作。

aftermath.en: In the aftermath of the pandemic, many businesses had to adapt to new working conditions.
aftermath.zh: 疫情过后，许多企业不得不适应新的工作条件。

afternoon.en: The workshop has been arranged for Thursday afternoon at the community center.
afternoon.zh: 研讨会已安排在周四下午在社区中心举行。

afterwards.en: Participants should review the presentation materials afterwards to enhance understanding.
afterwards.zh: 参与者之后应该复习演示材料以加深理解。

again.en: History has shown that we must learn from past mistakes and not repeat them again.
again.zh: 历史表明，我们必须从过去的错误中吸取教训，不要再犯同样的错误。

against.en: Many people voted against the proposed policy because they believed it would negatively affect their daily lives.
against.zh: 许多人投票反对该提议政策，因为他们相信它会对日常生活产生负面影响。

age.en: The average age of the workforce is rising in many industrialized nations.
age.zh: 许多工业化国家的劳动力平均年龄正在上升。

aged.en: The government provides various support programs for aged citizens in our society.
aged.zh: 政府为社会中的老年公民提供各种支持计划。

agencies.en: Various local government agencies must collaborate effectively to address the complex issue of environmental pollution globally.
agencies.zh: 各地方政府机构必须有效合作，以解决全球复杂的环境污染问题。

agency.en: The travel agency organized an excellent itinerary for our group visiting historical sites.
agency.zh: 旅行社为我们参观历史遗迹的团队安排了出色的行程。

agenda.en: The political agenda often prioritizes economic growth over environmental conservation.
agenda.zh: 政治议程往往将经济增长置于环境保护之上。

agent.en: A reliable real estate agent can help buyers find suitable properties within their budget.
agent.zh: 可靠房地产经纪人可以帮助买家找到预算范围内的合适房产。

agents.en: Travel agents play a crucial role in helping tourists plan complex itineraries for their overseas holidays.
agents.zh: 旅行社在帮助游客规划复杂的海外假期行程方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

ages.en: Traditional customs have been preserved and passed down through successive generations over the ages.
ages.zh: 传统习俗在漫长的岁月中被保存下来并代代相传。

along.en: Along with technological advancements, changes in consumer behavior have significantly transformed the retail industry over time.
along.zh: 除了技术进步外，消费者行为的变化也随着时间的推移显著改变了零售业。

alongside.en: Traditional teaching methods are now being used alongside modern technology in classrooms.
alongside.zh: 传统教学方法现在正在与现课堂教学中代技术一起使用。

alphabet.en: Before attending university, international students must learn the English alphabet thoroughly.
alphabet.zh: 在进入大学之前，国际学生必须彻底学习英语字母表。

alright.en: Although the weather was poor, the pilot confirmed that everything was alright for landing.
alright.zh: 尽管天气不好，飞行员确认降落的一切都正常。

also.en: The museum offers guided tours in the morning and also provides audio guides in the afternoon.
also.zh: 博物馆上午提供导游讲解，下午也提供语音导览。

alter.en: Global warming can significantly alter ecosystems and threaten the survival of many species.
alter.zh: 全球变暖可以显著改变生态系统，威胁许多物种的生存。

alteration.en: The government proposed an alteration to the current immigration policy last year.
alteration.zh: 政府去年提出了对现行移民政策的修改。

altered.en: The original design was significantly altered to accommodate the new safety regulations imposed by local authorities.
altered.zh: 原始设计被显著修改以适应当地当局实施的新安全法规。

alternative.en: Governments should invest in alternative energy sources like wind and solar power to reduce reliance on fossil fuels.
alternative.zh: 政府应投资风能及太阳能等替代能源，以减少对化石燃料的依赖。

alternatively.en: Students can submit their assignments online, or alternatively, hand them in at the office.
alternatively.zh: 学生可以在线提交作业，或者选择将作业交到办公室。

alternatives.en: The report explored several alternatives to address the housing shortage in urban areas.
alternatives.zh: 该报告探讨了解决城市地区住房短缺的几个替代方案。

although.en: Although the initial results were promising, further research is needed to confirm them.
although.zh: 尽管初步结果很有希望，但仍需要进一步研究来确认它们。

altitude.en: The high altitude of the mountain made it difficult for inexperienced climbers to breathe.
altitude.zh: 高山的高海拔使得经验不足的登山者呼吸困难。

altogether.en: The costs were altogether higher than expected, causing significant budget issues for the company this year.
altogether.zh: 成本完全高于预期，今年给公司造成了严重的预算问题。

always.en: Regular practice is always essential for achieving high scores in English language examinations.
always.zh: 定期练习对于在英语考试中取得高分总是必不可少的。

amateur.en: The photography exhibition featured works by both professional artists and talented amateur photographers.
amateur.zh: 摄影展展出了专业艺术家和才华横溢的业余摄影师的作品。

amaze.en: The rapid advancement of technology never ceases to amaze people around the world.
amaze.zh: 技术的快速进步让世界各地的人们惊叹不已。

amazing.en: The amazing technological advancements in the last decade have transformed how people communicate and access information globally.
amazing.zh: 过去十年惊人的技术进步改变了人们全球沟通和获取信息的方式。

amazon.en: The Amazon rainforest plays a crucial role in regulating the global climate system.
amazon.zh: 亚马逊雨林在调节全球气候系统中起着至关重要的作用。

amazonian.en: Amazonian tribes have lived sustainably in the rainforest for thousands of years.
amazonian.zh: 亚马逊部落已经在雨林中可持续地生活了数千年。

ambassador.en: The ambassador delivered a speech about cultural exchange between the two nations.
ambassador.zh: 大使发表了一篇关于两国文化交流的演讲。

amber.en: Amber is fossilized tree resin that often contains preserved insects from millions of years ago.
amber.zh: 琥珀是化石化的树树脂，通常包含数百万年前的保存完好的昆虫。

ambiguity.en: The ambiguity in the contract led to a lengthy legal dispute between the two companies.
ambiguity.zh: 合同中的歧义导致两家公司之间发生了漫长的法律纠纷。

ambiguous.en: The instructions were ambiguous, making it difficult for students to complete the task correctly.
ambiguous.zh: 说明含糊不清，使得学生难以正确完成任务。

ambition.en: Her ambition to become a successful researcher motivated her to pursue a doctoral degree.
ambition.zh: 她成为一名成功研究员的雄心激励她攻读博士学位。

aggravate.en: The constant traffic noise only served to aggravate the already stressful situation for residents living near the highway.
aggravate.zh: 持续的交通噪音只会加剧居住在高速公路附近的居民本已紧张的情况。

aggressive.en: Some students adopt an aggressive learning approach, pushing themselves beyond reasonable limits without considering the consequences.
aggressive.zh: 一些学生采取激进的学习方式，把自己逼得超出合理限度，却没有考虑到后果。

ago.en: Several decades ago, many rural communities relied heavily on farming as their primary source of income and sustenance.
ago.zh: 几十年前，许多农村社区严重依赖农业作为其主要的收入和生活来源。

agree.en: Most experts agree that early childhood education plays a crucial role in a child's future development.
agree.zh: 大多数专家同意早期儿童教育在儿童未来发展中起着至关重要的作用。

agreement.en: Both parties reached an agreement after lengthy negotiations, ensuring fair compensation and benefits for all employees.
agreement.zh: 经过长时间的谈判，双方达成了协议，确保所有员工获得公平的报酬和福利。

agricultural.en: Agricultural production has increased due to the introduction of new technology and better farming methods recently.
agricultural.zh: 由于最近引入了新技术和更好的耕作方法，农业生产有所增加。

agriculture.en: Modern agriculture relies heavily on technology to increase crop yields while minimizing environmental damage in developing countries.
agriculture.zh: 现代农业严重依赖技术来提高作物产量，同时尽量减少发展中国家的环境破坏。

ahead.en: It is essential for students to plan ahead regarding their career choices to ensure future stability.
ahead.zh: 学生必须提前规划职业选择，以确保未来的稳定性。

aid.en: International financial aid is often necessary for developing nations to rebuild infrastructure after experiencing natural disasters or economic crises.
aid.zh: 国际财政援助对于发展中国家在经历自然灾害或经济危机后重建基础设施往往是必要的。

ailment.en: Many common ailments can be prevented through proper diet, regular exercise, and maintaining a healthy work-life balance.
ailment.zh: 许多常见疾病可以通过适当的饮食、定期锻炼和保持健康的工作生活平衡来预防。

aim.en: The main aim of this research project is to understand the impact of climate change on coastal communities.
aim.zh: 这个研究项目的主要目的是了解气候变化对沿海社区的影响。

aim at.en: The new government policy aims at reducing youth unemployment through expanded vocational training programs nationwide.
aim at.zh: 新政府政策的目的是通过扩大全国职业培训项目来减少青年失业。

aim to.en: Educational institutions aim to equip students with critical thinking skills necessary for success in the modern workforce.
aim to.zh: 教育机构旨在培养学生批判性思维能力，这对于在现代劳动力市场中取得成功是必要的。

aims.en: This comprehensive study aims to investigate the relationship between social media usage and mental health among adolescents.
aims.zh: 这项综合研究旨在调查青少年社交媒体使用与心理健康之间的关系。

air.en: The fresh mountain air provides a refreshing escape from the pollution and congestion of urban environments.
air.zh: 清新的山间空气为人们提供了从城市污染和拥挤中解脱出来的清新体验。

air conditioning.en: The excessive use of air conditioning in modern buildings contributes significantly to energy consumption and environmental pollution.
air conditioning.zh: 现代建筑中过度使用空调对能源消耗和环境污染有重大贡献。

air pollution.en: Air pollution in major metropolitan areas poses serious health risks, particularly for children and elderly populations.
air pollution.zh: 大城市的空气污染构成了严重的健康风险，特别是对儿童和老年人群体。

aircraft.en: The aircraft manufacturing industry represents one of the most technologically advanced sectors in the global economy.
aircraft.zh: 飞机制造业代表了全球经济中最技术先进的部门之一。

airline.en: Choosing the right airline can significantly impact your travel experience, affecting comfort, service quality, and overall satisfaction.
airline.zh: 选择合适的航空公司会显著影响您的旅行体验，影响舒适度、服务质量和整体满意度。

airlines.en: Budget airlines have revolutionized travel by making air transportation accessible to a much wider range of consumers.
airlines.zh: 低成本航空公司通过让更广泛的消费者能够负担航空交通，革新了旅游业。

airplane.en: The invention of the airplane has fundamentally transformed global commerce, enabling rapid international trade and cultural exchange.
airplane.zh: 飞机的发明从根本上改变了全球商业，实现了快速的国际贸易和文化交流。

airport.en: Modern airports serve as crucial transportation hubs, connecting cities and facilitating both business and leisure travel.
airport.zh: 现代机场作为重要的交通枢纽，连接各个城市，促进商务和休闲旅行。

aisle seat.en: Passengers who prefer aisle seats often value the freedom to move around without disturbing fellow travelers during flights.
aisle seat.zh: 喜欢靠过道座位的乘客通常重视在飞行中能够自由活动而不打扰其他旅客。

alarm.en: The rapid rise in global pollution levels should cause significant alarm among policymakers and environmental scientists alike.
alarm.zh: 全球污染水平的迅速上升应该引起政策制定者和环境科学家的极大警觉。

alarming.en: The alarming rate of deforestation in tropical regions has raised serious concerns among scientists and environmental protection agencies worldwide.
alarming.zh: 热带地区令人担忧的森林砍伐率引起了科学家和世界各地环境保护机构的严重关切。

apologise.en: I would like to apologise for my late arrival to the interview yesterday morning.
apologise.zh: 我想为昨天早上面试迟到道歉。

apologize.en: The company should apologize to customers for the delayed shipment of their orders.
apologize.zh: 公司应该为订单延迟发货向客户道歉。

apology.en: Please accept my sincere apology for any inconvenience caused by the service interruption.
apology.zh: 请接受我对服务中断造成的不便的真诚道歉。

appalling.en: The appalling living conditions in some developing countries require immediate international attention.
appalling.zh: 一些发展中国家恶劣的生活条件需要国际社会立即关注。

apparatus.en: Scientists use specialised apparatus to conduct precise experiments in the laboratory setting.
apparatus.zh: 科学家使用专用仪器在实验室环境中进行精确实验。

apparent.en: Despite the apparent simplicity of the design, the building required highly complex engineering.
apparent.zh: 尽管设计看起来很简单，但这栋建筑需要高度复杂的工程设计。

apparently.en: Apparently, the new government policy aims to reduce carbon emissions, although critics argue that the measures are not strict enough.
apparently.zh: 显然，新政府政策旨在减少碳排放，尽管批评者认为这些措施不够严格。

apparents.en: The apparents differences between the two theories suggest further research is necessary.
apparents.zh: 两种理论之间明显的差异表明需要进一步研究。

appeal.en: The historic building has a strong visual appeal to tourists, contributing significantly to the local economy through increased visitor numbers annually.
appeal.zh: 这座历史建筑对游客具有强烈的视觉吸引力，通过每年增加的游客数量为当地经济做出了重大贡献。

appeal to.en: This advertisement is designed to appeal to young professionals seeking career advancement.
appeal to.zh: 这则广告旨在吸引寻求职业发展的年轻专业人士。

appear.en: It appears that the government is implementing new policies to solve the environmental problem relatively quickly.
appear.zh: 政府似乎正在实施新政策以相对迅速地解决环境问题。

appear to.en: The research findings appear to support the hypothesis about climate change impacts.
appear to.zh: 研究结果似乎支持关于气候变化影响的假设。

appearance.en: The appearance of the city has changed dramatically over the decades due to rapid urbanization and modern architectural developments.
appearance.zh: 由于快速的城市化和现代建筑的发展，这座城市的外观在过去的几十年里发生了巨大的变化。

append.en: Applicants should append a detailed resume to their covering letter when submitting job applications.
append.zh: 申请人在提交求职申请时应在求职信后附上详细简历。

appendix.en: The comprehensive statistical data can be found in the appendix of the research report.
appendix.zh: 详细的统计数据可以在研究报告的附录中找到。

appetite.en: Regular physical exercise can help regulate appetite and improve overall health conditions.
appetite.zh: 经常锻炼可以帮助调节食欲并改善整体健康状况。

appetizer.en: The restaurant offered a complimentary appetizer to welcome new customers during the opening week.
appetizer.zh: 餐厅在开业周期间提供免费开胃菜欢迎新顾客。

applaud.en: Society should applaud individuals who dedicate their careers to environmental conservation efforts.
applaud.zh: 社会应该赞扬那些致力于环境保护事业的人。

apple.en: Many nutritionists recommend eating an apple daily as part of a balanced diet plan.
apple.zh: 许多营养学家建议每天吃一个苹果作为均衡饮食的一部分。

appliance.en: Modern kitchen appliances have significantly reduced the time spent on daily cooking tasks.
appliance.zh: 现代厨房电器大大减少了日常烹饪所花费的时间。

appliances.en: Energy-efficient appliances are becoming increasingly popular among environmentally conscious consumers worldwide.
appliances.zh: 节能电器在全世界注重环保的消费者中越来越受欢迎。

applicable.en: The safety regulations are applicable to all employees working in the manufacturing facility.
applicable.zh: 安全规定适用于在制造工厂工作的所有员工。

applicant.en: Each applicant must demonstrate relevant qualifications and experience to be considered for the position.
applicant.zh: 每位申请人必须展示相关资格和经验才有资格考虑该职位。

application.en: The successful application of technology in education has transformed traditional classroom learning methods.
application.zh: 技术在教育中的成功应用改变了传统的课堂学习方法。

application form.en: Prospective students must complete the application form and attach required documents before the deadline.
application form.zh: 准学生必须在截止日期前完成申请表并附上所需文件。

ambitions.en: My uncle has always encouraged me to pursue my ambitions and seek opportunities beyond my comfort zone.
ambitions.zh: 我叔叔一直鼓励我追求抱负，寻找超越自己舒适区的机会。

ambitious.en: The government launched an ambitious plan to modernize infrastructure across the entire country within five years.
ambitious.zh: 政府启动了一个雄心勃勃的计划，承诺在五年内实现全国基础设施现代化。

ambulance.en: The ambulance arrived at the accident scene within ten minutes, and paramedics immediately began treating the injured.
ambulance.zh: 救护车在十分钟内到达事故现场，医护人员立即开始治疗伤者。

amend.en: Lawmakers agreed to amend the existing legislation to provide stronger protection for intellectual property rights.
amend.zh: 立法者同意修改现有法律，为知识产权提供更强有力的保护。

amendment.en: The proposed constitutional amendment sparked intense debate among citizens and political representatives alike.
amendment.zh: 拟议中的宪法修正案在公民和政治代表之间引发了激烈的辩论。

amid.en: The university continued its operations amid growing concerns about campus safety following recent incidents.
amid.zh: 在近期事件引发校园安全担忧的情况下，这所大学继续运营。

amongst.en: Surveys reveal significant differences in job satisfaction amongst employees working in different sectors.
amongst.zh: 调查显示，在不同行业工作的员工之间，工作满意度存在显著差异。

ample.en: The new campus library provides ample study spaces and resources for the growing student population.
ample.zh: 新校园图书馆为不断增长的学生群体提供了充足的学习空间和资源。

amuse.en: Street performers use various talents to amuse tourists and locals wandering through the city centre.
amuse.zh: 街头艺人们用各种才艺来娱乐在市中心漫步的游客和当地人。

an increase in.en: There has been a notable increase in the number of international students applying to universities this year.
an increase in.zh: 今年申请大学的国际学生数量显著增加。

analyse.en: Scientists need to analyse the experimental data thoroughly before publishing their research findings.
analyse.zh: 科学家需要在发表研究结果之前彻底分析实验数据。

analyses.en: Detailed analyses of the experimental results indicate a strong correlation between sleep quality and academic performance levels.
analyses.zh: 对实验结果的详细分析表明，睡眠质量与学业表现水平之间存在很强的相关性。

analysis.en: A detailed analysis of the survey results indicates a strong correlation between income and happiness levels.
analysis.zh: 对调查结果的详细分析表明，收入与幸福感水平之间存在很强的相关性。

analyst.en: According to the financial analyst, the company's stock price is expected to rise significantly next quarter.
analyst.zh: 据这位金融分析师称，该公司股价预计在下个季度将大幅上涨。

analysts.en: Industry analysts predict that renewable energy will become the dominant power source by 2050.
analysts.zh: 行业分析师预测，到2050年可再生能源将成为主要电力来源。

analytic.en: Strong analytic abilities are highly valued by employers in today's competitive job market.
analytic.zh: 在当今竞争激烈的就业市场中，强大的分析能力受到雇主的高度重视。

analytical.en: The programme develops students' analytical thinking through rigorous case studies and practical exercises.
analytical.zh: 该课程通过严格的案例研究和实践练习培养学生的分析思维能力。

analytically.en: We must address this challenge analytically if we hope to develop effective long-term solutions.
analytically.zh: 如果我们希望制定有效的长期解决方案，就必须以分析性的方式处理这一挑战。

analyze.en: Students in this course learn to analyze complex texts and evaluate the credibility of sources.
analyze.zh: 这门课程的学生学习分析复杂文本并评估来源的可信度。

analyzed.en: The survey responses were analyzed using advanced statistical software to ensure accurate results.
analyzed.zh: 调查回复使用先进的统计软件进行分析，以确保结果的准确性。

analyzes.en: The documentary critically analyzes the environmental impact of fast fashion on global ecosystems.
analyzes.zh: 这部纪录片批判性地分析了快时尚对全球生态系统的影响。

analyzing.en: The research team spent months analyzing data before reaching any definitive conclusions.
analyzing.zh: 研究团队花了数月时间分析数据，才得出任何确定的结论。

anatomy.en: Medical students must complete comprehensive courses in human anatomy before beginning clinical training.
anatomy.zh: 医学生必须在开始临床培训前完成全面的人体解剖学课程。

ancestor.en: According to family records, my ancestor emigrated from Italy to Australia during the gold rush era.
ancestor.zh: 根据家族记录，我的祖先在淘金时代从意大利移居到澳大利亚。

ancestors.en: Many cultural traditions practiced today were originally developed by our ancestors to ensure community cohesion and spiritual well-being.
ancestors.zh: 如今实践的许多文化传统最初是由我们的祖先创立的，以确保社区凝聚力和精神福祉。

ancestral.en: Many indigenous communities continue to practice ancestral rituals that have been preserved for thousands of years.
ancestral.zh: 许多原住民社区继续传承已保留数千年的祖先仪式。

anchor.en: The lighthouse served as an anchor for ships navigating the dangerous coastline during stormy weather.
anchor.zh: 灯塔在暴风雨天气中为航行危险海岸线的船只提供了锚定作用。

ancient.en: Archaeologists have discovered numerous ancient artifacts that provide insight into the daily lives of early civilizations.
ancient.zh: 考古学家发现了许多古代文物，这些文物提供了对早期文明日常生活的见解。

and.en: Modern technology has transformed how people communicate and access information in their daily lives.
and.zh: 现代技术改变了人们在日常生活中交流和获取信息的方式。

anecdote.en: The professor began the lecture with a humorous anecdote about her first teaching experience.
anecdote.zh: 教授用一个关于她第一次教学经历的幽默轶事开始了讲座。

anger.en: Uncontrolled anger can damage personal relationships and lead to serious psychological health issues.
anger.zh: 无法控制的愤怒会损害人际关系，并导致严重的心理健康问题。

angle.en: From a different angle, the environmental problem appears more complex than initially anticipated.
angle.zh: 从不同的角度来看，这个环境问题比最初预期的更加复杂。

angry.en: Many parents become angry when children spend excessive time on electronic devices instead of studying.
angry.zh: 许多父母在孩子花太多时间使用电子设备而不是学习时会变得生气。

animal.en: Medical research has benefited enormously from studying the behavior and biology of animal species.
animal.zh: 医学研究从研究动物物种的行为和生物学中获得了巨大收益。

animals.en: Wild animals in urban areas face numerous challenges due to rapid habitat loss and expansion.
animals.zh: 城市地区的野生动物由于快速栖息地丧失和扩张而面临众多挑战。

ankle.en: She sprained her ankle while hiking and had to be rescued by mountain rescue teams.
ankle.zh: 她在徒步旅行时扭伤了脚踝，不得不依靠山地救援队营救。

anniversary.en: The couple celebrated their twentieth wedding anniversary with a romantic dinner by the seaside.
anniversary.zh: 这对夫妇在海边享用了浪漫晚餐，庆祝他们的结婚二十周年。

announce.en: The university will announce the scholarship recipients next week during the formal ceremony.
announce.zh: 大学将在下周正式典礼上宣布奖学金获得者。

announced.en: The company officially announced a new policy regarding remote work arrangements for all employees next month.
announced.zh: 该公司正式宣布了一项关于下个月所有员工远程工作安排的新政策。

annoy.en: Constant noise from nearby construction sites tends to annoy local residents during working hours.
annoy.zh: 附近建筑工地的持续噪音往往在工作时间内打扰当地居民。

annoying.en: It is extremely annoying when public transportation is delayed without any clear explanation.
annoying.zh: 公共交通延误又没有任何明确解释时，这真的很烦人。

annual.en: The company publishes an annual report detailing its financial performance and commitment to sustainable environmental practices.
annual.zh: 该公司发布年度报告，详细说明其财务表现和对可持续环境实践的承诺。

annual fee.en: Many fitness centers charge a substantial annual fee that includes access to all facilities and classes.
annual fee.zh: 许多健身中心收取一笔可观的年费，包含所有设施和课程的使用权。

annually.en: The company reviews employee performance annually to determine promotions and salary adjustments.
annually.zh: 公司每年审查员工绩效，以决定晋升和薪资调整。

anomaly.en: Scientists were puzzled by the unexpected anomaly in the data that contradicted their hypothesis.
anomaly.zh: 科学家们对数据中与他们假设相矛盾的这个意外异常现象感到困惑。

another.en: After completing this research project, we will move on to another phase of the investigation.
another.zh: 完成这个研究项目后，我们将进入调查的下一个阶段。

answer.en: Candidates must provide clear and concise answers to all questions during the job interview.
answer.zh: 候选人必须在求职面试中清晰简洁地回答所有问题。

antarctic.en: The Antarctic region is experiencing rapid environmental changes that affect global weather patterns.
antarctic.zh: 南极地区正在经历影响全球天气模式的快速环境变化。

anthropologist.en: The anthropologist conducted extensive fieldwork to study the cultural practices of remote communities.
anthropologist.zh: 这位人类学家进行了广泛的实地考察，以研究偏远社区的文化习俗。

anthropologists.en: Anthropologists have discovered that ancient human migration patterns were more complex than previously believed.
anthropologists.zh: 人类学家发现，古代人类迁徙模式比以前认为的更加复杂。

adopted.en: Several countries have adopted strict policies to reduce carbon emissions and combat the effects of climate change.
adopted.zh: 几个国家已经采取了严格的政策来减少碳排放并对抗气候变化的影响。

adult.en: Adult education programs have become increasingly popular as older workers seek to update their professional skills.
adult.zh: 成人教育项目越来越受欢迎，因为年长的工人希望更新他们的专业技能。

adults.en: Many adults choose to return to university later in life to enhance their career prospects significantly.
adults.zh: 许多成年人选择在晚年重返大学，以显著增强他们的职业前景。

advance.en: The advance of technology has transformed the way we communicate, work, and access information globally.
advance.zh: 技术的进步改变了我们沟通、工作和获取全球信息的方式。

advanced.en: Advanced medical treatments have significantly improved survival rates for patients with previously incurable diseases.
advanced.zh: 先进的医疗方法显著提高了曾经无法治愈疾病患者的存活率。

advancement.en: The advancement of science and technology has contributed substantially to improvements in healthcare outcomes worldwide.
advancement.zh: 科学技术的进步为全球医疗保健的改善做出了重大贡献。

advantage.en: Living in a multicultural society offers the distinct advantage of exposing individuals to diverse perspectives and traditions.
advantage.zh: 生活在多元文化社会中具有明显的优势，使个人接触到不同的观点和传统。

advent.en: The advent of the internet has revolutionized how people access information and communicate with one another.
advent.zh: 互联网的出现彻底改变了人们获取信息和相互交流的方式。

adventure.en: Many tourists often seek adventure when travelling, preferring outdoor activities over relaxing in traditional hotel resorts.
adventure.zh: 许多游客在旅行时经常寻求冒险，更喜欢户外活动而不是在传统酒店度假村放松。

adverse.en: Adverse weather conditions often lead to flight delays and cancellations at major international airports.
adverse.zh: 恶劣天气条件经常导致主要国际机场的航班延误和取消。

adversity.en: Overcoming adversity builds resilience and character, teaching individuals valuable lessons about perseverance.
adversity.zh: 克服逆境能培养韧性和品格，教会个人关于坚持的宝贵经验。

advert.en: The advert was designed to appeal to young consumers through humor and contemporary cultural references.
advert.zh: 这则广告通过幽默和当代文化元素来吸引年轻消费者。

advertise.en: Companies use social media platforms to advertise their products and reach a much wider global audience.
advertise.zh: 公司利用社交媒体平台做广告，以接触更广泛的全球受众。

advertisement.en: The television advertisement featured a celebrity endorsement to boost consumer confidence in the product.
advertisement.zh: 这则电视广告采用名人代言来增强消费者对该产品的信心。

advertising.en: Modern advertising strategies often rely heavily on social media platforms to target specific demographic groups effectively.
advertising.zh: 现代广告策略通常严重依赖社交媒体平台来有效地针对特定人群。

advice.en: Students should seek professional advice before making significant decisions regarding their future career paths and studies.
advice.zh: 学生在做出关于未来职业道路和学习的重大决定之前应寻求专业建议。

advise.en: Doctors advise patients to maintain regular exercise routines to improve their overall physical and mental health.
advise.zh: 医生建议患者保持规律的锻炼习惯，以改善整体身心健康。

advisor.en: Each university student is assigned an academic advisor to help them plan their career path effectively.
advisor.zh: 每位大学生都配有一位学术顾问，帮助他们有效地规划职业道路。

advocate.en: Environmental groups continue to advocate for stronger government policies to protect endangered species and habitats.
advocate.zh: 环保组织继续倡导更强有力的政府政策来保护濒危物种和栖息地。

advocates.en: Environmental advocates strongly argue that immediate government action is necessary to reduce carbon emissions and protect biodiversity.
advocates.zh: 环保倡导者强烈主张，政府需要立即采取行动减少碳排放并保护生物多样性。

aerobic.en: Regular aerobic exercise such as swimming or cycling can improve cardiovascular health and increase stamina.
aerobic.zh: 定期进行游泳或骑自行车等有氧运动可以改善心血管健康并增强耐力。

aeroplane.en: Modern aeroplanes are designed with advanced fuel-efficient engines to reduce their environmental impact.
aeroplane.zh: 现代飞机采用先进的节能发动机设计，以减少对环境的影响。

aesthetic.en: The aesthetic appeal of public parks can significantly influence how residents feel about their communities.
aesthetic.zh: 公园的审美吸引力可以显著影响居民对社区的感受。

affair.en: The political affair sparked widespread public debate about government transparency and accountability standards.
affair.zh: 这起政治事件引发了公众对政府透明度和问责标准的广泛讨论。

affect.en: Climate change continues to significantly affect agricultural productivity in many developing nations around the entire world.
affect.zh: 气候变化继续显著影响世界各地许多发展中国家的农业生产力。

achieve.en: Students need to work consistently hard if they wish to achieve high grades in their final university examinations.
achieve.zh: 如果学生希望在最后的大学考试中取得高分，就需要持续努力地学习。

achieved.en: The country has achieved remarkable economic growth over the past decade through various reforms.
achieved.zh: 在过去十年里，这个国家通过各种改革取得了显著的经济增长。

achievement.en: Academic achievement is frequently used as a primary indicator of a student's future potential success.
achievement.zh: 学业成就经常被用作学生未来潜在成功的主要指标。

achievements.en: The scientist's achievements have contributed significantly to advancing medical research worldwide.
achievements.zh: 这位科学家的成就对推动全球医学研究做出了重大贡献。

achieves.en: Consistent practice achieves better results than sporadic, last-minute study sessions before exams.
achieves.zh: 持续的学习比考试前临时抱佛脚的学习效果更好。

achieving.en: Achieving a sustainable balance between work and personal life remains challenging for modern professionals.
achieving.zh: 在现代社会中，实现工作与个人生活的可持续平衡对职场人士来说仍然具有挑战性。

acid.en: The acid content in certain fruits contributes to their distinctive sharp and tangy flavour profile.
acid.zh: 某些水果中的酸含量造就了其独特的酸爽风味。

acid rain.en: Environmental scientists warn that acid rain can cause severe damage to forests and historical buildings.
acid rain.zh: 环境科学家警告说，酸雨可能对森林和历史建筑造成严重损害。

acknowledge.en: It is important to acknowledge the efforts of all team members when a project is successfully completed.
acknowledge.zh: 当一个项目成功完成时，认可所有团队成员的付出是很重要的。

acknowledged.en: It is widely acknowledged that regular exercise contributes significantly to improving both physical and mental health.
acknowledged.zh: 人们普遍承认，定期锻炼有助于显著改善身心健康。

acknowledgement.en: The book includes an acknowledgement section where the author thanks everyone who supported the project.
acknowledgement.zh: 这本书有一个致谢部分，作者感谢所有支持这个项目的人。

acoustics.en: The concert hall was specially designed with excellent acoustics to provide an optimal listening experience.
acoustics.zh: 这个音乐厅经过特别设计，拥有出色的音响效果，以提供最佳的听觉体验。

acquaintance.en: Through attending social gatherings, people can expand their circle of acquaintances and build professional networks.
acquaintance.zh: 通过参加社交聚会，人们可以扩大社交圈并建立职业人脉。

acquire.en: It takes considerable time to acquire a new language skill through consistent practice and total cultural immersion.
acquire.zh: 通过持续的练习和完全的文化沉浸，需要相当多的时间来获得新的语言技能。

acquired.en: The company was acquired by a larger corporation last year, resulting in significant organisational changes.
acquired.zh: 这家公司去年被一家更大的公司收购，导致了重大的组织变革。

acquires.en: A responsible student acquires knowledge not only from textbooks but also from practical experiences.
acquires.zh: 一个负责任的学生不仅从课本中获取知识，还从实践经验中学习。

acquiring.en: The process of acquiring a second language requires considerable time, patience, and consistent practice.
acquiring.zh: 学习第二语言的过程需要相当多的时间、耐心和持续的练习。

acquisition.en: The acquisition of new vocabulary is essential for achieving a high score in the IELTS reading test.
acquisition.zh: 获取新词汇对于在雅思阅读考试中取得高分至关重要。

acquisitions.en: The museum's recent acquisitions include several valuable artefacts from ancient Egyptian civilisation.
acquisitions.zh: 博物馆最近的收藏包括几件来自古埃及文明的珍贵文物。

acre.en: The university plans to develop a new campus on a parcel of land covering approximately fifty acres.
acre.zh: 大学计划在一块约五十英亩的土地上建设一个新校区。

acres.en: Many farms in rural areas span hundreds of acres and produce crops for both domestic and international markets.
acres.zh: 农村地区的许多农场占地数百英亩，为国内外市场生产农作物。

act.en: The government has passed a new act to protect endangered species from illegal hunting and habitat destruction.
act.zh: 政府通过了一项新法案，以保护濒危物种免受非法狩猎和栖息地破坏。

act as.en: Libraries act as valuable community resources, providing free access to books, technology, and educational programmes.
act as.zh: 图书馆充当宝贵的社区资源，提供免费获取书籍、技术和教育项目的机会。

action.en: Immediate action is required to address the growing concerns about environmental pollution in major cities.
action.zh: 需要立即采取行动来解决主要城市日益严重的环境污染问题。

activated.en: The security system is activated automatically whenever unusual movement is detected within the protected building area.
activated.zh: 每当在受保护的建筑区域内检测到异常移动时，安全系统会自动激活。

a head.en: The head of the department announced that the new research centre would open next semester.
a head.zh: 系主任宣布新的研究中心将于下学期开放。

a host of.en: The coastal city offers a host of recreational activities including surfing, diving, and fishing.
a host of.zh: 这座海滨城市提供大量娱乐活动，包括冲浪、潜水和钓鱼。

a large number of.en: A large number of graduates are struggling to find employment in their chosen fields.
a large number of.zh: 大量毕业生在他们选择的领域找工作时遇到了困难。

a lot.en: Living in a metropolitan area costs a lot, but it provides numerous career opportunities.
a lot.zh: 生活在大都市成本很高，但它提供了许多职业机会。

a lot of.en: A lot of evidence suggests that regular exercise improves both physical and mental health.
a lot of.zh: 大量证据表明，经常锻炼可以改善身体和心理健康。

a night.en: We spent a night camping under the stars and enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere of the countryside.
a night.zh: 我们在星空下露营了一晚，享受了乡村的宁静氛围。

a range of.en: The university provides a range of support services for international students settling into campus life.
a range of.zh: 大学为国际学生适应校园生活提供了一系列支持服务。

a result of.en: The decrease in air pollution is a result of stricter environmental regulations implemented last year.
a result of.zh: 空气污染的减少是去年实施更严格环境法规的结果。

a series of.en: The government introduced a series of measures to address the growing housing shortage in cities.
a series of.zh: 政府出台了一系列措施来解决城市日益严重的住房短缺问题。

a set of.en: Every student must follow a set of guidelines when writing academic essays to avoid plagiarism.
a set of.zh: 每个学生在写学术论文时都必须遵循一套准则以避免抄袭。

a small number of.en: Only a small number of applicants were selected for the prestigious scholarship programme.
a small number of.zh: 只有少数申请者被选中参加这个著名的奖学金项目。

a sort of.en: Learning to play a musical instrument is a sort of mental workout that enhances cognitive abilities.
a sort of.zh: 学习演奏乐器是一种锻炼大脑的方式，可以增强认知能力。

a variety of.en: The cafeteria offers a variety of healthy meal options for students with different dietary requirements.
a variety of.zh: 自助餐厅为有不同饮食要求的学生提供各种健康餐食选择。

a whole range of.en: Technological advancement has created a whole range of new career opportunities in the digital sector.
a whole range of.zh: 技术进步在数字领域创造了一系列新的职业机会。

a wide range.en: The internet provides access to a wide range of educational resources for self-directed learners.
a wide range.zh: 互联网为自主学习者提供了广泛的教育资源。

a wide range of.en: The charity organisation helps people from a wide range of socioeconomic backgrounds.
a wide range of.zh: 这个慈善组织帮助来自各种社会经济背景的人。

a wide variety of.en: London attracts tourists with a wide variety of historical landmarks and cultural attractions.
a wide variety of.zh: 伦敦以各种各样的历史地标和文化景点吸引着游客。

abandon.en: Some parents feel pressured to abandon their careers to dedicate more time to raising children.
abandon.zh: 一些父母感到压力很大，不得不放弃职业以投入更多时间抚养孩子。

abandoned.en: Many rural villages have been abandoned as younger generations migrate to cities for better work opportunities.
abandoned.zh: 许多农村村庄已被废弃，因为年轻一代为了更好的工作机会迁移到城市。

abbreviation.en: Please clarify what the abbreviation GDP stands for at the beginning of your presentation.
abbreviation.zh: 请在演讲开始时解释一下GDP这个缩写的含义。

able.en: Young people who are able to speak multiple languages have better job prospects in the global market.
able.zh: 能够说多种语言的年轻人在全球就业市场上有更好的前景。

abnormal.en: Doctors recommend that patients with abnormal blood test results should undergo further examination.
abnormal.zh: 医生建议血液检测结果异常的患者应该进行进一步检查。

aboard.en: As soon as passengers board the aircraft, they are required to fasten their seat belts for safety.
aboard.zh: 乘客一登上飞机，就被要求系好安全带以确保安全。

about.en: The documentary was about how climate change affects wildlife habitats in the Arctic region.
about.zh: 这部纪录片是关于气候变化如何影响北极地区野生动物栖息地的。

above.en: The temperature levels recorded last summer were significantly above the average historical data for this specific region.
above.zh: 去年夏天记录的温度水平明显高于该特定地区的历史平均数据。

students.en: Students who participate in extracurricular activities often develop better time management skills than those who focus solely on academic studies.
students.zh: 参与课外活动的学生往往比只专注于学业的学生培养出更好的时间管理能力。

such as.en: Many universities offer support services for international students, such as language tutoring, cultural orientation programs, and housing assistance.
such as.zh: 许多大学为国际学生提供支持服务，例如语言辅导、文化适应课程和住房援助。

summer.en: During the summer vacation, many young people seek part-time jobs to gain practical work experience and save money for their education.
summer.zh: 在暑假期间，许多年轻人寻找兼职工作以获得实际工作经验，并为教育攒钱。

sunday.en: I prefer to spend Sunday mornings exercising in the park, as it helps me relax and prepare mentally for the week ahead.
sunday.zh: 我更喜欢在周日早晨去公园锻炼，因为这有助于我放松身心，为接下来的一周做好准备。

swiss.en: The Swiss education system is highly regarded worldwide for its combination of theoretical knowledge and practical vocational training.
swiss.zh: 瑞士教育体系因其理论知识和实践职业培训的结合而受到全世界的高度评价。

take part in.en: Young people are encouraged to take part in community volunteer programs to develop social responsibility and leadership skills.
take part in.zh: 年轻人被鼓励参与社区志愿者项目，以培养社会责任感和领导能力。

teacher.en: A good teacher not only imparts knowledge but also inspires students to think critically and pursue their own intellectual curiosity.
teacher.zh: 一位好的老师不仅传授知识，还激励学生批判性思考并追求自己的求知欲。

teachers.en: Experienced teachers often attend professional development workshops to stay updated with the latest teaching methodologies and technologies.
teachers.zh: 经验丰富的教师经常参加专业发展研讨会，以跟上最新的教学方法和技术的步伐。

tesla.en: Tesla's innovations in electric vehicle technology have significantly contributed to reducing carbon emissions and promoting sustainable transportation.
tesla.zh: 特斯拉在电动汽车技术方面的创新为减少碳排放和促进可持续交通做出了重大贡献。

thesis.en: Writing a thesis requires extensive research, critical analysis, and the ability to present complex ideas in a clear and organized manner.
thesis.zh: 撰写论文需要广泛的研究、批判性分析，以及以清晰有序的方式呈现复杂想法的能力。

thursday.en: Our group presentation is scheduled for Thursday afternoon, so we need to finalize our slides and rehearse our arguments by Wednesday.
thursday.zh: 我们的小组演讲安排在周四下午，所以我们需要在周三之前完成幻灯片并排练我们的论点。

tuesday.en: The language exchange meeting takes place every Tuesday evening at the university library, providing students with conversation practice opportunities.
tuesday.zh: 语言交流活动每周二晚上在大学图书馆举行，为学生提供对话练习的机会。

universals.en: Some educators believe that certain learning principles are universals that apply across different cultures and educational systems worldwide.
universals.zh: 一些教育工作者认为某些学习原则是通用的，适用于世界各地不同的文化和教育体系。

videos.en: Educational videos can enhance classroom learning by providing visual demonstrations that help students understand complex scientific concepts more easily.
videos.zh: 教育视频可以通过提供可视化演示来增强课堂学习，帮助学生更容易理解复杂的科学概念。

vouchers.en: The government has introduced education vouchers to help low-income families afford quality tutoring services for their children.
vouchers.zh: 政府推出了教育券，以帮助低收入家庭为孩子负担优质辅导服务的费用。

wednesday.en: I have a job interview scheduled for Wednesday at the downtown office, so I will need to prepare my resume and research the company.
wednesday.zh: 我有一个工作面试安排在市中心办公室的周三，所以我需要准备简历并研究这家公司。

western australia.en: Western Australia is known for its vast mineral resources, which play a crucial role in the state's economic development and export industry.
western australia.zh: 西澳大利亚以其丰富的矿产资源而闻名，这些资源在该州的经济发展和出口产业中起着至关重要的作用。

work.en: Finding a balance between work and family life can be challenging for many professionals, especially those with demanding careers.
work.zh: 对于许多职场人士来说，尤其是在职业要求高的情况下，找到工作与家庭生活的平衡可能具有挑战性。

write about.en: In the writing task, candidates are asked to write about a familiar topic and demonstrate their ability to organize ideas coherently.
write about.zh: 在写作任务中，考生被要求写一个熟悉的话题，并展示他们有条理地组织想法的能力。

a big difference.en: There is a big difference between learning a language in a classroom setting and acquiring it through immersion in a native-speaking environment.
a big difference.zh: 在课堂环境中学习语言与在母语环境中通过沉浸式学习语言之间存在很大差异。

a bit.en: Living in a foreign country can be a bit overwhelming at first, but most people gradually adapt to the new cultural environment.
a bit.zh: 生活在异国他乡起初可能会有点不知所措，但大多数人会逐渐适应新的文化环境。

a couple of.en: I spent a couple of years working abroad after graduating, which greatly broadened my perspective on global business practices.
a couple of.zh: 毕业后我在国外工作了几年，这大大拓宽了我对全球商业实践的视野。

a dozen.en: The university library has acquired a dozen new databases to support students conducting research for their assignments and dissertations.
a dozen.zh: 大学图书馆已经获得了十几个新数据库，以支持学生完成作业和论文的研究工作。

a few more.en: I need to gather a few more sources before I can complete my research paper, as the bibliography currently lacks sufficient academic references.
a few more.zh: 我需要收集更多资料才能完成我的研究论文，因为目前参考书目缺乏足够的学术资料。

a great deal of.en: A great deal of scientific research has been conducted on the effects of climate change, yet many policy decisions continue to ignore the evidence.
a great deal of.zh: 科学家们已经进行了大量关于气候变化影响的研究，但许多政策决定仍然忽视这些证据。

applications.en: There are numerous practical applications of artificial intelligence being used within the modern healthcare industry nowadays.
applications.zh: 如今，在现代医疗保健行业中正在使用无数的人工智能实际应用程序。

applied.en: Students should focus on how theoretical knowledge can be applied to solve real-world problems in their future professional careers.
applied.zh: 学生应专注于如何将理论知识应用于解决未来职业生涯中的现实世界问题。

apply.en: Graduates should apply their theoretical knowledge to real-world situations in their professional careers.
apply.zh: 毕业生应该在职业生涯中将理论知识应用于实际情况。

apply for.en: I decided to apply for the postgraduate scholarship to pursue my dream of studying abroad.
apply for.zh: 我决定申请研究生奖学金，以追求出国深造的梦想。

apply to.en: The new traffic regulations apply to all drivers in the metropolitan area without exception.
apply to.zh: 新的交通法规适用于该 metropolitan 地区的所有驾驶员，无一例外。

appoint.en: The university board will appoint a new dean to oversee the faculty of humanities next semester.
appoint.zh: 大学董事会将在下学期任命一位新院长来监督人文学院。

appointed.en: She was appointed as the head of the research committee after demonstrating exceptional leadership skills.
appointed.zh: 她在展现出卓越的领导能力后被任命为研究委员会主席。

appointment.en: I scheduled an appointment with my academic advisor to discuss my thesis progress next week.
appointment.zh: 我预约了下周与我的学术导师讨论论文进展。

appointments.en: The Prime Minister has several important appointments scheduled during the international summit.
appointments.zh: 首相在国际峰会期间安排了几个重要约会。

appreciate.en: It is important to appreciate the dedicated efforts of workers who maintain essential public services daily.
appreciate.zh: 重要的是要欣赏那些日常维护基本公共服务的工人的奉献精神。

appreciation.en: The audience showed their appreciation by giving the speaker a prolonged standing ovation.
appreciation.zh: 观众通过给予演讲者长时间的起立鼓掌来表达他们的感激之情。

apprentice.en: The young apprentice learned traditional craftsmanship skills from master artisans in the workshop.
apprentice.zh: 这位年轻的学徒在 workshop 中向 master 工匠学习传统工艺技能。

apprenticeship.en: Completing a three-year apprenticeship provides valuable practical experience alongside theoretical study.
apprenticeship.zh: 完成三年的学徒期可以提供与理论学习相结合的有价值的实践经验。

approachable.en: The new psychology professor is very approachable and always welcomes questions from students.
approachable.zh: 新来的心理学教授非常平易近人，总是欢迎学生提问。

approached.en: The nervous student approached the examiner after the speaking test to clarify a few points.
approached.zh: 那个紧张的学生在口语考试后走向考官，想澄清几点。

approaches.en: Different cultures adopt various approaches to education, which can greatly influence learning outcomes.
approaches.zh: 不同文化采用不同的教育方法，这会极大地影响学习成果。

approaching.en: With the deadline approaching rapidly, students are working overtime to complete their dissertations.
approaching.zh: 随着截止日期迅速临近，学生们正在加班完成论文。

appropriacy.en: The appropriacy of the research methodology was carefully evaluated before the study began.
appropriacy.zh: 在研究开始前，研究方法的适当性经过了仔细评估。

appropriate.en: It is crucial for governments to allocate appropriate resources to support public healthcare systems during times of crisis.
appropriate.zh: 政府在危机期间分配适当的资源支持公共卫生系统是至关重要的。

approval.en: The research proposal requires approval from the ethics committee before it can be implemented.
approval.zh: 该研究 proposal 需要伦理委员会的批准才能实施。

approve.en: The university senate will meet to approve or reject the proposed changes to the curriculum.
approve.zh: 大学参议院将召开会议，批准或否决拟议的课程改革。

approved.en: The medicine has been approved by health authorities as safe for public consumption.
approved.zh: 这种药物已被卫生部门批准为公众使用安全。

approximate.en: I can give you an approximate timeline for completing the construction project within three months.
approximate.zh: 我可以给你一个大致的时间表，说明工程在三个月内完成。

approximated.en: The total cost of the international conference was approximated at around fifty thousand dollars.
approximated.zh: 这次国际 conference 的总费用被估算为大约五万美元。

approximately.en: The project will require approximately five million dollars in funding to complete the initial phase of construction within the scheduled timeline.
approximately.zh: 该项目将需要大约五百万美元的资金，以便在预定时间表中完成建设的最初阶段。

activation.en: The activation of the new online registration system caused widespread confusion among students at the beginning of the semester.
activation.zh: 新在线注册系统的激活在学期初引起了学生们的广泛困惑。

active.en: Regular physical activity is essential for maintaining good health and preventing chronic diseases in later life.
active.zh: 定期的身体活动对保持健康和预防晚年慢性疾病至关重要。

activists.en: Environmental activists have organized peaceful protests to demand stronger government action on climate change.
activists.zh: 环保活动人士组织了和平抗议，要求政府采取更有力的行动应对气候变化。

activity.en: Extracurricular activity plays a significant role in developing leadership skills and fostering teamwork among students.
activity.zh: 课外活动在培养学生的领导技能和团队合作方面发挥着重要作用。

actor.en: The famous actor donated a substantial portion of his earnings to build schools in underprivileged areas.
actor.zh: 这位著名演员将他收入的很大一部分捐出，用于在贫困地区建设学校。

actors.en: Many actors use their celebrity status to raise awareness about humanitarian issues affecting vulnerable populations.
actors.zh: 许多演员利用他们的名人地位来提高人们对弱势群体人道主义问题的认识。

actress.en: The talented actress received critical acclaim for her powerful performance portraying a complex historical figure.
actress.zh: 这位才华横溢的女演员在饰演一位复杂的历史人物时获得了评论界的高度赞扬。

actual.en: Despite initial concerns, the actual cost of the renewable energy project turned out to be much lower than expected.
actual.zh: 尽管最初存在担忧，可再生能源项目的实际成本比预期的要低得多。

actually.en: Many people believe that smartphones harm communication skills, but they actually help people stay connected across distances.
actually.zh: 许多人认为智能手机损害了沟通能力，但实际上它们帮助人们跨越距离保持联系。

adapt.en: Wildlife species must adapt quickly to survive the rapidly changing environmental conditions caused by global warming.
adapt.zh: 野生动物物种必须迅速适应，以在全球变暖引起的快速变化环境条件中生存。

adapt to.en: It takes considerable time for international students to adapt to the different academic expectations in foreign universities.
adapt to.zh: 国际学生需要相当长的时间来适应国外大学不同的学术期望。

adaptation.en: The adaptation of classic novels into modern films requires careful consideration of contemporary social values.
adaptation.zh: 将经典小说改编成现代电影需要仔细考虑当代社会价值观。

adapted.en: Many species have adapted to changing climates by altering their migration patterns and breeding behaviors over time.
adapted.zh: 许多物种通过随着时间的推移改变其迁徙模式和繁殖行为，适应了变化的气候。

adapter.en: International travelers often need to purchase a universal adapter to charge their electronic devices in different countries.
adapter.zh: 国际旅行者经常需要购买通用适配器，以便在不同国家为电子设备充电。

adaptive.en: Adaptive learning technologies can customize educational content to match each student's individual pace and abilities.
adaptive.zh: 自适应学习技术可以定制教育内容，以适应每个学生的个人节奏和能力。

add.en: Many experts believe that adding more practical components to theoretical courses would improve learning outcomes.
add.zh: 许多专家认为，在理论课程中加入更多实践内容可以提高学习效果。

add to.en: The new research findings will add to our understanding of how urban pollution affects human respiratory health.
add to.zh: 新的研究发现将加深我们对城市污染如何影响人类呼吸健康的理解。

added.en: The added complexity of the new tax system confused many taxpayers, leading to errors in their annual financial returns.
added.zh: 新税制增加的复杂性让许多纳税人感到困惑，导致他们在年度财务申报中出现错误。

addict.en: A recovering gambling addict requires ongoing psychological support and counseling to prevent relapse.
addict.zh: 一位正在康复的赌博成瘾者需要持续的心理支持和咨询来防止复发。

addiction.en: Social media addiction has become a growing concern among health professionals treating young people with mental health issues.
addiction.zh: 社交媒体成瘾已成为治疗有心理健康问题的年轻人的健康专业人士日益关注的问题。

addictive.en: Video game designers sometimes create addictive gameplay mechanics that can negatively impact players' daily lives.
addictive.zh: 电子游戏设计师有时会创造令人上瘾的游戏机制，可能会对玩家的日常生活产生负面影响。

addicts.en: Support groups and rehabilitation centers provide essential help for drug addicts seeking to rebuild their lives.
addicts.zh: 支持小组和康复中心为寻求重建生活的吸毒者提供必要的帮助。

addition.en: In addition to improving physical health, regular sports activities can also foster teamwork and social skills among children.
addition.zh: 除了改善身体健康外，定期体育活动还能培养儿童的团队合作和社交技能。

additional.en: The government provided additional funding to support the construction of new hospitals in rural areas during the crisis.
additional.zh: 政府提供了额外资金，以支持危机期间农村地区新医院的建设。

additionally.en: The new housing development will include parks and recreational facilities; additionally, it will feature sustainable energy systems.
additionally.zh: 新的住房开发项目将包括公园和娱乐设施；此外，它还将采用可持续能源系统。

cashier.en: The cashier at the supermarket scans each item carefully before telling the customer the total amount to pay.
cashier.zh: 超市收银员仔细扫描每件商品，然后告诉顾客需要支付的总金额。

changes.en: Climate changes have significantly affected agricultural productivity in many developing countries over the past decade.
changes.zh: 气候变化在过去十年中显著影响了许多发展中国家的农业生产力。

cheque.en: Many people still prefer to pay by cheque for large purchases, as it provides a secure record of the transaction.
cheque.zh: 许多人仍然喜欢用支票支付大额购物，因为这能提供安全的交易记录。

city council.en: The city council has approved plans to build a new public library in the downtown area to serve residents.
city council.zh: 市议会已经批准了在市中心建造新公共图书馆的计划，以服务市民。

commuter.en: The commuter train arrives at the central station every fifteen minutes during peak hours to accommodate workers.
commuter.zh: 通勤列车在高峰期每十五分钟到达中央车站，以方便上班族。

conservatory.en: The music conservatory offers advanced courses in classical instruments and composition for talented young musicians.
conservatory.zh: 音乐学院为有才华的年轻音乐家提供古典乐器和作曲的高级课程。

distribute.en: Volunteers work together to distribute food packages to families affected by the natural disaster in the region.
distribute.zh: 志愿者们一起向该地区受自然灾害影响的家庭分发食品包。

driving.en: Driving lessons typically cost more in urban areas compared to rural regions due to higher traffic density.
driving.zh: 与农村地区相比，城市的驾驶课程费用通常更高，因为城市交通更拥堵。

east africa.en: East Africa is renowned for its diverse wildlife and stunning natural parks that attract tourists from around the world.
east africa.zh: 东非以其多样的野生动物和迷人的自然公园而闻名，吸引着世界各地的游客。

eco.en: Eco-friendly products are becoming increasingly popular as consumers become more aware of environmental protection.
eco.zh: 随着消费者对环境保护的意识增强，环保产品正变得越来越受欢迎。

happier.en: Studies indicate that people who maintain strong social connections are generally happier than those who live in isolation.
happier.zh: 研究表明，拥有强大社交网络的人通常比独居的人更快乐。

have a look.en: Before drawing conclusions, we should have a look at all the available data and consider various interpretations.
have a look.zh: 在得出结论之前，我们应该查看所有可用数据并考虑各种解释。

headings.en: Using clear headings and subheadings helps readers navigate through lengthy academic articles more efficiently.
headings.zh: 使用清晰的标题和副标题可以帮助读者更高效地阅读冗长的学术文章。

health centre.en: The university has opened a new health centre to provide students with convenient access to medical services.
health centre.zh: 大学开设了新的健康中心，为学生提供便捷的医疗服务。

high street.en: Many traditional High Street shops have struggled to compete with online retailers over the past decade.
high street.zh: 在过去的十年里，许多传统商业街店铺一直难以与在线零售商竞争。

higher.en: Research demonstrates that individuals with higher education levels tend to achieve better career prospects.
higher.zh: 研究表明，受教育程度较高的人往往能够获得更好的职业前景。

humans.en: Humans have always been curious creatures, constantly seeking to understand and explore the world around them.
humans.zh: 人类一直是好奇的生物，不断寻求理解和探索周围的世界。

individual.en: Each individual has the right to pursue their own path in life, regardless of societal expectations.
individual.zh: 每个人都有权利追求自己的人生道路，无论社会期望如何。

joke.en: Although the speaker made a joke to lighten the atmosphere, the audience remained focused on the serious subject.
joke.zh: 尽管演讲者讲了个笑话来活跃气氛，但听众仍然专注于这个严肃的话题。

los angeles.en: Los Angeles, famous for its entertainment industry and diverse culture, attracts millions of visitors annually.
los angeles.zh: 洛杉矶以其娱乐产业和多元文化而闻名，每年吸引数百万游客。

ready.en: Many students are not ready for the IELTS exam because they have not practiced enough listening and speaking skills.
ready.zh: 许多学生还没有准备好参加雅思考试，因为他们没有足够练习听力和口语技能。

run through.en: Before the interview, candidates should run through common questions to build confidence and improve their responses.
run through.zh: 在面试前，考生应该过一遍常见问题，以增强信心并改善他们的回答。

safer.en: Living in suburban areas is often considered safer than living in city centers, where crime rates tend to be higher.
safer.zh: 住在郊区通常被认为比住在市中心更安全，那里的犯罪率往往更高。

saturday.en: Every Saturday morning, I attend a language exchange meeting where I practice English with native speakers from different countries.
saturday.zh: 每个星期六早上，我都会参加一个语言交流活动，在那里我与来自不同国家的母语者练习英语。

select.en: Applicants must select their preferred test dates and locations when registering for the IELTS examination online.
select.zh: 申请人在网上报名雅思考试时，必须选择他们首选的考试日期和地点。

shakespeare.en: Understanding the works of Shakespeare can significantly improve one's vocabulary and appreciation of the English language.
shakespeare.zh: 了解莎士比亚的作品可以显著提高一个人的词汇量和对英语的欣赏能力。

shame.en: It would be a shame to visit London without exploring its world-renowned theatres and historical landmarks.
shame.zh: 如果在游览伦敦时不参观其世界闻名的剧院和历史地标，那将是一件遗憾的事。

shops.en: Modern shopping malls often feature a variety of shops, restaurants, and entertainment facilities all located in one building.
shops.zh: 现代购物中心通常在一栋建筑内设有各种各样的商店、餐厅和娱乐设施。

sleeping.en: Research shows that getting adequate sleep before an important exam can significantly improve cognitive performance and memory retention.
sleeping.zh: 研究表明，在重要考试前获得充足的睡眠可以显著提高认知表现和记忆力。

south africa.en: South Africa offers diverse ecosystems, from savannas to coastal regions, making it a popular destination for nature enthusiasts.
south africa.zh: 南非拥有多样化的生态系统，从热带草原到沿海地区，使其成为自然爱好者的热门目的地。

a few.en: A few students in the class managed to achieve perfect scores on the difficult examination.
a few.zh: 班里有几名学生在这次困难的考试中取得了满分。

aids.en: International organizations work together to provide support and medication for people living with AIDS.
aids.zh: 国际组织合作，为艾滋病患者提供支持和药物治疗。

atm.en: I usually withdraw cash from the ATM near my university campus when I need money for daily expenses.
atm.zh: 当我需要日常开支的钱时，我通常从校园附近的自动取款机取现金。

avenue.en: The new shopping centre on the main avenue has attracted many tourists to our city.
avenue.zh: 位于主大道上的新购物中心吸引了许多游客来到我们的城市。

ball.en: Playing team sports like basketball helps young people develop important social and communication skills.
ball.zh: 打篮球等团队运动有助于年轻人培养重要的社交和沟通能力。

bags.en: Many airlines now charge extra fees for passengers who bring more than one piece of luggage or bags.
bags.zh: 许多航空公司现在对携带超过一件行李的乘客收取额外费用。

bees.en: Environmental scientists warn that the declining population of bees could have serious consequences for agriculture.
bees.zh: 环境科学家警告说，蜜蜂数量的减少可能对农业造成严重后果。

boys.en: Research indicates that boys and girls may require different teaching approaches to achieve optimal learning outcomes.
boys.zh: 研究表明，女孩和男孩可能需要不同的教学方法才能达到最佳学习效果。

cv.en: Before applying for a job, candidates should carefully review their CV to ensure all information is accurate and up to date.
cv.zh: 在申请工作之前，候选人应该仔细检查他们的简历，以确保所有信息准确且最新。

call.en: If you have any questions about the application process, please do not hesitate to call the admissions office.
call.zh: 如果您对申请流程有任何疑问，请随时拨打招生办公室的电话。

october.en: The international conference has been scheduled for October, and participants are advised to book accommodations in advance.
october.zh: 国际会议已安排在十月举行，建议参与者提前预订住宿。

olympics.en: The Olympics bring together athletes from around the world to compete in various sporting events every four years.
olympics.zh: 奥运会每四年举办一次，汇集来自世界各地的运动员参加各种体育赛事。

other students.en: Other students in my class prefer studying in groups, while I personally find individual study more effective.
other students.zh: 我班上的其他学生更喜欢小组学习，而我个人觉得独自学习更有效。

pin.en: For security reasons, banking institutions recommend changing your PIN number at least once every three months.
pin.zh: 出于安全考虑，金融机构建议至少每三个月更换一次您的PIN码。

padded.en: The padded seats in the new library provide comfortable studying conditions for students during long reading sessions.
padded.zh: 新图书馆的软垫座椅为学生在长时间阅读时提供了舒适的学习条件。

particular.en: I have a particular interest in environmental science and hope to contribute to sustainable development research in the future.
particular.zh: 我对环境科学有特别的兴趣，希望将来能为可持续发展研究做出贡献。

phone number.en: Please ensure you provide a valid phone number so the university can contact you regarding your application status.
phone number.zh: 请确保您提供有效的电话号码，以便大学能够就您的申请状态与您联系。

pizza.en: While pizza is convenient for busy students, nutritionists recommend balancing fast food with home-cooked meals.
pizza.zh: 虽然披萨对方便快捷的学生来说很方便，但营养学家建议将快餐与家常饭菜平衡搭配。

price.en: The price of housing in metropolitan areas has increased significantly, making it difficult for young professionals to afford rent.
price.zh: 大城市的房价大幅上涨，使年轻专业人士难以负担租金。

psychologists.en: Psychologists suggest that regular exercise can help reduce stress levels and improve overall mental well-being.
psychologists.zh: 心理学家表明，定期锻炼有助于降低压力水平并改善整体心理健康。

entertained.en: The children were thoroughly entertained by the street performers during the cultural celebration in the town square.
entertained.zh: 孩子们在广场上被街头艺人的表演彻底逗乐了。

euros.en: Many tourists were surprised to discover that prices throughout the country were quoted exclusively in euros.
euros.zh: 许多游客惊讶地发现全国各地的价格都只以欧元报价。

fertilizers.en: Organic fertilizers are becoming increasingly popular among farmers who wish to adopt sustainable agricultural practices.
fertilizers.zh: 有机肥料在希望采用可持续农业实践的农民中越来越受欢迎。

festival.en: The annual food festival showcases diverse cuisines from around the world and attracts thousands of visitors annually.
festival.zh: 一年一度的美食节展示来自世界各地的多样化美食，每年吸引数千名游客。

fishes.en: The aquarium displays over fifty different species of exotic fishes from tropical marine environments around the globe.
fishes.zh: 水族馆展示了来自全球热带海洋环境的五十多种外来鱼类。

friendship.en: True friendship requires mutual trust, honest communication, and the willingness to support each other through challenges.
friendship.zh: 真正的友谊需要相互信任、坦诚交流，以及在困难时期相互支持的意愿。

go through.en: Applicants must go through multiple rounds of interviews before being offered positions at this competitive company.
go through.zh: 申请者必须经过多轮面试才能获得这家竞争激烈的公司的职位。

goals.en: Setting realistic and achievable goals is essential for maintaining motivation throughout any long-term project or endeavour.
goals.zh: 设定现实且可实现的目标对于在任何长期项目或事业中保持动力至关重要。

grants.en: The university offers research grants to support graduate students conducting innovative studies in various scientific fields.
grants.zh: 该大学提供研究经费，以支持研究生在各个科学领域进行创新研究。

great britain.en: Great Britain consists of three separate nations, each with its own distinctive history, culture, and regional traditions.
great britain.zh: 大不列颠由三个独立的国家组成，每个国家都有自己独特的历史、文化和地区传统。

make a booking.en: I need to make a booking for a hotel room because I will be traveling to Sydney next month for an important conference.
make a booking.zh: 我需要预订酒店房间，因为我下个月将前往悉尼参加一个重要会议。

math.en: Although I studied math at university, I found that my real passion was in the field of environmental science.
math.zh: 虽然我在大学学习了数学，但我发现自己真正的热情在环境科学领域。

monday.en: Every Monday morning, I attend a staff meeting where we discuss the progress of various ongoing projects.
monday.zh: 每个周一早上，我都会参加员工会议，讨论各个正在进行的项目的进展情况。

more important.en: More important than academic qualifications, employers often value practical experience and interpersonal skills.
more important.zh: 比学历更重要的是，雇主通常重视实践经验和人际交往能力。

move.en: Many people decide to move to larger cities in search of better employment opportunities and higher standards of living.
move.zh: 许多人决定搬到更大的城市，以寻找更好的工作机会和更高水平的生活。

networks.en: Building professional networks is essential for career advancement, as connections can often lead to new opportunities.
networks.zh: 建立职业人脉对职业发展至关重要，因为人脉关系常常能带来新的机会。

new south wales.en: New South Wales, known for its iconic Sydney Opera House, attracts millions of tourists from around the world.
new south wales.zh: 新南威尔士州以其标志性的悉尼歌剧院闻名，每年吸引来自世界各地的数百万游客。

north america.en: North America is home to diverse ecosystems, ranging from the Arctic tundra to tropical rainforests in Central America.
north america.zh: 北美洲拥有多样的生态系统，从北极苔原到中美洲的热带雨林。

november.en: November marks the beginning of the tourist season in many parts of the world, as the weather becomes more pleasant.
november.zh: 十一月标志着世界许多地方旅游季节的开始，因为天气变得更加宜人。

obviously.en: Obviously, regular exercise and a balanced diet are fundamental to maintaining good physical and mental health.
obviously.zh: 显而易见的是，规律的运动和均衡的饮食是保持良好身心健康的根本。

south america.en: South America is home to the Amazon rainforest, which contains approximately 10 percent of all species on Earth.
south america.zh: 南美洲是亚马逊热带雨林的所在地，那里栖息着地球上大约10%的物种。

southeast asia.en: Many tourists choose to visit Southeast Asia during the dry season to avoid the heavy monsoon rains each year.
southeast asia.zh: 许多游客选择在南亚的旱季前往东南亚旅游，以避开每年大量的季风雨。

spaces.en: Urban planners must design public spaces that are accessible to people of all ages and physical abilities.
spaces.zh: 城市规划者必须设计对所有年龄段和身体能力的人都可进入的公共空间。

special offers.en: Many retail companies provide special offers during major holidays to attract more customers and boost sales.
special offers.zh: 许多零售公司在主要节日期间提供特别优惠，以吸引更多顾客并提高销售额。

strings.en: The orchestra's string section, which includes violins, cellos and double basses, played a beautiful and moving melody.
strings.zh: 管弦乐队的弦乐部分，包括小提琴、大提琴和低音提琴，演奏了一段优美动人的旋律。

accident.en: The accident on the highway caused significant delays during the morning rush hour, affecting thousands of commuters.
accident.zh: 高速公路上的事故导致早高峰期间严重堵车，影响了成千上万的通勤者。

accidental.en: The scientist made an accidental discovery during her research that ultimately changed the direction of her entire career.
accidental.zh: 这位科学家在研究中有了一个意外发现，最终改变了她整个职业生涯的方向。

accidentally.en: The student accidentally deleted the important assignment before saving her work, which was a frustrating experience.
accidentally.zh: 这名学生不小心在保存之前删除了重要的作业，这是一次令人沮丧的经历。

accidents.en: Strict safety regulations in the workplace are essential to minimize the number of serious accidents occurring every year.
accidents.zh: 工作场所的严格安全规定对于尽量减少每年发生的严重事故数量至关重要。

accommodate.en: The new shopping mall was designed to accommodate the growing number of visitors and provide adequate parking facilities.
accommodate.zh: 新的购物中心被设计成能够容纳越来越多的游客，并提供充足的停车设施。

admission.en: The university admission process has become increasingly competitive over the past decade.
admission.zh: 大学入学过程在过去十年中变得越来越有竞争力。

admit.en: Many countries now admit that climate change is primarily caused by human activities.
admit.zh: 许多国家现在承认气候变化主要由人类活动引起。

adolescent.en: Adolescent health education should be a priority in every school curriculum.
adolescent.zh: 青少年健康教育应该是每个学校课程的优先事项。

adolescents.en: Studies show that adolescents who engage in regular physical activity perform better academically.
adolescents.zh: 研究表明，经常参加体育活动的青少年学业表现更好。

adopt.en: Many companies choose to adopt new technologies to improve efficiency and remain competitive in the market.
adopt.zh: 许多公司选择采用新技术以提高效率并在市场中保持竞争力。

affordable.en: Affordable housing remains a significant challenge for young families in major cities.
affordable.zh: 负担得起的住房仍然是主要城市年轻家庭面临的重大挑战。

album.en: The photographer's latest album captures the essence of traditional culture in rural areas.
album.zh: 这位摄影师的最新相册捕捉到了农村地区传统文化的精髓。

alcohol.en: Medical experts agree that excessive alcohol consumption can lead to serious health problems.
alcohol.zh: 医学专家一致认为，过量饮酒可能导致严重的健康问题。

alert.en: The alert system successfully detected early signs of environmental pollution in the river.
alert.zh: 警报系统成功检测到了河流中环境污染的早期迹象。

algae.en: Scientists are exploring ways to use algae for producing clean and renewable energy.
algae.zh: 科学家们正在探索利用藻类生产清洁和可再生能源的方法。

alone.en: Relying on government funding alone is insufficient to solve the complex issues facing the modern public healthcare system today.
alone.zh: 仅依靠政府资金不足以解决现代公共医疗系统面临的复杂问题。

approximates.en: The population of this coastal city approximates two million, though the exact figure fluctuates seasonally.
approximates.zh: 这座沿海城市的人口约为两百万，尽管确切数字会随着季节变化。

approximating.en: When approximating the age of ancient cave paintings, archaeologists must consider various environmental factors.
approximating.zh: 在估算古代洞穴壁画的年龄时，考古学家必须考虑各种环境因素。

approximation.en: Any approximation of the total cost must include unexpected expenses, labour fees, and potential delays.
approximation.zh: 对总成本的任何估算都必须包括意外开支、人工费用和潜在的延误。

apt.en: The phrase 'global village' is particularly apt for describing how modern technology has connected people worldwide.
apt.zh: '地球村'这个短语特别贴切地描述了现代技术如何将世界各地的人们联系在一起。

aquatic.en: Many species of aquatic plants thrive in shallow waters where sunlight can easily penetrate the surface.
aquatic.zh: 许多水生植物物种在阳光容易穿透水面的浅水区繁茂生长。

aquifers.en: Underground aquifers provide essential fresh water supplies for agricultural irrigation in many arid regions.
aquifers.zh: 地下含水层为许多干旱地区的农业灌溉提供必需的淡水供应。

arbitrary.en: Critics argue that the selection criteria for university scholarships appear arbitrary and lack transparency.
arbitrary.zh: 批评者认为大学奖学金的选拔标准显得随意且缺乏透明度。

archaeological.en: Recent archaeological discoveries suggest that ancient civilizations had more advanced technology than historians previously believed possible.
archaeological.zh: 最近的考古发现表明，古代文明拥有的技术比历史学家先前认为的可能要先进得多。

archaeologists.en: Archaeologists often uncover ancient artifacts that provide valuable insights into the daily lives of past civilizations.
archaeologists.zh: 考古学家经常发现古代文物，为过去文明的日常生活提供宝贵的见解。

allergic.en: Many people are allergic to certain types of food, such as peanuts and shellfish, which requires careful attention when dining out.
allergic.zh: 许多人对某些类型的食物过敏，如花生和贝类，这使得外出就餐时需要格外注意。

allergies.en: Allergies have become increasingly common in modern society, affecting millions of people worldwide each year.
allergies.zh: 过敏症在现代社会变得越来越常见，每年影响着全球数百万人。

allergy.en: Developing an allergy to pollen can significantly affect one's quality of life during spring months.
allergy.zh: 对花粉产生过敏会严重影响一个人在春季期间的生活质量。

alleviate.en: Governments should implement effective policies to alleviate poverty and reduce income inequality in urban areas.
alleviate.zh: 政府应该实施有效政策来减轻贫困并减少城市地区的收入不平等。

alliance.en: The strategic alliance between different countries is essential for addressing global environmental challenges effectively.
alliance.zh: 不同国家之间的战略联盟对于有效应对全球环境挑战至关重要。

allocate.en: Schools should allocate more resources to improve digital literacy among students from disadvantaged backgrounds.
allocate.zh: 学校应该分配更多资源来提高来自弱势背景学生的数字素养。

allocated.en: A significant portion of the national budget was allocated to healthcare and education during the economic recovery period.
allocated.zh: 在经济复苏期间，国家预算的很大一部分被分配给了医疗保健和教育。

allow for.en: Effective urban planning must allow for adequate green spaces and recreational facilities in densely populated areas.
allow for.zh: 有效的城市规划必须为人口密集地区留出足够的绿地和娱乐设施。

allowance.en: Some parents give their children a weekly allowance to teach them the value of financial responsibility from an early age.
allowance.zh: 一些父母给孩子每周零用钱，以从小就教导他们财务责任的重要性。

ally.en: Finding a reliable ally in the workplace can be crucial when navigating challenging professional situations and career advancement.
ally.zh: 在职场中找到可靠的盟友，在应对挑战性的职业情况和职业晋升时可能至关重要。

administered.en: The survey was administered to students across different age groups to gather comprehensive data for the research.
administered.zh: 调查对不同年龄段的学生进行，以收集研究的全面数据。

administering.en: Administering examinations fairly requires strict protocols and trained invigilators to maintain academic integrity.
administering.zh: 公平地进行考试需要严格的规程和训练有素的监考人员来维护学术诚信。

administers.en: The university administers multiple entrance tests each year to select qualified candidates from various backgrounds.
administers.zh: 这所大学每年进行多次入学考试，从不同背景中选拔合格的考生。

administrate.en: The new digital system allows managers to administrate resources more efficiently than traditional methods allowed.
administrate.zh: 新的数字系统使管理人员能够比以前更高效地管理资源。

administration.en: The administration of public universities has become increasingly complex due to expanding student enrollments.
administration.zh: 由于学生入学人数不断增加，公立大学的管理变得越来越复杂。

administrations.en: Different administrations have implemented various policies to address environmental concerns in major cities.
administrations.zh: 不同的行政部门实施了各种政策来解决主要城市的环境问题。

administrative.en: Administrative duties often take up considerable time that academics could otherwise devote to research and teaching.
administrative.zh: 行政职责通常占用学者大量本可用于研究和教学的时间。

administrator.en: An effective administrator must balance competing priorities while maintaining staff morale and operational efficiency.
administrator.zh: 一位有效的管理者必须在保持员工士气和运营效率的同时平衡相互竞争的优先事项。

administrators.en: School administrators play a crucial role in creating positive learning environments for students from diverse backgrounds.
administrators.zh: 学校管理者在為不同背景的学生营造积极的学习环境方面发挥着关键作用。

admire.en: Many international students admire the British education system's emphasis on developing critical thinking and analytical skills.
admire.zh: 许多国际学生欣赏英国教育体系对培养批判性思维和分析能力的高度重视。

account.en: We must take into account the significant environmental costs when planning new industrial development projects.
account.zh: 在规划新的工业发展项目时，我们必须考虑到显著的环境成本。

account for.en: Renewable energy sources now account for approximately thirty percent of global electricity production.
account for.zh: 可再生能源现在约占全球电力生产的百分之三十。

accountant.en: My sister works as an accountant in a multinational corporation and earns a competitive salary.
accountant.zh: 我的姐姐在一家跨国公司担任会计，获得有竞争力的薪资。

accumulate.en: Over the years, I have managed to accumulate a substantial collection of books on various subjects.
accumulate.zh: 这些年来，我设法积累了大量关于各种学科的书籍。

accuracy.en: The accuracy of statistical data is crucial for researchers to draw valid conclusions.
accuracy.zh: 统计数据的准确性对于研究人员得出有效结论至关重要。

accurate.en: It is crucial to provide highly accurate statistics in academic writing to ensure the credibility of the research findings presented.
accurate.zh: 在学术写作中提供高度准确的统计数据至关重要，以确保所呈现研究成果的可信度。

accuse.en: The company was accused of neglecting environmental regulations and faced significant penalties.
accuse.zh: 该公司被指控忽视环境法规，面临重大处罚。

accustomed.en: Having lived abroad for five years, I am now accustomed to different cultural practices.
accustomed.zh: 在国外生活了五年，我现在已经习惯了不同的文化习俗。

ache.en: After sitting at my desk for long hours, I often experience backache and shoulder pain.
ache.zh: 长时间坐在办公桌前，我经常感到背痛和肩痛。

achievable.en: Setting realistic and achievable goals is essential for maintaining motivation and success.
achievable.zh: 设定现实且可实现的目标对于保持动力和取得成功至关重要。

accommodation.en: Finding suitable accommodation in major cities can be challenging for international students due to high rental costs.
accommodation.zh: 在主要城市找到合适的住宿对国际学生来说可能很困难，因为租金很高。
