body.en: The human body requires adequate sleep and nutrition to function effectively, yet many students neglect these basic needs during exam periods.
body.zh: 人体需要充足的睡眠和营养才能有效运作，但许多学生在考试期间忽视了这些基本需求。

bounce.en: The rubber ball continued to bounce against the wall until it finally lost momentum and came to rest on the floor.
bounce.zh: 橡皮球不断撞击墙壁弹跳，直到最终失去动力停在地板上。

bound.en: The new policy is bound to affect thousands of workers across the country regardless of their experience level.
bound.zh: 新政策必定会影响全国成千上万的工人，无论他们的经验水平如何。

boundaries.en: Modern technology has blurred the boundaries between work and personal life, making it increasingly difficult to disconnect.
boundaries.zh: 现代技术模糊了工作与个人生活之间的界限，使人越来越难分离两者。

boundary.en: The boundary of the national park clearly separates the protected wilderness area from the surrounding farmland.
boundary.zh: 国家公园的边界清楚地将受保护的荒野地区与周围的农田分隔开来。

bowl.en: She prepared a large ceramic bowl filled with fresh fruit salad for the family gathering on Saturday.
bowl.zh: 她准备了一个装满新鲜水果沙拉的大陶瓷碗，用于周六的家庭聚会。

bowtie.en: The distinguished professor wore a classic black bowtie while delivering his fascinating lecture on economics.
bowtie.zh: 那位杰出的教授在发表关于经济学的精彩演讲时佩戴了一条经典黑色领结。

box.en: The delivery man left a large cardboard box at the front door containing electronic equipment I had ordered.
box.zh: 快递员在门口留下一个大纸箱，里面装着我订购的电子设备。

box office.en: Despite negative reviews from critics, the superhero film dominated the box office during its opening weekend.
box office.zh: 尽管受到评论家的负面评价，这部超级英雄电影在首映周末仍主导了票房。

boy.en: The young boy showed exceptional talent in mathematics, solving complex equations that puzzled adults around him.
boy.zh: 那个年轻的男孩展现出非凡的数学天赋，能解开困扰周围成年人的复杂方程式。

brakes.en: I had to apply the brakes suddenly when a cat darted across the road, narrowly avoiding an accident.
brakes.zh: 当一只猫突然窜过马路时，我不得不急刹车，勉强避免了一场事故。

buzz.en: The buzz of excitement filled the lecture hall as students eagerly awaited the announcement of their exam results.
buzz.zh: 当学生们热切等待考试成绩公布时，演讲厅里充满了兴奋的低语声。

by.en: She managed to improve her writing skills by practicing essays every single day without fail.
by.zh: 她通过每天坚持练习作文，成功提高了写作技能。

by contrast.en: By contrast, rural areas offer peaceful environments, while cities provide more career opportunities.
by contrast.zh: 相比之下，农村地区提供宁静的环境，而城市则有更多职业机会。

by means of.en: Researchers are discovering new medical treatments by means of advanced genetic engineering techniques.
by means of.zh: 研究人员通过先进的基因工程技术发现了新的医疗方法。

by the sea.en: Many tourists choose to stay by the sea during summer holidays to enjoy water sports and fresh air.
by the sea.zh: 许多游客在暑假选择住在海边，以享受水上运动和新鲜空气。

by the way.en: By the way, have you considered applying for the scholarship that was mentioned in yesterday's assembly?
by the way.zh: 顺便问一下，你考虑过申请昨天集会上提到的那份奖学金吗？

by using.en: One can significantly reduce household expenses by using energy-efficient appliances and conscious consumption habits.
by using.zh: 人们可以通过使用节能电器和有意识的消费习惯来大幅减少家庭开支。

bye.en: I had to say bye to my childhood friends when my family relocated to a different country for work.
bye.zh: 当我的家人因工作搬迁到另一个国家时，我不得不和童年朋友们道别。

cab.en: We caught a cab to the train station because our flight was delayed and we were running extremely late.
cab.zh: 我们打了一辆出租车去火车站，因为航班延误了，我们赶时间。

cabinet.en: The newly appointed cabinet held their first meeting to discuss policies aimed at improving public transportation.
cabinet.zh: 新任命的内阁召开了第一次会议，讨论旨在改善公共交通的政策。

burial.en: The burial ceremony is an important tradition in many cultures around the world that honors the deceased.
burial.zh: 葬礼仪式在世界上许多文化中都是重要的传统，用于纪念逝者。

buried.en: The ancient artifacts were buried deep underground for thousands of years before being discovered by archaeologists.
buried.zh: 这些古代文物在被考古学家发现之前，已经在地下埋藏了数千年。

burn.en: The incineration process is used to burn waste materials, thereby reducing the volume sent to landfills.
burn.zh: 焚烧过程用于燃烧废物材料，从而减少送往垃圾填埋场的体积。

burning.en: The burning issue of global climate change requires immediate cooperative action from governments around the world today.
burning.zh: 全球气候变化这一紧迫问题需要世界各国政府立即采取合作行动。

burst.en: The water pipe suddenly burst during the freezing winter night, causing flooding in the basement.
burst.zh: 在寒冷的冬夜，水管突然爆裂，导致地下室被水淹没。

bury.en: In some cultures, people choose to bury their loved ones in their hometown regardless of where they lived.
bury.zh: 在某些文化中，人们选择将亲人埋葬在家乡，无论他们生前住在何处。

bus.en: Taking the bus to work is often more environmentally friendly than driving a private car alone.
bus.zh: 乘坐公交车上班通常比独自开私家车更环保。

bus stop.en: There is a bus stop near the university campus where students gather every morning to wait for transportation.
bus stop.zh: 大学校园附近有一个公交站，学生们每天早上都在那里聚集等候交通工具。

bush.en: A small bush grew in the corner of the garden where the sunlight barely reached during the day.
bush.zh: 一株小灌木生长在花园的角落里，那里白天几乎照不到阳光。

bushes.en: Wild rose bushes line both sides of the country road, creating a beautiful scene in the springtime.
bushes.zh: 野玫瑰丛生长在乡间小路的两侧，在春天形成了美丽的景色。

bright.en: The bright students in the class consistently outperform their peers and demonstrate exceptional analytical skills.
bright.zh: 班上聪明的学生经常表现出色，展示了非凡的分析能力。

brilliant.en: She came up with a brilliant solution to the environmental problem that impressed the entire committee.
brilliant.zh: 她想出了一个解决环境问题的绝妙方案，给整个委员会留下了深刻印象。

bring.en: Technological advances have brought significant changes to the way people communicate and work globally.
bring.zh: 技术进步给人们的全球沟通和工作方式带来了重大变化。

bring along.en: When traveling abroad, it is advisable to bring along a universal power adapter for your electronic devices.
bring along.zh: 出国旅行时，建议随身携带一个通用电源适配器以供电子设备使用。

broad.en: Universities typically offer a broad range of subjects to ensure students gain diverse knowledge and essential skills.
broad.zh: 大学通常提供广泛的科目，以确保学生获得多样化的知识和基本技能。

broadcast.en: The documentary about wildlife conservation will be broadcast on national television next week to raise public awareness.
broadcast.zh: 这部关于野生动物保护的纪录片将于下周在全国电视上播出，以提高公众意识。

brochure.en: I picked up a detailed travel brochure from the tourism office that highlighted the cultural attractions of the region.
brochure.zh: 我从旅游办公室拿了一份详细的旅行手册，上面突出介绍了该地区的文化景点。

broken.en: The broken communication system in remote areas has severely hindered the local community's access to essential services.
broken.zh: 偏远地区破损的通信系统严重阻碍了当地社区获得基本服务。

bronze.en: The museum acquired a rare bronze artifact from the ancient civilization, which is now on display for visitors.
bronze.zh: 博物馆获得了一件来自古代文明的稀有青铜器，现已向游客展出。

brother.en: My brother, who works as an engineer in a multinational company, has always encouraged me to pursue my dreams.
brother.zh: 我哥哥在一家跨国公司担任工程师，他一直鼓励我追求自己的梦想。

built.en: The local government has built several parks and recreational facilities to improve the quality of life for residents.
built.zh: 当地政府建造了几个公园和休闲设施，以提高居民的生活质量。

bulb.en: Replacing traditional light bulbs with energy-efficient LED bulbs can significantly reduce electricity consumption at home.
bulb.zh: 用节能LED灯泡替换传统灯泡可以显著减少家庭用电量。

bullet.en: When writing reports, using bullet points helps organize information clearly and makes it easier for readers to understand.
bullet.zh: 写报告时，使用项目符号有助于清晰组织信息，使读者更容易理解。

bullying.en: Schools should implement stricter policies to prevent bullying and protect students from psychological harm.
bullying.zh: 学校应该实施更严格的政策来防止校园霸凌，保护学生免受心理伤害。

bumps.en: The old road had numerous bumps and potholes that made driving uncomfortable and potentially dangerous.
bumps.zh: 这条老路有许多凸起和坑洼，使驾驶不舒服且潜在危险。

bunch.en: A bunch of environmental activists gathered in the city centre to raise awareness about climate change issues.
bunch.zh: 一群环保活动人士聚集在市中心，以提高人们对气候变化问题的认识。

burden.en: Many low-income families bear the financial burden of paying for healthcare, which can lead to difficult choices.
burden.zh: 许多低收入家庭承担着支付医疗费用的经济负担，这可能导致困难的选择。

bureau.en: The Federal Bureau of Investigation released an annual report on crime statistics across different states in the country.
bureau.zh: 联邦调查局发布了全国各州的年度犯罪统计数据报告。

bureaucracy.en: Excessive bureaucracy often creates unnecessary delays and obstacles for businesses trying to obtain operating permits.
bureaucracy.zh: 过度的官僚主义经常为试图获得运营许可证的企业造成不必要的延误和障碍。

burglar.en: Police are investigating a series of burglaries committed by a thief who targeted homes in the suburban area.
burglar.zh: 警方正在调查一名窃贼在该郊区针对住宅的系列盗窃案。

calcium.en: Milk and dairy products are excellent sources of calcium, which is essential for maintaining strong bones and preventing osteoporosis in later life.
calcium.zh: 牛奶和乳制品是钙的极佳来源，钙对于保持骨骼强壮和预防晚年骨质疏松症至关重要。

calculate.en: Scientists need to calculate the exact amount of carbon emissions produced by industrial activities to understand environmental impact.
calculate.zh: 科学家需要计算工业活动产生的确切碳排放量，以了解环境影响。

calculation.en: After careful calculation, the economists predicted that the new trade agreement would increase GDP by approximately 3.5 percent annually.
calculation.zh: 经过仔细计算，经济学家预测新的贸易协定将使国内生产总值每年增长约3.5%。

calendar.en: In many Asian cultures, the lunar calendar plays a significant role in determining important festivals and traditional celebrations throughout the year.
calendar.zh: 在许多亚洲文化中，阴历在决定全年重要节日和传统庆典方面起着重要作用。

call for.en: The growing concern over air pollution has prompted health organizations to call for stricter emissions standards and better urban planning.
call for.zh: 对空气污染日益增长的担忧促使卫生组织呼吁更严格的排放标准和更好的城市规划。

calm.en: Despite the heated debate during the conference, the speaker remained remarkably calm and addressed all questions with patience and clarity.
calm.zh: 尽管会议期间辩论激烈，演讲者仍然保持得非常冷静，耐心地清晰地回答了所有问题。

calming.en: Studies have shown that listening to classical music can have a calming effect on patients recovering from surgery and reducing their stress levels.
calming.zh: 研究表明，听古典音乐可以对术后恢复的病人产生镇静作用并降低他们的压力水平。

calorie.en: Understanding the calorie content of different foods is essential for making informed dietary choices and maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
calorie.zh: 了解不同食物的卡路里含量对于做出明智的饮食选择和保持健康的生活方式至关重要。

calories.en: While regular exercise helps burn excess calories, nutritionists agree that a balanced diet is equally important for long-term weight management.
calories.zh: 虽然定期锻炼有助于燃烧多余的热量，但营养学家一致认为均衡饮食对长期体重管理同样重要。

camel.en: For centuries, camels have served as the primary means of transportation in desert regions, enabling trade routes across vast and inhospitable terrains.
camel.zh: 几个世纪以来，骆驼一直是沙漠地区的主要交通工具，使得贸易路线能够穿越广阔而不适宜居住的地区。

brother-in-law.en: My brother-in-law works as a civil engineer and recently moved to a coastal city for a new project.
brother-in-law.zh: 我的姐夫是一名土木工程师，最近为了一个新项目搬到了沿海城市。

brown.en: Urban planners often prioritize developing brownfield sites instead of green spaces to preserve natural habitats for future generations.
brown.zh: 城市规划者通常优先开发棕地而不是绿地，以便为后代保护自然栖息地。

brush.en: Artists must choose the right brush for each technique, as different bristles create varying effects on canvas.
brush.zh: 艺术家必须为每种技法选择合适的画笔，因为不同的刷毛在画布上会产生不同的效果。

bubbles.en: Children were delighted to blow colorful bubbles in the park, watching them float gracefully in the breeze.
bubbles.zh: 孩子们在公园里吹着彩色的泡泡，看到它们在微风中优雅地飘浮，感到非常开心。

budget.en: When planning a holiday abroad, it is essential to create a realistic budget to avoid financial stress.
budget.zh: 在计划出国度假时，制定一个现实的预算来避免经济压力是至关重要的。

buds.en: In early spring, small green buds appear on the branches, promising the arrival of new flowers.
buds.zh: 早春时节，嫩绿的芽苞出现在枝头，预示着新花的到来。

buffet.en: The hotel buffet offers a wide variety of dishes, allowing guests to sample cuisines from different cultures.
buffet.zh: 酒店的自助餐提供种类繁多的菜肴，让客人可以品尝不同文化的美食。

build.en: The local council plans to build a new sports complex to encourage community participation in physical activities.
build.zh: 地方议会计划建造一个新的体育中心，以鼓励社区居民参与体育活动。

build up.en: Regular exercise can build up your immune system over time, making you more resistant to common illnesses.
build up.zh: 定期锻炼可以随着时间增强你的免疫系统，使你更能抵抗常见疾病。

building.en: The historic building in the city center was carefully restored to preserve its original architectural features.
building.zh: 市中心的历史建筑被精心修复，以保留其原有的建筑特色。

business class.en: The business class passengers were offered complimentary meals and Wi-Fi access during the international flight to London.
business class.zh: 商务舱乘客在飞往伦敦的国际航班上获得了免费餐食和Wi-Fi服务。

bustle.en: The constant bustle of modern urban life often leaves people feeling exhausted and disconnected from their communities.
bustle.zh: 现代都市生活的持续喧嚣常常让人感到疲惫，并与其社区失去联系。

busy.en: Many busy professionals struggle to maintain a healthy work-life balance, which can lead to chronic stress and burnout.
busy.zh: 许多忙碌的专业人士难以维持健康的工作与生活平衡，这可能导致慢性压力和倦怠。

but.en: Universities claim that higher education develops critical thinking skills, but employers frequently complain about graduate readiness.
but.zh: 大学声称高等教育培养批判性思维能力，但雇主经常抱怨毕业生的准备不足。

butter.en: Some health advocates suggest that imposing higher taxes on butter and other saturated fats could reduce consumption.
butter.zh: 一些健康倡导者建议对黄油和其他饱和脂肪征收更高的税可以减少消费。

butterflies.en: The conservation programme has successfully increased the population of rare butterflies in several protected nature reserves.
butterflies.zh: 该保护计划已成功在几个受保护的自然保护区增加了稀有蝴蝶的数量。

button.en: Students should not hesitate to press the emergency button if they notice any suspicious behaviour in the examination hall.
button.zh: 如果学生发现考试 hall 中有任何可疑行为，应该毫不犹豫地按下紧急按钮。

buy.en: Many consumers now prefer to buy products from companies that demonstrate environmental responsibility and ethical practices.
buy.zh: 许多消费者现在更愿意从表现出环境责任和道德规范的公司购买产品。

buyer.en: As a first-time home buyer, I found the legal procedures and paperwork involved in purchasing property quite overwhelming.
buyer.zh: 作为一名首次购房者，我发现购房涉及的法律程序和文书工作相当令人不知所措。

buyers.en: Online shopping platforms have attracted millions of buyers who appreciate the convenience of comparing prices from home.
buyers.zh: 在线购物平台吸引了数百万买家，他们欣赏在家比较价格的便利。

cabins.en: The rustic mountain cabins provided comfortable shelter for hikers seeking solitude away from busy city life.
cabins.zh: 古朴的山间小屋为寻求远离繁忙城市生活的徒步旅行者提供了舒适的住所。

cable.en: Underground cables transmit electricity and internet signals throughout modern metropolitan areas efficiently.
cable.zh: 地下电缆有效地在整个现代城市地区传输电力和互联网信号。

cacao.en: The cacao beans are harvested, fermented, and dried before being shipped to chocolate factories worldwide.
cacao.zh: 可可豆在收获后要经过发酵和干燥，然后才运往世界各地的巧克力工厂。

cache.en: Computer users should regularly clear their browser cache to protect personal privacy and improve performance.
cache.zh: 电脑用户应定期清除浏览器缓存，以保护个人隐私并提高性能。

cafe.en: Many students prefer studying at the local cafe because it offers a relaxed atmosphere and quality coffee.
cafe.zh: 许多学生喜欢在当地的咖啡馆学习，因为它提供轻松的氛围和优质的咖啡。

cafeteria.en: The university cafeteria offers diverse meal options at affordable prices for students with limited budgets.
cafeteria.zh: 大学自助餐厅为预算有限的学生提供价格实惠的多种餐饮选择。

caffeine.en: Excessive caffeine consumption may lead to anxiety, insomnia, and other health problems if not moderated.
caffeine.zh: 如果不适度控制，过量摄入咖啡因可能导致焦虑、失眠和其他健康问题。

cage.en: The rescued birds were carefully examined by veterinarians before being released from their cages.
cage.zh: 获救的鸟类在从笼中放飞前由兽医仔细检查。

cake.en: She baked an elaborate three-layer cake decorated with fresh strawberries for her sister's wedding.
cake.zh: 她为姐姐的婚礼烤了一个装饰着新鲜草莓的三层精致蛋糕。

cakes.en: Traditional cakes in various cultures often symbolize prosperity and good fortune during celebrations.
cakes.zh: 不同文化中的传统蛋糕在庆祝活动中通常象征着繁荣和好运。

camera.en: Security camera footage played a crucial role in helping the police identify the suspects involved in the incident.
camera.zh: 监控录像在帮助警方识别事件涉及的嫌疑人方面发挥了关键作用。

cameras.en: Security cameras have been installed throughout the shopping centre to prevent theft and ensure public safety.
cameras.zh: 购物中心已安装监控摄像头，以防止盗窃并确保公共安全。

camp.en: Many families choose to camp in the wilderness during summer holidays to reconnect with nature and escape city life.
camp.zh: 许多家庭选择在暑假期间到野外露营，以重新亲近自然并逃离城市生活。

campaign.en: The government launched a public health campaign to encourage citizens to adopt healthier eating habits and exercise regularly.
campaign.zh: 政府发起了一项公共卫生运动，鼓励公民养成更健康的饮食习惯并定期锻炼。

camps.en: Summer camps provide children with valuable opportunities to develop social skills and independence in a structured environment.
camps.zh: 夏令营为孩子们在有组织的环境中提供了培养社交技能和独立性的宝贵机会。

campsite.en: The campsite was equipped with basic facilities including showers, toilets, and a communal cooking area for visitors.
campsite.zh: 露营地配备了基本设施，包括淋浴间、厕所和供游客使用的公共烹饪区。

campus.en: The university campus offers excellent facilities including modern libraries, sports centres, and comfortable student accommodation.
campus.zh: 大学校园提供优秀的设施，包括现代化图书馆、体育中心和舒适的学生宿舍。

campuses.en: The institution has expanded to multiple campuses across the country to accommodate the growing number of international students.
campuses.zh: 该机构已扩展到全国各地的多个校区，以容纳日益增长的国际学生。

can.en: Students can access online learning resources through the university website and study from anywhere in the world.
can.zh: 学生可以通过大学网站访问在线学习资源，从世界任何地方学习。

canada.en: Canada is renowned for its diverse multicultural population and breathtaking natural landscapes including mountains and lakes.
canada.zh: 加拿大以其多元的文化人口和包括山脉和湖泊在内的壮丽自然景观而闻名。

capacity.en: The stadium was filled to capacity during the final match, demonstrating the immense popularity of the sport nationwide.
capacity.zh: 决赛期间体育场座无虚席，表明了这项运动在全国范围内的巨大受欢迎程度。

capital.en: Investing sufficient capital into renewable energy projects is crucial for transitioning away from fossil fuels and securing a sustainable future.
capital.zh: 向可再生能源项目投入足够的资本对于摆脱化石燃料并确保可持续的未来至关重要。

capitalism.en: While capitalism encourages innovation and economic growth, some economists argue it can lead to significant wealth disparity.
capitalism.zh: 虽然资本主义鼓励创新和经济增长，但一些经济学家认为它可能导致严重的贫富差距。

capsule.en: Space agencies are developing new capsule technology to safely transport astronauts on future missions to Mars.
capsule.zh: 航天机构正在开发新的太空舱技术，以便在未来火星任务中安全运送宇航员。

captain.en: The team captain demonstrated excellent leadership throughout the tournament, inspiring her teammates to perform at their best.
captain.zh: 队长在整个锦标赛期间表现出卓越的领导能力，激励队友发挥最佳水平。

captive.en: The documentary examined the psychological effects of keeping captive animals in artificial environments for entertainment purposes.
captive.zh: 这部纪录片探讨了为了娱乐目的将动物关在人工环境中的心理影响。

captivity.en: Many endangered species struggle to reproduce in captivity, which poses a significant challenge for conservation programmes.
captivity.zh: 许多濒危物种在人工饲养中难以繁殖，这对保护计划构成了重大挑战。

capture.en: Photographs can capture significant moments in history, allowing future generations to understand the emotional context of past events.
capture.zh: 照片可以捕捉历史上的重要时刻，让后代了解过去事件的情感背景。

car.en: Electric cars are becoming increasingly popular as governments implement policies to reduce carbon emissions from transportation.
car.zh: 随着政府实施减少交通碳排放的政策，电动汽车正变得越来越受欢迎。

car park.en: The university has constructed a new multi-storey car park to address the growing demand for parking spaces.
car park.zh: 大学建造了一个新的多层停车场，以满足日益增长的停车位需求。

career.en: Many students believe that pursuing a career in technology offers the best opportunities for professional growth and stability.
career.zh: 许多学生认为，从事科技职业能为专业成长和稳定性提供最佳机会。

careful.en: Students must be careful when selecting university courses to ensure they align with their long-term professional goals.
careful.zh: 学生在选择大学课程时必须谨慎，以确保这些课程符合他们的长期职业目标。

carefully.en: Students must read the examination questions carefully before attempting to write their answers down correctly.
carefully.zh: 学生在尝试正确写下答案之前必须仔细阅读考试问题。

careless.en: Careless handling of personal data online can lead to identity theft and serious privacy violations.
careless.zh: 在网上草率处理个人数据可能导致身份盗用和严重的隐私侵犯。

cargo.en: The transportation of cargo by sea remains the most cost-effective method for international trade between continents.
cargo.zh: 通过海运运输货物仍然是各大洲之间国际贸易最具成本效益的方式。

caries.en: Dental caries, commonly known as tooth decay, affects a significant portion of the global population regardless of age.
caries.zh: 龋齿，通常称为蛀牙，影响着全球相当大比例的人口，不分年龄。

carnival.en: The annual carnival in Rio de Janeiro attracts millions of tourists and generates substantial revenue for the local economy.
carnival.zh: 里约热内卢的年度嘉年华吸引着数百万游客，并为当地经济创造了可观的收入。

carolina.en: North Carolina is renowned for its diverse landscapes, ranging from coastal beaches to mountainous regions in the west.
carolina.zh: 北卡罗来纳州以其多样的地形而闻名，从沿海海滩到西部的山区。

carpet.en: In many cultures, removing one's shoes before stepping on a carpet is a customary practice demonstrating respect.
carpet.zh: 在许多文化中，进门脱鞋再踏上地毯是一种表示尊重的习俗。

carpets.en: Hand-woven carpets from traditional cultures often reflect intricate historical patterns and unique artistic heritage.
carpets.zh: 来自传统文化的手工地毯通常反映了复杂的历史图案和独特的艺术遗产。

carried.en: Extensive research was carried out to determine the impact of screen time on children's cognitive development and overall mental health status.
carried.zh: 进行了广泛的研究以确定屏幕时间对儿童认知发展和整体心理健康状况的影响。

carrier.en: Mobile phone carriers are increasingly competing to offer faster networks and more affordable data packages for consumers.
carrier.zh: 移动电话运营商正在越来越多地竞争，为消费者提供更快速的网络和更实惠的数据套餐。

carrot.en: Many nutritionists argue that eating carrots regularly can significantly improve eye health due to their high vitamin A content.
carrot.zh: 许多营养学家认为，由于胡萝卜富含维生素A，定期食用可以显著改善眼睛健康。

carry.en: Universities should carry more responsibility for ensuring that graduates possess practical skills for the job market.
carry.zh: 大学应该承担更多责任，确保毕业生具备就业市场所需的实用技能。

carry out.en: Scientists must carry out rigorous experiments to verify their hypotheses before publishing research findings.
carry out.zh: 科学家在发表研究成果之前，必须进行严格的实验来验证他们的假设。

carry-on.en: According to most airline regulations, passengers are typically permitted to bring one carry-on bag onto the aircraft at no additional cost.
carry-on.zh: 根据大多数航空公司的规定，乘客通常可以免费携带一个随身行李登上飞机。

cartilage.en: Injuries to the cartilage in the knee joint often require lengthy rehabilitation periods for athletes to fully recover.
cartilage.zh: 膝关节软骨的损伤通常需要漫长的康复期，运动员才能完全恢复。

carve.en: Indigenous communities traditionally carve intricate patterns into wood and stone to preserve their cultural heritage.
carve.zh: 原住民社区传统上会在木头和石头上雕刻复杂的图案，以保存他们的文化遗产。

carved.en: The ancient temple featured beautifully carved figures depicting scenes from mythology that attracted numerous tourists annually.
carved.zh: 这座古老的寺庙以精美雕刻的人物为特色，描绘了神话场景，每年吸引众多游客。

carvings.en: Museums around the world have begun returning indigenous carvings to their original communities as part of reconciliation efforts.
carvings.zh: 世界各地的博物馆已开始将原住民雕刻品归还给其原始社区，作为和解努力的一部分。

canal.en: The construction of the canal was a major engineering achievement that transformed regional trade routes and boosted economic growth.
canal.zh: 运河的建设是一项重大工程成就，改变了区域贸易路线并促进了经济增长。

canals.en: Many historic cities were built near canals because waterways provided an efficient method for transporting goods and materials.
canals.zh: 许多历史城市都建在运河附近，因为水道提供了一种运输货物和材料的有效方法。

canary.en: In the past, miners used canaries as early warning signals for dangerous gases underground to ensure their safety.
canary.zh: 过去，矿工们用金丝雀作为地下危险气体的早期预警信号以确保安全。

cancel.en: The airline had to cancel several flights due to severe weather conditions affecting the entire region this week.
cancel.zh: 由于影响整个地区的恶劣天气条件，航空公司不得不取消几个航班。

cancellation.en: The cancellation of the international conference caused inconvenience for many participants who had already booked accommodations.
cancellation.zh: 国际会议的取消给许多已经预订住宿的参与者带来了不便。

cancelled.en: Many outdoor events were cancelled when the meteorological department issued a severe storm warning for coastal areas.
cancelled.zh: 当气象部门向沿海地区发布暴风雨警告时，许多户外活动被取消了。

cancer.en: Early detection of cancer significantly improves survival rates, highlighting the importance of regular medical screenings and maintaining a healthy lifestyle.
cancer.zh: 早期发现癌症显著提高生存率，突出了定期体检和保持健康生活方式的重要性。

candidate.en: The job candidate demonstrated excellent communication skills and relevant experience throughout the entire interview process.
candidate.zh: 这位求职者在整个面试过程中表现出色，展现了优秀的沟通能力和相关经验。

candidates.en: The selection committee interviewed over fifty candidates before making their final decision on the new department head.
candidates.zh: 选拔委员会在决定新部门主管之前面试了五十多名候选人。

candle.en: During the power outage, the family lit candles to illuminate their home and maintain a sense of normalcy.
candle.zh: 在停电期间，这家人点燃蜡烛照亮他们的家，维持正常生活的感觉。

case.en: In this case, the government decided to implement stricter environmental regulations to address pollution concerns in major cities.
case.zh: 在这个案例中，政府决定实施更严格的环境法规来解决主要城市的污染问题。

case studies.en: Many universities now require students to complete case studies as part of their business administration programs.
case studies.zh: 现在许多大学要求学生完成案例研究作为工商管理课程的一部分。

case study.en: The case study examines how certain developing countries have successfully reduced poverty through education initiatives.
case study.zh: 这个案例研究探讨了某些发展中国家如何通过教育举措成功减少贫困。

cash.en: Although digital payments are popular, most elderly people still prefer using cash for local daily transactions.
cash.zh: 虽然数字支付很流行，但大多数老年人仍然喜欢使用现金进行本地日常交易。

cassette.en: The archaeologist discovered an old cassette tape in the ruins, which provided valuable insights into daily life centuries ago.
cassette.zh: 考古学家在废墟中发现了一盘旧磁带，这为了解几个世纪前的日常生活提供了宝贵的见解。

cast.en: The fishermen decided to cast their nets early in the morning to catch the freshest fish available at the market.
cast.zh: 渔民们决定一大早就撒网，以捕获市场上最新鲜的鱼。

castle.en: Visitors to Edinburgh can explore the famous castle, which has witnessed numerous significant historical events over centuries.
castle.zh: 爱丁堡的游客可以探索这座著名的城堡，几个世纪以来，这里见证了许多重大的历史事件。

castles.en: The tourist route passes through several ancient castles, each offering a unique perspective on regional history and architecture.
castles.zh: 这条旅游路线穿过几座古老的城堡，每一座都提供了该地区历史和建筑的不同视角。

casual.en: Despite their initial casual attitude toward climate change, many organizations are now taking concrete steps to reduce emissions.
casual.zh: 尽管最初对气候变化持漫不经心的态度，但许多组织现在正在采取具体措施减少排放。

casualty.en: The earthquake resulted in numerous casualties, prompting immediate international humanitarian aid to the affected region.
casualty.zh: 地震造成大量人员伤亡，促使国际社会立即向受灾地区提供人道主义援助。

car parks.en: Many cities have reduced the number of car parks in downtown areas to encourage residents to use public transportation instead.
car parks.zh: 许多城市减少了市中心地区的停车场数量，以鼓励居民使用公共交通工具。

carbon.en: Governments must implement policies to reduce carbon emissions from transportation and industry to combat the rising global temperature effectively.
carbon.zh: 政府必须实施政策以减少交通和工业的碳排放，从而有效应对全球气温上升。

carbon dioxide.en: Factories and power plants release significant amounts of carbon dioxide, which contributes to the greenhouse effect and global warming.
carbon dioxide.zh: 工厂和发电厂释放大量二氧化碳，这导致了温室效应和全球变暖。

carbon footprint.en: Individuals can significantly reduce their carbon footprint by choosing public transport, cycling, or walking instead of driving.
carbon footprint.zh: 个人可以通过选择公共交通、骑自行车或步行而不是开车来显著减少碳足迹。

carbon monoxide.en: Carbon monoxide detectors are essential safety devices in homes because this gas is invisible and potentially lethal.
carbon monoxide.zh: 一氧化碳探测器是家庭必备的安全设备，因为这种气体无色且可能致命。

card.en: Applicants must present a valid identification card at the reception desk before they are permitted to enter the building safely.
card.zh: 申请人必须在接待处出示有效身份证件，然后才被允许安全进入大楼。

card catalogue.en: Although most libraries now use digital databases, the traditional card catalogue system remains useful as a backup method.
card catalogue.zh: 尽管大多数图书馆现在使用数字数据库，但传统的卡片目录系统作为备用方法仍然有用。

cardiovascular.en: Regular cardiovascular exercises such as running and swimming can strengthen the heart and improve overall blood circulation.
cardiovascular.zh: 定期进行跑步和游泳等心血管锻炼可以增强心脏功能并改善整体血液循环。

care.en: The government should take greater care to protect vulnerable members of society, including the elderly and disabled.
care.zh: 政府应该更加注意保护社会的弱势群体，包括老年人和残疾人。

care for.en: Many young professionals find it challenging to care for their ageing parents while pursuing demanding careers.
care for.zh: 许多年轻专业人士在追求事业的同时发现照顾年迈的父母具有挑战性。

candy.en: Many parents express concern about the amount of candy their children consume, as excessive sugar intake can lead to serious health problems.
candy.zh: 许多家长对孩子们摄入的糖果量表示担忧，因为过量摄入糖分会导致严重的健康问题。

canisters.en: The expedition team stored their emergency supplies in waterproof canisters to protect them from the harsh mountain conditions.
canisters.zh: 探险队将应急物资存放在防水罐中，以保护它们免受恶劣山区环境的影响。

canoes.en: In remote river communities, canoes remain an essential means of transportation for fishing and moving goods between villages.
canoes.zh: 在偏远的河流社区，独木舟仍然是捕鱼和村庄之间运输货物的重要交通方式。

canopy.en: The thick forest canopy provides crucial habitat for numerous bird species and helps regulate the local climate.
canopy.zh: 茂密的森林树冠为众多鸟类提供重要的栖息地，并有助于调节当地气候。

canteen.en: University canteens should offer nutritious meal options to help students maintain healthy eating habits during their studies.
canteen.zh: 大学食堂应该提供营养丰富的膳食选择，以帮助学生在学习期间保持健康的饮食习惯。

canyon.en: The spectacular Grand Canyon attracts millions of visitors annually who come to witness its breathtaking natural formations.
canyon.zh: 壮观的科罗拉多大峡谷每年吸引数百万游客前来观赏其令人惊叹的自然地貌。

cap.en: The government has introduced a cap on university tuition fees to make higher education more accessible to all students.
cap.zh: 政府已出台大学学费上限政策，以使高等教育对所有学生更加负担得起。

capabilities.en: The new software demonstrates impressive capabilities in processing large datasets without compromising overall system performance speed.
capabilities.zh: 新软件在处理大型数据集方面展示了令人印象深刻的能力，且不损害整体系统性能速度。

capability.en: The new training programme aims to enhance employees' capability to adapt to rapidly changing workplace technologies.
capability.zh: 新的培训计划旨在提高员工适应快速变化的工作场所技术的能力。

capable.en: Modern computers are capable of processing vast amounts of information much faster than human beings ever could.
capable.zh: 现代计算机能够处理大量信息，速度远快于人类。

champion.en: The defending champion delivered an impressive performance that captivated the audience throughout the tournament.
champion.zh: 卫冕冠军在整个比赛中表现出色，吸引了观众的目光。

championship.en: Winning the championship requires not only physical strength but also mental resilience and strategic planning.
championship.zh: 赢得冠军不仅需要体力，还需要心理韧性和战略规划。

chance.en: There is a slim chance that the government will implement new policies to address climate change soon.
chance.zh: 政府很快实施新政策来解决气候变化的可能性很小。

chancellor.en: The university chancellor delivered an inspiring speech about the importance of innovation in higher education.
chancellor.zh: 大学校长发表了关于高等教育创新重要性的鼓舞人心的演讲。

change.en: Technological change has transformed the way people communicate, work, and access information in modern society.
change.zh: 技术变革改变了现代社会中人们的沟通、工作和获取信息的方式。

channel.en: Education serves as a vital channel for upward social mobility and economic improvement in modern societies.
channel.zh: 教育是现代社会中向上社会流动和经济改善的重要途径。

chaos.en: The sudden strike caused chaos in the transportation system, leaving thousands of commuters stranded during rush hour.
chaos.zh: 突然的罢工导致交通系统陷入混乱，使数千名通勤者在高峰时段滞留。

chapter.en: Completing this degree marks a new chapter in her life, opening doors to diverse international career opportunities.
chapter.zh: 完成这个学位标志着她生活中的新篇章，为多样的国际职业机会打开了大门。

chapters.en: The book comprises twelve distinct chapters, each focusing on different aspects of environmental conservation.
chapters.zh: 这本书包含十二个不同的章节，每个章节都关注环境保护的不同方面。

character.en: Developing strong moral character is essential for students to become responsible citizens within their local communities later.
character.zh: 培养坚强的道德品格对于学生日后成为当地社区中负责任的公民至关重要。

center.en: The shopping center offers a variety of retail stores and entertainment options for visitors throughout the day.
center.zh: 这个购物中心全天为游客提供各种零售商店和娱乐选择。

central.en: Access to central heating is considered a basic necessity for living in cold climate regions during winter.
central.zh: 获得中央供暖被认为是在冬季生活在寒冷气候地区的基本必需品。

century.en: Over the past century, technology has transformed every aspect of human life in unprecedented ways.
century.zh: 在过去的一个世纪里，技术以前所未有的方式改变了人类生活的方方面面。

ceramics.en: The museum's collection of ancient ceramics provides valuable insights into historical cultures and traditions.
ceramics.zh: 博物馆的古代陶瓷收藏为了解历史文化和传统提供了宝贵的见解。

cereals.en: Many health experts recommend starting the day with whole grain cereals for sustained energy throughout.
cereals.zh: 许多健康专家建议每天早上食用全谷物谷类食品以保持全天的持续能量。

ceremonies.en: Traditional ceremonies play an important role in preserving cultural heritage and community identity worldwide.
ceremonies.zh: 传统仪式在世界各地保护文化遗产和社区身份方面发挥着重要作用。

ceremony.en: The graduation ceremony marks an important milestone in every student's academic journey and future career.
ceremony.zh: 毕业典礼标志着每个学生学术旅程和未来职业生涯中的重要里程碑。

certain.en: Certain demographic groups are more vulnerable to economic fluctuations, requiring targeted support from social welfare programs during times of crisis.
certain.zh: 某些人口群体更容易受到经济波动的影响，需要在危机时期获得社会福利计划的针对性支持。

certainly.en: Government intervention is certainly necessary to regulate the excessive use of plastic materials in the manufacturing industry.
certainly.zh: 政府干预对于监管制造业中塑料材料的过度使用肯定是必要的。

certainty.en: With certainty, we can say that climate change poses one of the greatest challenges facing humanity today.
certainty.zh: 可以肯定地说，气候变化是当今人类面临的最大挑战之一。

celebrate.en: Many cultures choose to celebrate important milestones with elaborate ceremonies that bring communities together and strengthen social bonds.
celebrate.zh: 许多文化选择通过精心设计的仪式来庆祝重要里程碑，加强社会联系并团结社区。

celebrated.en: The city is celebrated for its rich historical heritage and vibrant cultural traditions that attract tourists worldwide.
celebrated.zh: 这座城市因其丰富的历史遗产和充满活力的文化传统而闻名，吸引着世界各地的游客。

celebration.en: The celebration of traditional festivals plays a crucial role in preserving cultural identity across generations.
celebration.zh: 传统节日的庆祝活动在代际传承中发挥着至关重要的作用，维护着文化认同。

cell.en: Scientists discovered that each human cell contains approximately three billion base pairs of DNA.
cell.zh: 科学家发现，每个人类细胞包含大约三十亿个DNA碱基对。

cells.en: Human body cells require a constant supply of nutrients and oxygen to function correctly and maintain health.
cells.zh: 人体细胞需要持续供应营养和氧气才能正常运作并保持健康。

cellular.en: The cellular phone has revolutionized communication, enabling people to connect instantly across great distances.
cellular.zh: 手机彻底改变了通讯方式，使人们能够即时跨越遥远的距离进行联系。

celsius.en: The temperature dropped to minus five degrees celsius overnight, causing widespread disruption to transportation systems.
celsius.zh: 夜间温度骤降至零下五摄氏度，导致交通系统大面积瘫痪。

cement.en: The discovery of cement revolutionized the construction industry, allowing architects to design more complex structures.
cement.zh: 水泥的发现彻底改变了建筑业，使建筑师能够设计更复杂的结构。

census.en: The government conducts a census every ten years to gather accurate population data for policy planning.
census.zh: 政府每十年进行一次人口普查，为政策规划收集准确的人口数据。

cent.en: Despite rising living costs, many families believe that every cent spent on education yields long-term benefits.
cent.zh: 尽管生活成本不断上涨，许多家庭认为花在教育上的每一分钱都会带来长期收益。

categorising.en: When categorising the survey responses, researchers must establish clear criteria to ensure consistency and reliability throughout the process.
categorising.zh: 在分类整理调查回复时，研究人员必须建立明确的标准以确保整个过程的一致性和可靠性。

categorization.en: The categorization of different species helps scientists understand evolutionary relationships and ecological roles within various habitats.
categorization.zh: 不同物种的分类有助于科学家理解各栖息地内的进化关系和生态作用。

categorized.en: The books in the university library are categorized by subject matter, publication date, and author nationality for easy access.
categorized.zh: 大学图书馆的书籍按主题、出版日期和作者国籍进行分类，以便于检索。

categorizes.en: The research report categorizes the main challenges facing urban development into economic, social, and environmental issues.
categorizes.zh: 该研究报告将城市发展面临的主要挑战分为经济、社会和环境问题。

categorizing.en: Categorizing information effectively is a crucial skill for students preparing for academic examinations and writing dissertations.
categorizing.zh: 有效地对信息进行分类是准备学术考试和撰写论文的学生的一项关键技能。

category.en: Applicants must select the appropriate category for their research before submitting papers to the international conference.
category.zh: 申请者在向国际会议提交论文前必须选择合适的研究类别。

cater.en: Modern universities strive to cater to diverse student needs through flexible course offerings and comprehensive support services.
cater.zh: 现代大学通过灵活的课程设置和全面的支持服务努力满足不同学生的需求。

cater for.en: The accommodation service at the hotel caters for guests with specific dietary requirements and special accessibility needs.
cater for.zh: 酒店的住宿服务为有特殊饮食要求和特殊无障碍需求的客人提供服务。

catering.en: The catering industry has experienced significant growth, creating numerous employment opportunities in urban areas worldwide.
catering.zh: 餐饮业经历了显著增长，在全球城市地区创造了众多就业机会。

caterpillars.en: The metamorphosis of caterpillars into butterflies demonstrates how natural development involves complete transformation through distinct stages.
caterpillars.zh: 毛毛虫变成蝴蝶的过程表明，自然发展如何通过不同的阶段实现完全变态。

certificate.en: Many employers require applicants to submit their educational certificates along with the application form before the deadline.
certificate.zh: 许多雇主要求申请者在截止日期前连同申请表一起提交他们的学历证书。

certification.en: Professional certification in fields such as accounting or information technology can significantly enhance one's career prospects.
certification.zh: 在会计或信息技术等领域的专业认证可以显著提升一个人的职业前景。

chain.en: A disruption in the supply chain can lead to significant delays and increased costs for consumers.
chain.zh: 供应链的中断可能导致消费者面临显著的延误和成本增加。

chain store.en: Chain stores often have the advantage of offering lower prices due to their ability to purchase goods in bulk.
chain store.zh: 连锁店由于能够批量采购商品，往往具有提供更低价格的优势。

chair.en: The committee decided to appoint a senior professor to chair the upcoming conference on environmental sustainability.
chair.zh: 委员会决定任命一位资深教授来主持即将举行的关于环境可持续性的会议。

chairman.en: The chairman of the board announced that the company would diversify its investments into emerging markets next year.
chairman.zh: 董事长宣布公司明年将把投资多元化扩展到新兴市场。

chalk.en: Despite the widespread use of digital devices in classrooms, many teachers still prefer using chalk for explaining complex mathematical concepts.
chalk.zh: 尽管数字设备在教室里被广泛使用，许多教师仍然更喜欢用粉笔来解释复杂的数学概念。

challenge.en: One significant challenge facing modern society today is the rapid increase in urban population density and traffic congestion.
challenge.zh: 当今现代社会面临的一个重大挑战是城市人口密度和交通拥堵的迅速增加。

challenged.en: The organization provides special training programs for young people who are intellectually challenged to help them develop essential skills.
challenged.zh: 该组织为有智力障碍的年轻人提供专门的培训项目，帮助他们培养基本技能。

chamber.en: The local chamber of commerce organized a networking event where small business owners could meet potential investors.
chamber.zh: 当地商会组织了一场社交活动，让小企业主能够与潜在投资者会面。

cat.en: Researchers studying the behavior of the cat in urban environments have discovered unexpected adaptations that allow them to thrive alongside humans in cities.
cat.zh: 研究城市环境中猫行为的研究人员发现了它们在城市中与人类共存时产生的意想不到的适应性变化。

catalog.en: The museum maintains a comprehensive catalog of its artifacts, enabling scholars to trace the historical significance of each exhibit with ease.
catalog.zh: 博物馆保存着藏品的完整目录，使学者们能够轻松追溯每件展品的历史意义。

catalogs.en: Modern online databases catalogs millions of research papers, making it considerably easier for academics to access relevant studies from around the world.
catalogs.zh: 现代在线数据库收录了数百万篇研究论文，使学者们能够更容易地获取世界各地的相关研究。

catastrophe.en: The environmental catastrophe caused by the oil spill devastated local ecosystems and posed significant challenges for wildlife conservation efforts in the region.
catastrophe.zh: 石油泄漏造成的环境灾难摧毁了当地生态系统，给该地区的野生动物保护工作带来了巨大挑战。

catch.en: It is difficult for new policies to catch the attention of busy policymakers without strong evidence.
catch.zh: 如果没有强有力的证据，新政策很难引起忙碌的政策制定者的注意。

categories.en: Consumers often sort products into different categories based on price, quality, and brand reputation before making a purchase decision.
categories.zh: 消费者在做出购买决定之前，通常会根据价格、质量和品牌声誉将产品分类。

categorisation.en: The categorisation of ancient artifacts requires extensive knowledge of historical periods, cultural contexts, and material composition to ensure accuracy in museum displays.
categorisation.zh: 古代文物的分类需要广泛的历史时期、文化背景和材料成分知识，以确保博物馆展览的准确性。

categorise.en: It is essential for researchers to categorise data systematically before conducting any statistical analysis, as this ensures the validity of their conclusions.
categorise.zh: 研究人员在进行任何统计分析之前，必须系统地对数据进行分类，因为这能确保其结论的有效性。

categorised.en: The study participants were categorised according to their age, income level, and educational background to ensure a representative sample in the research.
categorised.zh: 研究参与者按照年龄、收入水平和教育背景进行分类，以确保研究中样本的代表性。

categorises.en: The report categorises environmental problems into three main groups: pollution, habitat destruction, and overexploitation of natural resources for clarity.
categorises.zh: 该报告将环境问题清晰地分为三类：污染、栖息地破坏和自然资源的过度开发。

cathedral.en: The cathedral's intricate architecture attracts thousands of tourists annually, showcasing centuries of artistic heritage.
cathedral.zh: 大教堂复杂的建筑每年吸引成千上万的游客，展示了几个世纪的艺术遗产。

cattle.en: The cattle industry plays a significant role in the agricultural economy of many developing countries.
cattle.zh: 畜牧业在许多发展中国家的农业经济中扮演着重要角色。

cause.en: Air pollution can cause serious respiratory diseases, particularly among children and the elderly.
cause.zh: 空气污染可能导致严重的呼吸系统疾病，尤其是对儿童和老年人影响更大。

caution.en: Motorists should exercise caution when driving in foggy conditions to avoid accidents.
caution.zh: 司机在雾天驾驶时应该格外小心，以避免事故发生。

cautious.en: Investors should be cautious about putting all their money into a single high-risk venture.
cautious.zh: 投资者在把全部资金投入单一高风险项目时应该谨慎。

cave.en: Tourists often visit the limestone cave to admire the stunning stalactites, although authorities restrict access to protect the fragile natural environment.
cave.zh: 游客经常参观石灰岩洞穴以欣赏令人惊叹的钟乳石，尽管当局限制进入以保护脆弱的自然环境。

caves.en: Many caves around the world serve as natural habitats for endangered bat species.
caves.zh: 世界各地的许多洞穴是濒危蝙蝠物种的天然栖息地。

cavity.en: Regular dental check-ups can help prevent cavities from developing into more serious problems.
cavity.zh: 定期的牙科检查可以帮助防止蛀牙演变成更严重的问题。

cease.en: The company decided to cease production of the outdated model to focus on newer technology.
cease.zh: 该公司决定停止生产过时的型号，以便专注于更新的技术。

ceiling.en: The office has a very high ceiling, which creates an open and spacious working environment.
ceiling.zh: 这间办公室的天花板非常高，营造了一种开放宽敞的工作环境。

characterisation.en: The characterisation in this novel is so detailed that readers can easily visualise each character's personality and motivations.
characterisation.zh: 这部小说中的人物刻画非常细腻，读者可以轻松地想象出每个角色的性格和动机。

characterised.en: Victorian architecture is characterised by ornate details, steep roofs, and decorative gables that reflect the era's aesthetic values.
characterised.zh: 维多利亚式建筑的特点是装饰华丽、屋顶陡峭、装饰性山墙，体现了那个时代的美学价值观。

characteristic.en: One defining characteristic of successful leaders is their ability to communicate clearly and inspire confidence in others.
characteristic.zh: 成功领导者的一个定义性特征是他们能够清晰沟通并激发他人的信心。

characteristics.en: The physical characteristics of the building were preserved during the renovation to maintain its historical integrity.
characteristics.zh: 该建筑的物理特征在翻新期间得以保留，以维持其历史完整性。

charge.en: Some cities plan to charge drivers a fee for entering the center to reduce traffic congestion significantly.
charge.zh: 一些城市计划向进入中心的司机收费，以显著减少交通拥堵。

charity.en: Many students volunteer at local charity organisations during holidays to gain practical experience while helping those in need.
charity.zh: 许多学生在假期去当地慈善机构做志愿者，在帮助有需要的人的同时获得实践经验。

charm.en: Despite its industrial appearance, the old district has a unique charm that attracts tourists seeking authentic cultural experiences.
charm.zh: 尽管外观工业化，这个老城区有一种独特的魅力，吸引着寻求真实文化体验的游客。

chart.en: The chart illustrates the steady increase in university enrolment rates across developing countries over the past two decades.
chart.zh: 这张图表说明了过去二十年来发展中国家大学入学率的稳步增长。

chase.en: Rather than chase immediate profits, companies should focus on building sustainable business models that benefit society long-term.
chase.zh: 与其追逐短期利润，公司应该专注于建立有利于社会长期发展的可持续商业模式。

chat.en: During break time, students often chat with their classmates to discuss complex topics and exchange different perspectives.
chat.zh: 课间休息时，学生们经常和同学聊天，讨论复杂的话题并交流不同的观点。

chemicals.en: Many household cleaning products contain harmful chemicals that can damage the environment when disposed of incorrectly.
chemicals.zh: 许多家用清洁产品含有有害化学物质，如果处理不当会损害环境。

chemist.en: The chemist explained that the new medication required precise measurements to ensure patient safety and effectiveness.
chemist.zh: 药剂师解释说，这种新药需要精确的剂量以确保患者安全和疗效。

chemistry.en: Students who excel in chemistry often develop strong analytical skills that benefit them in various career paths.
chemistry.zh: 在化学方面表现优异的学生通常会培养出强大的分析能力，使他们在各种职业道路上受益。

cherish.en: As people grow older, they tend to cherish the time spent with family members more than material possessions.
cherish.zh: 随着人们年龄的增长，他们往往比物质财富更珍惜与家人共度的时光。

cherry.en: The farmer harvested cherries from his orchard during the summer months when the fruit reached peak ripeness.
cherry.zh: 农民在夏季果实达到最佳成熟度时从果园收获樱桃。

chess.en: Playing chess helps children develop critical thinking skills and strategic planning abilities that are useful in academic subjects in the future.
chess.zh: 下棋有助于儿童培养批判性思维技能和战略计划能力，这在未来的学术科目中很有用。

chest.en: The doctor used a stethoscope to listen to the patient's chest sounds as part of the routine examination.
chest.zh: 医生用听诊器作为常规检查的一部分来听诊患者的胸部声音。

chicken.en: Chicken is one of the most popular sources of protein worldwide, and it can be prepared in numerous culinary styles.
chicken.zh: 鸡肉是全世界最受欢迎的蛋白质来源之一，可以用多种烹饪方式制作。

chicks.en: The mother bird protects her chicks from predators by keeping them hidden in the nest during dangerous weather.
chicks.zh: 母鸟在危险的天气里把小鸟藏在巢中以保护它们免受捕食者的伤害。

chief.en: The chief reason for accelerated climate change is the excessive burning of fossil fuels by industries.
chief.zh: 气候加速变化的主要原因是工业过度燃烧化石燃料。

chatting.en: Many students enjoy chatting online with friends from different countries during their free time.
chatting.zh: 许多学生喜欢在空闲时间与来自不同国家的朋友在线聊天。

cheap.en: While cheap products may save money initially, they often need to be replaced more frequently.
cheap.zh: 虽然便宜的产品最初可能省钱，但通常需要更频繁地更换。

cheaper.en: Living in the suburbs is generally cheaper than residing in the city centre for most families.
cheaper.zh: 对于大多数家庭来说，住在郊区通常比住在市中心更便宜。

cheapest.en: The cheapest flights are usually available during off-peak seasons, typically in winter months.
cheapest.zh: 最便宜的航班通常在淡季（通常是冬季）才有。

cheat.en: Students who cheat on exams not only violate academic integrity but also miss valuable learning opportunities.
cheat.zh: 考试作弊的学生不仅违反了学术诚信，也错过了宝贵的学习机会。

check.en: Teachers should regularly check students' understanding before moving on to new topics.
check.zh: 老师应该在进入新话题前定期检查学生的理解情况。

check in.en: Passengers must check in at least two hours before their international flight departs.
check in.zh: 乘客必须在国际航班起飞前至少两小时办理登机手续。

check out.en: Guests are required to check out of the hotel by noon, although late checkout may be available.
check out.zh: 客人必须在中午之前退房，尽管可能可以申请延迟退房。

check-in.en: Online check-in has become increasingly popular among travellers seeking to save time at airports.
check-in.zh: 在线值机在寻求节省机场时间的旅客中变得越来越受欢迎。

check-up.en: Regular medical check-ups are essential for early detection of potential health problems.
check-up.zh: 定期体检对于及早发现潜在健康问题至关重要。

choice.en: Making the right choice about your career path requires careful consideration of your skills and interests.
choice.zh: 做出正确的职业选择需要仔细考虑你的技能和兴趣。

choices.en: The choices we make in our daily lives can have significant long-term impacts on the environment.
choices.zh: 我们在日常生活中做出的选择会对环境产生重大的长期影响。

cholesterol.en: Medical experts recommend reducing foods high in cholesterol to maintain cardiovascular health.
cholesterol.zh: 医学专家建议减少高胆固醇食物的摄入以维持心血管健康。

choose.en: Students must choose their university courses based on their academic strengths and career aspirations.
choose.zh: 学生必须根据自己的学术优势和职业抱负来选择大学课程。

chop.en: In many traditional recipes, the cook needs to chop vegetables into small, uniform pieces for even cooking.
chop.zh: 在许多传统食谱中，厨师需要将蔬菜切成大小均匀的小块以确保烹饪均匀。

chores.en: Assigning household chores to children can help them develop a sense of responsibility and time management.
chores.zh: 让孩子承担家务可以帮助他们培养责任感和时间管理能力。

chromosome.en: Scientists have identified specific genes located on chromosomes that determine certain inherited characteristics.
chromosome.zh: 科学家已经识别出位于染色体上决定某些遗传特征的特定基因。

chronic.en: Chronic stress without proper management can lead to serious physical and mental health problems.
chronic.zh: 长期压力如果得不到适当管理，可能会导致严重的身体和心理健康问题。

chunks.en: The lengthy report was divided into manageable chunks to make it easier for readers to digest the information.
chunks.zh: 这份冗长的报告被分成易管理的部分，以便读者更容易理解信息。

church.en: The medieval church in the town centre has been standing for over 500 years and attracts many tourists.
church.zh: 镇中心的这座中世纪教堂已矗立了500多年，吸引了众多游客。

civic.en: Civic education should be a mandatory part of the school curriculum to prepare young people for responsible citizenship.
civic.zh: 公民教育应该成为学校课程的必修部分，以培养年轻人成为负责任的公民。

civil.en: Maintaining civil discourse is essential when discussing controversial topics such as immigration or climate change.
civil.zh: 在讨论移民或气候变化等争议性话题时，保持文明的讨论方式至关重要。

civilian.en: The government has implemented new programmes to support civilian populations affected by the recent natural disaster.
civilian.zh: 政府已实施新方案，以支持受近期自然灾害影响的平民。

civilians.en: International humanitarian law strictly prohibits military forces from targeting civilians during armed conflicts.
civilians.zh: 国际人道主义法律严格禁止军队在武装冲突中以平民为目标。

civilisation.en: The ancient civilisation left behind remarkable architectural structures that continue to attract historians and tourists from around the world today.
civilisation.zh: 这个古代文明留下了引人注目的建筑结构，至今仍继续吸引着来自世界各地的历史学家和游客。

civilisations.en: Historians compare how different civilisations developed unique systems of government throughout history.
civilisations.zh: 历史学家比较不同文明如何在历史发展中形成独特的政府制度。

civility.en: The lack of civility in online discussions often leads to misunderstandings and unnecessary conflicts.
civility.zh: 网络讨论中缺乏文明礼貌常常导致误解和不必要的冲突。

civilization.en: The collapse of the Mayan civilization remains a subject of intense scholarly debate and research.
civilization.zh: 玛雅文明的崩溃仍然是学术界激烈辩论和研究的主题。

civilizations.en: Many ancient civilizations flourished along major rivers because of the fertile soil and reliable water supply.
civilizations.zh: 许多古代文明在主要河流沿岸繁荣发展，因为那里土壤肥沃、水源充足。

civilize.en: Missionaries in the colonial era believed they could civilize indigenous populations through education and religious conversion.
civilize.zh: 殖民时代的传教士认为他们可以通过教育和宗教皈依来教化土著居民。

checking account.en: I opened a checking account at the local bank to manage my daily expenses and receive my salary.
checking account.zh: 我在本地银行开了一个活期账户来管理日常开支和领取工资。

checklist.en: Before traveling abroad, I always prepare a comprehensive checklist to ensure I do not forget essential items.
checklist.zh: 在出国旅行前，我总是准备一份全面的清单，以确保不会忘记必需品。

checkout.en: The hotel checkout time is at noon, so we need to vacate our room and return the key by then.
checkout.zh: 酒店的退房时间是中午，所以我们需要在那个时候退房并归还钥匙。

checkup.en: Regular medical checkups are essential for maintaining good health and detecting potential problems early.
checkup.zh: 定期体检对于保持健康和及早发现潜在问题至关重要。

cheek.en: The child had rosy cheeks after running around in the playground under the warm afternoon sun.
cheek.zh: 在温暖的午后阳光下绕着操场跑完后，这个孩子的脸颊红扑扑的。

cheerful.en: Despite facing numerous challenges, she maintained a cheerful disposition throughout her university years.
cheerful.zh: 尽管面临重重挑战，她在整个大学期间都保持着开朗的性格。

cheese.en: Cheese production is an important industry in France and contributes significantly to the national economy.
cheese.zh: 奶酪生产在法国是一项重要产业，为国民经济做出重大贡献。

chef.en: The renowned chef demonstrated how to prepare traditional dishes using locally sourced organic ingredients.
chef.zh: 这位著名厨师展示了如何使用当地采购的有机食材烹制传统菜肴。

chefs.en: Many professional chefs attend culinary schools to refine their cooking techniques and expand their expertise.
chefs.zh: 许多专业厨师进入烹饪学校来提高烹饪技术并扩展专业知识。

chemical.en: Industrial waste often contains harmful chemical substances that can pollute local water supplies if not managed properly.
chemical.zh: 工业废物通常含有有害化学物质，如果管理不当，可能会污染当地供水。

cigar.en: Many countries have implemented strict regulations prohibiting people from smoking cigars in public places due to health concerns.
cigar.zh: 许多国家实施了严格的规定，禁止人们在公共场所吸雪茄，因为这涉及到健康问题。

cigarette.en: The government has significantly increased taxes on cigarettes to discourage young people from taking up smoking.
cigarette.zh: 政府大幅提高了香烟税，以阻止年轻人开始吸烟。

cigarettes.en: Studies have shown that second-hand smoke from cigarettes can cause serious respiratory problems for non-smokers.
cigarettes.zh: 研究表明，来自香烟的二手烟会对非吸烟者造成严重的呼吸系统问题。

cinema.en: The cinema industry has experienced significant changes due to the rise of streaming platforms in recent years.
cinema.zh: 近年来，由于流媒体平台的兴起，电影行业经历了重大变化。

circle.en: Poverty often creates a vicious circle where lack of education leads to low income and further limits future opportunities.
circle.zh: 贫困常常造成一个恶性循环，缺乏教育导致低收入，进而限制未来的机会。

circuit.en: The electrical circuit must be carefully designed to ensure safety and prevent overheating when multiple high-power appliances are used simultaneously.
circuit.zh: 电路必须精心设计以确保安全，并防止在同时使用多个大功率电器时过热。

circular.en: The concept of a circular economy encourages businesses to minimize waste by reusing and recycling materials.
circular.zh: 循环经济的理念鼓励企业通过再利用和回收材料来最大限度地减少浪费。

circulating.en: Rumors circulating on social media can sometimes spread misinformation faster than verified news reports.
circulating.zh: 社交媒体上流传的谣言有时比经过核实的新闻报道传播错误信息的速度更快。

circulation.en: Regular exercise is essential for maintaining good blood circulation throughout the human body.
circulation.zh: 定期锻炼对于维持人体良好的血液循环至关重要。

circumstance.en: Under no circumstance should students submit assignments that contain plagiarized content from other sources.
circumstance.zh: 在任何情况下，学生都不应该提交包含抄袭内容的作业。

circumstances.en: Under no circumstances should students be allowed to use mobile phones during important examinations at school.
circumstances.zh: 在任何情况下，都不应允许学生在学校的重要考试期间使用手机。

cite.en: When writing academic essays, students must cite all sources properly to avoid plagiarism and strengthen their arguments.
cite.zh: 在撰写学术论文时，学生必须正确引用所有资料来源，以避免抄袭并加强论证。

cited.en: The researcher cited several recent studies to support the argument that climate change is accelerating faster than previously expected globally.
cited.zh: 研究人员引用了几项最近的研究来支持气候变化正在比之前预期的全球加速的论点。

citizen.en: Every responsible citizen should actively participate in community activities and contribute to the development of local society.
citizen.zh: 每个负责任的公民都应该积极参与社区活动，为当地社会的发展做出贡献。

citizens.en: Modern governments must address the growing concerns of citizens regarding environmental protection and sustainable development.
citizens.zh: 现代政府必须解决公民对环境保护和可持续发展的日益增长的关切。

citizenship.en: Many immigrants view obtaining citizenship in their adopted country as a significant milestone in their personal journey.
citizenship.zh: 许多移民将获得移居国的公民身份视为个人旅程中的重要里程碑。

citrus.en: Farmers in warmer climates often cultivate citrus fruits such as oranges and lemons for export to international markets.
citrus.zh: 气候较温暖地区的农民通常种植橙子和柠檬等柑橘类水果以供出口到国际市场。

city.en: Living in a city can offer better career opportunities, but many people find the high cost of living challenging to manage.
city.zh: 生活在城市可以提供更好的职业机会，但许多人发现高昂的生活成本难以应付。

city centre.en: The city centre typically contains the most shops, restaurants, and entertainment venues, attracting visitors from all areas.
city centre.zh: 城市中心通常拥有最多的商店、餐厅和娱乐场所，吸引来自各地的游客。

city gardens.en: City gardens provide urban residents with valuable green spaces where they can grow vegetables and escape daily stress.
city gardens.zh: 城市花园为城市居民提供宝贵的绿色空间，让他们在那里种植蔬菜并缓解日常压力。

chief executive.en: The chief executive of the multinational company announced significant restructuring plans during yesterday's press conference.
chief executive.zh: 这家跨国公司的首席执行官在昨天的新闻发布会上宣布了重大重组计划。

child.en: Research has demonstrated that a child's early educational experiences can profoundly influence their long-term academic achievement.
child.zh: 研究表明，儿童的早期教育经历会深刻影响他们长期的学业成就。

childcare.en: The government should allocate more resources to affordable childcare programs to assist parents returning to the workforce.
childcare.zh: 政府应该为平价托儿项目投入更多资源，以帮助重返职场的父母。

childhood.en: Many adults believe that a stable and happy childhood is essential for developing strong emotional resilience in subsequent adulthood.
childhood.zh: 许多成年人认为，稳定快乐的童年对于在随后的成年期发展强烈的情感韧性至关重要。

children.en: Recent studies suggest that children who regularly engage in outdoor activities develop stronger problem-solving skills.
children.zh: 最近的研究表明，经常参与户外活动的儿童会培养出更强的解决问题的能力。

chill.en: After months of intensive preparation for examinations, students desperately need time to simply chill and unwind.
chill.zh: 经过数月的紧张备考，学生们迫切需要时间来放松和减压。

chimpanzees.en: Researchers observing wild chimpanzees in their natural habitat have discovered remarkable cultural traditions passed between generations.
chimpanzees.zh: 在野外观察黑猩猩的研究人员发现了代代相传的显著文化传统。

chimps.en: Like humans, chimps demonstrate sophisticated social structures including hierarchy, cooperation, and even political alliances.
chimps.zh: 与人类一样，黑猩猩表现出复杂的社会结构，包括等级制度、合作甚至政治联盟。

chip.en: The miniaturization of computer chip technology has fundamentally transformed how modern societies process and share information.
chip.zh: 计算机芯片技术的小型化从根本上改变了现代社会处理和共享信息的方式。

chocolate.en: Although chocolate is enjoyed worldwide for its rich taste, excessive consumption may contribute to various health complications.
chocolate.zh: 尽管巧克力因其浓郁的口感而受到全球喜爱，但过度食用可能导致各种健康问题。

classes.en: Many university classes now incorporate online components, allowing students to access lecture materials at their own convenience.
classes.zh: 许多大学课程现在都融入了在线内容，让学生能够按自己的节奏访问讲座材料。

classic.en: This classic novel remains popular among students because it explores universal themes of love and loss that resonate across different generations.
classic.zh: 这本经典小说在学生中依然受欢迎，因为它探讨了在不同世代间产生共鸣的关于爱与失落的普遍主题。

classical.en: Students often study classical music compositions in school to learn deeply about European history and culture.
classical.zh: 学生经常在学校学习古典音乐作品，以深入了解欧洲历史和文化。

classical music.en: Research has shown that listening to classical music can improve concentration and enhance cognitive performance.
classical music.zh: 研究表明，听古典音乐可以提高专注力并增强认知表现。

classification.en: The classification of species is essential for biologists to understand evolutionary relationships among organisms.
classification.zh: 物种分类对生物学家理解生物之间的进化关系至关重要。

classified.en: Some classified government documents were released to the public after several decades of being sealed.
classified.zh: 一些被列为机密的政府文件在封存数十年后向公众公布。

classify.en: Scientists must classify new discoveries according to established criteria to maintain consistency in research.
classify.zh: 科学家必须根据既定标准对新发现进行分类，以保持研究的一致性。

classmates.en: My classmates and I formed a study group to prepare for the upcoming examination more effectively.
classmates.zh: 我和同学们组建了一个学习小组，以便更有效地准备即将到来的考试。

classroom.en: Modern classroom environments increasingly utilize interactive technology to engage students in active learning.
classroom.zh: 现代课堂环境越来越多地使用互动技术来让学生参与主动学习。

clause.en: Before signing the contract, it is crucial to read every clause carefully to understand your obligations.
clause.zh: 在签合同之前，仔细阅读每个条款以了解你的义务至关重要。

coat.en: She put on her warm winter coat before stepping out into the freezing temperatures outside.
coat.zh: 她在出门前穿上了暖和的冬装外套，以抵御外面的严寒天气。

coats.en: The department store offers a wide variety of coats, ranging from lightweight jackets to heavy-duty parkas.
coats.zh: 这家百货商店提供各种款式的外套，从轻薄的夹克到厚实的派克大衣应有尽有。

cocktail.en: At the welcome reception, guests were offered an assortment of fruit cocktails and refreshing beverages.
cocktail.zh: 在欢迎招待会上，客人们得到了各种水果鸡尾酒和清爽饮料的款待。

cocoa.en: Many children enjoy drinking a warm cup of cocoa with marshmallows during cold winter evenings.
cocoa.zh: 许多孩子喜欢在寒冷的冬夜喝上一杯加棉花糖的热可可。

coconut.en: The coconut is a versatile tropical fruit that provides water, milk, oil, and nutritious flesh.
coconut.zh: 椰子是一种用途广泛的热带水果，提供水分、牛奶、油和营养丰富的果肉。

coconuts.en: Local vendors along the beach sell fresh coconuts, providing tourists with hydration and natural refreshment.
coconuts.zh: 海滩边的当地小贩出售新鲜椰子，为游客提供水分和天然的清凉饮品。

code.en: Learning to write computer code is becoming an essential skill for students in the modern digital economy.
code.zh: 学习编写计算机代码正成为现代数字经济中学生的必备技能。

coded.en: The ancient manuscript was coded in a mysterious language that historians struggled to decipher for decades.
coded.zh: 这份古代手稿用一种神秘的语言编码，历史学家们几十年来一直努力破译。

codes.en: Modern encryption codes protect sensitive personal information from unauthorized access and cyber threats.
codes.zh: 现代加密代码保护敏感的个人信息免受未经授权的访问和网络威胁。

codification.en: The codification of traditional practices into formal laws helped preserve cultural heritage for future generations.
codification.zh: 将传统习俗编纂成正式法律有助于为子孙后代保留文化遗产。

client.en: The lawyer advised her client to reach an out-of-court settlement to save both time and money.
client.zh: 律师建议她的当事人达成庭外和解以节省时间和金钱。

clients.en: Many clients prefer to consult professionals who can offer personalized services tailored to their specific needs.
clients.zh: 许多客户更喜欢咨询能够提供满足其特定需求的个性化服务的专业人士。

cliffs.en: The dramatic cliffs along the coastline attract numerous tourists who come to admire the stunning natural scenery.
cliffs.zh: 海岸线上壮观的悬崖吸引了众多游客前来欣赏迷人的自然风光。

climate.en: Global warming is altering the climate patterns worldwide, leading to more frequent extreme weather events and rising sea levels.
climate.zh: 全球变暖正在改变全球气候模式，导致更频繁的极端天气事件和海平面上升。

climate change.en: Governments worldwide are implementing various measures to combat climate change and reduce carbon emissions.
climate change.zh: 世界各国政府正在实施各种措施来应对气候变化并减少碳排放。

climatic.en: Severe climatic conditions often disrupt transportation systems and cause significant economic losses for many local businesses.
climatic.zh: 严重的气候条件经常破坏交通系统，并给许多当地企业造成重大经济损失。

climb.en: If you want to climb the career ladder successfully, you need to continuously develop your professional skills.
climb.zh: 如果你想成功晋升，你需要不断培养自己的专业技能。

climbing.en: The climbing gym has become increasingly popular among young people looking for a fun way to stay fit.
climbing.zh: 攀岩馆在寻找有趣健身方式的年轻人中变得越来越受欢迎。

clinic.en: The new dental clinic opened last month, providing modern facilities and affordable treatment for local residents.
clinic.zh: 新牙科诊所于上个月开业，为当地居民提供现代化设施和可负担的治疗服务。

clinical.en: The clinical trial demonstrated significant improvements in patient recovery rates after the new treatment was administered successfully.
clinical.zh: 临床试验表明，在成功实施新治疗后，患者的恢复率有了显著提高。

civilized.en: In a truly civilized society, people should respect each other's differences and work together harmoniously.
civilized.zh: 在一个真正文明的社会中，人们应该尊重彼此的差异并和谐地合作。

civilizes.en: Education civilizes individuals by teaching them moral values and social responsibilities from an early age.
civilizes.zh: 教育通过从小教导个人道德价值观和社会责任来使他们文明化。

civilizing.en: Travel can have a civilizing effect on people by exposing them to different cultures and perspectives.
civilizing.zh: 旅行可以通过让人们接触不同的文化和观点而产生教化作用。

claim.en: Some experts claim that artificial intelligence will eventually replace most human jobs in the near future.
claim.zh: 一些专家声称，人工智能最终将在不久的将来取代大多数人类工作。

clapping.en: The audience showed their enthusiastic appreciation with loud clapping after the orchestra finished the beautiful symphony.
clapping.zh: 观众在乐团精彩演出结束后以热烈的掌声表达他们的赞赏。

clarification.en: The speaker requested clarification from the examiner about the ambiguous question in the listening test.
clarification.zh: 演讲者要求考官澄清听力测试中模棱两可的问题。

clarify.en: Students should clarify any doubts they have before the exam to avoid unnecessary confusion and mistakes.
clarify.zh: 学生在考试前应该澄清任何疑问，以避免不必要的困惑和错误。

clarinet.en: My neighbor practices playing the clarinet every evening, and the beautiful music often drifts into my apartment.
clarinet.zh: 我的邻居每天晚上练习单簧管演奏，美妙的音乐经常飘进我的公寓。

clash.en: There was a violent clash between protesters and police in the city center yesterday evening, resulting in injuries.
clash.zh: 昨天晚上，市中心发生了抗议者和警察之间的暴力冲突，导致人员受伤。

class.en: The new employee quickly rose to the top class of performers in the company through her dedication and skill.
class.zh: 这位新员工通过她的奉献精神和技能，迅速成为公司表现最优秀的员工之一。

co-operative.en: A co-operative approach to problem-solving often yields better results than working in isolation.
co-operative.zh: 合作解决问题的方法往往比单独工作产生更好的结果。

co-worker.en: My co-worker generously shared his research notes, which significantly improved my analysis.
co-worker.zh: 我的同事慷慨地分享了他的研究笔记，这大大改进了我的分析。

coach.en: A professional coach can help athletes improve their performance by providing personalized training plans and mental support.
coach.zh: 专业教练可以通过提供个性化的训练计划和精神支持来帮助运动员提高表现。

coaches.en: Many sports teams are actively recruiting experienced coaches to enhance their training programmes.
coaches.zh: 许多运动队正在积极招募有经验的教练来加强他们的训练计划。

coal.en: Although coal has powered industrial development for centuries, its environmental impact is now widely recognised.
coal.zh: 尽管煤炭几个世纪以来为工业发展提供了动力，但现在人们普遍认识到其对环境的影响。

coalition.en: The coalition of environmental organisations successfully advocated for stricter regulations on industrial emissions.
coalition.zh: 环保组织联盟成功倡导对工业排放实施更严格的监管。

coarse.en: The coarse fabric of the traditional clothing was well-suited to the region's hot and dusty climate.
coarse.zh: 传统服装的粗糙面料非常适合该地区炎热多尘的气候。

coast.en: The government plans to protect the coast from erosion caused by rising sea levels and severe weather conditions.
coast.zh: 政府计划保护海岸免受海平面上升和恶劣天气条件引起的侵蚀。

coastal.en: Many coastal cities are facing significant risks due to rising sea levels caused by global warming.
coastal.zh: 由于全球变暖导致海平面上升，许多沿海城市正面临重大风险。

coastline.en: Erosion along the coastline has forced several coastal communities to relocate their homes further inland.
coastline.zh: 海岸线的侵蚀迫使几个沿海社区将房屋搬迁到更远的内陆地区。

cloakroom.en: Many schools and restaurants provide a cloakroom where visitors can store their coats and bags securely.
cloakroom.zh: 许多学校和餐厅提供衣帽间，访客可以安全地存放外套和包。

clock.en: The clock on the wall showed that the exam would begin in precisely thirty minutes.
clock.zh: 墙上的时钟显示考试将在恰好三十分钟后开始。

clone.en: Although scientists have successfully cloned animals, the ethical implications of cloning humans remain highly controversial.
clone.zh: 尽管科学家已经成功克隆动物，但克隆人类的伦理问题仍然存在极大争议。

close.en: Living in close proximity to public transportation can significantly reduce commuting time and expenses.
close.zh: 居住在公共交通附近可以显著减少通勤时间和费用。

closed.en: Due to extensive renovations, the historical library will remain closed to the public for the next six months.
closed.zh: 由于大规模翻修，这座历史悠久的图书馆将在接下来六个月内不对公众开放。

closely.en: Researchers must monitor the experiment closely to ensure that all variables are controlled throughout the entire investigation process.
closely.zh: 研究人员必须密切关注实验，以确保在整个调查过程中控制所有变量。

cloth.en: The traditional method of producing cloth from natural fibers has been preserved in several remote villages.
cloth.zh: 用天然纤维生产布料的传统方法在几个偏远的村庄得到保留。

clothes.en: In some cultures, people change their clothes multiple times daily to mark different occasions and activities.
clothes.zh: 在某些文化中，人们每天换好几次衣服以区分不同的场合和活动。

clothing.en: The fast fashion clothing industry generates enormous amounts of waste each year, contributing to environmental degradation.
clothing.zh: 快速时尚服装业每年产生大量废物，导致环境恶化。

cloud.en: The dark clouds gathering on the horizon suggested that a severe storm was approaching rapidly.
cloud.zh: 地平线上聚集的乌云表明一场猛烈的暴风雨正在迅速逼近。

clouds.en: Scientists study how pollution affects the formation of clouds, which plays a vital role in regulating the Earth's temperature and climate.
clouds.zh: 科学家研究污染如何影响云的形成，这在调节地球温度和气候方面起着至关重要的作用。

cloudy.en: On cloudy days, many students feel less motivated to study outdoors, preferring the quiet atmosphere of indoor libraries.
cloudy.zh: 在多云的天气里，许多学生对户外学习的动力不足，更喜欢室内图书馆的安静环境。

club.en: Joining the drama club helped Sarah improve her public speaking skills and gain considerable confidence in presentations.
club.zh: 加入戏剧社帮助萨拉提高了公开演讲技巧，并在演讲中获得了极大的自信。

clubhouse.en: The new university clubhouse provides students with comfortable meeting spaces for various extracurricular activities.
clubhouse.zh: 新的大学社团会所为学生提供舒适的空间，用于开展各种课外活动。

clubroom.en: The photography clubroom is equipped with professional editing computers that all members can reserve in advance.
clubroom.zh: 摄影社团活动室配备了专业编辑电脑，所有成员都可以提前预约使用。

clubs.en: Universities encourage students to participate in various clubs to develop leadership skills and expand social networks.
clubs.zh: 大学鼓励学生参加各种社团组织，以培养领导能力并扩展社交网络。

clue.en: The detective found no useful clue at the crime scene, making the investigation extremely challenging for the police.
clue.zh: 侦探在犯罪现场没有找到有用的线索，这使得警方调查变得极其困难。

clues.en: Researchers examine ancient fossils to find crucial clues regarding the evolutionary history of early human ancestors.
clues.zh: 研究人员检查古代化石，以寻找有关早期人类祖先进化历史的关键线索。

clumsy.en: The clumsy waiter accidentally knocked over a tray of dishes, causing an embarrassing situation in the restaurant.
clumsy.zh: 那个笨手笨脚的服务员不小心打翻了一托盘盘子，在餐厅造成了一个尴尬的场面。

clusters.en: The data shows that houses in certain clusters tend to have higher property values than isolated buildings.
clusters.zh: 数据显示，某些区域的房屋群往往比独立建筑的房产价值更高。

clay.en: The artist shaped the soft clay into an intricate vase, carefully molding each curve by hand.
clay.zh: 艺术家将柔软的陶土塑造成一个复杂的花瓶，仔细地用手塑造每一条曲线。

clean.en: The government has implemented stricter regulations to ensure that our rivers remain clean and unpolluted.
clean.zh: 政府实施了更严格的法规，以确保我们的河流保持清洁且不受污染。

cleaned.en: Once the data had been cleaned and organized, the researchers identified clear patterns in consumer behavior.
cleaned.zh: 数据经过清理和整理后，研究人员识别出了消费者行为的清晰模式。

cleaner.en: The office cleaner arrived early every morning to ensure that all workspaces were tidy before staff arrived.
cleaner.zh: 办公室清洁工每天早晨早早到达，以确保员工到达前所有工作空间都整洁有序。

clear.en: It is clear that renewable energy will play a vital role in addressing climate change in coming decades.
clear.zh: 很明显，可再生能源将在未来几十年应对气候变化方面发挥至关重要的作用。

clearance.en: The shop offered a clearance sale with discounts of up to 70 percent, attracting bargain hunters.
clearance.zh: 这家商店提供清仓大甩卖，折扣高达70%，吸引了大量寻求便宜商品的顾客。

clearly.en: The speaker clearly demonstrated how sustainable farming practices can increase yields while protecting ecosystems.
clearly.zh: 演讲者清楚地展示了可持续农业实践如何在保护生态系统的同时提高产量。

clerk.en: My cousin works as a bank clerk and is responsible for processing customer transactions and answering inquiries.
clerk.zh: 我的表兄是一名银行职员，负责处理客户交易和回答咨询。

clever.en: The clever marketing campaign used social media influencers to effectively promote the product to young audiences.
clever.zh: 这个精明的营销活动利用社交媒体影响者有效地向年轻观众推广产品。

click.en: Visitors can simply click on the website to book tickets online, avoiding the long queues at the venue.
click.zh: 游客可以简单地点击网站在线预订门票，避免在场馆排长队。

commission.en: The government decided to commission a detailed report on the economic impact of the new policy changes.
commission.zh: 政府决定委托一份关于新政策变化经济影响的详细报告。

commissioned.en: The government has commissioned a new report on climate change to assess the effectiveness of current environmental policies.
commissioned.zh: 政府委托撰写了一份关于气候变化的新报告，以评估当前环境政策的有效性。

commissioner.en: The education commissioner announced that all schools must implement new safety guidelines starting from next semester.
commissioner.zh: 教育专员宣布，所有学校必须从下学期开始实施新的安全指南。

commissioners.en: The commissioners met to discuss the proposed urban development project and its potential impact on local communities.
commissioners.zh: 专员们开会讨论了拟议的城市开发项目及其对当地社区的潜在影响。

commissioning.en: The commissioning of new public transportation systems has significantly reduced traffic congestion in major cities.
commissioning.zh: 新公共交通系统的投入使用大幅减少了主要城市的交通拥堵。

commissions.en: Many artists earn a living through commissions, creating custom pieces for private collectors and corporate clients.
commissions.zh: 许多艺术家通过接受委托谋生，为私人收藏家和公司客户创作定制作品。

commit.en: Students must commit sufficient time to studying if they wish to achieve high bands in their examinations.
commit.zh: 学生必须投入足够的时间学习，如果希望在考试中取得高分。

commitment.en: Building a successful career requires commitment, perseverance, and a willingness to continuously develop new skills.
commitment.zh: 建立成功的职业生涯需要奉献精神、毅力和不断学习新技能的意愿。

commitments.en: Despite his many professional commitments, he always makes time to volunteer at the local community center on weekends.
commitments.zh: 尽管他有诸多职业承诺，他总是会在周末抽出时间在当地社区中心做志愿者。

commits.en: The company commits substantial resources to research and development each year to maintain its competitive advantage.
commits.zh: 该公司每年投入大量资源用于研发，以保持其竞争优势。

come from.en: Many of the students in this university come from rural areas, which gives them a unique perspective on education.
come from.zh: 这所大学的许多学生来自农村地区，这赋予了他们独特的教育视角。

come up with.en: The committee needs to come up with practical solutions to address the growing housing shortage in major cities.
come up with.zh: 委员会需要想出切实可行的解决方案，以解决主要城市日益严重的住房短缺问题。

comedy.en: Watching comedy shows can be an effective way to reduce stress and improve overall mental well-being.
comedy.zh: 看喜剧节目是减轻压力和改善整体心理健康的一种有效方式。

comet.en: Scientists use advanced telescopes to track the trajectory of each comet passing through our solar system.
comet.zh: 科学家使用先进的天文望远镜来追踪经过太阳系的每颗彗星的轨迹。

comets.en: Comets are celestial bodies composed mainly of ice, dust, and rock that develop spectacular tails near the sun.
comets.zh: 彗星是由冰、尘埃和岩石组成的天体，接近太阳时会形成壮观的尾巴。

comfort.en: The comfort of passengers should be the top priority when designing public transportation systems in urban areas.
comfort.zh: 在设计城市地区的公共交通系统时，乘客的舒适度应该是首要考虑因素。

comfortable.en: Creating a comfortable learning environment is essential for students to develop their critical thinking skills effectively.
comfortable.zh: 创造一个舒适的学习环境对学生有效发展批判性思维能力至关重要。

command.en: Effective managers must have the ability to command respect from their team members while remaining approachable.
command.zh: 有效的管理者必须有能力赢得团队成员的尊重，同时保持平易近人。

commands.en: The study found that soldiers who receive clear commands perform significantly better in complex military operations.
commands.zh: 研究发现，在复杂军事行动中，收到明确命令的士兵表现明显更好。

commemorate.en: Every year on this date, citizens gather at the memorial to commemorate those who lost their lives in the war.
commemorate.zh: 每年这一天，公民们都会聚集在纪念馆前，纪念那些在战争中牺牲的人。

codify.en: The government decided to codify the existing environmental regulations into a single comprehensive document for easier reference.
codify.zh: 政府决定将现行环境法规编纂成一份单一的综合文件以便查阅。

coding.en: Many universities now offer courses in coding to prepare students for careers in the rapidly growing technology sector.
coding.zh: 许多大学现在提供编程课程，以培养学生进入快速发展的科技行业就业。

coffee.en: Studies have shown that drinking coffee in moderation can improve alertness and concentration during long study sessions.
coffee.zh: 研究表明，适量饮用咖啡可以提高长时间学习时的警觉性和注意力。

coffee shop.en: The coffee shop near campus has become a popular meeting place for students to study and collaborate on projects.
coffee shop.zh: 校园附近的咖啡店已成为学生学习和协作项目的热门聚会场所。

cognitive.en: Regular physical exercise has been shown to improve cognitive functions and memory retention in elderly individuals.
cognitive.zh: 规律的体育锻炼已被证明可以改善老年人的认知功能和记忆保持。

coherent.en: A coherent argument requires clear evidence, logical structure, and well-organized paragraphs to persuade readers effectively.
coherent.zh: 一篇连贯的文章需要清晰的证据、逻辑结构和组织良好的段落来有效说服读者。

coin.en: The ancient Roman coin discovered during the archaeological dig provided valuable insights into historical trade practices.
coin.zh: 考古发掘中发现的古罗马硬币为了解历史贸易实践提供了宝贵的见解。

coincide.en: The timing of the exam period tends to coincide with increased stress levels among university students each year.
coincide.zh: 考试时间往往与每年大学生压力增加的时期相吻合。

coincided.en: The rise in unemployment rates coincided with the onset of the global economic recession in recent years.
coincided.zh: 失业率的上升与近年来全球经济衰退的开始相吻合。

coincidentally.en: Coincidentally, the new library opened on the same day as the university celebrated its fiftieth anniversary.
coincidentally.zh: 巧合的是，新图书馆开放的当天正是大学庆祝其五十周年校庆的日子。

coined.en: The term 'carbon footprint' was coined by environmental scientists to describe the impact of human activities on the climate.
coined.zh: '碳足迹'这个术语是由环境科学家创造的，用来描述人类活动对气候的影响。

coins.en: Some economists believe that collecting coins with historical significance can be a valuable long-term investment strategy.
coins.zh: 一些经济学家认为，收集具有历史意义的硬币可以是一种有价值长期投资策略。

cold.en: The cold weather during winter months often leads to a significant increase in hospital admissions for respiratory illnesses.
cold.zh: 冬季寒冷天气常常导致因呼吸道疾病入院的人数显著增加。

collaborating.en: The two universities are collaborating on a groundbreaking research project to develop renewable energy technologies.
collaborating.zh: 这两所大学正在合作开展一个开创性的研究项目，以开发可再生能源技术。

collaboration.en: Successful collaboration between governments and private enterprises can lead to more innovative solutions for urban challenges.
collaboration.zh: 政府与私营企业之间的成功合作可以为城市挑战带来更多创新解决方案。

collapse.en: Without proper maintenance, old buildings may collapse and pose a serious potential safety risk to residents.
collapse.zh: 如果没有适当的维护，旧建筑物可能会倒塌，并对居民构成严重的潜在安全风险。

colleague.en: My colleague in the science department helped me understand the complex methodology used in the recent climate study.
colleague.zh: 我科学系的同事帮助我理解了最近气候研究中使用的复杂方法。

colleagues.en: Collaborating with colleagues from different departments often leads to more innovative solutions for complex organizational problems.
colleagues.zh: 与来自不同部门的同事合作往往能为复杂的组织问题带来更创新的解决方案。

collect.en: Schools should collect feedback from students regularly to identify areas that need improvement in the curriculum.
collect.zh: 学校应该定期收集学生反馈，以识别课程中需要改进的领域。

collecting.en: Collecting data from multiple sources ensures that the research findings are accurate and reliable for analysis.
collecting.zh: 从多个来源收集数据可确保研究发现准确可靠，便于进行分析。

collection.en: The museum boasts an impressive collection of ancient artifacts from various historical periods and civilizations.
collection.zh: 该博物馆拥有来自各个历史时期和文明的令人印象深刻的古代文物收藏。

collective.en: The collective decision-making process allows all team members to contribute their ideas before reaching a final agreement.
collective.zh: 集体决策过程允许所有团队成员在达成最终协议之前贡献他们的想法。

collectively.en: The residents collectively raised concerns about the proposed construction project and its potential environmental impact.
collectively.zh: 居民们共同对拟议的建设项目及其潜在环境影响表示担忧。

collectors.en: Experienced antique collectors often travel worldwide to find rare pieces that could significantly increase in value over time.
collectors.zh: 经验丰富的古董收藏家经常周游世界寻找随着时间推移可能大幅升值的稀有物品。

college.en: Attending college allows young adults to acquire specialized knowledge and develop critical thinking skills for their future careers.
college.zh: 上大学使年轻人能够获得专业知识，并为未来的职业发展培养批判性思维技能。
