collisions.en: Modern safety features in vehicles have helped reduce the number of serious collisions occurring on busy urban roads.
collisions.zh: 车辆中的现代安全功能有助于减少繁忙城市道路上发生的严重碰撞数量。

colonial.en: The colonial architecture in the old quarter reflects the historical influence of European settlers on local urban development.
colonial.zh: 老城区的殖民时期建筑反映了欧洲定居者对当地城市发展的历史影响。

colony.en: A well-established colony of bees can contain thousands of individuals working together to maintain their hive and produce honey.
colony.zh: 一个完善的蜜蜂群落可以包含成千上万的个体，共同维护蜂巢并生产蜂蜜。

color.en: The color of the ocean varies dramatically from deep navy to bright turquoise depending on depth and sunlight conditions.
color.zh: 海洋的颜色根据深度和阳光条件的不同从深海军蓝到明亮的绿松石色变化显著。

colored.en: The artist used colored pencils to create a vibrant illustration that captured the essence of urban life in the city.
colored.zh: 艺术家用彩色铅笔创作了一幅充满活力的插图，捕捉了城市都市生活的精髓。

commence.en: The construction of the new shopping centre will commence next month, creating thousands of employment opportunities for local residents.
commence.zh: 新的购物中心的建设将于下个月开始，为当地居民创造数千个就业机会。

comment.en: In his opening comment, the speaker outlined the main objectives of the conference before presenting detailed research findings.
comment.zh: 在开场评论中，演讲者概述了会议的主要目标，然后展示详细的研究结果。

commentary.en: The documentary provided insightful commentary on environmental issues, highlighting the urgent need for sustainable development practices.
commentary.zh: 这部纪录片对环境问题提供了有洞察力的评论，强调了可持续发展的紧迫性。

commentator.en: A renowned political commentator was invited to explain the implications of the new legislation on the evening news programme.
commentator.zh: 一位著名的政治评论员受邀在晚间新闻节目中解释新立法的含义。

commentators.en: Various financial commentators expressed concern about the potential economic impact of the proposed tax changes on small businesses.
commentators.zh: 多位金融评论员对拟议的税收变化对小企业的潜在经济影响表示担忧。

commented.en: The research team commented that their findings challenge previously accepted theories about climate change adaptation strategies.
commented.zh: 研究团队评论说，他们的发现挑战了先前关于气候变化适应策略的公认理论。

commenting.en: Commenting on the rapid technological advancement, experts predicted significant changes in how people will work and communicate.
commenting.zh: 在评论 rapid technological advancement 时，专家们预测人们的工作和交流方式将发生重大变化。

comments.en: The professor invited students to submit written comments on the proposed changes to the university curriculum.
comments.zh: 教授邀请学生对提议的大学课程变更提交书面意见。

commerce.en: The development of e-commerce has revolutionized global commerce, enabling businesses to reach customers in distant markets efficiently.
commerce.zh: 电子商务的发展彻底改变了全球商业，使企业能够有效地接触遥远市场的客户。

commercial.en: The commercial success of the film exceeded all expectations despite its relatively low production budget overall.
commercial.zh: 尽管总体制作预算相对较低，这部电影的商业成功超出了所有预期。

committed.en: The company is committed to reducing its carbon footprint by implementing sustainable practices across all operations.
committed.zh: 该公司致力于通过在所有运营中实施可持续实践来减少其碳足迹。

committee.en: The committee will carefully review all applications before making a final decision on scholarship recipients.
committee.zh: 委员会将在最终决定奖学金获得者之前仔细审查所有申请。

committing.en: Some people argue that committing resources to nuclear energy is risky despite its clean energy potential.
committing.zh: 一些人认为，尽管核能具有清洁能源的潜力，但投入资源发展核能是危险的。

commodity.en: Fresh water is becoming an increasingly valuable commodity in many drought-prone regions around the world.
commodity.zh: 淡水资源在世界各地许多干旱地区正成为一种越来越宝贵的商品。

common.en: It is common for young adults to experience anxiety when facing important career decisions in life.
common.zh: 年轻人在人生中面临重要职业抉择时经历焦虑是很常见的。

common sense.en: While common sense suggests that regular exercise improves health, scientific studies provide compelling evidence.
common sense.zh: 虽然常识表明经常锻炼能改善健康，但科学研究提供了令人信服的证据。

commonly.en: Smoking is commonly believed to be harmful, yet many people still continue this habit despite health warnings.
commonly.zh: 吸烟通常被认为有害，但尽管有健康警告，许多人仍继续这种习惯。

communicate.en: International students must learn to communicate effectively in English to succeed academically in foreign universities.
communicate.zh: 国际学生必须学会用英语有效沟通，以便在外国大学取得学业成功。

communicated.en: The ancient civilization communicated its beliefs through elaborate architectural structures and intricate artistic designs.
communicated.zh: 古代文明通过精心设计的建筑结构和复杂的艺术图案来传达其信仰。

communicates.en: The documentary effectively communicates the urgent need for global cooperation to address climate change challenges.
communicates.zh: 这部纪录片有效地传达了全球合作应对气候变化挑战的紧迫性。

column.en: The data was clearly presented in a column chart, making it easy to identify the upward trend in renewable energy usage over five years.
column.zh: 数据以柱状图的形式清晰呈现，使人们容易识别出五年间可再生能源使用量的上升趋势。

coma.en: Medical advances have significantly improved survival rates for patients who fall into comas after serious car accidents.
coma.zh: 医学进步显著提高了严重车祸后陷入昏迷的患者的存活率。

combat.en: Local authorities are implementing strict measures to combat the spread of infectious diseases in densely populated areas.
combat.zh: 地方当局正在实施严格措施，在人口密集地区对抗传染病的传播。

combination.en: Success in this field often requires a unique combination of technical skills, creative thinking, and strong interpersonal communication abilities.
combination.zh: 在这个领域取得成功通常需要技术技能、创造性思维和强大的人际沟通能力的独特组合。

combine.en: Researchers aim to combine different research methodologies to achieve more comprehensive and reliable study results.
combine.zh: 研究人员旨在结合不同的研究方法，以获得更全面和可靠的研究结果。

combined.en: When traditional teaching methods are combined with modern technology, students often demonstrate improved academic performance and engagement.
combined.zh: 当传统教学方法与现代技术相结合时，学生往往表现出更好的学业成绩和参与度。

combs.en: The scientist carefully combs through vast amounts of environmental data to identify patterns related to climate change.
combs.zh: 这位科学家仔细梳理大量环境数据，以识别与气候变化相关的规律。

combustion.en: The incomplete combustion of fossil fuels releases harmful pollutants that contribute to respiratory diseases.
combustion.zh: 化石燃料的不完全燃烧会释放有害污染物，导致呼吸系统疾病。

come.en: With proper education and awareness campaigns, more people will come to appreciate the importance of biodiversity conservation.
come.zh: 通过适当的教育和宣传活动，越来越多的人将会认识到生物多样性保护的重要性。

come along.en: The development of sustainable infrastructure is coming along gradually as governments increase funding for green projects.
come along.zh: 随着政府对绿色项目投入的增加，可持续基础设施的建设正在逐步推进。

compensated.en: The workers were well compensated for the extra hours they worked during the demanding project deadline.
compensated.zh: 工人们因在紧张的项目截止日期期间加班而获得了丰厚的补偿。

compensates.en: The company compensates its employees fairly for any business-related travel expenses incurred during work.
compensates.zh: 该公司公平地补偿员工在工作期间产生的任何商务差旅费用。

compensating.en: The government introduced compensating measures to help small businesses affected by the unexpected economic changes.
compensating.zh: 政府推出了补偿措施，以帮助受意外经济变化影响的小型企业。

compensation.en: Many employees feel that their current salary does not reflect adequate compensation for their hard work.
compensation.zh: 许多员工认为他们目前的工资并没有充分反映他们辛勤工作的报酬。

compensatory.en: Students may need to undertake compensatory coursework if they fail to meet the required academic standards.
compensatory.zh: 如果学生未能达到要求的学术标准，他们可能需要参加补偿性课程学习。

compete.en: Local businesses often struggle to compete with large multinational corporations due to limited resources and marketing budgets.
compete.zh: 由于资源和营销预算有限，本地企业往往难以与大型跨国公司竞争。

compete with.en: It is challenging for smaller companies to compete with established brands on massive advertising budgets.
compete with.zh: 小公司很难在巨额广告预算方面与成熟品牌竞争。

competent.en: A competent professional should possess both strong theoretical knowledge and practical skills in their field.
competent.zh: 一位称职的专业人士应在其领域具备扎实的理论知识和实践技能。

competition.en: In a global market, intense competition forces companies to innovate constantly to maintain their share and satisfy customer needs.
competition.zh: 在全球市场中，激烈的竞争迫使公司不断创新，以维持其市场份额并满足客户需求。

competitions.en: The school organizes various competitions throughout the year to encourage student participation in extracurricular activities.
competitions.zh: 学校全年组织各种竞赛活动，以鼓励学生参与课外活动。

communicating.en: Effective communication is essential when communicating with people from different cultural backgrounds.
communicating.zh: 有效的沟通对于与来自不同文化背景的人交流至关重要。

communication.en: Effective communication between senior managers and ordinary employees is essential for maintaining a productive and harmonious workplace environment.
communication.zh: 高层管理人员与普通员工之间的有效沟通对于维持一个富有成效且和谐的工作环境至关重要。

communications.en: Improvements in telecommunications and communications infrastructure have connected people worldwide.
communications.zh: 电信和通讯基础设施的改善使全世界的人们联系在一起。

communicative.en: Learners who are more communicative tend to develop language skills more rapidly than reserved students.
communicative.zh: 更善于交际的学习者往往比沉默寡言的学生更快地掌握语言技能。

communicator.en: A skilled communicator must be able to adapt their message to suit different audiences effectively.
communicator.zh: 一位熟练的沟通者必须能够有效地调整自己的信息以适应不同的受众。

communicators.en: The best communicators understand that listening is just as important as speaking in any dialogue.
communicators.zh: 最好的沟通者明白，在任何对话中，倾听和说话同样重要。

communities.en: Online communities have created new opportunities for people to connect and share interests globally.
communities.zh: 在线社区为人们在全球范围内联系和分享兴趣创造了新机会。

commute.en: Many city workers face long commutes that consume several hours of their daily schedule.
commute.zh: 许多城市工人面临漫长的通勤，每天要花几个小时在路途上。

compact.en: The compact design of modern smartphones allows users to carry powerful technology in their pockets.
compact.zh: 现代智能手机的紧凑设计让用户能够将强大的技术装入口袋。

companion.en: Having a reliable study companion can significantly improve motivation and learning outcomes.
companion.zh: 拥有一个可靠的学习伙伴可以显著提高学习动力和效果。

company.en: Many international companies have established branches in developing countries to take advantage of lower labor costs and new markets.
company.zh: 许多国际公司在发展中国家设立分支机构，以利用较低的劳动力成本并开拓新市场。

comparatively.en: Comparatively speaking, the cost of living in smaller cities is much more affordable than in major metropolitan areas.
comparatively.zh: 相对来说较小城市的生活成本比主要都市区要便宜得多。

compare.en: When you compare the educational systems of different countries, you often find significant variations in teaching approaches and assessment methods.
compare.zh: 当比较不同国家的教育系统时，经常会发现教学方法评估方法存在显著差异。

compared.en: When compared with traditional methods, digital learning platforms offer greater flexibility for students living in remote areas.
compared.zh: 与传统方法相比，数字学习平台为居住在偏远地区的学生提供了更大的灵活性。

compared with.en: Compared with the previous generation, today's young people have access to considerably more information through digital devices and internet connectivity.
compared with.zh: 与上一代人相比，今天的年轻人可以通过电子设备和互联网连接获得更多的信息。

comparison.en: A close comparison of the two policies reveals that environmental protection measures have become increasingly strict over recent years.
comparison.zh: 对这两项政策的仔细比较表明，近年来环境保护措施变得越来越严格。

compatible.en: The new software is fully compatible with existing systems, which means companies do not need to replace their current computer equipment.
compatible.zh: 新软件与现有系统完全兼容，这意味着公司不需要更换当前的计算机设备。

compel.en: The law compels all companies to provide adequate training for employees to ensure workplace safety standards are maintained at all times.
compel.zh: 法律迫使所有公司为员工提供足够的培训，以确保工作场所安全标准始终得到维护。

compelling.en: The documentary presented compelling evidence about climate change, which convinced many viewers to alter their daily habits and reduce carbon footprints.
compelling.zh: 这部纪录片提供了关于气候变化的令人信服的证据，说服了许多观众改变日常习惯并减少碳足迹。

compensate.en: Employers should compensate workers fairly for overtime hours to maintain morale and ensure productivity remains consistent throughout the year.
compensate.zh: 雇主应该公平地补偿工人的加班时间，以保持士气并确保全年生产力保持一致。

comprehensive.en: The comprehensive report covered all aspects of environmental policy, including economic, social, and ecological considerations.
comprehensive.zh: 这份综合性报告涵盖了环境政策的所有方面，包括经济、社会和生态方面的考量。

comprise.en: The curriculum comprises theoretical lectures, practical workshops, and field research to provide well-rounded education.
comprise.zh: 该课程由理论讲座、实践研讨会和实地研究组成，以提供全面的教育。

comprised.en: The research team was comprised of experts from various disciplines who collaborated on the innovative project.
comprised.zh: 该研究团队由来自不同学科的专家组成，他们共同合作开展这项创新项目。

comprises.en: Effective communication comprises verbal skills, body language, active listening abilities, and cultural awareness.
comprises.zh: 有效的沟通包括语言技能、肢体语言、积极倾听能力和文化意识。

compromise.en: Finding a compromise between economic development and environmental protection remains a significant challenge for governments.
compromise.zh: 在经济发展和环境保护之间找到妥协方案仍然是各国政府面临的重大挑战。

compulsory.en: Attendance at secondary school has become compulsory in most developed countries to ensure basic education for all.
compulsory.zh: 在大多数发达国家，义务教育阶段已变为强制性的，以确保所有人都能接受基础教育。

computable.en: Not all social phenomena are easily computable, as human behavior often involves complex emotional factors.
computable.zh: 并非所有社会现象都能轻易计算，因为人类行为往往涉及复杂的情感因素。

computation.en: The computation of complex statistical models requires advanced software, substantial processing power, and skilled analysts.
computation.zh: 复杂统计模型的计算需要先进的软件、强大的处理能力和熟练的分析师。

computational.en: Computational methods have revolutionized scientific research by enabling the analysis of massive datasets and simulations.
computational.zh: 计算方法通过使大规模数据集和模拟分析成为可能，彻底改变了科学研究。

computations.en: The computations required for climate modeling demand supercomputers capable of processing billions of calculations daily.
computations.zh: 气候建模所需的计算需要超级计算机，它们能够每天处理数十亿次计算。

competitive.en: The job market has become increasingly competitive, requiring candidates to possess diverse skills and relevant professional experience to succeed.
competitive.zh: 就业市场竞争日益激烈，要求求职者拥有多样化的技能和相关的专业经验才能成功。

competitors.en: The company carefully studies its competitors to understand their marketing strategies and pricing models.
competitors.zh: 该公司仔细研究竞争对手，以了解他们的营销策略和定价模式。

compile.en: Students must compile a comprehensive list of references before submitting their research papers.
compile.zh: 学生在提交研究论文前必须编制一份全面的参考文献清单。

compiled.en: The data compiled from various sources showed a clear trend in consumer purchasing behaviour.
compiled.zh: 从各种来源汇编的数据显示出消费者购买行为的明显趋势。

complain.en: Many customers complain about the poor quality of products purchased from online stores.
complain.zh: 许多顾客抱怨从网上商店购买的产品质量差。

complaint.en: The hotel received numerous complaints regarding the noise levels from the construction site nearby.
complaint.zh: 酒店收到了许多关于附近建筑工地噪音水平的投诉。

complaints.en: Despite repeated complaints, the local council has failed to address the waste management issues.
complaints.zh: 尽管反复投诉，地方议会仍未能解决废物管理问题。

complement.en: The new software features are designed to complement the existing system and improve workflow efficiency.
complement.zh: 新软件功能旨在补充现有系统并提高工作流程效率。

complete.en: It is crucial to complete all sections of the application form to avoid processing delays.
complete.zh: 必须完成申请表的所有部分以避免处理延迟。

completely.en: The old factory was completely demolished to make space for a new residential complex nearby.
completely.zh: 这座旧工厂被完全拆除，以便为附近的一个新住宅小区腾出空间。

completion.en: The completion of the university degree required four years of intensive study and practical training in the field.
completion.zh: 大学学位的完成需要在相关领域进行四年的 intensive 学习和实践培训。

complex.en: The human brain is an extremely complex organ that controls various bodily functions and cognitive processes simultaneously.
complex.zh: 人脑是一个极其复杂的器官，同时控制着各种身体功能和认知过程。

complexities.en: Many international students underestimate the complexities of adapting to a new educational system and cultural environment.
complexities.zh: 许多国际学生低估了适应新教育体系和文化环境的复杂性。

complexity.en: The complexity of global environmental issues requires graduates to develop strong analytical and critical thinking skills.
complexity.zh: 全球环境问题的复杂性要求毕业生培养强大的分析和批判性思维能力。

compliance.en: Strict compliance with safety standards is mandatory for all manufacturing companies operating within this jurisdiction.
compliance.zh: 所有在该管辖范围内运营的制造公司必须严格遵守安全标准。

complicate.en: The sudden change in visa regulations threatened to complicate the travel plans of thousands of international students.
complicate.zh: 签证法规的突然变化可能使数千名国际学生的旅行计划变得复杂。

complicated.en: The complicated application process for postgraduate programs often discourages talented candidates from applying to foreign universities.
complicated.zh: 研究生课程的复杂申请程序常常使优秀申请者放弃申请外国大学。

complication.en: The main complication with this research project is the insufficient funding available from both government and private sectors.
complication.zh: 这个研究项目的主要障碍是政府和私营部门提供的资金不足。

comply.en: All businesses operating in this country must comply with local labor laws to ensure employee rights are properly protected.
comply.zh: 所有在该国运营的企业必须遵守当地劳动法，以确保员工权利得到适当保护。

comply with.en: Companies that fail to comply with environmental protection regulations may face severe penalties and damage to their reputation.
comply with.zh: 未能遵守环境保护法规的公司可能面临严厉处罚并损害其声誉。

compute.en: According to recent studies, researchers use complex statistical formulas to compute the rate of environmental change over the past five decades.
compute.zh: 根据最近的研究，研究人员使用复杂的统计公式来计算过去五十年环境变化的速度。

computed.en: The scientist computed the average global temperature increase using data from multiple reliable sources collected over many years.
computed.zh: 这位科学家使用多年来收集的多个可靠来源的数据计算了全球平均温度的升高。

computer.en: The computer laboratory at the university is equipped with the most advanced technology available for students and researchers.
computer.zh: 大学的计算机实验室配备了可供学生和研究人员使用的最先进技术设备。

computerized.en: Many modern factories have become highly computerized, significantly reducing the need for manual labor while increasing overall productivity.
computerized.zh: 许多现代工厂已经高度计算机化，大大减少了对体力劳动的需求，同时提高了整体生产率。

computers.en: Personal computers have become essential tools for both education and professional work in the contemporary digital age.
computers.zh: 在当代数字时代，个人电脑已成为教育和专业工作的重要工具。

computes.en: The sophisticated algorithm computes the results automatically, which saves researchers a considerable amount of time and effort.
computes.zh: 这个复杂的算法自动计算结果，这为研究人员节省了大量时间和精力。

computing.en: Cloud computing has revolutionized how businesses store and process large amounts of data efficiently and cost-effectively.
computing.zh: 云计算彻底改变了企业存储和处理大量数据的方式，使其变得高效且具有成本效益。

conceal.en: The government attempted to conceal the true extent of the economic crisis from the general public for several months.
conceal.zh: 政府试图在几个月内对公众隐瞒经济危机的真实程度。

conceive.en: It is increasingly difficult to conceive of modern life without the internet and digital communication technologies.
conceive.zh: 越来越难以想象没有互联网和数字通信技术的现代生活是什么样子。

conceived.en: The innovative project was originally conceived by university researchers as a solution to environmental challenges.
conceived.zh: 这个创新项目最初是由大学研究人员构想的，旨在解决环境挑战。

confuse.en: The similar spelling of words like 'affect' and 'effect' often confuse students who are studying for the IELTS examination.
confuse.zh: 'affect'和'effect'等相似的单词拼写经常让准备雅思考试的学生感到困惑。

confused.en: Many candidates felt confused when the examiner asked them to discuss both advantages and disadvantages in one response.
confused.zh: 许多考生在考官要求他们在一个回答中同时讨论利弊时感到困惑。

confusing.en: The instructions in the reading section were quite confusing, which made it challenging for test-takers to finish on time.
confusing.zh: 阅读部分的说明相当令人困惑，这使得考生很难按时完成。

confusion.en: There was considerable confusion among students regarding the new speaking test format announced by the examination board.
confusion.zh: 学生们对考试委员会宣布的新口语考试形式存在相当大的困惑。

congenital.en: Medical researchers are studying congenital heart defects in newborns to develop more effective treatment methods.
congenital.zh: 医学研究人员正在研究新生儿先天性心脏缺陷，以开发更有效的治疗方法。

congestion.en: Traffic congestion in major cities has become increasingly severe, resulting in significant environmental and economic consequences.
congestion.zh: 主要城市的交通拥堵变得越来越严重，带来了严重的环境和经济后果。

congratulate.en: The university president chose to congratulate all graduates on their remarkable achievements during the commencement ceremony.
congratulate.zh: 大学校长选择在毕业典礼上祝贺所有毕业生取得的卓越成就。

congress.en: The international congress brought together leading scientists to discuss potential solutions for climate change and environmental protection.
congress.zh: 这次国际大会汇集了顶尖科学家，讨论气候变化和环境保护的潜在解决方案。

conjunction.en: In grammar, a conjunction is used to connect words, phrases, or clauses, forming more complex and meaningful sentences.
conjunction.zh: 在语法中，连接词用于连接单词、短语或分句，形成更复杂、更有意义的句子。

connect.en: Modern technology allows people to connect with others worldwide, facilitating cultural exchange and international collaboration.
connect.zh: 现代技术使人们能够与世界各地的人建立联系，促进文化交流和国际合作。

connected.en: The Internet has connected people across the globe, facilitating instant communication and enhancing international business collaborations significantly.
connected.zh: 互联网将全球各地的人们连接起来，促进了即时沟通并显著增强了国际商业合作。

connection.en: There is a strong connection between regular exercise and improved mental health among university students today.
connection.zh: 如今在大学生中，定期锻炼与改善心理健康之间存在着密切的联系。

conquered.en: The company has conquered new markets in Southeast Asia after years of careful expansion strategies.
conquered.zh: 经过多年的谨慎扩张策略，该公司已经征服了东南亚的新市场。

conscience.en: A person with a strong conscience would never consider cheating on important examinations.
conscience.zh: 一个有强烈良心的人永远不会考虑在重要考试中作弊。

conscious.en: Many consumers are now more environmentally conscious, choosing products that minimize harm to the natural world around them.
conscious.zh: 许多消费者现在更具环保意识，选择那些尽量减少对周围自然世界伤害的产品。

consecutive.en: The city has experienced three consecutive years of population growth due to migration from rural areas.
consecutive.zh: 由于农村人口迁移，这座城市已经经历了连续三年的人口增长。

consensus.en: Reaching a consensus among all stakeholders is essential before implementing any major policy changes.
consensus.zh: 在实施任何重大政策变革之前，与所有利益相关者达成共识至关重要。

consent.en: Written consent must be obtained from participants before any personal data can be collected for research purposes.
consent.zh: 在出于研究目的收集任何个人数据之前，必须获得参与者的书面同意。

consented.en: The local residents consented to the construction of the new highway after the government promised noise reduction measures.
consented.zh: 在当地政府承诺采取噪音 reduction 措施后，当地居民同意了新高速公路的建设。

consenting.en: All consenting adults should have the freedom to choose their own lifestyle without discrimination.
consenting.zh: 所有同意的成年人应该有权自由选择自己的生活方式而不受歧视。

condemn.en: Human rights organizations condemn the use of violence against civilians in conflict zones worldwide.
condemn.zh: 人权组织谴责世界各地冲突地区针对平民使用暴力的行为。

condition.en: The poor living conditions in urban slums contribute significantly to the spread of infectious diseases.
condition.zh: 城市贫民窟恶劣的生活条件极大地促进了传染病的传播。

conditioner.en: Using a hair conditioner regularly can significantly improve the texture and appearance of damaged hair.
conditioner.zh: 定期使用护发素可以显著改善受损头发的质地和外观。

conduct.en: Scientists conduct experiments to test their hypotheses about the effects of pollution on marine ecosystems.
conduct.zh: 科学家进行实验来验证他们关于污染对海洋生态系统影响的假设。

conducted.en: The longitudinal study was conducted over a period of ten years across twenty different countries.
conducted.zh: 这项纵向研究在二十个不同的国家进行了十年。

conducting.en: While conducting the interview, the researcher asked participants about their daily eating habits and exercise routines.
conducting.zh: 在 conducting the interview 时，研究人员询问了参与者他们的日常饮食习惯和锻炼情况。

conduction.en: Heat conduction through metal cookware allows food to be heated quickly and cooked evenly.
conduction.zh: 金属炊具的热传导能够快速加热食物并使其均匀受热。

conductor.en: The orchestra conductor raised his baton dramatically to signal the beginning of the final movement.
conductor.zh: 管弦乐队的指挥家戏剧性地举起指挥棒，宣告最终乐章的开始。

conducts.en: The environmental agency conducts regular monitoring of air quality in major metropolitan areas.
conducts.zh: 环境机构在主要城市地区进行定期的空气质量监测。

cones.en: Traffic cones are essential safety equipment used to redirect vehicles and protect workers on construction sites.
cones.zh: 交通锥是重要的安全设备，用于引导车辆并保护建筑工地的工人。

confidential.en: All personal information submitted through the application form is kept strictly confidential and will not be shared with third parties.
confidential.zh: 通过申请表提交的所有个人信息都将严格保密，不会与第三方共享。

confine.en: The government should not confine environmental policies to mere symbolic gestures but implement substantial changes.
confine.zh: 政府不应将环境政策局限于象征性的姿态，而应实施实质性变革。

confined.en: Children who grow up in confined urban spaces often have fewer opportunities for outdoor play and natural exploration.
confined.zh: 在有限的城市空间中成长的儿童通常较少有机会进行户外活动和自然探索。

confirm.en: The scientist conducted multiple experiments to confirm the hypothesis before publishing the research findings.
confirm.zh: 这位科学家进行了多次实验以确认假设，然后才发表研究发现。

confirmation.en: After submitting your application, you will receive an email confirmation with details about the registration process.
confirmation.zh: 提交申请后，您将收到一封确认邮件，其中包含有关注册过程的详细信息。

confirmed.en: Recent studies have confirmed that exposure to natural sunlight improves mental health by regulating sleep patterns and boosting mood substantially.
confirmed.zh: 最近的研究证实，接触自然阳光通过调节睡眠模式和显著提升情绪来改善心理健康。

conflict.en: The ongoing conflict between economic development and environmental protection remains a major concern for global policymakers.
conflict.zh: 经济发展与环境保护之间持续的冲突仍然是全球政策制定者主要关注的问题。

conform.en: Although students are expected to conform to school rules, they should also be encouraged to develop independent thinking skills.
conform.zh: 虽然学生被期望遵守学校规则，但也应该鼓励他们培养独立思考能力。

confront.en: Society must confront the growing problem of digital addiction among young people rather than ignoring its serious consequences.
confront.zh: 社会必须正视年轻人日益严重的数字成瘾问题，而不是忽视其严重后果。

confronted.en: The medical staff were confronted with an overwhelming number of patients during the unprecedented health crisis last year.
confronted.zh: 在去年的空前健康危机期间，医务人员面临大量患者的涌入。

confer.en: The royal society will confer an honorary title upon the distinguished scientist for his contributions.
confer.zh: 皇家学会将授予这位杰出科学家荣誉头衔，以表彰他的贡献。

conference.en: The international conference on climate change brought together experts from over fifty countries.
conference.zh: 这次关于气候变化的国际会议汇集了来自五十多个国家的专家。

conference centre.en: The modern conference centre offers state-of-the-art facilities for conducting business meetings.
conference centre.zh: 这个现代化的会议中心为商务会议提供最先进的设施。

conferences.en: Many young researchers attend conferences to establish professional networks in their field.
conferences.zh: 许多年轻研究人员参加学术会议，以在其领域建立专业人脉网络。

conferred.en: The university conferred doctoral degrees on all candidates who completed their research successfully.
conferred.zh: 大学向所有成功完成研究的候选人授予了博士学位。

conferring.en: The ceremony of conferring degrees will take place in the main auditorium next week.
conferring.zh: 学位授予仪式将于下周在主礼堂举行。

confers.en: Regular reading habit confers the benefit of improved vocabulary and analytical thinking skills.
confers.zh: 规律的阅读习惯能够带来提高词汇量和分析思维能力的好处。

confess.en: Many teenagers confess that excessive use of social media negatively affects their academic performance.
confess.zh: 许多青少年承认过度使用社交媒体会对他们的学业成绩产生负面影响。

confidence.en: Building self-confidence is truly essential for young people who aspire to become future leaders in society.
confidence.zh: 建立自信对于渴望成为社会未来领导者的年轻人来说确实至关重要。

confident.en: After months of preparation, she felt confident about her ability to pass the final examination.
confident.zh: 经过几个月的准备，她对通过期末考试的能力充满信心。

conclude.en: From the evidence presented, we can conclude that renewable energy is becoming increasingly cost-effective in modern society.
conclude.zh: 从所呈现的证据来看，我们可以得出结论，可再生能源在现代社会中正变得日益经济实惠。

concluded.en: After reviewing all the evidence, the researchers concluded that the new method was significantly more effective.
concluded.zh: 在审查所有证据后，研究人员得出结论，新方法显著更有效。

concludes.en: The author concludes that rapid technological advancement has fundamentally transformed how people communicate and build relationships.
concludes.zh: 作者得出结论，快速的科技进步从根本上改变了人们交流和建立关系的方式。

concluding.en: In concluding remarks, the speaker emphasized that collective international action is essential for addressing climate change effectively.
concluding.zh: 在总结发言中，演讲者强调，集体性的国际行动对于有效应对气候变化至关重要。

conclusion.en: In conclusion, the available evidence suggests that early childhood education significantly impacts future overall academic success.
conclusion.zh: 总之，现有证据表明幼儿教育显著影响未来的整体学业成功。

conclusions.en: The researcher's conclusions suggest that early intervention programmes are more effective than remedial approaches for struggling students.
conclusions.zh: 研究人员的结论表明，针对学习困难学生，早期干预项目比补救方法更有效。

conclusive.en: Although several studies have been conducted, the evidence is not conclusive enough to support the proposed policy changes.
conclusive.zh: 尽管已进行了多项研究，但证据仍不够充分，不足以支持拟议的政策改革。

concrete.en: Researchers need concrete evidence to support their hypotheses before publishing findings in reputable scientific journals for comprehensive peer review procedures.
concrete.zh: 研究人员需要在知名科学期刊上发表成果进行综合同行评审程序之前，获得具体证据来支持他们的假设。

concurrent.en: The concurrent rise in both unemployment rates and housing costs has created significant social and economic challenges for many families.
concurrent.zh: 失业率和住房成本的同时上升给许多家庭带来了重大的社会和经济挑战。

concurrently.en: Many students choose to study part-time while concurrently working in their chosen field to gain practical professional experience.
concurrently.zh: 许多学生选择半工半读，同时在他们选择的领域工作以获得实际的职业经验。

conceptualization.en: The conceptualization of sustainable development requires understanding both environmental and economic factors.
conceptualization.zh: 可持续发展的概念化需要理解环境和经济因素。

conceptualize.en: It is difficult to conceptualize the scale of climate change without seeing the data firsthand.
conceptualize.zh: 如果不亲眼看到数据，就很难概念化气候变化的规模。

conceptually.en: While conceptually sound, the proposed solution may be difficult to implement in practice.
conceptually.zh: 虽然概念上合理，但提议的解决方案在实践中可能难以实施。

concern.en: One of the main concerns about urbanization is the strain it places on natural resources.
concern.zh: 关于城市化的主要担忧之一是它对自然资源造成的压力。

concerned.en: Many citizens are concerned about the lack of public funding for healthcare, which affects vulnerable groups significantly.
concerned.zh: 许多公民担心缺乏公共医疗资金，这显著影响了弱势群体。

concerned about.en: Scientists are increasingly concerned about the long-term effects of microplastics in the ocean.
concerned about.zh: 科学家们越来越担心海洋中微塑料的长期影响。

concerning.en: The survey revealed some concerning trends in youth unemployment rates across different regions.
concerning.zh: 调查显示了不同地区青年失业率的一些令人担忧的趋势。

concert.en: Attending a live concert can provide a more immersive cultural experience than watching recordings.
concert.zh: 参加现场音乐会可以提供比观看录像更身临其境的文化体验。

concerts.en: Open-air concerts during summer festivals attract thousands of tourists to the city each year.
concerts.zh: 夏季节日期间的露天音乐会每年吸引数千名游客来到这座城市。

concession.en: As a concession to public opinion, the government agreed to delay the implementation of the new policy.
concession.zh: 作为对公众舆论的让步，政府同意推迟新政策的实施。

concentrate.en: It is difficult for many children to concentrate on their studies when there are many distractions around them.
concentrate.zh: 当周围有许多干扰时，许多孩子很难集中精力学习。

concentrate on.en: Workers should concentrate on their assigned tasks during working hours to improve overall workplace productivity.
concentrate on.zh: 员工在工作时间应该专注于分配给他们的任务，以提高整体工作场所的生产效率。

concentrated.en: The concentrated effort of the research team finally led to a significant breakthrough in renewable energy technology.
concentrated.zh: 研究团队专注的努力最终在可再生能源技术方面取得了重大突破。

concentrates.en: The government concentrates on improving healthcare infrastructure to provide better medical services for citizens.
concentrates.zh: 政府专注于改善医疗基础设施，为公民提供更好的医疗服务。

concentrating.en: She found concentrating on her thesis difficult while simultaneously working part-time at a demanding company.
concentrating.zh: 她发现在一家要求严格的公司兼职的同时，很难集中精力撰写论文。

concentration.en: High levels of concentration are required when studying complex subjects for extended periods of time daily.
concentration.zh: 每天长时间学习复杂科目需要高度的注意力集中。

concept.en: The concept of remote working has become increasingly popular since the global pandemic changed traditional office routines.
concept.zh: 自从全球大流行改变了传统办公室常规以来，远程工作的概念变得越来越流行。

conception.en: His conception of success has changed dramatically after experiencing various challenges during his entrepreneurial journey.
conception.zh: 在创业过程中经历各种挑战后，他对成功的观念发生了巨大变化。

concepts.en: Understanding fundamental economic concepts helps individuals make more informed decisions about personal financial management.
concepts.zh: 理解基本的经济概念帮助个人在个人财务管理方面做出更明智的决定。

conceptual.en: The theoretical framework relies heavily on conceptual models from cognitive psychology to explain human decision-making processes.
conceptual.zh: 这个理论框架在很大程度上依赖于认知心理学的概念模型来解释人类的决策过程。

contain.en: The comprehensive report contains detailed analysis of market trends and consumer behavior patterns across different regions.
contain.zh: 这份综合报告包含了不同地区市场趋势和消费者行为模式的详细分析。

container.en: The shipping container was loaded onto the cargo ship after passing all customs and security inspections at the port.
container.zh: 这艘运输集装箱在通过港口的所有海关和安全检查后被装上了货船。

containers.en: Shipping containers have revolutionized global trade by allowing goods to be transported efficiently across international borders.
containers.zh: 集装箱通过允许货物高效地跨越国界运输，彻底改变了全球贸易。

containing.en: The museum opened an exhibition featuring artifacts containing significant historical and cultural value from ancient civilizations.
containing.zh: 博物馆开设了一个展览，展示包含古代文明重大历史和文化价值的文物。

contains.en: This academic textbook contains essential theoretical frameworks that students need to understand for their examinations.
contains.zh: 这本学术教科书包含学生考试所需的基本理论框架。

contaminate.en: Factory emissions can contaminate the air and water supplies, posing serious health risks to nearby communities.
contaminate.zh: 工厂排放物会污染空气和水源，对附近社区造成严重的健康风险。

contaminated.en: The contaminated groundwater was declared unsafe for drinking, forcing residents to rely on bottled water supplies.
contaminated.zh: 受污染的地下水被宣布不适合饮用，迫使居民依靠瓶装水供应。

contamination.en: Environmental contamination caused by industrial waste has become a major concern for public health authorities worldwide.
contamination.zh: 工业废物造成的环境污染已成为全球公共卫生部门的主要关切。

contemplate.en: Before making major life decisions, it is wise to contemplate all possible consequences and seek professional advice.
contemplate.zh: 在做重大人生决定之前，明智的做法是深思熟虑所有可能的后果并寻求专业建议。

contemporary.en: Contemporary architecture often incorporates sustainable materials and innovative designs to minimize environmental impact.
contemporary.zh: 当代建筑经常采用可持续材料和创新设计，以减少对环境的影响。

constitutive.en: Education is a constitutive element of personal development and has a profound impact on society.
constitutive.zh: 教育是个人发展的基本要素，对社会产生深远的影响。

constrain.en: Financial limitations often constrain the ability of developing nations to invest in modern infrastructure.
constrain.zh: 资金限制经常制约发展中国家投资建设现代基础设施的能力。

constrained.en: Many low-income families are constrained by the high cost of housing in major urban centres.
constrained.zh: 许多低收入家庭受到大城市高房价的限制。

constraining.en: The most constraining factor for small businesses is frequently the lack of access to affordable credit.
constraining.zh: 小企业最受限的因素通常是无法获得负担得起的信贷。

constrains.en: Increasing environmental regulations constrains industrial expansion while promoting sustainable practices.
constrains.zh: 日益严格的环境法规限制了工业扩张，同时促进了可持续发展实践。

constraint.en: One major constraint on educational reform is the limited funding available for schools and teachers.
constraint.zh: 教育改革的 一个主要限制是学校和教师获得的资金有限。

constraints.en: Urban planners must work within various constraints including budget limitations and available land space.
constraints.zh: 城市规划者必须在各种限制条件下工作，包括预算限制和可用土地空间。

construct.en: Governments should construct comprehensive policies that address both economic growth and environmental protection.
construct.zh: 政府应该制定综合性的政策，同时解决经济增长和环境保护问题。

constructed.en: The new bridge was constructed using sustainable materials to minimize the environmental impact on the surrounding local ecosystem.
constructed.zh: 这座新桥是用可持续材料建造的，以尽量减少对周围当地生态系统的环境影响。

constructing.en: While constructing new housing developments, authorities should preserve green spaces for community use.
constructing.zh: 在建设新的住宅区时，当局应该保留绿地供社区使用。

constituent.en: As a member of parliament, she regularly meets with her constituents to discuss local issues and concerns.
constituent.zh: 作为国会议员，她定期与当地选民会面，讨论地方事务和关注的问题。

constituents.en: The main constituents of a healthy diet include fresh fruits, vegetables, whole grains, and lean proteins.
constituents.zh: 健康饮食的主要成分包括新鲜水果、蔬菜、全谷物和瘦肉蛋白。

constitute.en: Repeated exposure to air pollution can constitute a serious threat to public health in urban areas.
constitute.zh: 反复接触空气污染可能对城市地区的公众健康构成严重威胁。

constituted.en: The independent inquiry committee was constituted in 2015 to investigate alleged financial misconduct.
constituted.zh: 独立调查委员会于2015年成立，调查涉嫌的财务不当行为。

constitutes.en: Regular physical activity constitutes an essential component of maintaining both physical and mental well-being.
constitutes.zh: 定期的体育活动是保持身体和心理健康的重要组成部分。

constituting.en: The various departments, constituting the entire organization, collaborate closely to achieve shared objectives.
constituting.zh: 构成整个组织的各个部门紧密合作，以实现共同目标。

constitution.en: Many democratic nations have a written constitution that establishes the fundamental principles of governance.
constitution.zh: 许多民主国家都有成文宪法，确立国家治理的基本原则。

constitutional.en: The supreme court ruled that the proposed legislation was not constitutional and therefore could not be enacted.
constitutional.zh: 最高法院裁定拟议的立法不符合宪法，因此无法颁布。

constitutionally.en: The president is constitutionally obligated to address the nation during times of national emergency.
constitutionally.zh: 根据宪法规定总统有义务在国家紧急状态期间向全国发表讲话。

constitutions.en: Different countries have constitutions that reflect their unique historical, cultural, and political circumstances.
constitutions.zh: 不同国家的宪法反映了各自独特的历史、文化和政治环境。

considerable.en: The new infrastructure project requires considerable investment before it can yield any substantial financial returns for local investors.
considerable.zh: 新的基础设施项目需要大量投资，然后才能为当地投资者带来任何实质性的财务回报。

considerably.en: Air quality in urban areas has improved considerably since the government implemented stricter emission standards.
considerably.zh: 自从政府实施更严格的排放标准以来，城市地区的空气质量已大大改善。

consideration.en: Cost is a primary consideration for students when choosing a university, but academic reputation also plays a vital role.
consideration.zh: 成本是学生选择大学时的首要考虑因素，但学术声誉也起着至关重要的作用。

consist.en: A balanced diet should consist of蛋白质，碳水化合物，脂肪 and essential vitamins for optimal health.
consist.zh: 均衡饮食应包含蛋白质、碳水化合物、脂肪和必需维生素，以保持最佳健康状态。

consist of.en: The research team consists of scientists from various disciplines, including biology, chemistry, and environmental science.
consist of.zh: 研究团队由来自不同学科的科学家组成，包括生物学、化学和环境科学。

consisted.en: The initial survey group consisted of five hundred participants from various backgrounds, ensuring a representative sample for the research study.
consisted.zh: 最初的调查小组由来自不同背景的五百名参与者组成，确保了研究样本的代表性。

consistency.en: The consistency of the results across multiple experiments strengthened the validity of the scientific theory.
consistency.zh: 多次实验结果的一致性加强了该科学理论的有效性。

consistent.en: Students need to maintain consistent study habits throughout the semester to achieve high grades in their examinations.
consistent.zh: 学生需要在整个学期保持一致的学习习惯，以便在考试中取得高分。

consistently.en: The company has consistently ranked among the top employers in terms of workplace satisfaction and employee benefits.
consistently.zh: 在职场满意度和员工福利方面，该公司始终位列最佳雇主行列。

consisting.en: Modern smartphones consist of hundreds of components, consisting of sophisticated processors, sensors, and display technology.
consisting.zh: 现代智能手机由数百个组件组成，包括复杂的处理器、传感器和显示技术。

consents.en: The patient consents to the medical procedure after being fully informed about the potential risks involved.
consents.zh: 患者在充分了解潜在风险后，同意接受该医疗程序。

consequence.en: One significant consequence of rapid urbanization is the displacement of traditional communities and loss of cultural heritage.
consequence.zh: 快速城市化的一个重要后果是传统社区的迁移和文化遗产的丧失。

consequences.en: Ignoring the environmental consequences of industrial pollution can lead to severe long-term damage for future generations.
consequences.zh: 忽视工业污染的环境后果可能会给后代带来严重的长期损害。

consequent.en: The heavy rainfall and the consequent flooding caused widespread disruption to transportation and daily life in the region.
consequent.zh: 暴雨及其引发的洪水对该地区的交通和日常生活造成了广泛的中断。

consequently.en: The government increased taxes on luxury goods, and consequently, consumer spending in this sector decreased significantly over the year.
consequently.zh: 政府提高了奢侈品的税收，因此，该领域的消费者支出在这一年中显著下降。

conservation.en: Effective wildlife conservation strategies are essential to protect endangered species from the threats of habitat loss.
conservation.zh: 有效的野生动物保护策略对于保护濒危物种免受栖息地丧失的威胁至关重要。

conservationists.en: Many conservationists argue that protecting biodiversity is essential for maintaining ecological balance and human well-being.
conservationists.zh: 许多环保人士认为，保护生物多样性对于维持生态平衡和人类福祉至关重要。

conservative.en: The conservative approach to economic policy prioritizes fiscal responsibility and gradual reform over radical changes.
conservative.zh: 保守的经济政策方法将财政责任和渐进式改革置于激进变革之上。

conserve.en: Governments should implement effective strategies to conserve natural resources for the benefit of future generations.
conserve.zh: 政府应该实施有效的策略，为子孙后代的利益保护自然资源。

consider.en: Students should carefully consider all factors before deciding whether to pursue higher education abroad.
consider.zh: 学生在决定是否出国深造之前应该仔细考虑所有因素。

consume.en: The average person in developed countries consumes far more resources than they actually need for daily survival.
consume.zh: 发达国家的人均资源消耗量远远超过他们的日常生存所需。

consumed.en: By the time the meeting started, she had already consumed three cups of strong coffee to stay alert.
consumed.zh: 会议开始时，她已经喝了三杯浓咖啡来保持清醒。

consumer.en: The consumer electronics market has expanded significantly over the past decade, creating numerous employment opportunities.
consumer.zh: 消费电子产品市场在过去十年中显著扩张，创造了大量就业机会。

consumers.en: Modern consumers are increasingly demanding transparency regarding the ethical sourcing of all product materials globally.
consumers.zh: 现代消费者越来越要求在全球范围内对所有产品材料的道德采购保持透明。

consumes.en: The factory consumes enormous amounts of water and electricity every day to maintain its production operations.
consumes.zh: 这家工厂每天消耗大量的水和电力来维持生产运营。

consuming.en: The task of organizing such a large event was incredibly consuming, requiring the team to work late every night.
consuming.zh: 组织这样一个大型活动的任务极其耗费精力，要求团队每天晚上工作到很晚。

consumption.en: The excessive consumption of fossil fuels contributes significantly to global warming and necessitates urgent shifts toward renewable energy.
consumption.zh: 过度消耗化石燃料显著导致全球变暖，并迫切需要向可再生能源转变。

contact.en: Maintaining regular contact with family members is essential for emotional well-being in today's increasingly fast-paced society.
contact.zh: 在当今日益快节奏的社会中，与家人保持定期联系对于情感福祉至关重要。

contact details.en: Please ensure that your contact details are kept up to date in our database to receive important notifications.
contact details.zh: 请确保您在我们数据库中的联系信息保持最新，以便接收重要通知。

contagious.en: Laughter can be highly contagious, which explains why it spreads so quickly through social gatherings and public places.
contagious.zh: 笑声具有很强的传染性，这解释了为什么它在社交聚会和公共场所传播得如此迅速。

consists.en: The urban development plan consists of three key components: housing, transportation, and public facilities.
consists.zh: 城市发展计划由三个关键部分组成：住房、交通和公共设施。

consolidation.en: The consolidation of smaller companies into larger corporations has significantly changed the economic landscape in recent decades.
consolidation.zh: 小公司合并成大公司极大地改变了近几十年来的经济格局。

consonants.en: In English, consonants are letters such as B, C, D, F, G, and H that differ from vowel sounds.
consonants.zh: 在英语中，辅音字母如B、C、D、F、G、H是区别于元音发音的字母。

constant.en: Despite constant improvements in technology and scientific research, some fundamental social issues remain unresolved in many countries.
constant.zh: 尽管技术和科学研究不断进步，但许多国家的一些基本社会问题仍未解决。

constantly.en: Students today are constantly exposed to vast amounts of information online, which requires developing strong critical thinking skills.
constantly.zh: 当今学生不断接触网络上的海量信息，这需要培养强大的批判性思维能力。

constants.en: While many aspects of culture change over time, family bonds and traditions remain important constants in society worldwide.
constants.zh: 虽然文化的许多方面会随着时间而改变，但家庭纽带和传统仍然是世界各地社会中重要的常量。

constellation.en: The constellation Orion is easily recognizable in the night sky and has been referenced throughout history in various cultures.
constellation.zh: 猎户座星座在夜空中很容易辨认，并且在各种文化的历史中都有提及。

constipation.en: Constipation is a common digestive issue that can often be prevented through a balanced diet rich in fibre and regular exercise.
constipation.zh: 便秘是一种常见的消化问题，通常可以通过富含纤维的均衡饮食和定期锻炼来预防。

constituencies.en: Politicians must balance the interests of different constituencies when making decisions that affect the entire nation and its economy.
constituencies.zh: 政治家在做出影响整个国家和经济决策时，必须平衡不同选区的利益。

constituency.en: Each constituency in the country is represented by a single member of parliament who serves as their voice in government.
constituency.zh: 该国的每个选区都由一名国会议员代表，作为他们在政府中的代言人。

contrasts.en: The article contrasts traditional teaching methods with modern approaches to education in developed nations.
contrasts.zh: 这篇文章将发达国家的传统教学方法与现代教育方法进行了对比。

contribute.en: Many factors contribute to the increasing cost of housing in major cities around the world.
contribute.zh: 许多因素导致全球主要城市住房成本的不断上升。

contribute to.en: Regular exercise can contribute to better mental health as well as improved physical fitness.
contribute to.zh: 经常锻炼有助于改善心理健康以及提高身体素质。

contributed.en: The innovative technology contributed significantly to improving efficiency in the manufacturing sector, resulting in higher productivity and lower costs.
contributed.zh: 这项创新技术显著促进了制造业效率的提高，从而带来了更高的生产力和更低的成本。

contributes.en: Online education contributes significantly to making learning more accessible for people in remote areas.
contributes.zh: 在线教育为偏远地区的人们更方便地获取学习资源做出了重大贡献。

contributing.en: Contributing to community volunteer programs helps students develop important leadership skills.
contributing.zh: 参与社区志愿者项目有助于培养学生重要的领导能力。

contribution.en: Every employee's unique contribution to the project was acknowledged during the meeting, highlighting the importance of collaborative teamwork in business.
contribution.zh: 会议上承认了每位员工对项目的独特贡献，强调了协作团队合作在商业中的重要性。

contributions.en: The government acknowledged all contributions made by volunteers during the disaster relief efforts.
contributions.zh: 政府表彰了所有在救灾工作中做出贡献的志愿者。

contributor.en: He was a key contributor to the project's success through his innovative problem-solving approach.
contributor.zh: 他通过创新的问题解决方法成为该项目成功的关键贡献者。

contributors.en: The researchers were among the primary contributors to the groundbreaking environmental study.
contributors.zh: 这些研究人员是这项突破性环境研究的主要贡献者。

contextually.en: When studying historical events, researchers must analyze the material contextually to avoid misinterpretation.
contextually.zh: 在研究历史事件时，研究人员必须从语境角度分析材料，以避免误解。

continent.en: Climate change poses a significant threat to biodiversity across every continent, requiring immediate global cooperation and action.
continent.zh: 气候变化对每个大陆的生物多样性构成了重大威胁，需要立即的全球合作和行动。

continental.en: The continental drift theory explains how the continents have moved over millions of years.
continental.zh: 大陆漂移理论解释了大陆在数百万年间是如何移动的。

continual.en: The continual rise in sea levels poses a serious threat to coastal communities around the world.
continual.zh: 海平面持续上升对世界各地的沿海社区构成严重威胁。

continually.en: The government is continually updating its policies to address the growing concerns about environmental pollution.
continually.zh: 政府正在不断更新政策，以应对日益严重的环境污染问题。

continuous.en: A continuous supply of electricity is vital for hospitals to function properly and save lives.
continuous.zh: 持续稳定的电力供应对医院正常运转和挽救生命至关重要。

continuously.en: The population has been growing continuously for the past three decades in many developing countries.
continuously.zh: 在过去的三十年里，许多发展中国家的人口一直在持续增长。

contract.en: Before signing any employment contract, candidates should carefully review all terms and conditions.
contract.zh: 在签署任何雇佣合同之前，候选人应仔细审查所有条款和条件。

contracted.en: The muscles in the body become contracted after prolonged periods of physical inactivity.
contracted.zh: 长时间身体不活动后，身体的肌肉会收缩。

contracting.en: The contracted economy has led to higher unemployment rates and reduced consumer spending.
contracting.zh: 不断萎缩的经济导致失业率上升和消费支出减少。

contempt.en: Many young people today show contempt for traditional values and prefer to establish their own standards of behavior.
contempt.zh: 当今许多年轻人对传统价值观表现出蔑视，更倾向于建立自己的行为标准。

contend.en: Researchers must contend with the challenge of obtaining accurate data when studying sensitive social issues.
contend.zh: 研究人员在研究敏感社会问题时，必须应对获取准确数据的挑战。

content.en: Employees who feel content with their working conditions are generally more productive and demonstrate higher levels of loyalty to the company.
content.zh: 对工作条件感到满意的员工通常生产力更高，并且对公司表现出更高水平的忠诚度。

contents.en: The contents of the museum's new exhibition include ancient artifacts from three different civilizations spanning two millennia.
contents.zh: 博物馆新展览的内容包括来自三个不同文明的古代文物，跨越了两千年。

contest.en: The government decided to contest the court's ruling regarding environmental protection policies in coastal regions.
contest.zh: 政府决定对法院关于沿海地区环境保护政策的裁决提出质疑。

context.en: Understanding the historical context is essential when analysing the development of modern social structures in contemporary society.
context.zh: 在分析当代社会现代社交结构的发展时，理解历史背景是必不可少的。

contexts.en: The same policy may produce vastly different outcomes in various contexts, depending on economic and cultural factors.
contexts.zh: 同样的政策在不同的背景下可能产生截然不同的结果，这取决于经济和文化因素。

contextual.en: Researchers need to consider multiple contextual factors when evaluating the effectiveness of educational programs.
contextual.zh: 研究人员在评估教育项目的有效性时，需要考虑多个背景因素。

contextualization.en: The contextualization of historical events requires examining not only the facts but also the social circumstances of the era.
contextualization.zh: 对历史事件的背景化研究不仅需要审视事实，还需要考察那个时代的社会状况。

contextualize.en: To fully understand the economic crisis, we must contextualize it within the broader framework of global market changes.
contextualize.zh: 为了充分理解这场经济危机，我们必须将其置于全球市场变化的更广泛框架中来分析。

cookery.en: Many schools now include cookery classes in their curriculum to teach students about healthy eating habits.
cookery.zh: 许多学校现在将烹饪课程纳入教学大纲，以教导学生健康的饮食习惯。

cooking.en: Learning the art of cooking helps young adults develop essential life skills while promoting healthier eating habits within the family unit.
cooking.zh: 学习烹饪艺术有助于年轻人发展基本的生活技能，同时促进家庭内部更健康的饮食习惯。

cool.en: The weather became remarkably cool during the evening, prompting everyone to wear warm clothing.
cool.zh: 傍晚时分天气变得格外凉爽，促使每个人都穿上了暖和的衣服。

cooled.en: After the soup cooled down to a safe temperature, the children were able to eat it without burning themselves.
cooled.zh: 汤冷却到安全温度后，孩子们才能够吃而不至于烫伤自己。

cooling.en: Modern urban planning initiatives focus on cooling city areas through increased planting of trees and installing green roofs.
cooling.zh: 现代城市规划倡议侧重于通过增加树木种植和安装绿色屋顶来冷却城市区域。

cooperate.en: It is essential that all team members cooperate effectively to complete this project on schedule.
cooperate.zh: 所有团队成员必须有效合作，才能按计划完成这个项目。

cooperating.en: The two companies are cooperating on a joint research project to develop renewable energy sources.
cooperating.zh: 这两家公司正在合作开展一个联合研究项目，开发可再生能源。

cooperation.en: International cooperation is crucial when addressing global challenges such as climate change and pandemics.
cooperation.zh: 在应对气候变化和疫情等全球性挑战时，国际合作至关重要。

cooperative.en: She decided to join a local housing cooperative to share expenses and maintenance responsibilities.
cooperative.zh: 她决定加入当地的住房合作社，以分摊费用和维护责任。

contractor.en: The general contractor coordinated with various subcontractors to ensure the renovation project was completed within budget and on schedule.
contractor.zh: 总承包商与各分包商协调，以确保翻新项目在预算内按时完成。

contractors.en: Many construction companies prefer hiring independent contractors instead of full-time employees to reduce operational costs significantly.
contractors.zh: 许多建筑公司更喜欢雇用独立承包商而不是全职员工，以显著降低运营成本。

contracts.en: The government should enforce stricter regulations on employment contracts to protect workers' rights and prevent exploitation.
contracts.zh: 政府应该对雇用合同实施更严格的监管，以保护工人权利并防止剥削。

contradict.en: Recent scientific studies appear to contradict earlier claims about the effectiveness of this treatment method for chronic conditions.
contradict.zh: 最近的科学研究似乎与早期关于这种慢性病治疗方法有效性的说法相矛盾。

contrary.en: Contrary opinions among the committee members made it extremely difficult to reach a consensus on the proposed legislation.
contrary.zh: 委员会成员之间的相反意见使得就拟议的立法达成共识变得极其困难。

contrary to.en: Contrary to popular assumption, many elderly people are quite comfortable with using smartphones and social media platforms.
contrary to.zh: 与普遍假设相反，许多老年人非常习惯使用智能手机和社交媒体平台。

contrast.en: In contrast to traditional teaching methods, modern approaches often emphasize interactive learning and student participation in the classroom.
contrast.zh: 与传统教学方法相比，现代方法通常强调互动式学习和学生在课堂上的参与。

contrasted.en: The research report contrasted the economic growth of developed nations with the challenges faced by developing countries.
contrasted.zh: 研究报告将发达国家的经济增长与发展中国家面临的挑战进行了对比。

contrasting.en: The documentary presents two contrasting perspectives on immigration, highlighting both its economic benefits and social challenges.
contrasting.zh: 这部纪录片呈现了两种截然不同的移民观点，突出了移民的经济效益和社会挑战。

contrastingly.en: Contrastingly, cultures that emphasize group achievement tend to produce students who are more collaborative than competitive.
contrastingly.zh: 相反，强调集体成就的文化往往培养出比竞争型学生更具合作精神的学生。

controlled.en: The experiment was carefully controlled to ensure the accuracy of the results and eliminate any external variables that might affect findings.
controlled.zh: 实验被仔细控制以确保结果的准确性，并消除任何可能影响发现的外部变量。

controllers.en: Air traffic controllers play a vital role in ensuring the safe and efficient movement of aircraft around the world daily.
controllers.zh: 空中交通管制员在确保全球每天飞机安全高效运行方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

controls.en: The government has implemented strict environmental controls to reduce pollution levels and protect endangered natural habitats.
controls.zh: 政府实施了严格的环境控制措施，以减少污染水平并保护濒危的自然栖息地。

controversial.en: The government's new policy regarding immigration has become highly controversial, sparking intense debate among citizens and politicians across the nation.
controversial.zh: 政府关于移民的新政策引起了高度争议，在全国公民和政治家中引发了激烈的辩论。

controversy.en: The controversy surrounding the use of artificial intelligence in hiring processes continues to divide opinions among experts.
controversy.zh: 围绕在招聘过程中使用人工智能的争议持续分裂着专家们的意见。

convene.en: The international climate summit will convene next week to address urgent environmental challenges facing developing nations.
convene.zh: 国际气候峰会将于下周召开，讨论发展中国家面临的紧迫环境挑战。

convened.en: A panel of distinguished scientists was convened to evaluate the safety and effectiveness of the new vaccine.
convened.zh: 一个由杰出科学家组成的小组被召集来评估新疫苗的安全性和有效性。

convenes.en: The university convenes an annual conference each autumn where researchers present their latest academic discoveries.
convenes.zh: 大学每年秋季召开一次会议，研究人员在会上展示他们最新的学术发现。

convenience.en: The convenience of online shopping has transformed consumer behavior and significantly impacted traditional retail businesses.
convenience.zh: 网购的便利性改变了消费者行为，并显著影响了传统零售业。

convenience store.en: Convenience stores have become essential in urban areas, offering quick access to daily necessities for busy residents.
convenience store.zh: 便利店在城市地区变得不可或缺，为忙碌的居民提供日常必需品的快速获取渠道。

convert.en: Many people decide to convert their savings into different currencies to take advantage of better exchange rates.
convert.zh: 许多人会将储蓄转换成不同的货币以获得更好的汇率。

converted.en: The old warehouse has been converted into trendy apartments that appeal to young professionals.
converted.zh: 旧仓库已被改建成时尚的公寓，吸引年轻专业人士入住。

convey.en: The artist used vibrant colours to convey emotions that words alone could not express.
convey.zh: 这位艺术家用鲜艳的色彩来传达言语无法单独表达的情感。

convict.en: The judge will convict the defendant if the prosecution can prove guilt beyond reasonable doubt.
convict.zh: 如果控方能证明被告无疑点地有罪，法官将对其进行定罪。

convicted.en: The convicted criminal received a seven-year sentence for embezzling millions from the company.
convicted.zh: 这名被定罪的罪犯因从公司盗用数百万美元被判处七年监禁。

convince.en: Sales representatives must convince potential customers that their products offer genuine value for money.
convince.zh: 销售代表必须说服潜在客户相信他们的产品能带来真正的性价比。

convinced.en: I am convinced that implementing stricter recycling policies will significantly reduce the amount of waste sent to landfills each year.
convinced.zh: 我坚信实施更严格的回收政策将显著减少每年送往垃圾填埋场的废物数量。

convincing.en: The witness provided a convincing account of the incident that helped resolve the legal dispute.
convincing.zh: 证人提供了令人信服的事件描述，有助于解决这起法律纠纷。

cook.en: Students living away from home must learn to cook simple meals to maintain a healthy diet.
cook.zh: 离家住校的学生必须学会烹饪简单的饭菜以保持健康饮食。

cooker.en: Modern cookers equipped with digital displays and timers have made cooking more convenient than ever.
cooker.zh: 配备数字显示屏和计时器的现代炉灶使烹饪变得更加便捷。

convenient.en: Online shopping has made it very convenient for consumers to purchase products from the comfort of their homes.
convenient.zh: 网购让消费者在家就能方便地购买产品。

convening.en: The United Nations is convening an emergency summit to address the growing humanitarian crisis in the region.
convening.zh: 联合国正在召开紧急峰会，讨论该地区日益严重的人道主义危机。

convention.en: The international convention on wildlife protection was signed by over 180 countries to prevent endangered species extinction.
convention.zh: 超过180个国家签署了国际野生动物保护公约，以防止濒危物种灭绝。

conventional.en: Many farmers are moving away from conventional methods to adopt more sustainable and organic agricultural practices.
conventional.zh: 许多农民正远离传统方法，转而采用更可持续和有机的农业实践。

conventionally.en: Conventionally, women have been underrepresented in leadership positions, but companies are now actively promoting gender diversity.
conventionally.zh: 传统上，女性在领导职位上的代表性不足，但企业现在正积极推动性别多样性。

conventions.en: Social conventions regarding appropriate behaviour vary significantly between different cultures and require cultural sensitivity.
conventions.zh: 关于适当行为的社会习俗在不同文化之间差异很大，需要文化敏感性。

conversation.en: During my presentation, I initiated a conversation with the audience to keep them engaged throughout the lecture.
conversation.zh: 在演讲中，我与听众展开了对话，让他们全程保持参与。

conversations.en: Daily conversations in English have greatly improved my speaking skills and boosted my confidence in communication.
conversations.zh: 每日的英语对话大大提高了我的口语能力，并增强了我沟通的自信心。

converse.en: When I studied abroad, I had to converse with local people to improve my language skills rapidly.
converse.zh: 在国外留学时，我不得不与当地人交谈以快速提高语言能力。

conversely.en: Remote work allows greater flexibility; conversely, it may lead to feelings of isolation and reduced team collaboration.
conversely.zh: 远程工作提供了更大的灵活性；反之，它可能导致孤独感并减少团队协作。

coordinated.en: The government launched a coordinated campaign to tackle air pollution in major urban areas across the country.
coordinated.zh: 政府发起了一场协调一致的运动，在全国主要城市地区解决空气污染问题。

coordinates.en: The map coordinates enabled the expedition team to navigate safely through the remote wilderness area.
coordinates.zh: 地图坐标使探险队能够安全地穿越偏远荒野地区。

coordinating.en: The coordinating role requires strong interpersonal skills to manage diverse teams working on complex projects.
coordinating.zh: 协调角色需要强大的人际交往能力来管理从事复杂项目的多元化团队。

coordination.en: Better coordination between schools and parents is crucial for supporting children's academic development.
coordination.zh: 学校与家长之间更好的协调对于支持孩子的学业发展至关重要。

coordinator.en: The project coordinator arranged regular meetings to ensure all team members understood their responsibilities.
coordinator.zh: 项目协调员安排定期会议，以确保所有团队成员了解自己的职责。

coordinators.en: The event coordinators spent months planning logistics to ensure the conference would run smoothly.
coordinators.zh: 活动协调员花了数月时间规划后勤工作，以确保会议顺利进行。

cope.en: It is essential for university students to develop healthy habits to cope with academic pressure successfully.
cope.zh: 大学生必须养成健康的习惯，以成功应对学业压力。

cope with.en: Students must learn effective strategies to cope with the academic pressures of university studies.
cope with.zh: 学生必须学习有效的策略来应对大学学习的学术压力。

copier.en: The office copier broke down during the busiest period, causing significant delays in document preparation.
copier.zh: 办公室的复印机在最繁忙的时期坏了，导致文件准备工作严重延误。

copies.en: The administrator asked the assistant to make sufficient copies of the report for all committee members attending.
copies.zh: 管理员要求助手为所有参会的委员会成员制作足够的报告副本。

county.en: The county government has announced plans to build a new hospital to serve the growing rural population.
county.zh: 县政府宣布计划建造一家新医院，为不断增长的农村人口提供服务。

coup.en: The military coup led to widespread protests and international condemnation from neighbouring countries.
coup.zh: 军事政变导致了广泛的抗议活动，并受到邻国的国际谴责。

couple.en: It usually takes a couple of years for new employees to fully adapt to the company culture.
couple.zh: 新员工通常需要几年的时间才能完全适应公司文化。

coupon.en: Customers can use discount coupons downloaded from the official website to save money on purchases.
coupon.zh: 顾客可以使用从官方网站下载的折扣券来节省购物费用。

courage.en: It takes considerable courage to admit mistakes publicly and accept responsibility for one's actions.
courage.zh: 公开承认错误并为自己的行为承担责任需要相当的勇气。

course.en: Students should carefully review the course syllabus before deciding which elective modules to take.
course.zh: 学生在决定选择哪些选修模块之前，应该仔细查看课程大纲。

coursework.en: The coursework contributes forty percent to the final assessment, so consistent effort is essential throughout the term.
coursework.zh: 课程作业占总评的百分之四十，因此整个学期持续的努力至关重要。

court.en: The dispute was settled out of court after both parties agreed to the proposed mediation terms.
court.zh: 双方同意拟议的调解条款后，争议在庭外得到解决。

courtesy.en: It is common courtesy to inform the host in advance if you cannot attend a dinner invitation.
courtesy.zh: 如果不能出席晚餐邀请，提前告知主人是基本的礼貌。

courtroom.en: The witness provided detailed testimony in the courtroom, helping the jury understand the sequence of events.
courtroom.zh: 证人在法庭上提供了详细的证词，帮助陪审团理解事件发生的顺序。

correctly.en: Students must learn to pronounce words correctly to ensure effective communication in all international business environments.
correctly.zh: 学生必须学会正确发音，以确保在所有国际商务环境中进行有效沟通。

correlates.en: The study demonstrates that regular exercise correlates with improved mental health outcomes in adults.
correlates.zh: 研究表明，定期锻炼与成年人改善心理健康状况相关。

correlation.en: There is a strong correlation between economic development and environmental degradation in developing nations.
correlation.zh: 在发展中国家，经济发展与环境恶化之间存在很强的相关性。

correspond.en: The results of the experiment do not correspond with the predictions made by the theoretical model.
correspond.zh: 实验结果与理论模型所做的预测不一致。

corresponded.en: The ancient texts corresponded with archaeological evidence, providing a clearer picture of early civilizations.
corresponded.zh: 古代文献与考古证据相吻合为了解早期文明提供了更清晰的图景。

correspondence.en: Email correspondence has largely replaced traditional letters in modern business communication practices.
correspondence.zh: 电子邮件通信在现代商业交流实践中已 largely取代了传统信件。

correspondent.en: The foreign correspondent provided detailed reports on the cultural traditions observed during her assignment.
correspondent.zh: 这位驻外记者详细报道了她在派遣期间观察到的文化传统。

corresponding.en: Each research question has a corresponding methodology designed to address it effectively and systematically.
corresponding.zh: 每个研究问题都有相应的方法论来有效且系统地解决。

correspondingly.en: As demand for organic products increases, correspondingly higher prices are charged by retailers.
correspondingly.zh: 随着有机产品需求的增加，零售商相应收取更高的价格。

corresponds.en: The increase in temperature corresponds with the rise in global carbon emissions over recent decades.
corresponds.zh: 气温上升与近几十年全球碳排放的增加相一致。

counsellor.en: Many universities provide a dedicated counsellor to help students deal with academic stress and personal challenges during their studies.
counsellor.zh: 许多大学提供专职辅导员，帮助学生在学习期间应对学业压力和个人挑战。

count.en: Every vote in the election will count, and citizens should participate actively in the democratic process regardless of their background.
count.zh: 选举中的每一票都很重要，公民应该积极参与民主进程，不论其背景如何。

count on.en: Students should count on their own efforts and perseverance rather than relying solely on external support or circumstances.
count on.zh: 学生应该依靠自己的努力和毅力，而不是完全依赖外部支持或环境条件。

counter.en: Companies often use specific advertising strategies to counter the negative effects of bad publicity on their brand.
counter.zh: 公司经常使用特定的广告策略来抵消负面宣传对其品牌产生的不利影响。

counterpart.en: The education minister met with his counterpart from the neighbouring country to discuss strategies for improving digital literacy in schools.
counterpart.zh: 教育部长与邻国同行会面，讨论提高学校数字素养的策略。

counterparts.en: Our research team frequently collaborates with their counterparts from European universities to share findings and methodologies.
counterparts.zh: 我们的研究团队经常与欧洲大学的同行合作，分享研究发现和方法论。

counting.en: Counting on government subsidies alone is not a sustainable strategy for successful business development in competitive markets.
counting.zh: 仅依靠政府补贴并不是竞争市场中成功商业发展的可持续策略。

countless.en: Countless research studies have demonstrated that regular physical exercise significantly improves both physical health and mental wellbeing.
countless.zh: 无数研究表明，规律的体育锻炼能显著改善身体健康和心理健康。

country.en: The country has achieved remarkable economic growth over the past decade, lifting millions of people out of poverty successfully.
country.zh: 这个国家在过去十年中取得了显著的经济增长，成功帮助数百万人摆脱贫困。

countryside.en: Many urban residents choose to relocate to the countryside seeking a quieter lifestyle away from the noise and pollution of cities.
countryside.zh: 许多城市居民选择搬到农村，追求远离城市喧嚣和污染的宁静生活方式。

corners.en: Small shops located on street corners often serve as convenient hubs for residents to purchase daily necessities without traveling far.
corners.zh: 位于街角的小商店通常作为方便的枢纽，供居民购买日常必需品而无需远行。

coronary.en: Coronary heart disease remains one of the leading causes of death in developed nations with sedentary lifestyles.
coronary.zh: 冠心病仍然是久坐不动生活方式发达国家的主要死因之一。

corporate.en: Many corporate leaders are now prioritizing sustainability initiatives to reduce their significant environmental impact globally and act responsibly.
corporate.zh: 许多企业领导者现在正优先考虑可持续性倡议，以在全球范围内减少其显著的环境影响并采取负责任的行动。

corporately.en: The company must act corporately to ensure consistent environmental standards are maintained across all branches.
corporately.zh: 公司必须以企业化方式运作，确保所有分支机构维持一致的环境标准。

corporates.en: The new tax regulations will significantly impact how corporates structure their financial operations and reporting.
corporates.zh: 新的税收法规将显著影响企业如何构建其财务运作和报告。

corporation.en: The corporation was ordered to pay substantial compensation after environmental inspectors found serious violations.
corporation.zh: 在环境检查员发现严重违规行为后，这家公司被命令支付巨额赔偿。

corporations.en: Many international corporations have relocated their manufacturing facilities to developing countries seeking cheaper labor.
corporations.zh: 许多国际公司已将制造工厂迁至寻求廉价劳动力的发展中国家。

corps.en: The diplomatic corps plays a vital role in maintaining peaceful relations between nations during conflicts.
corps.zh: 外交使团在冲突期间维护国家间和平关系方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

correct.en: It is essential to correct any misinformation immediately to prevent confusion among the general public regarding safety.
correct.zh: 立即纠正任何错误信息至关重要，以防止公众在安全问题上产生混淆。

corrections.en: The corrections system requires comprehensive reform to address overcrowding and reduce high recidivism rates.
corrections.zh: 惩教系统需要全面改革以解决人满为患的问题并降低高再犯率。

corridor.en: The emergency exits are located at both ends of the corridor, which must remain clear at all times for safety reasons.
corridor.zh: 紧急出口位于走廊的两端，为了安全起见，走廊必须始终保持畅通。

corrupt.en: Corrupt officials who abuse their power for personal gain should face severe legal consequences and public scrutiny.
corrupt.zh: 滥用职权谋取私利的腐败官员应该面临严厉的法律制裁和公众监督。

cortex.en: Researchers have discovered that the cerebral cortex plays a crucial role in processing sensory information and memory formation.
cortex.zh: 研究人员发现，大脑皮层在处理感官信息和记忆形成方面起着至关重要的作用。

cosmetics.en: Many teenagers nowadays spend excessive amounts of money on cosmetics, often influenced by aggressive social media advertising.
cosmetics.zh: 如今年轻人在化妆品上花费大量金钱，这往往受到社交媒体上激进广告的影响。

cosmic.en: The cosmic exploration missions have provided valuable insights into the origins of the universe and potential habitable planets.
cosmic.zh: 宇宙探索任务为了解宇宙起源和可能适宜居住的星球提供了宝贵的见解。

cost.en: The government must carefully consider the environmental cost of industrial development before approving new construction projects.
cost.zh: 政府在批准新的建设项目之前，必须仔细考虑工业发展对环境的代价。

costly.en: Medical treatment can be extremely costly for families without adequate health insurance coverage, causing serious financial burdens.
costly.zh: 对于没有足够医疗保险覆盖的家庭来说，医疗费用可能极其昂贵，造成严重的经济负担。

costs.en: The rising costs of university education have made it increasingly difficult for students from low-income backgrounds to pursue higher learning.
costs.zh: 大学教育费用的不断上涨，使得低收入家庭的学生越来越难以接受高等教育。

costumes.en: The theatrical performance featured elaborate costumes that authentically represented the historical period depicted in the play.
costumes.zh: 这场戏剧表演采用了精心制作的戏服，真实地再现了剧中描绘的历史时期。

cot.en: The lightweight camping cot can be easily folded and transported, making it ideal for hikers and outdoor enthusiasts.
cot.zh: 这款轻便的露营简易床可以轻松折叠和运输，非常适合徒步旅行者和户外爱好者使用。

copper.en: The copper wiring in older buildings often needs replacement due to safety concerns and outdated standards.
copper.zh: 老建筑中的铜线由于安全问题和过时的标准经常需要更换。

copy.en: Students must avoid copying from the internet and learn to paraphrase ideas in their own words.
copy.zh: 学生必须避免从网上抄袭，并学会用自己的话改述观点。

coral.en: Rising ocean temperatures pose a severe threat to coral reefs, which are vital ecosystems supporting diverse marine life globally.
coral.zh: 海洋温度上升对珊瑚礁构成了严重威胁，而珊瑚礁是支持全球多样化海洋生命的重要生态系统。

core.en: The core curriculum of the university program focuses on critical thinking skills rather than rote memorization of factual information.
core.zh: 大学课程的核心课程侧重于批判性思维技能，而不是事实信息的死记硬背。

cored.en: The apple was cored before being sliced for the fruit salad to ensure even texture throughout.
cored.zh: 苹果在切片做水果沙拉前被去核，以确保整体口感均匀。

cores.en: The research team extracted several cores from the seabed to study sediment layers and climate history.
cores.zh: 研究团队从海底提取了多个岩芯，以研究沉积物层和气候历史。

coring.en: Coring techniques are widely used in geology to obtain underground samples for scientific analysis.
coring.zh: 取芯技术广泛应用于地质学，以获取地下样本进行科学分析。

cork.en: Cork harvested from cork oak trees is not only lightweight but also environmentally sustainable.
cork.zh: 从软木橡树收获的软木不仅轻便，而且对环境可持续。

corn.en: Corn production has increased significantly in recent years due to advances in agricultural technology.
corn.zh: 由于农业技术的进步，近年来玉米产量显著增加。

corner.en: The small bookshop is located on the corner of Main Street and Broadway, making it easy to locate.
corner.zh: 这家小书店位于主街和百老汇的拐角处，很容易找到。

cottage.en: The charming stone cottage nestled in the countryside attracts tourists seeking a peaceful escape from city life.
cottage.zh: 这座迷人的石屋坐落在乡村，吸引了寻求远离城市喧嚣的游客。

cottages.en: The government provides subsidies for renovating traditional cottages in rural areas to preserve local heritage.
cottages.zh: 政府为翻新农村地区的传统小屋提供补贴，以保护当地文化遗产。

cotton.en: Although cotton is a natural and biodegradable material, its cultivation requires significant amounts of water.
cotton.zh: 尽管棉花是一种天然可降解的材料，但其种植需要大量的水资源。

couch.en: Research indicates that excessive time spent on the couch contributes to various health problems in modern society.
couch.zh: 研究表明，过多时间坐在沙发上会导致现代社会的各种健康问题。

cough.en: The persistent cough caused by air pollution has become a serious public health concern in many cities.
cough.zh: 由空气污染引起的持续咳嗽已成为许多城市严重的公共健康问题。

could.en: Local businesses could benefit significantly from improved public transportation infrastructure connecting suburban areas to city centres.
could.zh: 当地企业可以从连接郊区与市中心的公共交通基础设施改善中获益匪浅。

council.en: The local council decided to invest more money in public transport to reduce traffic congestion in the city center.
council.zh: 地方议会决定投入更多资金用于公共交通，以减少市中心的交通拥堵。

councillor.en: Each city councillor is expected to hold regular community meetings to address concerns raised by local residents.
councillor.zh: 每位市议员都应定期召开社区会议，以解决当地居民提出的问题。

counsel.en: Before making major financial decisions, individuals should seek professional counsel to understand potential risks and benefits.
counsel.zh: 在做出重大财务决策之前，个人应寻求专业建议以了解潜在的風險和收益。

counselling.en: The university offers confidential counselling services to help students cope with academic pressure and personal challenges.
counselling.zh: 大学提供保密的心理咨询服务，帮助学生应对学业压力和个人挑战。

creators.en: The creators of the innovative mobile application were praised for their creative vision and technical expertise in the field.
creators.zh: 这款创新移动应用的创作者因其创意愿景和技术专长而受到赞誉。

creature.en: According to recent studies, the mysterious deep-sea creature has baffled marine biologists for several decades now.
creature.zh: 根据最近的研究，这种神秘的深海生物让海洋生物学家困惑了数十年。

creatures.en: Many marine creatures are threatened by pollution, which destroys their natural habitats in the ocean.
creatures.zh: 许多海洋生物受到污染的威胁，污染破坏了它们在海洋中的自然栖息地。

credential.en: When applying for teaching positions abroad, having the appropriate academic credentials is absolutely essential.
credential.zh: 在申请海外教学职位时，拥有适当的学术证书是绝对必要的。

credit.en: Many university students rely on bank credit to finance their tuition fees and living expenses during their studies.
credit.zh: 许多大学生依靠银行信贷来支付学费和生活费。

credit card.en: Using a credit card for online transactions requires careful attention to security and fraud prevention measures.
credit card.zh: 使用信用卡进行网上交易需要仔细注意安全和欺诈预防措施。

credited.en: The significant improvement in air quality is largely credited to the government's strict environmental regulations.
credited.zh: 空气质量的显著改善很大程度上归功于政府的严格环境法规。

crediting.en: Many historians believe that crediting achievements solely to individual leaders overlooks the contributions of ordinary people.
crediting.zh: 许多历史学家认为，将成就完全归功于个别领导人忽视了普通人的贡献。

creditor.en: Before approving the loan application, the creditor carefully examined the borrower's financial history and credit score.
creditor.zh: 在批准贷款申请之前，债权人仔细审查了借款人的财务历史和信用评分。

creditors.en: The company is currently negotiating with its creditors to restructure the substantial debts accumulated over recent years.
creditors.zh: 公司目前正在与债权人谈判重组近年来积累的大量债务。

crack.en: The intense heat caused a small crack to appear in the foundation of the old historical building during summer.
crack.zh: 酷热导致这座古老历史建筑的地基在夏天出现了一道小裂缝。

cracking.en: The alarming sound of cracking ice echoed ominously across the frozen lake during their dangerous expedition.
cracking.zh: 危险的探险中，碎裂冰块令人担忧的声音在冰封的湖面上回荡。

craft.en: Learning a traditional craft requires patience and skill, which appeals to many tourists seeking authentic cultural experiences.
craft.zh: 学习传统手工艺需要耐心和技巧，这吸引了许多寻求真实文化体验的游客。

craftsmen.en: Highly skilled craftsmen carefully restored the ancient temple, ensuring every detail matched its original appearance.
craftsmen.zh: 技艺精湛的工匠们精心修复了这座古庙，确保每个细节都与其原始外观相符。

crash.en: The sudden stock market crash had a devastating impact on the national economy and caused widespread unemployment.
crash.zh: 突如其来的股市崩盘对国民经济造成了毁灭性打击，并导致了大规模失业。

crater.en: Scientists examined the enormous crater left by the meteorite to understand its potential impact on the environment.
crater.zh: 科学家们检查了陨石留下的巨大陨石坑，以了解其对环境的潜在影响。

crave.en: Many university students crave independence and the freedom to make important decisions about their own lives.
crave.zh: 许多大学生渴望独立，渴望拥有自主决定人生重要事务的自由。

crazy.en: Some people believe it is crazy to spend billions of dollars on space exploration rather than solving poverty.
crazy.zh: 一些人认为将数十亿美元花费在太空探索而不是解决贫困问题上是疯狂的。

cream.en: Fresh cream is considered one of the essential ingredients in making traditional British scones for afternoon tea.
cream.zh: 鲜奶油被认为是制作传统英式下午茶烤饼的基本原料之一。

create.en: Modern technology has created countless new opportunities for people to work remotely from anywhere in the world.
create.zh: 现代技术为人们创造了无数新的机会，使他们能够在世界任何地方远程工作。

crystal.en: The crystal clear water of the mountain spring is safe to drink without any additional treatment or purification.
crystal.zh: 山泉清澈透明的水无需任何额外处理或净化即可安全饮用。

crystals.en: Salt crystals form naturally when seawater evaporates under hot and sunny climatic conditions over extended periods.
crystals.zh: 盐晶在炎热晴朗的气候条件下海水经过长时间蒸发后会自然形成。

cubic.en: The cubic shape of the storage container makes it extremely convenient to stack and maximize warehouse space efficiently.
cubic.zh: 这种存储容器的立方形状使其非常便于堆叠，并能有效地最大化仓库空间。

cubs.en: Bear cubs typically remain with their mothers for approximately two years before they learn to survive independently.
cubs.zh: 熊崽通常会与母亲待在一起大约两年，然后才会学会独立生存。

cue.en: The sudden applause from the audience served as a clear cue for the performer to begin the final act.
cue.zh: 观众突然爆发的掌声清楚地提示表演者可以开始最后一个节目了。

cues.en: Social cues in the workplace help employees understand appropriate behavior and communicate more effectively with colleagues.
cues.zh: 职场中的社交线索帮助员工理解适当的行为，并与同事更有效地沟通。

cuisine.en: Traditional French cuisine is renowned worldwide for its sophisticated techniques and emphasis on high-quality ingredients.
cuisine.zh: 传统法国菜以其精湛的烹饪技术和对优质食材的重视而闻名于世。

culprit.en: Scientists have identified industrial waste as the main culprit behind the declining fish population in the river.
culprit.zh: 科学家已经确定工业废物是导致这条河流鱼类数量减少的主要原因。

cultivate.en: Schools should cultivate critical thinking skills in students, enabling them to analyze information objectively rather than accepting it blindly.
cultivate.zh: 学校应该培养学生的批判性思维技能，使他们能够客观地分析信息，而不是盲目接受。

cultivated.en: The formerly barren land was cultivated into fertile fields, allowing local farmers to grow sufficient crops to feed the village.
cultivated.zh: 曾经贫瘠的土地被开垦成肥沃的田地，使当地农民能够种植足够的作物来养活村庄。

courtyard.en: The university courtyard provides a peaceful outdoor space where students can study and socialize during breaks.
courtyard.zh: 大学的庭院为学生提供了一个宁静的户外空间，他们可以在休息时间学习和社交。

cousin.en: My cousin recently graduated from medical school and now works as a doctor in a local hospital.
cousin.zh: 我的表兄弟最近从医学院毕业，现在在一家当地医院担任医生。

cover.en: The government attempted to cover up the environmental disaster, but journalists eventually exposed the truth.
cover.zh: 政府试图掩盖环境灾难，但记者最终揭露了真相。

coverage.en: The television coverage of the international summit was extensive, reaching audiences in over 150 countries.
coverage.zh: 电视对国际峰会的报道范围广泛，覆盖了150多个国家的观众。

coverage lettering.en: The insurance policy includes coverage lettering that specifies exactly which situations are protected under the agreement.
coverage lettering.zh: 保险单包含了保险承保函，明确规定了协议中受保护的具体情况。

covered.en: The comprehensive insurance policy covered all potential damages caused by natural disasters affecting the residential property owners.
