err.en: Researchers must err on the side of caution when interpreting complex statistical data to prevent misleading conclusions.
err.zh: 研究人员在解释复杂统计数据时必须谨慎行事，以避免得出误导性的结论。

exceeded.en: The annual budget for the construction project exceeded the initial estimates due to unexpected delays and material costs.
exceeded.zh: 由于意外的延误和材料成本，该建设项目的年度预算超出了最初的估计。

exceedingly.en: The candidate performed exceedingly well in the interview, impressing all the panel members with her thoughtful responses.
exceedingly.zh: 候选人在面试中表现得极其出色，她深思熟虑的回答给所有评委留下了深刻印象。

excel.en: Students who wish to excel in their academic pursuits should develop effective time management and study habits.
excel.zh: 希望在学业上取得优异成绩的学生应该培养有效的时间管理和学习习惯。

excellence.en: The university is renowned for its commitment to academic excellence and continuous innovation in teaching methods.
excellence.zh: 这所大学以其对学术卓越和教学方法不断创新的承诺而闻名。

excellent.en: The library provides an excellent environment for students to concentrate on their research and academic work.
excellent.zh: 图书馆为学生集中精力进行研究和学术工作提供了极好的环境。

except.en: Everyone attended the meeting except the manager, who was unavailable due to an urgent business trip abroad.
except.zh: 每个人都参加了会议，除了经理，他因紧急公务出差而无法出席。

except for.en: The experiment produced remarkable results, except for a few inconsistencies in the data collected during the first week.
except for.zh: 除了第一周收集的数据中存在一些不一致外，实验产生了显著的结果。

exception.en: There is no exception to the university's strict policy regarding academic dishonesty and plagiarism violations.
exception.zh: 关于学术不端和抄袭违规行为，大学严格政策没有任何例外。

exceptional.en: Due to her exceptional research contributions, the professor was recognized with a prestigious national award.
exceptional.zh: 由于她出色的研究贡献，这位教授获得了备受瞩目的国家奖项。

excess.en: The government has implemented new measures to reduce the excess consumption of energy in industrial sectors.
excess.zh: 政府已实施新措施来减少工业部门对能源的过度消耗。

exhibition.en: The art exhibition attracted thousands of visitors who came to appreciate the contemporary paintings on display.
exhibition.zh: 这个艺术展览吸引了成千上万的参观者，他们来欣赏展出的当代绘画作品。

exhibitions.en: Many international exhibitions are held in major cities each year, showcasing cultural diversity and technological innovation.
exhibitions.zh: 每年在主要城市都会举办许多国际展览，展示文化多样性和技术创新。

exhibits.en: The local museum exhibits numerous ancient artifacts which demonstrate the rich cultural history of the region effectively.
exhibits.zh: 当地博物馆展出了许多古代文物，有效地展示了该地区丰富的文化历史。

exile.en: The political exile returned to his homeland after decades of living abroad due to persecution for his beliefs.
exile.zh: 这位政治流亡者因信仰遭受迫害而在海外生活数十年后返回祖国。

existing.en: Developers should improve existing infrastructure rather than building new roads, which helps reduce environmental damage and costs.
existing.zh: 开发者应该改善现有基础设施而不是修建新道路，这有助于减少环境破坏和成本。

exit.en: According to fire safety regulations, every public building must have clearly marked emergency exits for evacuation.
exit.zh: 根据消防安全法规，每栋公共建筑都必须有明确标识的紧急疏散出口。

exotic.en: Many tourists are drawn to the region by its exotic cuisine, vibrant festivals, and stunning natural landscapes.
exotic.zh: 许多游客被该地区异国风情的美食、充满活力的节日庆典和迷人的自然景观所吸引。

expand.en: Companies often seek to expand their operations into international markets to increase their long-term overall profitability.
expand.zh: 公司通常寻求将业务扩展到国际市场以提高其长期的整体盈利能力。

expanded.en: The university has expanded its campus significantly over the past decade, adding new libraries and research facilities.
expanded.zh: 过去十年间，这所大学显著扩大了校园规模，新建了图书馆和研究设施。

expanding.en: With an expanding population and increasing demand for housing, urban planners face significant challenges.
expanding.zh: 随着人口不断增长和住房需求增加，城市规划者面临着重大挑战。

excluded.en: Students who fail to meet the minimum academic requirements are excluded from the scholarship programme.
excluded.zh: 未能达到最低学术要求的学生将被排除在奖学金项目之外。

excludes.en: The survey excludes participants who have not resided in the country for at least five years.
excludes.zh: 该调查不包括在澳大利亚居住不足五年的人。

excluding.en: The average household income, excluding taxes and mandatory deductions, is approximately fifty thousand dollars.
excluding.zh: 不包括税收和强制性扣除的家庭平均收入约为五万美元。

exclusion.en: The exclusion of indigenous perspectives from historical records has led to an incomplete understanding of the past.
exclusion.zh: 历史记录中排除土著观点导致对过去的理解不完整。

exclusionary.en: Critics argue that immigration policies in some countries are overly exclusionary and fail to acknowledge cultural diversity.
exclusionary.zh: 批评者认为，一些国家的移民政策过于排斥，未能承认文化多样性。

exclusive.en: The magazine offers exclusive interviews with world leaders and provides in-depth analysis of global affairs.
exclusive.zh: 该杂志提供与世界领导人的独家专访，并对全球事务进行深入分析。

exclusively.en: The university has exclusively focused on renewable energy research for the past decade.
exclusively.zh: 这所大学在过去十年里专门专注于可再生能源研究。

exclusivity.en: The exclusivity of private clubs often attracts wealthy individuals who value privacy and networking opportunities.
exclusivity.zh: 私人俱乐部的排他性经常吸引重视隐私和社交机会的富有人士。

excrete.en: The human body naturally excretes toxins through sweat, urine, and other metabolic processes.
excrete.zh: 人体通过汗液、尿液和其他代谢过程自然排出毒素。

excursion.en: As part of the cultural exchange programme, students participated in an educational excursion to historic landmarks.
excursion.zh: 作为文化交流项目的一部分，学生们参加了一次前往历史名胜的教育考察。

eventually.en: After many failed attempts, the research team eventually discovered a viable solution to the complex technical problem.
eventually.zh: 经过多次失败的尝试，研究团队最终发现了这个复杂技术问题的可行解决方案。

ever.en: Have you ever considered how technological advancements might fundamentally change the way we communicate in the future?
ever.zh: 你有没有考虑过技术进步可能会如何根本性地改变我们未来的交流方式？

every time.en: Every time I visit a new country, I gain a deeper understanding of different cultures and traditions.
every time.zh: 每次我访问一个新的国家，我都会对不同的文化和传统有更深入的了解。

everybody.en: Everybody should have equal access to healthcare services regardless of their economic status.
everybody.zh: 每个人都应该平等地获得医疗服务，无论他们的经济状况如何。

everyday.en: Smartphones have increasingly become an everyday essential for communication, navigation, and accessing vital information in modern urban societies worldwide.
everyday.zh: 智能手机已日益成为现代城市社会中沟通、导航和获取重要信息的日常必需品。

everyday life.en: Renewable energy sources are becoming increasingly important in our everyday life due to environmental concerns.
everyday life.zh: 由于环境问题，可再生能源在我们的日常生活中变得越来越重要。

everything.en: While modern technology simplifies many tasks, relying on it for everything can diminish essential human skills and critical thinking abilities.
everything.zh: 虽然现代技术简化了许多任务，但依赖它做一切事情可能会削弱基本的人类技能和批判性思维能力。

everywhere.en: Plastic pollution has become so prevalent that microplastics are now found everywhere, from deep oceans to remote mountains.
everywhere.zh: 塑料污染已变得如此普遍，以至于微塑料现在无处不在，从深海到偏远的山脉都能发现。

evidenced.en: The negative impact of air pollution on public health is evidenced by the rising rates of respiratory diseases.
evidenced.zh: 空气污染对公众健康的负面影响已被呼吸系统疾病发病率上升所证实。

evident.en: It is evident that online learning has become more popular since the pandemic began worldwide.
evident.zh: 很明显，自疫情在全球开始以来，在线学习已经变得更加流行。

exaggerate.en: Some people tend to exaggerate the difficulties of learning a new language, but with consistent practice, significant progress is definitely achievable.
exaggerate.zh: 有些人倾向于夸大学习新语言的困难，但只要坚持练习，取得显著进步是完全可能的。

exaggerated.en: The media often presents exaggerated claims about the benefits of certain health supplements, which can mislead consumers.
exaggerated.zh: 媒体经常对某些保健品的益处做出夸大的声明，这可能会误导消费者。

exam.en: Effective exam preparation requires developing a structured study schedule and regularly reviewing key concepts.
exam.zh: 有效的考试准备需要制定结构化的学习计划，并定期复习关键概念。

examination.en: A thorough examination of the archaeological site revealed valuable insights into the ancient civilization's daily practices.
examination.zh: 对考古遗址的彻底检查揭示了关于古代文明日常生活实践的宝贵见解。

examine.en: Before drawing conclusions, researchers must carefully examine all available evidence and consider alternative explanations.
examine.zh: 在得出结论之前，研究人员必须仔细检查所有可用的证据并考虑其他可能的解释。

examined.en: The researcher examined the samples carefully to determine the presence of any harmful chemicals in the water.
examined.zh: 研究人员仔细检查了样本，以确定水中是否存在任何有害化学物质。

example.en: The government should set a positive example by implementing effective sustainable environmental policies nationwide.
example.zh: 政府应该通过在全国范围内实施有效的可持续环境政策来树立正面榜样。

excavated.en: The ancient Roman villa was carefully excavated over several years by a dedicated team of international archaeologists.
excavated.zh: 这座古罗马别墅经过一支国际考古学家团队多年的精心发掘。

excavation.en: The ongoing excavation has uncovered numerous artifacts that provide valuable information about medieval trading routes.
excavation.zh: 正在进行的发掘工作已经发现了大量文物为了解中世纪贸易路线提供了宝贵信息。

exceed.en: Industrial factories are required to ensure that their emissions do not exceed the safety limits established by environmental regulations.
exceed.zh: 工业工厂必须确保其排放不超过环境法规规定的安全限值。

excess baggage.en: Many airlines now charge passengers extra fees for excess baggage, which has become a significant concern for budget travelers worldwide.
excess baggage.zh: 许多航空公司现在向乘客收取超额行李附加费，这已成为全球预算旅客关注的重要问题。

excessive.en: Excessive consumption of fast food has been linked to rising obesity rates and various health problems in modern society.
excessive.zh: 过度消费快餐与现代社会中不断上升的肥胖率及各种健康问题有关。

exchange.en: Many students choose to study abroad for a semester to experience a cultural exchange that broadens their global perspective significantly.
exchange.zh: 许多学生选择出国学习一个学期，以体验文化交流，这极大地拓宽了他们的全球视野。

exchange rate.en: Fluctuations in the exchange rate can significantly impact international trade and affect the profitability of exported goods.
exchange rate.zh: 汇率波动会严重影响国际贸易，并影响出口商品的盈利能力。

exchanges.en: Cultural exchanges between nations promote mutual understanding and help preserve traditional practices that might otherwise disappear.
exchanges.zh: 国家间的文化交流促进相互理解，并有助于保护可能会消失的传统习俗。

excite.en: The prospect of a challenging career never fails to excite ambitious graduates who are eager to make their mark.
excite.zh: 充满挑战的职业前景总是让渴望有所成就的雄心勃勃的毕业生兴奋不已。

excitement.en: The excitement surrounding major sporting events often brings communities together and creates a shared sense of national identity.
excitement.zh: 重大体育赛事带来的兴奋感常常将社区凝聚在一起，创造出一种共同的民族认同感。

exciting.en: Working in the technology industry is considered an exciting career choice for young people interested in innovation.
exciting.zh: 对于对创新感兴趣的年轻人来说，科技行业的工作被认为是一个令人兴奋的职业选择。

exclaim.en: Visitors often exclaim in amazement when they witness the breathtaking natural beauty of certain destinations for the first time.
exclaim.zh: 当游客第一次目睹某些目的地令人惊叹的自然美景时，他们常常惊讶地发出赞叹。

exclude.en: Schools should not exclude students from participating in group activities based solely on their academic abilities or disabilities.
exclude.zh: 学校不应仅基于学生的学业能力或残疾而将他们排斥在集体活动之外。

expert.en: The expert recommended that the government implement stricter environmental regulations to combat pollution.
expert.zh: 专家建议政府实施更严格的环境法规来应对污染。

expertise.en: The company lacks the expertise required to develop innovative solutions in this competitive market.
expertise.zh: 该公司缺乏在这个竞争激烈的市场中开发创新解决方案所需的专业知识。

experts.en: Many leading experts agree that climate change requires immediate global action to mitigate its potentially devastating effects on society.
experts.zh: 许多领先专家同意，气候变化需要立即采取全球行动，以减轻其对社会潜在的毁灭性影响。

expire.en: My student visa will expire next month, so I need to apply for an extension as soon as possible.
expire.zh: 我的学生签证下个月到期，所以我需要尽快申请续签。

explain.en: The professor will explain the complex economic theories using practical examples that students can relate to.
explain.zh: 教授将用学生能够理解的实际例子来解释复杂的经济理论。

explains.en: The article explains how social media has fundamentally changed the way people communicate and share information.
explains.zh: 这篇文章解释了社交媒体如何从根本上改变了人们的沟通和信息共享方式。

explanation.en: The teacher provided a detailed explanation of the complex theory to ensure all students understood it.
explanation.zh: 老师提供了关于该复杂理论的详细解释，以确保所有学生都能理解它。

explanations.en: Various explanations have been proposed for the increasing rates of obesity among young people worldwide.
explanations.zh: 人们提出了各种解释来说明全球年轻人肥胖率不断上升的原因。

explicit.en: The assignment requires explicit instructions that allow students to understand exactly what is expected of them.
explicit.zh: 作业需要明确的说明，让学生能够准确理解对他们的期望。

explicitly.en: The university policy explicitly states that plagiarism in any form will result in serious academic consequences.
explicitly.zh: 大学政策明确规定，任何形式的抄袭都将导致严重的学术后果。

areas.en: Different areas of study require various approaches and methodologies to achieve optimal results in academic research.
areas.zh: 不同的研究领域需要各种方法和策略，以在学术研究中取得最佳结果。

arena.en: The political arena has become increasingly competitive as more young candidates enter elections in recent years.
arena.zh: 近年来，随着更多年轻候选人参加选举，政治舞台变得更加竞争激烈。

argue.en: Many economists argue that globalization has contributed to both economic growth and increased income inequality.
argue.zh: 许多经济学家认为，全球化既促进了经济增长，也加剧了收入不平等。

argues.en: The author strongly argues that implementing stricter regulations is necessary to protect the environment from further damage.
argues.zh: 作者强烈认为实施更严格的法规对于保护环境免受进一步破坏是必要的。

argument.en: There is a strong argument that government funding should be prioritized for healthcare rather than for other public sectors.
argument.zh: 有一个有力的观点认为，政府资金应优先用于医疗保健，而不是其他公共部门。

arid.en: The arid regions of the world face unique challenges in terms of water scarcity and agricultural productivity.
arid.zh: 世界上干旱地区在水资源短缺和农业生产力方面面临独特挑战。

arise.en: Significant complications may arise during the implementation phase if the project managers fail to communicate effectively with stakeholders.
arise.zh: 如果项目经理未能与利益相关者有效沟通，实施阶段可能会出现重大并发症。

arising.en: Many issues arising from rapid urbanization require coordinated solutions between local and national authorities.
arising.zh: 快速城市化带来的许多问题需要地方和国家当局之间的协调解决方案。

aristocrat.en: In the past, an aristocrat typically enjoyed privileges such as land ownership and access to exclusive education.
aristocrat.zh: 在过去，贵族通常享有土地所有权和接受精英教育等特权。

aristotle.en: Aristotle's writings on ethics and politics continue to influence modern philosophical and political thought significantly.
aristotle.zh: 亚里士多德关于伦理学和政治学的著作继续对现代哲学和政治思想产生重大影响。

attacks.en: Frequent panic attacks can significantly impact an individual's ability to perform well in high-pressure situations daily.
attacks.zh: 频繁的恐慌发作会显著影响个人在日常高压情况下表现良好的能力。

attain.en: With consistent effort and proper guidance, students can attain excellent results in their academic pursuits.
attain.zh: 通过持续的努力和适当的指导，学生可以在学业追求中获得优异的成绩。

attempt.en: Every attempt to reduce pollution must involve cooperation between governments and private industries to be effective.
attempt.zh: 每一次减少污染的尝试都必须涉及政府和私营企业之间的合作才能奏效。

attempt to.en: The government should attempt to implement stricter regulations on industrial pollution to protect natural ecosystems.
attempt to.zh: 政府应该尝试实施更严格的工业污染法规，以保护自然生态系统。

attend.en: Many young professionals choose to attend international conferences to expand their knowledge and build networks.
attend.zh: 许多年轻专业人士选择参加国际会议，以扩展知识面和建立人脉。

attendance.en: Regular school attendance is crucial for children's academic development and social skills.
attendance.zh: 规律的上学出勤对孩子的学业发展和社交技能至关重要。

attended.en: Over five hundred students attended the lecture to learn about the latest developments in scientific research.
attended.zh: 超过五百名学生参加了这次讲座，以了解科学研究的最新进展。

attention.en: Students should pay close attention to the instructions provided by the examiner to avoid making unnecessary mistakes.
attention.zh: 学生应密切关注考官提供的说明，以避免犯不必要的错误。

attention to.en: Success in any field requires careful attention to detail and a commitment to continuous improvement.
attention to.zh: 在任何领域的成功都需要仔细关注细节，并致力于持续改进。

attic.en: The family converted the dusty attic into a functional home office during the pandemic.
attic.zh: 这家人疫情时期把落满灰尘的阁楼改造成了一个实用的家庭办公室。

exhaust.en: The constant demands of work eventually exhaust employees, leading to decreased productivity and burnout.
exhaust.zh: 工作持续的要求最终耗尽员工的精力，导致生产率下降和倦怠。

exhausted.en: After completing the marathon, the runners were completely exhausted and needed immediate rest.
exhausted.zh: 完成马拉松后，跑步者们完全精疲力竭，需要立即休息。

exhibit.en: The museum will exhibit ancient artifacts from the Ming Dynasty to showcase China's rich cultural heritage.
exhibit.zh: 博物馆将展出明朝时期的古代文物，展示中国丰富的文化遗产。

expands.en: As the population grows, the city expands rapidly into surrounding rural areas, causing urban sprawl.
expands.zh: 随着人口增长，这座城市迅速向周边农村地区扩展，造成城市扩张。

expansion.en: The rapid expansion of urban areas often leads to significant environmental degradation and loss of natural habitats worldwide.
expansion.zh: 城市地区的迅速扩张往往导致严重的环境退化和世界各地自然栖息地的丧失。

expect.en: Students should expect rigorous academic standards when pursuing higher education abroad.
expect.zh: 学生应该预期海外高等教育有严格的学术标准。

expectations.en: Many employees feel that their professional expectations are not met by the current management strategies implemented in the workplace.
expectations.zh: 许多员工觉得当前的管理策略未能满足他们的职业期望。

expected.en: It is expected that global temperatures will rise significantly if immediate action is not taken soon.
expected.zh: 预计如果不尽快采取立即行动，全球气温将显著上升。

expedition.en: The scientific expedition to Antarctica aims to study the effects of climate change on polar ecosystems.
expedition.zh: 南极科学考察旨在研究气候变化对极地生态系统的影响。

expeditions.en: Historical expeditions to remote regions have contributed significantly to our understanding of ancient civilizations.
expeditions.zh: 对偏远地区的历史考察为我们理解古代文明做出了重大贡献。

exacerbating.en: The rising unemployment rate is exacerbating the housing crisis, as more families struggle to afford rent in urban areas.
exacerbating.zh: 不断上升的失业率正在加剧住房危机，因为越来越多的家庭在城市地区难以负担租金。

exact.en: I cannot give you the exact number of participants, but it was approximately five hundred people who attended the conference.
exact.zh: 我无法给你确切的参与者人数，但大约有五百人参加了这次会议。

exactly.en: It is difficult to determine exactly how many species will become extinct due to habitat loss.
exactly.zh: 很难确切确定有多少物种将因栖息地丧失而灭绝。

excuse.en: Some students use their part-time jobs as an excuse for not completing their assignments on time during exams.
excuse.zh: 一些学生以兼职工作为借口，在考试期间不按时完成作业。

execute.en: The company needs to execute its marketing strategy effectively if it hopes to increase sales and gain market share.
execute.zh: 如果公司希望增加销售额并获得市场份额，就需要有效地执行其营销策略。

executive.en: The executive team meets every Monday to discuss the company's performance and make important decisions about the future.
executive.zh: 执行团队每周一开会讨论公司业绩，并对未来做出重要决策。

executives.en: Senior executives often struggle to balance corporate profitability with the ethical responsibilities owed to their respective local communities effectively.
executives.zh: 高级管理人员往往难以有效地平衡企业盈利能力与对各自当地社区承担的道德责任。

exempt.en: In some countries, small businesses are exempt from certain tax regulations to encourage entrepreneurship and economic growth.
exempt.zh: 在一些国家，小企业可以免缴某些税收，以鼓励创业和经济增长。

exercise.en: Engaging in regular physical exercise is vital for maintaining a healthy lifestyle and preventing chronic disease.
exercise.zh: 参与规律的体育锻炼对于保持健康的生活方式和预防慢性疾病至关重要。

exert.en: Governments should exert more pressure on corporations to reduce their carbon emissions and protect the environment.
exert.zh: 政府应该对企业施加更大压力，要求它们减少碳排放并保护环境。

construction.en: The construction of new housing complexes must adhere to strict safety regulations to ensure the well-being of residents.
construction.zh: 新住房综合体的建设必须遵守严格的安全法规，以确保居民的福祉。

constructions.en: Ancient stone constructions throughout the region attract numerous tourists each year.
constructions.zh: 该地区周围的古代石制建筑每年吸引大量游客。

constructive.en: Students benefit greatly from constructive feedback that highlights both strengths and areas for improvement.
constructive.zh: 学生从建设性的反馈中获益匪浅，这种反馈既肯定优点也指出改进之处。

constructs.en: Social psychology examines how cultural values construct our understanding of personal identity.
constructs.zh: 社会心理学研究文化价值观如何构建我们对个人身份的理解。

consult.en: Individuals should consult with medical professionals before starting any new exercise programme.
consult.zh: 个人在开始任何新的锻炼计划之前应该咨询医疗专业人员。

consultancy.en: The multinational company hired a management consultancy to improve its operational efficiency.
consultancy.zh: 这家跨国公司聘请了一家管理咨询公司来提高运营效率。

consultant.en: A financial consultant can help families develop effective strategies for long-term wealth accumulation.
consultant.zh: 财务顾问可以帮助家庭制定有效的长期财富积累策略。

consultants.en: Many corporations rely on external consultants to provide specialised expertise during complex projects.
consultants.zh: 许多公司在复杂项目期间依赖外部顾问提供专业知识和建议。

consultation.en: The government conducted widespread public consultation before implementing the new environmental regulations.
consultation.zh: 政府在实施新的环境法规之前进行了广泛的公众咨询。

consulted.en: The urban planning team consulted with local residents to understand their transportation needs.
consulted.zh: 城市规划团队咨询了当地居民以了解他们的交通需求。

branch.en: The bank has opened a new branch in the city center to provide better services to local customers.
branch.zh: 该银行在市中心开设了一家新分行，以便为当地客户提供更好的服务。

branches.en: Large corporations often establish branches in different countries to expand their global market reach and services.
branches.zh: 大公司经常在不同国家建立分公司，以扩大其全球市场范围和服务。

brand.en: Consumer loyalty often depends on whether a brand maintains high quality standards and ethical practices throughout its production process.
brand.zh: 消费者忠诚度通常取决于一个品牌是否在整个生产过程中保持高标准的质量和道德实践。

brave.en: It takes a brave decision to change careers after working in the same field for decades.
brave.zh: 在同一领域工作数十年后转行需要勇敢的决定。

breach.en: The security breach exposed sensitive customer data and damaged the company's reputation.
breach.zh: 安全漏洞暴露了敏感的客户数据，损害了公司的声誉。

bread.en: In many developing countries, bread remains an affordable staple food for millions of families.
bread.zh: 在许多发展中国家，面包仍然是数百万家庭负担得起的主食。

break.en: It is essential for students to take a short break during study sessions to maintain concentration levels.
break.zh: 学生在学习期间短暂休息以保持注意力集中是至关重要的。

breakdown.en: The breakdown in communication between team members led to significant project delays.
breakdown.zh: 团队成员之间沟通的破裂导致了项目严重的延误。

breakfast.en: Research shows that eating a nutritious breakfast can enhance academic performance in students.
breakfast.zh: 研究表明，吃有营养的早餐可以提高学生的学业表现。

breakthrough.en: Scientists announced a major breakthrough in renewable energy technology last month.
breakthrough.zh: 科学家们上个月宣布了可再生能源技术的重大突破。

coordinate.en: The government needs to coordinate efforts between different departments to address environmental issues effectively.
coordinate.zh: 政府需要协调各部门之间的努力，以有效应对环境问题。

encompass.en: A comprehensive education policy should encompass various aspects including curriculum development, teacher training, and student assessment.
encompass.zh: 一项全面的教育政策应涵盖课程开发、教师培训和学生评估等各个方面。

encounter.en: Students may encounter significant difficulties when adapting to new learning environments in foreign countries.
encounter.zh: 学生在适应外国新学习环境时可能会遇到重大困难。

encountered.en: During my travels, I encountered many difficulties, but solving them helped me become more independent and confident.
encountered.zh: 在旅行中，我遇到了许多困难，但解决它们帮助我变得更加独立和自信。

encourage.en: Governments should encourage citizens to use public transportation by reducing fares and improving the overall service quality.
encourage.zh: 政府应通过降低票价和提高整体服务质量来鼓励市民使用公共交通。

encouragement.en: Parental encouragement plays a crucial role in building children's confidence and motivation to learn.
encouragement.zh: 父母的鼓励在培养孩子的学习信心和动力方面起着至关重要的作用。

encouraging.en: The recent decline in pollution levels is encouraging, suggesting that environmental protection measures are finally becoming effective.
encouraging.zh: 最近污染水平的下降令人鼓舞，表明环境保护措施终于开始生效。

endanger.en: Industrial pollution can endanger public health and damage ecosystems in surrounding communities.
endanger.zh: 工业污染可能危及公众健康并破坏周边社区的生态系统。

endangered.en: Many endangered species face imminent extinction due to significant habitat loss and persistent illegal hunting practices worldwide.
endangered.zh: 许多濒危物种因栖息地丧失和全球范围内持续的非法狩猎行为而面临迫在眉睫的灭绝。

endeavor.en: Learning a new language is a challenging but rewarding endeavor that opens doors to countless opportunities.
endeavor.zh: 学习一门新语言是一项具有挑战性但回报丰厚的努力，它为无数机会打开了大门。

component.en: Trust is considered a fundamental component of any successful long-term relationship between international business partners today.
component.zh: 信任被认为是当今国际商业伙伴之间任何成功的长期关系的基本组成部分。

components.en: The failure was attributed to multiple faulty components in the industrial machinery.
components.zh: 故障归因于工业机械中的多个有缺陷的部件。

compose.en: The committee will compose a detailed report on the environmental impact of the project.
compose.zh: 委员会将撰写一份关于该项目环境影响的具体报告。

composed.en: The committee is composed of experts from various fields who analyze environmental policies and suggest improvements.
composed.zh: 该委员会由来自各个领域的专家组成，他们分析环境政策并提出改进建议。

composers.en: Many famous composers from the Romantic era drew significant inspiration from nature.
composers.zh: 许多浪漫主义时期的著名作曲家从大自然中获得了重要的灵感。

composition.en: The composition of the workforce has changed dramatically in the past few decades.
composition.zh: 劳动力结构在过去几十年发生了巨大变化。

compost.en: Using compost in agricultural practices can significantly reduce reliance on chemical fertilizers.
compost.zh: 在农业实践中使用堆肥可以大大减少对化肥的依赖。

compound.en: The chemical compound found in certain plants has shown promising results in medical research.
compound.zh: 在某些植物中发现的化合物已在医学研究中显示出可喜的结果。

compounds.en: Certain chemical compounds found in heavily processed foods can sometimes have significant negative effects on human health.
compounds.zh: 某些在重度加工食品中发现的化学化合物有时会对人类健康产生显著的负面影响。

comprehend.en: Students often struggle to comprehend abstract theoretical concepts without practical examples.
comprehend.zh: 如果没有实际例子，学生通常很难理解抽象的理论概念。

expel.en: The university decided to expel the student for repeatedly violating academic integrity policies, which raised concerns about fairness in disciplinary procedures.
expel.zh: 大学决定开除这个学生，因为他反复违反学术诚信政策，这引发了对纪律处分程序公平性的担忧。

expend.en: During physical exercise, the human body expends considerable energy to maintain optimal function and regulate body temperature effectively.
expend.zh: 在体育锻炼期间，人体消耗大量能量以维持最佳功能并有效调节体温。

expense.en: At the expense of environmental sustainability, some developing countries prioritize economic growth to address immediate poverty issues.
expense.zh: 一些发展中国家以环境可持续性为代价，优先考虑经济增长以解决眼前的贫困问题。

expenses.en: When studying abroad, international students must carefully manage their living expenses to avoid financial difficulties throughout their academic program.
expenses.zh: 在国外学习时，国际学生必须仔细管理生活开支，以避免在整个学习期间出现经济困难。

expensive.en: Living in major metropolitan areas can be extremely expensive due to high housing costs and daily expenditure requirements.
expensive.zh: 由于高昂的住房成本和日常支出需求，生活在主要大都市区域可能非常昂贵。

experience.en: Through hands-on experience in laboratories, science students gain practical skills that complement their theoretical knowledge obtained from textbooks.
experience.zh: 通过在实验室的动手经验，理科学生获得了补充教科书理论知识的实践技能。

experiment.en: The experiment conducted by researchers demonstrated that environmental factors significantly influence animal behavior patterns in their natural habitats.
experiment.zh: 研究人员进行的实验表明，环境因素显著影响动物在其自然栖息地的行为模式。

experimental.en: The company is currently testing an experimental method to reduce carbon emissions in many large factories.
experimental.zh: 该公司目前正在测试一种实验性的方法，以减少许多大型工厂的碳排放。

experimentation.en: Scientific breakthroughs often require years of careful experimentation and repeated testing to validate initial hypotheses before publication.
experimentation.zh: 科学突破通常需要多年的仔细实验和重复测试，才能在发表前验证初步假设。

experiments.en: Rigorous controlled experiments are absolutely necessary to verify the hypothesis before publishing the final scientific findings publicly.
experiments.zh: 在公开发布最终科学发现之前，严格的对照实验对于验证假设是绝对必要的。

endemic.en: Many endemic species in the Amazon rainforest face extinction due to widespread deforestation and habitat loss.
endemic.zh: 由于大规模森林砍伐和栖息地丧失，亚马逊雨林中许多特有物种面临灭绝。

enforcing.en: The government is enforcing stricter environmental regulations to combat air pollution in major cities.
enforcing.zh: 政府正在实施更严格的环境法规，以对抗主要城市的空气污染。

evidently.en: Evidently, the new waste management policy has significantly reduced landfill contributions in urban areas.
evidently.zh: 显然，新的废物管理政策已大幅减少了城市地区的垃圾填埋量。

evil.en: Some philosophers argue that ignoring climate change is one of the greatest evil acts of our generation.
evil.zh: 一些哲学家认为，忽视气候变化是我们这一代人最大的恶行之一。

evoke.en: The documentary aims to evoke public sympathy toward endangered marine creatures and their fragile ecosystems.
evoke.zh: 这部纪录片旨在唤起公众对濒危海洋生物及其脆弱生态系统的同情。

evolution.en: The evolution of technology has drastically changed how people communicate, work, and access information in the modern world.
evolution.zh: 技术的演变极大地改变了人们在现代世界中沟通、工作和获取信息的方式。

evolutionary.en: The evolutionary development of language suggests that communication skills are innate rather than solely learned through social interaction.
evolutionary.zh: 语言的进化发展表明，沟通技能是天生的，而不是仅仅通过社会互动学习到的。

evolve.en: Public attitudes toward sustainable living continue to evolve as more people recognize the urgency of climate action.
evolve.zh: 随着越来越多的人认识到气候行动的紧迫性，公众对可持续生活的态度持续转变。

evolved.en: Technology has evolved rapidly over the past few decades, fundamentally changing how people communicate and access information globally.
evolved.zh: 技术在过去的几十年里迅速发展，从根本上改变了人们沟通和获取信息的方式。

explode.en: The population of major cities around the world is expected to explode significantly in the coming decades due to urbanization.
explode.zh: 由于城市化进程，世界各地主要城市的人口预计将在未来几十年大幅增长。

exploded.en: The widely believed myth about this ancient civilization was finally exploded by recent groundbreaking archaeological discoveries.
exploded.zh: 最近具有突破性的考古发现最终推翻了这个关于古代文明被广泛相信的神话。

exploit.en: Companies should not exploit their workers by paying them wages that are below the legal minimum requirements.
exploit.zh: 公司不应该通过支付低于法定最低工资来剥削工人。

exploitation.en: The exploitation of natural resources has raised serious environmental concerns among governments and conservation organizations worldwide.
exploitation.zh: 自然资源的开发引起了世界各地政府和环保组织对环境的严重担忧。

exploiting.en: Ethical businesses avoid exploiting vulnerable populations by ensuring fair wages and safe working conditions for all employees.
exploiting.zh: 道德企业通过确保所有员工获得公平工资和安全的工作条件来避免剥削弱势群体。

explore.en: Students should actively explore different career options and gain practical work experience before making important decisions.
explore.zh: 学生在做出重要决定之前应该积极探索不同的职业选择并获得实际工作经验。

explored.en: Researchers have explored various renewable energy sources to find sustainable alternatives to fossil fuels for future generations.
explored.zh: 研究人员探索了各种可再生能源，以为后代寻找化石燃料的可持续替代品。

explorer.en: The famous explorer Marco Polo traveled extensively throughout Asia and documented his remarkable experiences during the 13th century.
explorer.zh: 著名探险家马可·波罗在13世纪广泛游历了亚洲，并记录了他非凡的经历。

explorers.en: Early explorers often faced dangerous conditions while mapping unknown territories across the vast oceans and continents.
explorers.zh: 早期探险家在跨越广阔海洋和大陆绘制未知领土地图时，经常面临危险条件。

explosion.en: The rapid explosion of digital technology has fundamentally transformed how modern societies communicate, learn, and work.
explosion.zh: 数字技术的快速爆发从根本上改变了现代社会的沟通、学习和工作方式。

external.en: Students often struggle with external pressures from family and society, which can negatively impact their academic performance and mental health.
external.zh: 学生经常难以应对来自家庭和社会的外部压力，这可能对他们的学业表现和心理健康产生负面影响。

externally.en: The university has been externally audited to ensure that all financial records meet international standards.
externally.zh: 这所大学已接受外部审计，以确保所有财务记录符合国际标准。

extinct.en: Conservationists are working tirelessly to prevent rare species from becoming extinct due to habitat loss and illegal hunting activities.
extinct.zh: 保护主义者正在不懈努力，防止稀有物种因栖息地丧失和非法狩猎活动而灭绝。

extinction.en: Many species around the world are facing extinction due to rapid habitat loss and the severe effects of climate change.
extinction.zh: 由于栖息地的迅速丧失和气候变化的严重影响，世界上许多物种正面临灭绝。

extinguish.en: Firefighters worked through the night to extinguish the flames before they could spread to nearby buildings.
extinguish.zh: 消防员彻夜工作，在火势蔓延到附近建筑物之前将其扑灭。

extra.en: Many students require extra time to complete complex examinations, ensuring that everyone has a fair opportunity to succeed.
extra.zh: 许多学生需要额外的时间来完成复杂的考试，确保每个人都有公平的成功的机会。

extra cost.en: There is an extra cost for express delivery, usually around twenty dollars depending on the package size.
extra cost.zh: 快递送货需要额外费用，通常根据包裹大小约为二十美元。

extract.en: The research team aims to extract valuable information from thousands of surveys collected over several years.
extract.zh: 研究团队旨在从多年来收集的数千份调查中提取有价值的信息。

extraction.en: The extraction of natural resources must be carefully managed to prevent environmental degradation and pollution.
extraction.zh: 自然资源开采必须谨慎管理，以防止环境退化和污染。

extraordinary.en: The team made extraordinary progress in developing the new vaccine within such a short period of time.
extraordinary.zh: 该团队在如此短的时间内开发新疫苗方面取得了非凡的进展。

failed.en: Many students failed to achieve the required scores because they did not prepare adequately for the examination.
failed.zh: 许多学生未能达到所需分数，因为他们没有为考试做好充分准备。

failure.en: The failure to implement strict regulations has led to a significant rise in air pollution levels.
failure.zh: 未能实施严格的规定导致空气污染水平显著上升。

fair.en: It is fair to say that globalisation has brought both economic benefits and challenges to developing nations.
fair.zh: 公平地说，全球化给发展中国家带来了经济利益和挑战。

fairly.en: Although the exam was challenging, she performed fairly well and achieved a respectable score overall.
fairly.zh: 虽然考试具有挑战性，但她表现得相当不错，总体取得了不错的成绩。

fairy.en: Children are often fascinated by fairy tales because they feature magical creatures and moral lessons.
fairy.zh: 孩子们通常对童话故事着迷，因为它们以神奇的生物和道德教训为特色。

faith.en: Having faith in one's abilities is essential for overcoming academic challenges and achieving long-term success.
faith.zh: 对自己的能力充满信心对于克服学业挑战和取得长期成功至关重要。

fake.en: Consumers should be cautious about purchasing designer products, as many fake items are sold online.
fake.zh: 消费者在网上购买名牌产品时应谨慎，因为许多假冒产品在网络上销售。

falcons.en: Falcons are remarkable birds of prey that can dive at incredible speeds to catch their targets.
falcons.zh: 猎鹰是出色的猛禽，能够以惊人的速度俯冲捕捉猎物。

fall.en: There was a sharp fall in the number of tourists visiting the region during the winter season.
fall.zh: 冬季期间，访问该地区的游客数量急剧下降。

fall behind.en: Students who do not manage their time effectively may fall behind in their academic responsibilities.
fall behind.zh: 不能有效管理时间的学生可能会在学业责任方面落后。

exposure.en: Early exposure to a second language significantly enhances a child's ability to acquire native-like pronunciation and fluency later in life.
exposure.zh: 早期接触第二语言显著增强了孩子日后获得母语般发音和流利度的能力。

exposures.en: Multiple exposures to various teaching methodologies help students develop versatile learning strategies and adaptable skills.
exposures.zh: 多次接触不同的教学方法帮助学生培养多样化的学习策略和适应能力。

express.en: Students should be encouraged to express their opinions freely during classroom discussions to foster critical thinking.
express.zh: 应鼓励学生在课堂讨论中自由表达意见，以培养批判性思维。

expressions.en: Facial expressions play a crucial role in non-verbal communication during face-to-face interactions between different individuals globally today.
expressions.zh: 面部表情在当今不同个体之间的全球面对面交流中的非语言沟通起着至关重要的作用。

extend.en: The city council plans to extend the cycling lane network throughout the downtown area to promote eco-friendly transportation.
extend.zh: 市议会计划在整个市中心扩展自行车道网络，以促进环保交通。

extended.en: Many universities offer extended deadlines for students who are facing exceptional circumstances during their final examinations.
extended.zh: 许多大学为那些在期末考试期间面临特殊情况的学生提供延长的截止日期。

extension.en: The university granted an extension for the dissertation submission deadline due to the student's unexpected medical circumstances.
extension.zh: 由于学生意外的健康状况，大学批准了论文提交的延期。

extensive.en: The government conducted an extensive survey to understand the changing habits of consumers across the nation.
extensive.zh: 政府进行了一项广泛的调查，以了解全国消费者不断变化的习惯。

extensively.en: The impact of social media on adolescent mental health has been studied extensively by psychologists worldwide.
extensively.zh: 社交媒体对青少年心理健康的影响已被世界各地的心理学家广泛研究。

extent.en: It is difficult to determine the full extent of the damage caused by the recent economic crisis.
extent.zh: 很难确定最近经济危机造成的损害的全部程度。

extravagant.en: Many people consider buying designer brands an extravagant way to spend money, especially when affordable alternatives are equally durable.
extravagant.zh: 许多人认为购买名牌是一种奢侈的消费方式，尤其是当更便宜的替代品同样耐用的时候。

extreme.en: Extreme weather conditions such as hurricanes and floods have become more frequent due to climate change, causing widespread damage.
extreme.zh: 由于气候变化，飓风和洪水等极端天气条件变得更加频繁，造成了广泛的破坏。

extremely.en: The weather conditions became extremely severe, causing significant disruptions to transportation and daily activities across the region.
extremely.zh: 天气状况变得极其严重，导致该地区交通和日常活动发生重大中断。

eye.en: The human eye is capable of distinguishing approximately ten million different colors, making our visual perception remarkably sophisticated.
eye.zh: 人眼能够区分大约一千万种不同的颜色，使我们的视觉感知非常复杂。

eye contact.en: Maintaining appropriate eye contact during a job interview demonstrates confidence and helps establish trust with the interviewer.
eye contact.zh: 在求职面试中保持适当的眼神交流可以展示自信，并有助于与面试官建立信任。

eyesight.en: Prolonged screen time can gradually deteriorate one's eyesight, which is why eye doctors recommend taking regular breaks.
eyesight.zh: 长时间使用屏幕会逐渐损害视力，这就是眼科医生建议定期休息的原因。

fabric.en: The quality of fabric used in clothing significantly affects both its comfort level and how long it will last before wearing out.
fabric.zh: 服装所用面料的质量显著影响其舒适度和耐穿程度。

fabrics.en: Synthetic fabrics like polyester and nylon are popular because they resist wrinkles and dry quickly compared to natural fibers.
fabrics.zh: 涤纶和尼龙等合成面料因其抗皱、快干的特性而广受欢迎，相比天然纤维更具优势。

fabulous.en: The museum's new exhibition features a fabulous collection of ancient artifacts that attract visitors from around the world.
fabulous.zh: 博物馆的新展览展示了一系列精美的古代文物，吸引来自世界各地的参观者。

face.en: The government must face the growing concern about environmental degradation and take immediate action to address this critical issue.
face.zh: 政府必须正视日益严重的环境退化问题，并立即采取行动来解决这一关键问题。

facial.en: Facial recognition technology is becoming increasingly common in airports to streamline the security checking process for passengers.
facial.zh: 面部识别技术在机场变得越来越普遍，以简化乘客的安全检查流程。

facilitate.en: Many educational institutions use online platforms to facilitate distance learning and make education more accessible.
facilitate.zh: 许多教育机构使用在线平台来促进远程学习，使教育更加易于获取。

facilitated.en: The conference was facilitated by experts in the field who guided discussions on climate change and sustainable development.
facilitated.zh: 该会议由该领域的专家主持，他们引导了关于气候变化和可持续发展的讨论。

facilitates.en: Regular physical exercise facilitates better sleep patterns and improves concentration levels throughout the day.
facilitates.zh: 定期的体育锻炼促进更好的睡眠模式，并提高全天的注意力水平。

facilitating.en: The government is facilitating economic recovery by implementing new policies that support small businesses.
facilitating.zh: 政府正在通过实施支持小型企业的新政策来促进经济复苏。

facilitation.en: The facilitation of learning requires not only knowledge of the subject but also strong interpersonal skills.
facilitation.zh: 学习的促进不仅需要学科知识，还需要较强的人际交往能力。

facilitator.en: A skilled facilitator can guide group discussions effectively while ensuring all participants have an equal voice.
facilitator.zh: 一位熟练的引导者可以有效地引导小组讨论，同时确保所有参与者都有平等的发言权。

facilitators.en: Experienced facilitators create a supportive environment where participants feel comfortable sharing diverse perspectives.
facilitators.zh: 经验丰富的引导者创造一个支持性的环境，让参与者能够舒适地分享不同的观点。

facilities.en: The university provides excellent sports facilities, including a swimming pool and a fully equipped gymnasium for students.
facilities.zh: 该大学提供卓越的体育设施，包括游泳池和设施齐全的健身房供学生使用。

facility.en: The sports facility provides equipment and training areas for athletes at all skill levels to practice regularly.
facility.zh: 该体育设施为各级别运动员提供设备和训练场地，以便他们定期练习。

fact.en: It is a well-established fact that regular exercise contributes to both physical and mental well-being.
fact.zh: 众所周知，定期锻炼有助于身心健康。

factor.en: The economic factor plays a significant role in determining the success of any development project.
factor.zh: 经济因素在决定任何发展项目的成功方面起着重要作用。

factored.en: When the environmental costs were factored into the analysis, the project appeared far less viable.
factored.zh: 当环境成本被纳入分析时，该项目看起来远不那么可行。

factories.en: Many old factories have been converted into modern art galleries to preserve the industrial heritage of the city.
factories.zh: 许多旧工厂已被改造成现代艺术画廊，以保护城市的工业遗产。

factoring.en: Factoring in the rising energy prices, the company revised its production forecast downward.
factoring.zh: 考虑到能源价格上涨，公司向下修正了生产预测。

factory.en: The factory regulations have been strengthened to minimise industrial pollution in urban areas.
factory.zh: 工厂法规已得到加强，以减少城市地区的工业污染。

factual.en: Students must learn to distinguish between factual information and personal opinions in their research.
factual.zh: 学生在研究中必须学会区分事实信息和个人观点。

faculty.en: The faculty members have expressed concerns about the proposed changes to the curriculum.
faculty.zh: 教师成员对课程改革的提议表示了担忧。

fade.en: Traditional cultural practices are beginning to fade as younger generations adopt modern lifestyles.
fade.zh: 随着年轻一代采用现代生活方式，传统文化的做法正在逐渐消失。

fail.en: Students who fail to submit their assignments on time may face penalties in their final grades.
fail.zh: 未能按时提交作业的学生可能会在最终成绩中受到处罚。

false.en: The false advertising led to many customers demanding refunds, highlighting the importance of honest marketing practices.
false.zh: 虚假的广告导致许多顾客要求退款，凸显了诚实营销实践的重要性。

fame.en: Many young people pursue fame through social media, believing it will bring them happiness and financial success.
fame.zh: 许多年轻人通过社交媒体追求名望，认为这会给他们带来幸福和经济上的成功。

familiar.en: Students often feel more comfortable in a familiar environment, which can positively impact their academic performance and overall confidence.
familiar.zh: 学生通常在熟悉的环境中感到更舒适，这可以对他们的学业表现和整体信心产生积极影响。

families.en: Modern families are increasingly diverse, with many choosing to have single parents or same-sex couples raising children.
families.zh: 现代家庭越来越多元化，许多人选择单亲或同性夫妇抚养孩子。

family.en: Family plays a crucial role in shaping an individual's values and personality during their formative years.
family.zh: 家庭在塑造个人的价值观和性格方面起着至关重要的作用。

family members.en: Extended family members often provide additional support and childcare assistance to working parents.
family members.zh: 大家庭成员经常为在职父母提供额外的支持和儿童照护帮助。

famine.en: Famine remains a serious issue in developing countries, where climate change and conflict exacerbate food shortages.
famine.zh: 饥荒仍然是发展中国家面临的严重问题，气候变化和冲突加剧了粮食短缺。

famous.en: The famous architect designed several iconic buildings that have become major tourist attractions in the city.
famous.zh: 这位著名建筑师设计了几座标志性建筑，已成为城市的主要旅游胜地。

fan.en: Being a fan of classical music often encourages individuals to attend live concerts and support local orchestras.
fan.zh: 成为古典音乐迷往往鼓励个人参加现场音乐会并支持当地管弦乐队。

fancy.en: Some people think it is fancy to dine at expensive restaurants, but home cooking can be equally satisfying.
fancy.zh: 有些人认为在昂贵的餐厅用餐很时尚，但家常烹饪同样令人满意。

export.en: The government plans to export more agricultural products to increase its national income significantly this year.
export.zh: 政府计划出口更多的农产品以显著增加今年的国民收入。

exported.en: Last year, the company exported over one million units to various Asian markets, generating significant revenue.
exported.zh: 去年，该公司向多个亚洲市场出口了超过一百万台设备，创造了可观的收入。

exporter.en: China has become one of the world's largest exporter of electronic products, dominating global markets.
exporter.zh: 中国已成为世界上最大的电子产品出口国之一，在全球市场占据主导地位。

exporters.en: Many exporters have benefited significantly from the favourable trade agreements established between countries recently.
exporters.zh: 许多出口商已从近年来各国之间签订的有利贸易协定中获得了显著收益。

exporting.en: The factory is currently exporting textiles to several European countries, including Germany and France.
exporting.zh: 这家工厂目前正在向包括德国和法国在内的几个欧洲国家出口纺织品。

exports.en: The government's new policy aims to boost agricultural exports significantly to improve farmers' income.
exports.zh: 政府的新政策旨在大幅增加农产品出口，以提高农民的收入。

expose.en: Travelling abroad can expose young people to different cultures and help them develop broader perspectives.
expose.zh: 出国旅行可以让年轻人接触不同的文化，帮助他们拓展更广阔的视野。

exposed.en: Many children are exposed to harmful content online, which raises serious concerns about the need for stricter internet safety regulations globally.
exposed.zh: 许多儿童接触到网上的有害内容，这引发了对全球需要更严格互联网安全法规的严重担忧。

exposes.en: The documentary exposes the environmental damage caused by certain industries and raises public awareness.
exposes.zh: 这部纪录片揭露了某些行业造成的环境破坏，并提高了公众意识。

exposing.en: The journalist is exposing the corruption scandal that has affected thousands of innocent citizens.
exposing.zh: 这位记者正在揭露这起已影响数千名无辜公民的腐败丑闻。

fields.en: Many students choose to pursue careers in scientific fields where employment opportunities are more abundant.
fields.zh: 许多学生选择从事科学领域的职业，因为那里的就业机会更加丰富。

fierce.en: The competition among graduates for desirable jobs has become increasingly fierce in recent years.
fierce.zh: 近年来，毕业生之间对理想工作的竞争变得日益激烈。

fifty.en: Approximately fifty participants attended the conference on sustainable development held in the city center.
fifty.zh: 大约有五十名参与者参加了在市中心举办的关于可持续发展的会议。

fight.en: Governments should take immediate action to fight against environmental degradation and pollution.
fight.zh: 政府应该立即采取行动来对抗环境退化和污染问题。

fighting.en: Governments are fighting against climate change by implementing stricter regulations on carbon emissions from major industries.
fighting.zh: 各国政府正在通过对主要工业碳排放实施更严格的规定来对抗气候变化。

figure.en: The figure of tourists visiting the country has risen dramatically over the past five years.
figure.zh: 过去五年间，访问该国的游客数量急剧上升。

figure out.en: Researchers are working hard to figure out the main causes of the recent economic decline.
figure out.zh: 研究人员正在努力找出最近经济下滑的主要原因。

figures.en: The statistics figures indicate that renewable energy usage has doubled compared to last year.
figures.zh: 统计数据显示，可再生能源的使用量比去年翻了一番。

file.en: Applicants must file their completed forms before the deadline to be considered for the scholarship.
file.zh: 申请人必须在截止日期前提交填好的表格才有资格获得奖学金。

files.en: Modern offices store most of their important documents in digital files rather than paper copies.
files.zh: 现代办公室将大部分重要文件存储在数字文件中，而不是纸质副本。

feast.en: During the harvest festival, villagers prepared a magnificent feast featuring traditional dishes from different regions.
feast.zh: 在丰收节期间，村民们准备了一场盛大的宴会，展示了来自不同地区的传统菜肴。

feat.en: Climbing Mount Everest is widely regarded as one of the most remarkable feats of human endurance.
feat.zh: 攀登珠穆朗玛峰被广泛认为是人类耐力最卓越的壮举之一。

feathers.en: The artist created stunning sculptures using colourful feathers from various bird species found in tropical forests.
feathers.zh: 这位艺术家使用在热带森林中发现的多种鸟类的彩色羽毛创作了令人惊叹的雕塑。

feature.en: One distinctive feature of traditional Japanese architecture is the seamless integration of indoor and outdoor spaces.
feature.zh: 日本传统建筑的一个显著特点是室内外空间的无缝融合。

featured.en: The documentary featured interviews with several immigration experts who shared their insights on global migration patterns.
featured.zh: 这部纪录片采访了几位移民专家，分享了他们对全球迁移模式的见解。

features.en: The new software includes several unique features that allow users to manage their time more effectively and efficiently.
features.zh: 新软件包含几个独特的功能，允许用户更有效地管理他们的时间。

featuring.en: The international conference, featuring speakers from forty countries, addressed pressing environmental challenges facing our planet.
featuring.zh: 这次国际会议邀请了来自四十个国家的演讲者，讨论地球面临的紧迫环境挑战。

federal.en: The federal government announced new policies to improve public transportation systems across major metropolitan areas.
federal.zh: 联邦政府宣布了新的政策，以改善主要都市地区的公共交通系统。

fee.en: Many universities have significantly increased their tuition fees, making higher education less accessible for low-income families.
fee.zh: 许多大学大幅提高了学费，使低收入家庭更难接受高等教育。

feeble.en: Despite their feeble attempts to address the problem, the committee failed to propose any effective solutions.
feeble.zh: 尽管他们试图解决这个问题，但委员会未能提出任何有效的解决方案。

female.en: Encouraging female participation in STEM fields is crucial for fostering innovation and achieving gender equality in the workplace.
female.zh: 鼓励女性参与STEM领域对于培养创新和实现职场性别平等至关重要。

feminine.en: The study examined how society influences the development of feminine traits in young girls during their formative years.
feminine.zh: 这项研究探讨了社会如何在女孩成长过程中影响其女性特质的发展。

fence.en: The farmer built a wooden fence around the property to keep the livestock secure and prevent predators from entering.
fence.zh: 这位农民在房产周围建了一道木栅栏，以保护牲畜安全并防止捕食者进入。

fences.en: Some people believe that stronger legal fences should be established to protect personal data in the digital age.
fences.zh: 一些人认为，在这个数字时代，应该建立更强的法律屏障来保护个人数据。

ferry.en: The ferry service connects the mainland with several remote islands, providing essential transportation for local residents.
ferry.zh: 渡轮服务将大陆与几个偏远岛屿连接起来，为当地居民提供必要的交通服务。

fertile.en: The fertile river delta has been cultivated by local farmers for centuries, producing abundant crops each year.
fertile.zh: 肥沃的河流三角洲已被当地农民耕种了几个世纪，每年都产出丰富的农作物。

fertilisers.en: Excessive use of chemical fertilisers can lead to soil degradation and contaminate groundwater supplies in surrounding areas.
fertilisers.zh: 过度使用化学肥料可能导致土壤退化，并污染周边地区的地下水供应。

fertility.en: Research indicates that environmental factors and lifestyle choices may contribute to declining fertility rates in developed nations.
fertility.zh: 研究表明，环境因素和生活方式选择可能导致发达国家的生育率下降。

fertilizer.en: Excessive use of chemical fertilizer can damage soil quality, leading to long-term environmental problems for local farming communities.
fertilizer.zh: 过度使用化学肥料会破坏土壤质量，导致当地农业社区出现长期的环境问题。

festivals.en: Traditional festivals play a crucial role in preserving cultural heritage and strengthening community bonds across generations.
festivals.zh: 传统节日在保存文化遗产和加强跨代社区联系方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

fetch.en: Many families in rural areas still have to fetch water from wells located several kilometers away from their homes.
fetch.zh: 许多农村家庭仍然需要从离家几公里外的井里取水。

feud.en: The long-standing feud between the two neighboring communities has finally been resolved through mediation and dialogue.
feud.zh: 这两个相邻社区之间长期存在的争端最终通过调解和对话得到解决。

fever.en: Medical professionals strongly advise that children who develop a high fever should be taken to hospital immediately.
fever.zh: 医疗专业人士强烈建议，发高烧的儿童应该立即送往医院。

few.en: Only a few students in the class managed to achieve a perfect score on the challenging English proficiency test.
few.zh: 班上只有少数学生在这次具有挑战性的英语水平测试中取得了满分。

fiber.en: Health experts recommend consuming foods rich in fiber because they promote better digestion and overall wellbeing.
fiber.zh: 健康专家建议食用富含纤维的食物，因为它们能促进更好的消化和整体健康。

fibre.en: Whole grain products contain an excellent source of dietary fibre that helps maintain healthy cholesterol levels.
fibre.zh: 全谷物产品含有丰富的膳食纤维，有助于维持健康的胆固醇水平。

fibres.en: The research study examined how muscle fibres adapt and strengthen in response to regular physical exercise.
fibres.zh: 这项研究考察了肌肉纤维如何适应和加强以应对定期的体育锻炼。

fiction.en: While many people enjoy reading fiction for entertainment, others argue that non-fiction provides more practical knowledge.
fiction.zh: 虽然许多人喜欢阅读小说作为娱乐，但其他人认为非小说类作品提供了更实用的知识。

field.en: After completing university, she decided to pursue a career in the medical field rather than in business.
field.zh: 大学毕业后，她决定从事医学领域而非商业领域的工作。

field trip.en: The educational field trip to the science museum allowed students to gain hands-on experience with various experiments.
field trip.zh: 这次去科学博物馆的教育实地考察让学生们获得了各种实验的亲身体验。

fascinated.en: Many tourists are fascinated by the ancient architecture in European cities, which reflects centuries of cultural heritage and artistic achievement.
fascinated.zh: 许多游客被欧洲城市古老的建筑所吸引，这些建筑反映了几百年的文化遗产和艺术成就。

fascinating.en: The documentary about deep-sea creatures proved to be fascinating, revealing species that few people had ever seen before.
fascinating.zh: 这部关于深海生物的纪录片非常引人入胜，揭示了许多人从未见过的物种。

fashion.en: Many young people follow the latest fashion trends to express their individuality and personal style clearly.
fashion.zh: 许多年轻人追随最新的时尚潮流，以清晰地表达他们的个性和个人风格。

fashionable.en: It is fashionable for young professionals to work in open-plan offices, although some argue this reduces privacy and productivity.
fashionable.zh: 年轻的专业人士在开放式办公室工作被认为很时髦，尽管有人认为这会降低隐私和效率。

fast.en: Technology has developed at a remarkably fast pace over the past decade, fundamentally changing how we communicate and work.
fast.zh: 在过去十年里，技术以惊人的速度发展，从根本上改变了我们的沟通和工作方式。

fast food.en: Fast food consumption has increased dramatically worldwide, contributing to health problems such as obesity and heart disease.
fast food.zh: 快餐消费在全球范围内急剧增加，导致了肥胖和心脏病等健康问题。

fat.en: Health experts recommend reducing the intake of fat in daily diets to prevent various chronic diseases and maintain a healthy weight.
fat.zh: 健康专家建议减少日常饮食中的脂肪摄入，以预防各种慢性疾病并保持健康体重。

fatal.en: The fatal accident on the highway highlighted the urgent need for stricter safety regulations for heavy vehicles.
fatal.zh: 高速公路上这起致命事故凸显了对重型车辆实施更严格安全法规的迫切需要。

fate.en: The fate of endangered species depends largely on government policies and international conservation efforts.
fate.zh: 濒危物种的命运很大程度上取决于政府政策和国际保护努力。

father.en: My father taught me the importance of perseverance and hard work, values that have helped me throughout my academic career.
father.zh: 我父亲教会了我坚持和努力工作的重要性，这些价值观帮助我度过了整个学术生涯。

feed.en: The volunteers decided to feed the homeless people at the shelter every Saturday morning to help those in need.
feed.zh: 志愿者们决定每周六早上在收容所喂养无家可归的人，以帮助有需要的人。

feed on.en: Successful entrepreneurs often feed on challenges and setbacks, turning them into opportunities for growth and innovation.
feed on.zh: 成功的创业者常常以挑战和挫折为动力，将它们转化为成长和创新的机会。

feedback.en: The teacher provided detailed feedback on my essay, which helped me understand my weaknesses and improve my writing skills.
feedback.zh: 老师对我的作文提供了详细的反馈，这帮助我理解自己的弱点并提高写作技能。

feeding.en: The feeding of wild animals in national parks can disrupt their natural behaviors and create dangerous dependencies on humans.
feeding.zh: 在国家公园喂养野生动物会扰乱它们的自然行为，并造成对人类的危险依赖。

feel.en: Many international students feel anxious about adapting to a new culture, but this experience often leads to personal growth.
feel.zh: 许多留学生对适应新文化感到焦虑，但这种经历通常会带来个人成长。

feelings.en: Expressing one's feelings openly is considered a sign of emotional maturity in Western cultures, whereas some Eastern cultures value restraint.
feelings.zh: 在西方文化中，公开表达情感被认为是情感成熟的表现，而一些东方文化则重视克制。

fees.en: University fees have increased significantly over the past decade, making higher education less accessible for students from low-income families.
fees.zh: 过去十年里，大学费用大幅上涨，使得低收入家庭的学生越来越难以接受高等教育。

feet.en: After walking several miles on her sore feet, the hiker finally reached the mountain summit and enjoyed the breathtaking view.
feet.zh: 走了几英里后，脚很痛的徒步旅行者终于到达了山顶，欣赏到了令人惊叹的景色。

fellow.en: My fellow students and I formed a study group to prepare for the upcoming examination, sharing notes and discussing difficult concepts.
fellow.zh: 我和同学们组建了一个学习小组来准备即将到来的考试，分享笔记并讨论难题。

fellowship.en: The research fellowship allowed me to work alongside distinguished scholars and conduct independent research in my field of interest.
fellowship.zh: 这个研究奖学金让我能够与杰出学者一起工作，并在我的研究领域进行独立研究。

fantastic.en: The fantastic scenery of the mountain region吸引了国内外游客前来观赏，旅游业因此蓬勃发展。
fantastic.zh: fantastic 的山脉风光吸引了国内外游客前来观赏，旅游业因此蓬勃发展。

fantasy.en: Many young readers are drawn to fantasy novels because they provide an escape from the stresses of daily life.
fantasy.zh: 许多年轻读者被奇幻小说所吸引，因为它们为读者提供了逃离日常生活压力的途径。

far.en: Although the new shopping centre is located far from residential areas, it still receives a large number of visitors daily.
far.zh: 尽管新购物中心位于远离居民区的地方，它每天仍然接待大量访客。

fare.en: The rising bus and train fares have become a significant burden for low-income commuters in metropolitan cities.
fare.zh: 公交车和火车票价的上涨已成为大都市低收入通勤者的重大负担。

farm.en: My grandparents decided to sell their small farm and retire to the city after working there for forty years.
farm.zh: 我的祖父母在那座小农场工作了四十年后，决定卖掉农场，搬到城市养老。

farmer.en: The farmer explained that this year's harvest was particularly poor due to unexpected floods during the planting season.
farmer.zh: 这位农民解释说，由于种植季节遭遇意外洪水，今年的收成特别差。

farmers.en: Modern technology allows farmers to monitor soil conditions and optimize irrigation systems for better yields.
farmers.zh: 现代技术使农民能够监测土壤条件并优化灌溉系统以获得更好的产量。

farming.en: Modern farming techniques help farmers produce more food efficiently to feed the rapidly growing global population sustainably.
farming.zh: 现代耕作技术帮助农民更高效地生产更多粮食，以可持续地养活迅速增长的全球人口。

farmland.en: The rapid urbanization has led to a significant loss of farmland, which poses a serious threat to food security.
farmland.zh: 快速的城市化进程导致大量农田流失，这对食品安全构成了严重威胁。

fascinate.en: The ancient Egyptian pyramids continue to fascinate archaeologists and historians who seek to understand their mysteries.
fascinate.zh: 古埃及金字塔继续吸引着渴望了解其奥秘的考古学家和历史学家。

fatigue.en: The fatigue from long working hours often leads to decreased productivity, poor decision-making, and serious health issues.
fatigue.zh: 长期工作导致的疲劳常常引起生产力下降、决策失误以及严重的健康问题。

fault.en: It is not entirely the teacher's fault that students perform poorly on examinations in this education system.
fault.zh: 在这个教育体系中，学生考试成绩不佳并不完全归咎于老师。

favor.en: Some argue that governments should not favor certain industries over others when allocating limited resources.
favor.zh: 有人认为，政府在分配有限资源时不应该偏袒某些行业。

favorite.en: My favorite part of studying abroad was experiencing different cultures and learning from diverse perspectives.
favorite.zh: 我在国外留学期间最喜欢的部分就是体验不同的文化并从多样的视角中学习。

favour.en: Government policies should favour sustainable development rather than prioritizing short-term economic gains at overall environmental expense.
favour.zh: 政府政策应有利于可持续发展，而不是优先考虑以整体环境为代价的短期经济收益。

favourable.en: The favourable weather conditions allowed the outdoor concert to proceed as planned without major disruptions.
favourable.zh: 有利的天气条件使得户外音乐会能够按计划进行，没有重大中断。

favourite.en: Reading has always been my favourite pastime since childhood because it broadens my understanding of the world.
favourite.zh: 阅读一直是我童年以来最喜欢的消遣方式，因为它拓宽了我对世界的理解。

fax.en: Many modern businesses have replaced traditional fax machines with more efficient digital communication systems.
fax.zh: 许多现代企业已经用更高效的数字通信系统取代了传统的传真机。

fear.en: The fear of failure often prevents talented students from pursuing unconventional career paths that could be rewarding.
fear.zh: 对失败的恐惧常常阻碍有才华的学生追求那些可能有所回报的非传统职业道路。

feasible.en: It may not be feasible to complete this ambitious project within the current budget and tight deadline.
feasible.zh: 在现有预算和紧迫的截止日期下，完成这个雄心勃勃的项目可能不可行。

fill.en: The auditorium began to fill with eager spectators as the performance was about to begin.
fill.zh: 随着演出即将开始，礼堂开始挤满了热情的观众。

fill in.en: Candidates are required to fill in all sections of the application form before the deadline.
fill in.zh: 申请者必须在截止日期前填写完申请表的所有部分。

fill out.en: Participants should fill out the survey questionnaire to provide valuable feedback.
fill out.zh: 参与者应填写调查问卷，以提供有价值的反馈。

filled.en: The lecture hall was filled with students eager to learn about the latest developments in renewable energy technology and sustainable practices.
filled.zh: 讲堂里挤满了渴望了解可再生能源技术和可持续发展实践最新发展的学生。

film.en: The documentary aims to film the traditional customs of indigenous communities in the Arctic.
film.zh: 这部纪录片旨在拍摄北极地区土著社区的传统习俗。

films.en: Many acclaimed films explore complex themes such as identity, displacement, and cultural heritage.
films.zh: 许多获奖影片探讨了身份、流离失所和文化遗产等复杂主题。

filter.en: Researchers must filter the raw data to eliminate any statistical anomalies before analysis.
filter.zh: 研究人员在分析前必须过滤原始数据，以消除任何统计异常。

final.en: Students who fail the final examination will have the opportunity to retake it in August.
final.zh: 未能通过期末考试的学生将有机会在八月重考。

finalise.en: The government plans to finalise the new environmental regulations by the end of the month.
finalise.zh: 政府计划在本月底前最终确定新的环境法规。

finalised.en: The terms of the agreement have been finalised after months of careful negotiation.
finalised.zh: 经过数月的仔细谈判，协议的条款已经最终确定。

financed.en: The construction of the new library was financed by the local government and private investors.
financed.zh: 新图书馆的建设由当地政府和私人投资者资助。

finances.en: Many university students find it difficult to manage their finances while balancing academic workload.
finances.zh: 许多大学生发现，在平衡学业的同时管理自己的财务是很困难的。

financial.en: Many students face significant financial difficulties while studying abroad without adequate support from their families.
financial.zh: 许多学生在没有家庭充分支持的情况下出国留学时面临巨大的经济困难。

financially.en: Some families are not financially stable enough to afford higher education for their children.
financially.zh: 有些家庭经济不够稳定，无法负担子女的高等教育费用。

financing.en: The financing of healthcare systems remains a significant challenge for developing countries.
financing.zh: 医疗体系的融资对发展中国家来说仍然是一个重大挑战。

find.en: Researchers often find that their initial hypotheses need to be revised after conducting experiments.
find.zh: 研究人员经常发现，在进行实验后，他们最初的假设需要修改。

find out.en: Students should find out about entry requirements before submitting their university applications.
find out.zh: 学生在提交大学申请之前应该了解入学要求。

find out more about.en: To find out more about this topic, it is advisable to consult academic journals and reliable sources.
find out more about.zh: 要了解更多关于这个话题的内容，建议查阅学术期刊和可靠来源。

finding.en: The finding that air pollution has significant effects on public health has been widely documented.
finding.zh: 空气污染对公众健康有重大影响这一发现已得到广泛记录。

fine.en: The weather was fine during the holiday, so many families chose to visit outdoor attractions.
fine.zh: 假期期间天气很好，所以许多家庭选择去户外景点游玩。

finger.en: She pointed with her finger at the map to indicate the exact location of the ancient ruins.
finger.zh: 她用手指指着地图，标出古遗址的确切位置。

fingers.en: The pianist's nimble fingers danced across the keys, producing a beautiful melody that captivated the audience.
fingers.zh: 钢琴家灵活的双手在琴键上飞舞，奏出美妙的旋律，迷住了观众。

finish.en: Students must finish their assignments before the deadline to avoid losing marks on their final grades.
finish.zh: 学生必须在截止日期前完成作业，以避免在最终成绩中失分。

finished.en: Once the construction work was finished, the new facility immediately began serving the local community members.
finished.zh: 一旦建设工作完成，新设施立即开始为当地社区成员服务。

finite.en: The earth's resources are finite, which is why governments must implement policies to promote recycling and conservation.
finite.zh: 地球资源是有限的，这就是为什么各国政府必须实施促进回收利用和保护的政策。

fire.en: In many countries, fire safety regulations require all public buildings to have working smoke detectors installed.
fire.zh: 在许多国家，消防安全法规要求所有公共场所安装正常工作的烟雾探测器。

fireball.en: The explosion created a massive fireball that illuminated the night sky and could be seen from miles away.
fireball.zh: 爆炸产生了一个巨大的火球，照亮了夜空，在数英里外都能看到。

fires.en: The heating system automatically activates when the indoor temperature drops below a certain level.
fires.zh: 当室内温度降到某一水平以下时，供暖系统会自动启动。

fireworks.en: The city organizes fireworks displays every year to celebrate the national festival and attract tourists from around the world.
fireworks.zh: 城市每年都会组织烟花表演来庆祝国庆节，并吸引来自世界各地的游客。

first.en: The first time I visited London, I was immediately struck by the historic architecture throughout the city.
first.zh: 我第一次访问伦敦时，立刻被整个城市的历史建筑所震撼。

first aid.en: Learning basic first aid techniques can be crucial in emergency situations and may even save lives.
first aid.zh: 学习基本的急救技术可能在紧急情况下至关重要，甚至可以挽救生命。

first century.en: Archaeologists have discovered remarkable artifacts dating back to the first century in this region.
first century.zh: 考古学家在这个地区发现了可追溯到公元一世纪的非凡文物。

first class.en: Many students aspire to achieve first class honors in their university degrees to enhance career prospects.
first class.zh: 许多学生渴望在大学学位中获得一等荣誉，以增强职业前景。

first draft.en: I usually complete a first draft of my essays before going back to revise and improve the content.
first draft.zh: 我通常先完成论文的初稿，然后再回头修改和完善内容。

first of all.en: First of all, it is important to understand the main argument before attempting to write a critical analysis.
first of all.zh: 首先，在尝试写批判性分析之前，理解主要论点是很重要的。

fiscal.en: The government announced new fiscal policies aimed at reducing the national debt and stimulating economic growth.
fiscal.zh: 政府宣布了旨在减少国债和刺激经济增长的新财政政策。

fish.en: In many coastal communities, fish remains a primary source of protein and an important economic resource.
fish.zh: 在许多沿海社区，鱼类仍然是主要的蛋白质来源和重要的经济资源。

fisheries.en: Overfishing poses a severe threat to global fisheries and the delicate marine ecosystems they depend upon for survival.
fisheries.zh: 过度捕捞对全球渔业及其赖以生存的脆弱海洋生态系统构成了严重威胁。

fisherman.en: The experienced fisherman shared traditional techniques passed down through generations during the cultural festival.
fisherman.zh: 这位经验丰富的渔民在文化节期间分享了代代相传的传统技术。

flavor.en: Many tourists are surprised by the diverse flavor combinations they encounter when trying authentic international cuisine for the first time.
flavor.zh: 许多游客在第一次尝试正宗的国际美食时，会对他们遇到的多样化口味组合感到惊讶。

flavour.en: The unique flavour of this regional dish attracts tourists who wish to experience authentic local culinary traditions during their visit.
flavour.zh: 这道地方菜肴的独特风味吸引了希望在其访问期间体验正宗当地烹饪传统的游客。

flaw.en: Despite its apparent strength, the construction of the new bridge was found to have a serious structural flaw during the inspection.
flaw.zh: 尽管新桥外表坚固，但在检查过程中人们发现其结构存在严重的缺陷。

flee.en: During the conflict, thousands of civilians were forced to flee their homes in search of safety and shelter in neighbouring countries.
flee.zh: 在冲突期间，数千名平民被迫逃离家园，到邻国寻找安全和庇护。

fleet.en: The shipping fleet plays a crucial role in international trade, transporting goods between continents and supporting the global economy.
fleet.zh: 船队在国际贸易中起着至关重要的作用，在各大洲之间运输货物并支撑全球经济。

flesh.en: As people age, the flesh on their faces tends to lose elasticity, which often leads to the formation of wrinkles and fine lines.
flesh.zh: 随着人们年龄增长，面部皮肤往往会失去弹性，这通常会导致皱纹和细纹的形成。

flexible.en: Employers increasingly value flexible working arrangements because they improve both employee satisfaction and productivity levels significantly.
flexible.zh: 雇主越来越重视灵活的工作安排，因为它们能显著提高员工满意度和生产力水平。

flick.en: With a quick flick of his wrist, the chef demonstrated how to properly toss vegetables in a hot wok to achieve perfect texture.
flick.zh: 厨师快速挥动手腕，示范了如何正确地在热锅中翻炒蔬菜以达到完美的质地。

flight.en: Many passengers prefer a direct flight to avoid the hassle of changing planes during long international journeys.
flight.zh: 许多乘客更喜欢直飞航班，以避免在长途国际旅行中更换飞机的麻烦。

flights.en: When comparing flights to the same destination, travellers should consider not only the price but also the duration and number of stopovers.
flights.zh: 在比较前往同一目的地的航班时，旅客不仅应考虑价格，还应考虑飞行时间和经停次数。

fixed.en: The museum exhibits are located in a fixed position so that visitors can follow the historical timeline without getting confused.
fixed.zh: 博物馆的展品位于固定位置，以便参观者可以遵循历史时间线而不感到困惑。

fixture.en: The old fireplace has been a fixture in this house for over a hundred years, adding to its charm.
fixture.zh: 这个老壁炉已经成为这所房子一百多年来的固定装置，增添了它的魅力。

flag.en: Students are taught to flag important information in textbooks for efficient revision during exams.
flag.zh: 学生们被教导在教科书中标记重要信息，以便在考试期间高效复习。

flags.en: Many countries display their national flags during international sporting events to promote national pride and unity.
flags.zh: 许多国家在国际体育赛事期间展示国旗，以促进民族自豪感和团结。

flame.en: The small flame on the candle flickered gently, casting dancing shadows across the dimly lit room.
flame.zh: 蜡烛上的小火苗轻轻摇曳，在昏暗的房间里投下舞动的影子。

flap.en: When birds flap their wings rapidly, they can generate enough lift to take off from the ground quickly.
flap.zh: 当鸟类快速拍打翅膀时，它们可以产生足够的升力快速从地面起飞。

flare.en: Tensions between the two nations began to flare after the disputed border incident was widely reported in media.
flare.zh: 在争议边界事件被媒体广泛报道后，两国之间的紧张关系开始升级。

flash.en: A sudden flash of lightning illuminated the dark sky, followed immediately by a tremendous roar of thunder.
flash.zh: 一道突如其来的闪电照亮了黑暗的天空，紧接着是一声巨大的雷鸣。

flat.en: Many young people prefer to rent a flat in the city center rather than buy a house.
flat.zh: 许多年轻人更喜欢在市中心租公寓，而不是买房子。

flatter.en: The young politician tried to flatter the voters by praising their community during the campaign speech.
flatter.zh: 这位年轻的政治家在竞选演讲中试图通过赞扬他们的社区来讨好选民。

fishermen.en: Local fishermen have complained that stricter regulations are needed to protect their livelihoods from overfishing.
fishermen.zh: 当地渔民抱怨说，需要更严格的法规来保护他们的生计免受过度捕捞的影响。

fishing.en: Many coastal communities depend on fishing as their primary source of income and daily protein intake.
fishing.zh: 许多沿海社区依靠捕鱼作为其主要收入来源和日常蛋白质摄入途径。

fishing industry.en: The fishing industry has faced significant challenges due to declining fish populations and stricter environmental laws.
fishing industry.zh: 渔业因鱼类数量减少和更严格的环境法规而面临重大挑战。

fission.en: Nuclear power plants generate electricity through fission, a process that splits atoms to release massive amounts of energy.
fission.zh: 核电站通过裂变产生电力，这是一个分裂原子以释放大量能量的过程。

fist.en: The athlete raised his fist in triumph after crossing the finish line in first place at the marathon.
fist.zh: 这位运动员在马拉松比赛中第一个冲过终点线后，胜利地举起了拳头。

fit.en: Regular exercise helps people stay fit and significantly reduces the risk of developing chronic diseases.
fit.zh: 定期锻炼帮助人们保持健康，并大大降低患慢性疾病的风险。

fit in.en: New immigrants often struggle to fit in with the local culture and customs of their adopted country.
fit in.zh: 新移民经常在适应移居国的当地文化和习俗方面遇到困难。

fitness.en: Physical fitness is essential for maintaining good health and improving one's overall quality of life.
fitness.zh: 身体健康对于保持良好健康和提高整体生活质量至关重要。

fitness centre.en: The university opened a new fitness centre equipped with modern gym equipment, swimming pools and yoga studios.
fitness centre.zh: 这所大学开设了一个新的健身中心，配备了现代化的健身设备、游泳池和瑜伽室。

fix.en: The government needs to fix the housing crisis by building more affordable homes for low-income families.
fix.zh: 政府需要通过为低收入家庭建造更多经济实惠的住房来解决住房危机。

finalising.en: The university is finalising its admission criteria for the upcoming academic year after extensive consultations.
finalising.zh: 经过广泛咨询后，大学正在敲定下一学年的招生标准。

finalist.en: After months of intensive preparation, she was thrilled to be named a finalist in the international singing competition.
finalist.zh: 经过数月的紧张准备，她很高兴被命名为国际歌唱比赛的决赛选手。

finalists.en: The judges carefully evaluated all submissions and selected three finalists who will compete in the grand finale.
finalists.zh: 评委仔细评估了所有提交的作品，并选出了三名将在总决赛中竞争的选手。

finality.en: The finality of the examination results meant that students had to accept their scores and plan their next steps accordingly.
finality.zh: 考试结果的最终性意味着学生必须接受分数，并相应地规划下一步。

finalize.en: The project team needs to finalize the research proposal before the deadline to secure additional funding from the university.
finalize.zh: 项目团队需要在截止日期前敲定研究方案，以从大学获得额外资金。

finalized.en: Once the travel itinerary has been finalized, participants will receive detailed information about accommodation and activities.
finalized.zh: 一旦旅行行程最终确定，参与者将收到关于住宿和活动的详细信息。

finalizing.en: The research team is finalizing the discussion chapter of their thesis, incorporating feedback from their supervisors.
finalizing.zh: 研究小组正在完成论文的讨论章节，整合导师的反馈意见。

finally.en: After years of difficult negotiation, the countries finally agreed upon a mutually beneficial international trade agreement.
finally.zh: 经过多年的艰难谈判，各国终于达成了一项互利互惠的国际贸易协定。

finals.en: During finals week, the campus library remains open twenty-four hours to accommodate students preparing for their examinations.
finals.zh: 在期末考试周期间，校园图书馆全天24小时开放，以容纳准备考试的学生。

finance.en: The government announced new policies to improve access to finance for small and medium-sized enterprises.
finance.zh: 政府宣布新政策，以改善中小型企业获得融资的机会。

fog.en: The heavy fog this morning caused significant delays at the airport, affecting hundreds of travellers with connecting flights.
fog.zh: 今天早上的浓雾导致机场严重延误，影响了数百名需要转机的旅客。

fold.en: She carefully fold the map along its creased lines before placing it back into her travel bag.
fold.zh: 她小心地沿着折痕把地图折好，然后放回旅行袋里。

folded.en: The folded paper cranes were displayed on the altar as a symbol of peace and remembrance.
folded.zh: 折好的纸鹤被展示在祭坛上，作为和平与纪念的象征。

folk.en: The folk music festival attracts thousands of visitors each year, showcasing traditional performances from various regions.
folk.zh: 民间音乐节每年吸引数千名游客，展示来自不同地区的传统表演。

folklore.en: Many indigenous communities incorporate folklore into their educational systems to preserve cultural heritage.
folklore.zh: 许多原住民社区将民间传说纳入教育体系，以保护文化遗产。

follow.en: Students are expected to follow the academic guidelines strictly to maintain their enrollment status.
follow.zh: 学生需要严格遵守学术准则以保持入学资格。

followers.en: The social media influencer has amassed millions of followers through her authentic lifestyle content.
followers.zh: 这位社交媒体影响者通过她真实的生活方式内容积累了数百万追随者。

fond.en: I have always been fond of reading historical novels that transport me to different eras and places.
fond.zh: 我一直喜欢阅读把我带到不同年代和地方的历史小说。

food.en: The escalating prices of fresh food have become a serious concern for families on limited budgets.
food.zh: 新鲜食品价格上涨已成为低收入家庭的严重担忧。

food chain.en: Understanding the food chain is crucial for scientists studying how pollution affects marine ecosystems.
food chain.zh: 了解食物链对于研究污染如何影响海洋生态系统的科学家至关重要。

flow.en: The steady flow of information between departments is essential for maintaining efficiency in any large organization.
flow.zh: 部门之间稳定的信息流对于维持任何大型组织的效率至关重要。

flower.en: The cherry blossom is a flower that holds significant cultural importance in Japanese tradition and tourism.
flower.zh: 樱花是一种在日本传统和旅游业中具有重要文化意义的花卉。

flowers.en: Many people believe that buying flowers for special occasions is a waste of money, whereas others view it as a meaningful gesture.
flowers.zh: 许多人认为为特殊场合买花是浪费钱，而其他人则视其为一种有意义的姿态。

flu.en: During winter, the flu spreads rapidly, and public health officials recommend vaccination to prevent infection.
flu.zh: 在冬季，流感传播迅速，公共卫生官员建议接种疫苗以预防感染。

fluctuate.en: Oil prices tend to fluctuate due to geopolitical tensions and changes in global supply and demand.
fluctuate.zh: 由于地缘政治紧张局势以及全球供需变化，石油价格往往会有波动。

fluent.en: To become a fluent English speaker, consistent practice and immersion are more effective than formal study.
fluent.zh: 要成为流利的英语使用者，持续练习和沉浸式学习比正式学习更有效。

fluid.en: The job market remains fluid, requiring workers to adapt their skills continuously to changing industry demands.
fluid.zh: 就业市场仍然不稳定，工人们需要不断调整自己的技能以适应变化的行业需求。

flush.en: When she spoke in public, her face would flush red due to anxiety and fear of judgment.
flush.zh: 当她在公开场合讲话时，由于紧张和害怕被评判，她的脸会涨得通红。

flute.en: Learning to play the flute requires breath control and regular practice to master proper technique.
flute.zh: 学习吹奏长笛需要呼吸控制能力和定期练习来掌握正确的技巧。

flux.en: The education system has been in a state of flux, with constant reforms being implemented to improve outcomes.
flux.zh: 教育体系一直处于不断变化之中，不断有改革措施被实施以改善教育成果。

food production.en: The increase in global food production has raised concerns about environmental sustainability and resource consumption.
food production.zh: 全球食品生产的增长引发了对环境可持续性和资源消耗的担忧。

food source.en: Fish has traditionally been a primary food source for coastal communities in many developing countries.
food source.zh: 鱼传统上一直是许多发展中国家沿海社区的主要食物来源。

food supply.en: Climate change poses a significant threat to global food supply chains in the coming decades.
food supply.zh: 气候变化在未来几十年对全球食品供应链构成重大威胁。

foods.en: Different cultures have developed diverse foods that reflect their local ingredients, climate conditions, and traditions.
foods.zh: 不同的文化发展出多样化的食物，反映了当地的食材、气候条件和传统。

fool.en: The ancient story teaches that it is unwise to fool with nature's delicate ecological balance.
fool.zh: 这个古老的故事教导人们，不要戏弄自然微妙的生态平衡是不明智的。

foot.en: According to the research, an average person walks approximately 5,000 steps per day on foot.
foot.zh: 根据这项研究，一个人每天步行大约5000步。

football.en: Football remains one of the most popular sports worldwide, with billions of fans watching international matches.
football.zh: 足球仍然是世界上最受欢迎的运动之一，数十亿球迷观看国际比赛。

footbridge.en: A new footbridge was built near the school to ensure the safety of children crossing the busy road.
footbridge.zh: 学校附近建起了一座新的人行桥，以确保孩子们安全穿越繁忙的公路。

footer.en: Most official documents include a footer with the company name, page number, and date of publication.
footer.zh: 大多数官方文件都包含页脚，注明公司名称、页码和发布日期。

footprints.en: Scientists found ancient footprints near the lake, providing evidence of human habitation thousands of years ago.
footprints.zh: 科学家在湖边发现了古老的脚印，为数千年前人类居住的证据。

forecasts.en: According to recent economic forecasts, the country is expected to experience significant growth over the next decade.
forecasts.zh: 根据最近的经济预测，这个国家预计在未来十年将实现显著增长。

forehead.en: The athlete wiped the sweat from his forehead after completing the exhausting marathon race.
forehead.zh: 这位运动员在完成马拉松比赛后，擦掉了额头的汗水。

foreign.en: Learning a foreign language opens up numerous career opportunities and facilitates deeper cross-cultural communication globally nowadays.
foreign.zh: 学习一门外语开辟了无数职业机会，并促进当今全球更深层次的跨文化交流。

foremost.en: Education is foremost among the government's priorities, with substantial funding allocated to schools and universities.
foremost.zh: 教育是政府的首要优先事项，学校和大学获得了大量资金支持。

foresee.en: It is difficult to foresee how technological advancements will reshape the job market in the coming years.
foresee.zh: 很难预见技术进步将如何重塑未来几年的就业市场。

forest.en: The dense forest provides a vital habitat for numerous species of endangered birds and wildlife.
forest.zh: 茂密的森林为许多濒危鸟类和野生动物提供了重要的栖息地。

forests.en: Preserving ancient forests is crucial for maintaining biodiversity and ensuring the stability of our global ecosystem.
forests.zh: 保护古老森林对于维持生物多样性和确保我们全球生态系统的稳定性至关重要。

forever.en: Many young people believe that hard work and dedication can help them achieve lasting success forever.
forever.zh: 许多年轻人相信，努力和奉献可以帮助他们获得永久的持久成功。

forfeit.en: Athletes who violate doping regulations may forfeit their medals and face lengthy suspensions from competition.
forfeit.zh: 违反兴奋剂规定的运动员可能会被剥夺奖牌，并面临长期禁赛。

forge.en: The craftsman used traditional techniques to forge intricate metal designs for the royal palace gates.
forge.zh: 这位工匠使用传统技术为皇宫大门锻造出复杂的金属图案。

forget.en: I sometimes forget important deadlines when I am under pressure from multiple assignments simultaneously.
forget.zh: 当我同时承受多项作业的压力时，有时会忘记重要的截止日期。

forgotten.en: Unfortunately, many traditional cultural practices are being forgotten by younger generations who prefer modern technology and global trends.
forgotten.zh: 不幸的是，许多传统文化习俗正被年轻一代遗忘，他们更喜欢现代技术和全球趋势。

fork.en: When eating at formal dinners, it is important to hold the fork in your left hand and the knife in your right.
fork.zh: 在正式晚宴上用餐时，用左手拿叉、右手拿刀是很重要的。

form.en: Students must fill out a registration form to enrol in university courses at the beginning of each semester.
form.zh: 学生必须在每学期初填写登记表才能注册大学课程。

formal.en: Obtaining a formal qualification is often necessary for individuals seeking employment in specialized professional fields currently.
formal.zh: 目前，获得正式资格对于寻求在专业领域就业的个人来说通常是必要的。

format.en: The format of the IELTS listening test requires candidates to answer forty questions within thirty minutes.
format.zh: 雅思听力考试的格式要求考生在三十分钟内回答四十道题。
