literature.en: Reviewing existing literature on the subject helps researchers understand previous findings before conducting their own empirical studies.
literature.zh: 回顾有关该主题的现有文献有助于研究人员在进行实证研究前了解既往发现。

litre.en: I purchased a two litre bottle of filtered water to stay properly hydrated during my afternoon study session.
litre.zh: 我买了一瓶两升的纯净水，以在下午学习时保持充足的水分。

litres.en: The doctor recommended that I drink at least two litres of water daily to maintain optimal kidney function and health.
litres.zh: 医生建议我每天至少喝两升水，以保持最佳肾脏功能和健康状态。

litter.en: The beautiful park was unfortunately littered with plastic bottles and food wrappers after Sunday afternoon visitors left.
litter.zh: 不幸的是，美丽的公园在周日下午的游客离开后到处都是塑料瓶和食品包装纸。

little.en: Despite having only a little time remaining before the deadline, I managed to complete my research paper successfully.
little.zh: 尽管在截止日期前只剩一点时间，我还是成功完成了我的研究论文。

live.en: Many graduates aspire to live in metropolitan cities where they can access better career opportunities and cultural amenities.
live.zh: 许多毕业生渴望生活在能够获得更好职业机会和文化设施的大都市。

live in.en: Students who live in university dormitories during their first year often develop stronger friendships and social networks.
live in.zh: 第一年住在大学宿舍的学生通常会建立更强的友谊和社交网络。

logo.en: The company's logo is instantly recognizable worldwide and appears prominently on all their products and marketing materials.
logo.zh: 这家公司的标识在全球范围内极易辨认，出现在其所有产品和营销材料上。

loneliness.en: Many elderly people suffer from loneliness, which can have serious effects on their mental health and overall well-being.
loneliness.zh: 许多老年人遭受孤独之苦，这可能对他们的心理健康和整体健康产生严重影响。

lonely.en: Living in a foreign country can make even the most outgoing person feel lonely at times, especially during cultural adjustment.
lonely.zh: 在异国生活可能会让即使最外向的人有时感到孤独，特别是在文化适应期间。

long.en: The long working hours required by some professions often lead to burnout and stress, affecting both physical and mental health.
long.zh: 某些职业要求的长时间工作经常导致倦怠和压力，影响身心健康。

longevity.en: Scientists are studying the factors that contribute to longevity in different populations around the world.
longevity.zh: 科学家们正在研究世界各地不同人群长寿的因素。

longitude.en: The ship's position was determined by calculating its latitude and longitude using advanced satellite navigation systems available today.
longitude.zh: 这艘船的位置是通过使用当今先进的卫星导航系统计算其纬度和经度来确定的。

look.en: When you look at the statistics, it becomes clear that education directly impacts earning potential and career opportunities.
look.zh: 当你查看统计数据时，很明显教育直接影响赚钱能力和职业机会。

look after.en: Parents are responsible for looking after their children's basic needs until they reach adulthood and become independent.
look after.zh: 父母有责任照顾孩子的基础需求，直到他们成年并独立。

look at.en: We should look at this issue from multiple perspectives before drawing any conclusions or making hasty judgments.
look at.zh: 在得出结论或做出草率判断之前，我们应该从多个角度来看待这个问题。

look for.en: Many graduates are looking for jobs that offer both competitive salaries and meaningful career advancement opportunities.
look for.zh: 许多毕业生正在寻找既有竞争力薪酬又有意义职业发展机会的工作。

locomotive.en: The locomotive pulled twenty carriages across the countryside, transporting both passengers and freight efficiently.
locomotive.zh: 火车头拖着二十节车厢穿过乡村，高效地运送乘客和货物。

locomotives.en: Modern locomotives are significantly more fuel-efficient than those manufactured a century ago.
locomotives.zh: 现代火车头比一个世纪前制造的火车头燃油效率高得多。

lodge.en: Students who wish to lodge a complaint about their accommodation should contact the housing office immediately.
lodge.zh: 希望对住宿提出投诉的学生应立即联系住房办公室。

log.en: Researchers keep a detailed log of all observations made during their field studies.
log.zh: 研究人员在他们的田野调查期间详细记录所有观察结果。

logging.en: Deforestation caused by illegal logging has become a serious environmental concern in many tropical regions.
logging.zh: 非法伐木导致的森林砍伐在许多热带地区已成为严重的环境问题。

logic.en: The logic behind the proposed policy change is difficult to understand without more detailed explanation.
logic.zh: 没有更详细的解释，很难理解拟议政策变化背后的逻辑。

logical.en: A logical approach to solving environmental problems involves effective cooperation between governments and private corporations worldwide.
logical.zh: 解决环境问题的逻辑方法涉及政府与私营企业之间的有效全球合作。

logically.en: Students should approach essay writing logically, first gathering research before drafting their arguments.
logically.zh: 学生应该逻辑地进行论文写作，先收集研究资料再起草论点。

logician.en: The logician spent decades developing new systems of reasoning that transformed mathematical analysis.
logician.zh: 这位逻辑学家花费数十年开发新的推理系统，改变了数学分析领域。

logicians.en: Ancient Greek logicians laid the foundation for systematic thinking in Western philosophy and science.
logicians.zh: 古希腊逻辑学家为西方哲学和科学中的系统性思维奠定了基础。

loaf.en: During the summer holidays, many teenagers tend to loaf around at home instead of engaging in productive activities.
loaf.zh: 暑假期间，许多青少年倾向于在家无所事事，而不是从事有意义的活动。

loan.en: The government provides low-interest loans to help students from low-income families access higher education.
loan.zh: 政府提供低息贷款，帮助低收入家庭的学生接受高等教育。

lobby.en: Environmental organisations lobby parliamentarians to introduce stricter laws protecting endangered species from extinction.
lobby.zh: 环保组织向国会议员游说，要求出台更严格的法律保护濒危物种免于灭绝。

local.en: Shopping at local markets supports small businesses and helps reduce the carbon footprint of transporting goods.
local.zh: 在本地市场购物可以扶持小企业，并有助于减少货物运输的碳足迹。

local community.en: The local community has established a volunteer programme to assist elderly residents with their daily chores.
local community.zh: 当地社区成立了一个志愿者项目，帮助老年居民处理日常琐事。

local council.en: The local council voted to increase funding for public libraries to promote literacy among residents.
local council.zh: 地方议会投票决定增加对公共图书馆的资助，以促进居民的识字能力。

local people.en: Local people possess invaluable traditional knowledge about the ecosystem that can aid scientific research.
local people.zh: 当地人拥有宝贵的生态系统传统知识，可以帮助科学研究。

local residents.en: Local residents have raised objections to the proposed construction of a factory near the residential area.
local residents.zh: 当地居民对在住宅区附近建设工厂的提议提出了反对意见。

locality.en: The coastal locality is renowned for its picturesque landscapes and thriving fishing industry.
locality.zh: 这个沿海地区以其风景如画的景观和繁荣的渔业而闻名。

locals.en: Visitors to the village are encouraged to learn about local customs and respect the traditions of the locals.
locals.zh: 前往该村庄的游客被鼓励了解当地习俗，尊重当地人的传统。

live on.en: Many rural communities still live on subsistence farming, growing crops and raising animals for their own consumption and survival.
live on.zh: 许多农村社区仍然依靠自给农业为生，种植农作物和饲养牲畜供自己消费和生存。

livelihoods.en: The factory closure has severely affected the livelihoods of hundreds of workers who depend on it for their income.
livelihoods.zh: 工厂关闭严重影响了几百名依靠它获得收入的工人的生计。

lively.en: The neighborhood becomes lively every weekend when the local market opens and brings together vendors and shoppers.
lively.zh: 每周末当地市场开市时，邻里变得热闹起来，商家和购物者汇聚一堂。

liver.en: Doctors warn that excessive alcohol consumption can cause significant damage to the liver and other vital organs.
liver.zh: 医生警告说，过量饮酒可能导致肝脏和其他重要器官受到严重损害。

livestock.en: Modern farming techniques have significantly improved the efficiency of livestock production in many developing countries around the world.
livestock.zh: 现代耕作技术显著提高了世界上许多发展中国家的畜牧业生产效率。

living.en: The rising cost of living in metropolitan areas has forced many young people to reconsider their career choices.
living.zh: 大都市生活成本的上涨迫使许多年轻人重新考虑他们的职业选择。

living room.en: The family gathered in the living room to watch the documentary together after dinner on Sunday evening.
living room.zh: 周日晚上，一家人聚在客厅一起观看纪录片。

lizards.en: Tropical forests are home to diverse species of lizards, many of which have developed unique camouflage abilities.
lizards.zh: 热带森林是各种蜥蜴的家园，其中许多已经进化出独特的伪装能力。

load.en: University students often carry a heavy academic load, balancing multiple courses, assignments, and extracurricular activities.
load.zh: 大学生通常承受着沉重的学业负担，需要平衡多门课程、作业和课外活动。

loads.en: The new shopping center attracted loads of customers during its opening week, with queues extending around the block.
loads.zh: 新购物中心在开业第一周吸引了大量顾客，排队的人绕过整个街区。

lose.en: Many students lose marks in the writing section because they fail to address all parts of the question properly.
lose.zh: 许多学生在写作部分失分，因为他们没有恰当地回答问题的所有部分。

loss.en: The company reported a significant financial loss due to the unexpected disruption in the global supply chain network.
loss.zh: 由于全球供应链网络的意外中断，公司报告了重大的财务损失。

lost.en: Tourists often feel lost when navigating unfamiliar cities without proper maps or adequate signposts to guide them.
lost.zh: 游客在导航不熟悉的城市时经常会感到迷茫，因为没有合适的地图或足够的路标指引他们。

lot.en: A lot of research has been conducted into the effects of social media on young people's mental health.
lot.zh: 关于社交媒体对年轻人心理健康的影响，已经进行了大量研究。

lots of.en: There are lots of benefits to learning a second language at an early age, including improved cognitive flexibility.
lots of.zh: 在年幼时学习第二语言有很多好处，包括提高认知灵活性。

lottery.en: Some people believe that winning the lottery would solve all their financial problems, but this is often unrealistic.
lottery.zh: 一些人认为中彩票能解决所有财务问题，但这通常是不现实的。

loud.en: The loud noise from construction sites can be extremely disruptive to local residents trying to sleep at night.
loud.zh: 建筑工地的嘈杂噪音对试图夜间入睡的当地居民可能会造成极大干扰。

lounge.en: The airport lounge provides a comfortable space for passengers to rest during long layovers between connecting flights.
lounge.zh: 机场候机室为转机乘客在长时间等候期间提供了舒适的休息空间。

love.en: Young children typically love exploring new environments and learning through play, which is crucial for their development.
love.zh: 幼儿通常喜欢探索新环境并通过玩耍来学习，这对他们的发展至关重要。

lovely.en: The city has a lovely atmosphere, with beautiful parks, tree-lined streets, and friendly people wherever you go.
lovely.zh: 这座城市有着宜人的氛围，到处都有美丽的公园、林荫道和友好的人们。

mainland.en: The mainland regions of the country have experienced rapid economic growth over the past decade.
mainland.zh: 该国内陆地区在过去十年里经历了快速的经济增长。

mainly.en: The increase in urban population is mainly attributed to people migrating from rural areas for better jobs.
mainly.zh: 城市人口的增长主要归因于人们为了更好的工作而从农村迁移。

mainstream.en: Alternative energy sources are gradually becoming part of the mainstream energy market.
mainstream.zh: 替代能源正逐渐成为主流能源市场的一部分。

maintain.en: It is essential for employees to maintain a high level of productivity throughout the working day.
maintain.zh: 员工在整个工作日内保持高水平的生产力是至关重要的。

maintained.en: The university has maintained its reputation for academic excellence for over fifty years.
maintained.zh: 这所大学五十多年来一直保持着学术卓越的声誉。

maintaining.en: Maintaining a healthy work-life balance is crucial for long-term productivity and well-being.
maintaining.zh: 保持健康的工作与生活平衡对长期生产力和身心健康至关重要。

maintains.en: The report maintains that environmental regulations should be strengthened immediately to combat climate change.
maintains.zh: 该报告坚持认为应立即加强环境法规以应对气候变化。

maintenance.en: Regular maintenance of public infrastructure can prevent costly repairs and ensure public safety.
maintenance.zh: 定期维护公共基础设施可以防止昂贵的维修费用并确保公共安全。

maize.en: Maize is one of the most widely cultivated crops and serves as a staple food for millions worldwide.
maize.zh: 玉米是种植最广泛的作物之一，是全世界数百万人赖以生存的主食。

majorities.en: In most democratic elections, majorities determine the final outcome of the vote and shape national policies.
majorities.zh: 在大多数民主选举中，多数票决定投票结果并塑造国家政策。

machines.en: Modern machines have revolutionized the manufacturing industry by increasing production speed and reducing human error significantly.
machines.zh: 现代机器通过提高生产速度和显著减少人为错误，彻底改变了制造业。

mad.en: The decision to cancel the project without warning left many employees feeling absolutely mad about the poor management.
mad.zh: 取消项目而未发出警告的决定让许多员工对糟糕的管理感到非常愤怒。

madam.en: The customer service representative politely addressed the guest as madam and asked how she could assist with her inquiry.
madam.zh: 客服代表礼貌地称呼这位客人为女士，并询问她可以如何帮助处理她的咨询。

magazine.en: According to recent research, reading a magazine regularly can improve vocabulary and keep readers informed about current events.
magazine.zh: 根据最近的研究，定期阅读杂志可以提高词汇量，并让读者了解时事。

magic.en: Many children believe that reading fantasy books allows them to experience the magic of impossible worlds and characters.
magic.zh: 许多孩子相信，阅读奇幻书籍能让他们体验到不可能的世界和角色的魔力。

magistrate.en: The magistrate delivered a fair verdict after carefully considering all the evidence presented by both prosecution and defense lawyers.
magistrate.zh: 法官在仔细考虑了控方和辩护律师提供的所有证据后，作出了公正的裁决。

magnet.en: Scientists discovered that certain rare earth elements can function as powerful magnets when combined with specific metal alloys.
magnet.zh: 科学家发现，某些稀土元素与特定金属合金结合时，可以作为强力磁铁发挥作用。

magnetic.en: The magnetic field surrounding Earth plays a crucial role in protecting our planet from harmful solar radiation every day.
magnetic.zh: 地球周围的磁场每天在保护我们的星球免受有害太阳辐射方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

magnificent.en: Tourists often describe the magnificent architecture of ancient temples as one of the most impressive cultural heritage sites they have visited.
magnificent.zh: 游客经常将古代寺庙宏伟的建筑描述为他们参观过的最令人印象深刻的文化遗产之一。

magnified.en: Under the microscope, the tiny organisms were magnified thousands of times, revealing complex cellular structures previously invisible to the naked eye.
magnified.zh: 在显微镜下，这些微小生物被放大了数千倍，揭示了以前肉眼看不见的复杂细胞结构。

malignant.en: Early detection of malignant tumors significantly improves patients' chances of successful treatment and recovery.
malignant.zh: 恶性肿瘤的早期发现能显著提高患者成功治疗和康复的机会。

mall.en: The new shopping mall has transformed the city center, attracting thousands of visitors every weekend.
mall.zh: 这座新的购物中心改变了城市中心的面貌，每周吸引数千名游客。

malnutrition.en: Malnutrition during early childhood can lead to permanent cognitive damage and developmental problems.
malnutrition.zh: 童年早期的营养不良可能导致永久性的认知损害和发育问题。

mammal.en: The dolphin is a highly intelligent marine mammal that communicates through complex vocalizations.
mammal.zh: 海豚是一种高度智慧的海洋哺乳动物，通过复杂的发声进行交流。

mammals.en: Marine mammals face significant threats from industrial pollution and overfishing activities in many parts of the open ocean.
mammals.zh: 海洋哺乳动物在许多开阔海域面临工业污染和过度捕捞活动的重大威胁。

mammoths.en: Scientists are studying mammoth DNA to understand how these magnificent creatures adapted to Ice Age conditions.
mammoths.zh: 科学家们正在研究猛犸象的DNA，以了解这些壮观的生物如何适应冰河时代的环境。

man.en: Man has always sought to understand the natural world through scientific inquiry and exploration.
man.zh: 人类始终通过科学探究和探索来寻求理解自然界。

manage.en: It is essential for students to manage their time effectively to balance academic and personal commitments.
manage.zh: 对学生来说，有效管理时间以平衡学业和个人事务至关重要。

management.en: Effective time management allows individuals to balance their professional responsibilities with personal leisure activities more successfully.
management.zh: 有效的时间管理使个人能够更成功地平衡职业责任与个人休闲活动。

manager.en: The project manager coordinated various teams to ensure the construction was completed on schedule and within budget.
manager.zh: 项目经理协调各团队，确保建设按时并在预算内完成。

managers.en: Effective managers must possess strong communication skills to ensure that all team members understand their specific responsibilities.
managers.zh: 有效的管理者必须具备强大的沟通技巧，以确保所有团队成员理解他们的具体职责。

mangrove.en: The mangrove forests along coastal regions provide crucial habitats for various species and protect shorelines from erosion.
mangrove.zh: 沿海地区的红树林为各种物种提供了重要的栖息地，并保护海岸线免受侵蚀。

manifest.en: The negative effects of pollution will manifest in declining public health and environmental degradation over time.
manifest.zh: 污染的负面影响将随着时间推移在公共健康下降和环境恶化中显现出来。

manipulate.en: Some social media companies attempt to manipulate user behaviour through carefully designed algorithms and notifications.
manipulate.zh: 一些社交媒体公司试图通过精心设计的算法和通知来操纵用户行为。

mankind.en: Throughout history, mankind has developed innovative technologies to overcome environmental challenges and improve living standards.
mankind.zh: 纵观历史，人类开发了创新技术来克服环境挑战并提高生活水平。

manner.en: The professor spoke in a calm manner, ensuring that all students understood the complex theoretical concepts clearly.
manner.zh: 教授以平静的方式讲话，确保所有学生都清楚地理解了复杂的理论概念。

manoeuvre.en: The pilot performed a complex manoeuvre to land the aircraft safely during the unexpected gusty weather conditions.
manoeuvre.zh: 飞行员在意外的大风天气条件下执行了复杂的机动动作以安全着陆。

mansion.en: The historic mansion was transformed into a luxury hotel that attracts thousands of tourists every year.
mansion.zh: 这座历史悠久的豪宅被改造成一家每年吸引数千名游客的豪华酒店。

mantle.en: The research institution has taken on the mantle of leadership in developing sustainable energy solutions for the future.
mantle.zh: 该研究机构承担起了为未来开发可持续能源解决方案的领导责任。

manual.en: Before operating any laboratory equipment, students are required to read the safety manual thoroughly to prevent accidents.
manual.zh: 在操作任何实验室设备之前，学生需要仔细阅读安全手册以防止事故发生。

low.en: The low cost of living in many developing countries makes them attractive destinations for expatriates seeking to save money.
low.zh: 许多发展中国家较低的生活成本使它们成为希望存钱的 expatriates 的热门目的地。

lowland.en: The lowland regions of the country are particularly vulnerable to flooding during the annual monsoon season.
lowland.zh: 该国的低洼地区在每年的季风季节特别容易发生洪水。

loyal.en: A loyal customer base is essential for the long-term success and profitability of any retail business.
loyal.zh: 忠实的客户群对于任何零售企业的长期成功和盈利能力至关重要。

loyalty.en: Many corporations reward employee loyalty by offering attractive benefits and career advancement opportunities.
loyalty.zh: 许多公司通过提供诱人的福利和职业发展机会来奖励员工的忠诚。

loyalty card.en: Using a loyalty card at supermarkets can help consumers accumulate points that can be redeemed for discounts.
loyalty card.zh: 在超市使用会员卡可以帮助消费者积累积分，这些积分可以兑换折扣。

lubricate.en: It is important to lubricate the moving parts of machinery regularly to prevent wear and extend its lifespan.
lubricate.zh: 定期润滑机械的运动部件以防止磨损并延长其使用寿命是很重要的。

luck.en: Finding affordable housing in major cities is often a matter of luck rather than careful planning.
luck.zh: 在大城市找到负担得起的住房通常与其说是仔细规划，不如说是运气问题。

luckily.en: Luckily, I arrived at the airport two hours early, which gave me plenty of time to check in and go through security.
luckily.zh: 幸运的是，我提前两小时到达机场，这给了我足够的时间办理登机手续和通过安检。

lucky.en: Some people believe that finding a four-leaf clover is lucky, although there is no scientific evidence to support this.
lucky.zh: 有些人认为找到四叶草是幸运的，尽管没有科学证据支持这一说法。

luggage.en: Many airlines now charge extra fees for passengers who wish to check in additional luggage beyond the free allowance.
luggage.zh: 许多航空公司现在对希望托运超出免费限额的额外行李的乘客收取额外费用。

lump.en: Many university students prefer to pay their tuition fees as a lump sum rather than in monthly installments throughout the year.
lump.zh: 许多大学生更喜欢一次性缴清学费，而不是全年按月分期付款。

lunar.en: The lunar calendar continues to play an important role in determining traditional festivals in many Asian countries.
lunar.zh: 农历在许多亚洲国家仍将在决定传统节日方面发挥重要作用。

lunch.en: During my lunch break, I usually take a short walk around the office building to refresh my mind.
lunch.zh: 午餐休息时间，我通常会在办公楼附近散步来放松身心。

lung.en: Doctors warn that smoking one pack of cigarettes per day can cause severe damage to the lung over time.
lung.zh: 医生警告称，每天吸一包香烟随着时间的推移会对肺部造成严重损害。

lungs.en: Prolonged exposure to air pollution can significantly reduce the capacity of the lungs and lead to respiratory diseases.
lungs.zh: 长时间暴露在空气污染中会显著降低肺活量并导致呼吸系统疾病。

lure.en: The lure of high salaries in big cities often attracts young graduates to leave their hometowns and relocate.
lure.zh: 大城市高薪资的诱惑常常吸引年轻毕业生离开家乡并搬迁至此。

lush.en: The National Park is famous for its lush forests, crystal-clear lakes, and diverse wildlife species.
lush.zh: 这个国家公园以其郁郁葱葱的森林、清澈的湖泊和多样的野生动物而闻名。

luxury.en: Some people argue that luxury brands charge excessive prices for products that are simply not worth their market value.
luxury.zh: 一些人认为，奢侈品牌对那些根本不值市场价值的产品收取过高的价格。

machine.en: The automated machine has replaced many manual workers in factories, raising concerns about widespread job displacement.
machine.zh: 自动化机器取代了工厂中的许多体力劳动者，引发了人们对普遍失业的担忧。

machinery.en: The factory invested heavily in automated machinery to increase production speed while simultaneously reducing the risk of human error in manufacturing.
machinery.zh: 工厂大力投资自动化机械以提高生产速度，同时降低制造中人为错误的风险。

majority.en: The majority of respondents indicated that environmental protection should be a top priority for governments.
majority.zh: 大多数受访者表示，环境保护应成为政府的首要任务。

majors.en: When choosing university majors, students should carefully consider both their personal interests and potential career prospects.
majors.zh: 选择大学专业时，学生应该仔细考虑自己的个人兴趣和潜在的职业前景。

make.en: Parents should make time to read with their children every day to improve literacy rates in the long term.
make.zh: 父母应该每天抽出时间与孩子一起阅读，以长期提高识字率。

make a note of.en: I always make a note of new vocabulary in a dedicated notebook for systematic exam preparation.
make a note of.zh: 我总是在专门的笔记本上记下新词汇，以便系统地备考。

make out.en: It can be difficult to make out what the speaker is saying when there is significant background noise.
make out.zh: 当有明显的背景噪音时，很难听清说话者的内容。

make sure.en: Before submitting the application, applicants must make sure all required documents are attached and complete.
make sure.zh: 在提交申请前，申请人必须确保所有要求的文件都已附上并且完整。

make up.en: Women make up approximately half of the workforce in many developed countries, reflecting changing social norms.
make up.zh: 在许多发达国家，女性约占劳动力的一半，这反映了社会规范的改变。

make use of.en: Communities should make use of renewable energy sources to reduce carbon emissions and protect the environment.
make use of.zh: 社区应该利用可再生能源来减少碳排放并保护环境。

malaria.en: Malaria remains a serious health concern in tropical regions, causing approximately 600,000 deaths annually worldwide.
malaria.zh: 疟疾在热带地区仍然是一个严重的健康问题，每年在全球造成约60万人死亡。

male.en: In some cultures, male children are traditionally given more educational opportunities than their female counterparts.
male.zh: 在某些文化中，男孩传统上比女孩获得更多的教育机会。

magnify.en: The microscope can magnify tiny cells to hundreds of times their original size, allowing scientists to observe them clearly.
magnify.zh: 显微镜可以将微小的细胞放大数百倍，让科学家们能够清晰地观察它们。

magnitude.en: The magnitude of the environmental problem requires immediate action from governments and individuals worldwide.
magnitude.zh: 环境问题的严重性需要各国政府和个人立即采取行动。

maid.en: In many countries, families employ a maid to help with household chores such as cleaning and cooking.
maid.zh: 在许多国家，家庭雇佣女佣来帮忙做打扫和烹饪等家务。

mail.en: Despite the rise of digital communication, traditional mail remains essential for sending official documents and packages.
mail.zh: 尽管数字通信兴起，传统邮件在发送官方文件和包裹方面仍然不可或缺。

main.en: The main advantage of living in the city is the convenient access to public transportation and healthcare.
main.zh: 住在城市的主要优势是能够方便地使用公共交通和医疗保健。

main course.en: For the main course, I ordered grilled salmon with roasted vegetables, which was both delicious and nutritious.
main course.zh: 主菜我点了烤三文鱼配烤蔬菜，既美味又营养。

main entrance.en: The main entrance to the museum is located on the north side, facing the central square of the city.
main entrance.zh: 博物馆的正门位于北侧，面向城市中心广场。

main hall.en: The graduation ceremony took place in the main hall of the university, where hundreds of students received their diplomas.
main hall.zh: 毕业典礼在大学的大礼堂举行，数百名学生在那里领取了毕业证书。

main points.en: While taking lecture notes, students should focus on capturing the main points rather than transcribing every word.
main points.zh: 做课堂笔记时，学生应该专注于记录要点，而不是逐字抄写。

main road.en: The main road connecting the airport to the city centre was congested during rush hour, causing significant delays.
main road.zh: 连接机场和市中心的主干道在高峰时段拥堵，造成了严重的延误。

mariners.en: Throughout history, mariners have relied on stars and natural landmarks to navigate across vast oceans.
mariners.zh: 纵观历史，水手们依靠星星和自然地标在浩瀚的海洋中导航。

mark.en: The archaeological discovery marked a significant turning point in our understanding of ancient civilizations.
mark.zh: 这一考古发现标志着我们理解古代文明的一个重要转折点。

marked.en: There has been a marked improvement in student performance since the new curriculum was introduced.
marked.zh: 自从引入新课程以来，学生的表现有了显著的改善。

marketing.en: Effective marketing strategies are essential for businesses seeking to expand their customer base.
marketing.zh: 有效的营销策略对于寻求扩大客户群的企业至关重要。

marketplace.en: The online marketplace has fundamentally transformed the way consumers purchase goods and services.
marketplace.zh: 网上市场从根本上改变了消费者购买商品和服务的方式。

marks.en: The examination marks are published on the university website at the end of each academic semester.
marks.zh: 每学期末，考试成绩都会发布在大学网站上。

marriage.en: In many cultures, marriage is considered a sacred institution that binds two families together.
marriage.zh: 在许多文化中，婚姻被视为将两个家庭联系在一起的神圣制度。

married.en: Many couples nowadays choose to live together before getting married, reflecting changing social values.
married.zh: 如今许多情侣选择在结婚前同居，这反映了不断变化的社会价值观。

marry.en: Individuals should wait until they are emotionally and financially ready before they decide to marry.
marry.zh: 个人应该在情感和经济上都准备好之后再决定结婚。

marsh.en: The marshland serves as a crucial habitat for various species of birds and aquatic organisms.
marsh.zh: 沼泽地是各种鸟类和水生生物的重要栖息地。

maximize.en: Companies should maximize their use of renewable energy sources to reduce their environmental impact significantly.
maximize.zh: 公司应该最大化利用可再生能源来显著减少对环境的影响。

maximized.en: The new factory design maximized the available floor space while simultaneously minimizing energy consumption.
maximized.zh: 新的工厂设计在最大化可用地板空间的同时也最小化了能源消耗。

maximizes.en: A well-organized study schedule maximizes learning efficiency and greatly improves knowledge retention.
maximizes.zh: 合理的学习安排能最大化学习效率并大大提高知识记忆力。

maximizing.en: Maximizing the benefits of technology in education requires proper training programs for all teachers.
maximizing.zh: 最大化教育技术的好处需要对所有教师进行适当的培训项目。

maximum.en: The new policy aims to achieve maximum participation rates in community recycling programs across the country.
maximum.zh: 新政策旨在实现全国社区回收项目参与率的最大化。

maybe.en: Maybe the government should consider investing more in public transport to reduce traffic congestion in major city centers.
maybe.zh: 也许政府应该考虑投资更多公共交通，以减少主要市中心的交通拥堵。

mayor.en: The mayor announced ambitious plans to build a modern cultural center in the heart of the downtown area.
mayor.zh: 市长宣布了在市中心建造现代化文化中心的宏伟计划。

maze.en: The old part of the city is like a maze of narrow streets and winding alleyways that confuse visitors.
maze.zh: 城市的老城区就像一个由狭窄街道和蜿蜒小巷组成的迷宫，让游客感到困惑。

meadow.en: Many species of colorful butterflies can be observed in the wildflower meadows during the summer months.
meadow.zh: 许多种类的彩色蝴蝶可以在夏季的野花草地上观察到。

meal.en: Having a nutritious breakfast is essential for maintaining energy levels and concentration throughout the day.
meal.zh: 吃一顿有营养的早餐对保持一整天的精力和专注至关重要。

manufacture.en: Many factories in Asia manufacture electronic devices for international markets and global consumers.
manufacture.zh: 亚洲的许多工厂为国际市场和全球消费者生产电子设备。

manufacturer.en: The car manufacturer announced plans to invest heavily in electric vehicle development next year.
manufacturer.zh: 这家汽车制造商宣布计划明年大力投资电动汽车开发。

manufacturers.en: Many international manufacturers are shifting towards sustainable materials to meet growing consumer demand for eco-friendly products.
manufacturers.zh: 许多国际制造商正转向可持续材料，以满足消费者对环保产品日益增长的需求。

manufacturing.en: The manufacturing industry has adopted automation to increase efficiency and reduce human error during the production process.
manufacturing.zh: 制造业已采用自动化技术来提高效率并减少生产过程中的错误。

manuscript.en: Researchers carefully examined the ancient manuscript to understand historical writing practices.
manuscript.zh: 研究人员仔细检查了这本古老的手稿，以了解历史上的书写习惯。

many.en: Many university graduates face significant challenges when entering the competitive job market.
many.zh: 许多大学毕业生在进入竞争激烈的就业市场时面临重大挑战。

map.en: The government intends to map the changing landscape of the city to better understand urban development trends.
map.zh: 政府打算绘制城市不断变化的景观地图，以便更好地了解城市发展趋势。

maple.en: The maple tree is widely recognized for its beautiful autumn foliage and delicious syrup.
maple.zh: 枫树因其美丽的秋叶和美味的糖浆而被广泛认可。

maps.en: Modern digital maps have revolutionized how people navigate cities and find directions.
maps.zh: 现代数字地图彻底改变了人们在城市中导航和寻找方向的方式。

marathon.en: Training for a marathon requires months of dedicated preparation and consistent physical exercise.
marathon.zh: 参加马拉松训练需要数月的专注准备和持续的体育锻炼。

meals.en: The researcher studied eating habits and found that students who skip meals tend to have lower academic performance.
meals.zh: 研究人员调查了饮食习惯，发现不吃正餐的学生往往学习成绩较差。

mean.en: Although the mean temperature has increased globally, the impact varies significantly across different regions and communities.
mean.zh: 尽管全球平均温度有所上升，但不同地区和社区受到的影响差异显著。

meaning.en: Understanding the meaning behind cultural traditions helps people appreciate diverse perspectives and build mutual respect.
meaning.zh: 理解文化传统背后的含义有助于人们欣赏不同的观点并建立相互尊重。

meaningful.en: Young people seek meaningful work that provides both financial security and personal satisfaction in their chosen careers.
meaningful.zh: 年轻人在他们选择的职业中寻求既有经济保障又有个人满足感的有意义工作。

means.en: Public transportation is an effective means of reducing traffic congestion and improving air quality in urban areas.
means.zh: 公共交通是减少城市交通拥堵和改善空气质量的有效手段。

meantime.en: The new library is under construction; in the meantime, students can use temporary facilities nearby on campus.
meantime.zh: 新图书馆正在建设中；在此期间，学生可以使用校园附近的临时设施。

meanwhile.en: The government plans to reduce taxes; meanwhile, private companies are encouraged to invest more in renewable energy sources.
meanwhile.zh: 政府计划减税；与此同时，鼓励私营企业更多地投资可再生能源来源。

measure.en: Governments should measure the success of educational policies by examining long-term outcomes rather than short-term statistics.
measure.zh: 政府应该通过检查长期成果而非短期统计数据来衡量教育政策的成功与否。

measured.en: The study measured the impact of technology on children's social development over a five-year period with careful methodology.
measured.zh: 该研究通过仔细的方法论，测量了技术对儿童社会发展在五年期间的影响。

measurement.en: Accurate measurement of carbon emissions is essential for governments to create effective policies targeting climate change mitigation strategies.
measurement.zh: 准确测量碳排放对于政府制定针对气候变化缓解战略的有效政策至关重要。

match.en: Applicants should ensure their qualifications match the job requirements listed in the advertisement to increase their chances of being selected.
match.zh: 申请人应确保其资格与广告中列出的工作要求相匹配，以增加被选中的机会。

mate.en: During his university years, he developed lasting friendships with his course mates, who continued to support each other professionally.
mate.zh: 在大学期间，他与同学们建立了持久的友谊，他们在职业发展上继续相互支持。

material.en: The building's structural integrity depends heavily on the quality of material used in its construction, particularly in areas prone to earthquakes.
material.zh: 建筑物的结构完整性在很大程度上取决于其建造所用材料的质量，特别是在地震多发地区。

materialism.en: Some critics argue that excessive materialism in modern society has led to environmental degradation and a decline in community values.
materialism.zh: 一些批评者认为，现代社会中过度的物质主义已导致环境恶化和社会价值观的衰落。

materials.en: The architect selected sustainable materials for the new library, including recycled wood and energy-efficient glass panels.
materials.zh: 建筑师为新图书馆选择了可持续材料，包括回收木材和节能玻璃板。

mathematical.en: Students pursuing scientific careers must develop strong mathematical skills to analyse complex data and solve practical problems effectively.
mathematical.zh: 从事科学职业的学生必须培养强大的数学能力，以便有效地分析复杂数据和解决实际问题。

mathematician.en: The renowned mathematician presented groundbreaking theories that revolutionised our understanding of numerical patterns in nature.
mathematician.zh: 这位著名数学家提出了突破性的理论，彻底改变了我们对自然界数字规律的理解。

mathematics.en: Mathematics remains a mandatory subject in most secondary schools, as it develops logical reasoning and problem-solving abilities.
mathematics.zh: 数学在大多数中学仍然是必修科目，因为它能培养逻辑推理和解决问题的能力。

maths.en: She found maths challenging initially but with consistent practice, she improved significantly and earned excellent examination results.
maths.zh: 她最初觉得数学很难，但通过持续练习，她取得了显著进步并在考试中取得了优异成绩。

matriculation.en: Successful matriculation at prestigious universities often requires meeting strict academic standards and passing rigorous entrance examinations.
matriculation.zh: 成功进入名牌大学通常需要达到严格的学术标准并通过严格的入学考试。

marshal.en: The event organizer worked hard to marshal all the volunteers before the international conference officially began.
marshal.zh: 活动组织者在国际会议正式开始前努力召集了所有的志愿者。

marvel.en: Visitors to the ancient city often marvel at the remarkably preserved structures that date back thousands of years.
marvel.zh: 参观古城的游客常常对可以追溯到几千年前的保存完好的建筑感到惊叹。

marvelous.en: The science students found the laboratory's new equipment a marvelous addition to their research capabilities.
marvelous.zh: 理科学生发现实验室的新设备对他们进行研究的能力是一个极好的补充。

mask.en: During the pandemic, people were required to wear a mask in indoor public spaces to prevent the spread of disease.
mask.zh: 在大流行期间，人们被要求在室内公共场所佩戴口罩以防止疾病传播。

mass.en: The mass production of consumer goods has significantly lowered prices but often compromises overall quality and sustainability.
mass.zh: 消费品的大规模生产显著降低了价格，但往往损害了整体质量和可持续性。

massachusetts.en: Massachusetts is widely recognized for its prestigious universities, rich colonial history, and vibrant cultural attractions.
massachusetts.zh: 马萨诸塞州因其 prestigious 大学、丰富的殖民历史和充满活力的文化景点而广为人知。

massive.en: The government invested a massive amount of money into improving the public transportation infrastructure across the entire city.
massive.zh: 政府投入了大量资金用于改善整个城市的公共交通基础设施。

master.en: It typically takes many years of dedicated practice to master a musical instrument at a professional performing level.
master.zh: 通常需要多年专注的练习才能在专业演奏水平上精通一种乐器。

masterpiece.en: Art historians widely consider Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa to be one of the greatest masterpieces in Western art.
masterpiece.zh: 艺术史学家普遍认为达芬奇的蒙娜丽莎是西方艺术中最伟大的杰作之一。

mat.en: Students placed their belongings neatly on the mat before entering the examination hall to take their IELTS test.
mat.zh: 学生们在进入雅思考试考场前把他们的物品整齐地放在垫子上。

matter.en: While cost is important, the quality of materials used in construction matters more for long-term durability.
matter.zh: 虽然成本很重要，但建筑材料的质量对长期耐久性更为重要。

mattress.en: Many consumers believe that investing in a quality mattress is essential for maintaining good sleep health.
mattress.zh: 许多消费者认为投资一张优质床垫对保持良好睡眠健康至关重要。

mature.en: Research suggests that children mature at different rates both physically and emotionally throughout their development.
mature.zh: 研究表明，儿童在身体和情感发育的整个过程中以不同的速度成熟。

max.en: The lecture is scheduled for a maximum of forty-five minutes to ensure students remain focused and engaged.
max.zh: 讲座安排最多四十五分钟，以确保学生保持专注和参与。

maximisation.en: The maximisation of available resources is crucial for ensuring the long-term success of any business enterprise.
maximisation.zh: 可用资源的最大化对确保任何企业的长期成功至关重要。

maximise.en: Companies strive to maximise their profits while minimising environmental impact through sustainable manufacturing processes and efficient resource management strategies.
maximise.zh: 公司力求通过可持续制造流程和高效资源管理策略最大化利润，同时最小化环境影响。

maximised.en: The company has maximised its revenue through strategic partnerships and effective marketing campaigns over the past year.
maximised.zh: 在过去一年中，该公司通过战略伙伴关系和有效的营销活动实现了收入最大化。

maximises.en: Efficient time management maximises the output of workers while simultaneously reducing stress and burnout in the office.
maximises.zh: 高效的时间管理可以最大化员工产出，同时减少办公室里的压力和倦怠。

maximising.en: Maximising stakeholder engagement is essential for building trust and ensuring the sustainability of community projects.
maximising.zh: 最大化利益相关者的参与对于建立信任和确保社区项目的可持续性至关重要。

maximization.en: The maximization of shareholder returns remains a primary objective for most publicly traded companies worldwide.
maximization.zh: 股东回报的最大化仍然是全球大多数上市公司的主要目标。

marble.en: The ancient Greek temple was constructed entirely from white marble, which gave it a magnificent and enduring appearance.
marble.zh: 这座古希腊神庙完全由白色大理石建造，这赋予了它壮丽而持久的的外观。

march.en: Thousands of protesters chose to march through the city centre to demonstrate their strong opposition to the proposed development.
march.zh: 成千上万的抗议者选择穿过市中心游行，以表达他们对拟议开发项目的强烈反对。

margin.en: Many small businesses operate on extremely narrow profit margins, making it challenging to survive during economic downturns.
margin.zh: 许多小企业在极窄的利润空间中运营，这使得它们在经济低迷时期难以生存。

marginal.en: The marginal increase in temperature may seem insignificant, yet scientists warn it could trigger major environmental changes.
marginal.zh: 温度的微小上升可能看起来微不足道，但科学家警告说这可能引发重大环境变化。

marginalization.en: The marginalization of indigenous communities remains a serious concern, as it often results in limited access to education and healthcare.
marginalization.zh: 原住民社区的边缘化仍然是一个严重问题，因为它通常导致他们获得教育和医疗的机会受限。

marginalize.en: Without proper representation in parliament, rural populations risk being marginalized in decisions that directly affect their daily lives.
marginalize.zh: 如果没有在议会中的适当代表权，农村人口在直接影响其日常生活的决策中就有被边缘化的风险。

marginalized.en: The government has implemented new programs specifically designed to assist marginalized groups in accessing essential social services.
marginalized.zh: 政府已实施专门计划，以帮助边缘化群体获得必要的社会服务。

marginalizing.en: Some sociologists argue that the current education system is marginalizing students from lower-income families by failing to provide adequate support.
marginalizing.zh: 一些社会学家认为，现行教育体系因未能提供足够的支持而正在边缘化来自低收入家庭的学生。

margins.en: Publishers frequently operate on very tight margins, which can unfortunately lead to compromises in the quality of books produced.
margins.zh: 出版商经常在极薄的利润空间中运营，这不幸地可能导致所出版书籍质量的妥协。

marine.en: Protecting marine ecosystems is crucial because many species depend on healthy oceans for their survival and reproduction.
marine.zh: 保护海洋生态系统至关重要，因为许多物种依赖健康的海洋生存和繁殖。

metals.en: The conductivity of various metals has been extensively studied in physics laboratories around the world.
metals.zh: 各种金属的导电性已在世界各地的物理实验室中得到广泛研究。

metaphor.en: The author used a powerful metaphor comparing society to a complex machine in her thought-provoking essay.
metaphor.zh: 这位作者在她发人深省的文章中用一个有力的比喻，将社会比作一台复杂的机器。

meteor.en: When a meteor enters Earth's atmosphere, it creates a bright streak of light known as a shooting star.
meteor.zh: 当流星进入地球大气层时，它会产生一道被称为流星的明亮光带。

meteorology.en: Advances in meteorology have significantly improved our ability to forecast severe weather events accurately.
meteorology.zh: 气象学的进步显著提高了我们准确预测恶劣天气事件的能力。

meter.en: The electricity meter measures how much power households consume each month for billing purposes.
meter.zh: 电表测量家庭每月消耗的电量，用于计费。

methane.en: Scientists are concerned about methane emissions from livestock because methane is a potent greenhouse gas.
methane.zh: 科学家担心牲畜产生的甲烷排放，因为甲烷是一种强效的温室气体。

method.en: The research method involved conducting surveys and analyzing data to draw meaningful conclusions.
method.zh: 该研究方法包括进行 surveys 调查和分析数据以得出有意义的结论。

methodological.en: The study received praise for its rigorous methodological approach to investigating social behavior patterns.
methodological.zh: 该研究因其严谨的方法论方法调查社会行为模式而受到称赞。

methodologies.en: Different methodologies for teaching languages have been compared in recent educational research studies.
methodologies.zh: 不同的语言教学方法论在最近的教育研究中被进行了比较。

methodology.en: The methodology section of the thesis explains the systematic procedures used to collect and analyze data.
methodology.zh: 论文的方法论部分解释了在收集和分析数据时使用的系统性程序。

mentor.en: Having a qualified mentor can significantly improve a student's academic performance and future career prospects.
mentor.zh: 拥有一位合格的导师可以显著提高学生的学业成绩和未来职业前景。

menu.en: Many restaurants now offer digital menus that customers can access conveniently through their smartphones.
menu.zh: 许多餐厅现在提供顾客可以通过智能手机方便访问的电子菜单。

merchandise.en: The university bookstore sells a wide range of merchandise including clothing, stationery, and textbooks.
merchandise.zh: 大学书店销售各种商品，包括服装、文具和教科书。

merchant.en: The local merchant has been running the family business for over three generations with great success.
merchant.zh: 这位当地商人成功经营家族企业已超过三代。

merchants.en: Historically, merchants played a vital role in facilitating trade routes between distant civilizations and cultures across the continent.
merchants.zh: 历史上，商人在促进大陆之间遥远文明和文化的贸易路线方面发挥了至关重要的作用。

mercury.en: Exposure to high levels of mercury can cause serious neurological problems in humans over time.
mercury.zh: 长期接触高浓度的汞会导致人体出现严重的神经系统问题。

mercy.en: The judge showed mercy by reducing the sentence for the young defendant who was a first-time offender.
mercy.zh: 法官对这位首次犯罪且年轻的被告表现出仁慈，减轻了刑罚。

mere.en: The mere possibility of failure should not prevent ambitious individuals from pursuing their entrepreneurial dreams.
mere.zh: 仅仅失败的可能性不应该阻止有抱负的人追求他们的创业梦想。

merely.en: Many students believe that memorizing vocabulary is merely a preliminary step towards achieving fluency in a new language.
merely.zh: 许多学生认为背诵词汇仅仅是实现新语言流利度的初步步骤。

merge.en: The two major technology companies decided to merge last year to strengthen their competitive position globally.
merge.zh: 这两家主要的科技公司去年决定合并，以加强其在全球的竞争地位。

melt.en: The snow began to melt as the temperature rose, creating small streams that flowed down the hillside into the river below.
melt.zh: 随着温度上升，雪开始融化，形成了顺着山坡流向河里的小溪。

melting.en: The rapid melting of polar ice caps is a clear indicator of the accelerating global climate change crisis.
melting.zh: 极地冰盖的快速融化是全球气候变化危机加速的一个明显指标。

member.en: Every member of the research team was required to contribute innovative ideas during the weekly brainstorming session to solve complex problems.
member.zh: 研究团队的每个成员都被要求在每周的头脑风暴会议上贡献创新想法，以解决复杂问题。

members.en: Family members often share similar values, although individual experiences can shape distinct personal viewpoints over time.
members.zh: 家庭成员通常分享相似的价值观，尽管个人经历可能会随着时间的推移塑造独特的个人观点。

members of the public.en: Members of the public are encouraged to share their opinions through online surveys and community forums to help shape future urban development plans.
members of the public.zh: 公众成员被鼓励通过在线调查和社区论坛分享他们的意见，以帮助塑造未来的城市发展计划。

membership.en: The gym offers a discounted membership rate for students under the age of twenty-five, making fitness facilities more affordable for young adults.
membership.zh: 这家健身房为25岁以下的学生提供折扣会员费率，使年轻人更能负担得起健身设施。

memo.en: The manager circulated a memo explaining the new office policies regarding remote work, outlining expectations for communication and performance standards.
memo.zh: 经理发布了一份备忘录，解释关于远程工作的新办公室政策，概述了沟通和绩效标准的期望。

memorial.en: The city built a beautiful memorial to honour the soldiers who sacrificed their lives during the war, creating a peaceful space for reflection.
memorial.zh: 这座城市为纪念在战争中牺牲的士兵建造了一座美丽的纪念碑，创造了一个供人沉思的宁静空间。

memories.en: Many people believe that travel experiences create lasting memories that enrich our lives and broaden our understanding of different cultures worldwide.
memories.zh: 许多人认为旅行经历会创造持久的记忆，丰富我们的生活，并拓宽我们对世界各地不同文化的理解。

memorise.en: Students must memorise key vocabulary words and grammatical structures to improve their performance in language exams and achieve higher scores.
memorise.zh: 学生必须记住关键的词汇和语法结构，以提高他们在语言考试中的表现并取得更高分数。

merit.en: The merit of this approach is that it allows students to learn at their own pace and develop critical thinking skills.
merit.zh: 这种方法的优势在于它允许学生按照自己的节奏学习并培养批判性思维能力。

merry.en: Despite the cold weather, the market square was filled with merry shoppers enjoying the winter festival decorations.
merry.zh: 尽管天气寒冷，广场上挤满了享受冬季节日装饰的欢乐购物者。

mess.en: The kitchen was left in a complete mess after the cooking class, with pots and ingredients scattered everywhere.
mess.zh: 烹饪课结束后，厨房一片狼藉，锅和食材散落各处。

message.en: The key message of the advertisement is that our products can significantly improve your daily quality of life.
message.zh: 广告的核心信息是我们的产品可以显著改善您的日常生活质量。

messages.en: Advertising campaigns often send subtle messages to consumers, influencing their purchasing decisions and shaping their perceptions of various brand identities.
messages.zh: 广告活动经常向消费者发送微妙的信息，影响他们的购买决定并塑造他们对各种品牌身份的看法。

messenger.en: In ancient times, messengers traveled long distances on horseback to deliver urgent news between kingdoms.
messenger.zh: 在古代，信使骑马长途跋涉在王国之间传递紧急消息。

messy.en: Living in a messy room can lead to increased stress levels and difficulty focusing on important tasks.
messy.zh: 生活在杂乱的房间里可能导致压力增加，难以专注于重要任务。

metabolic.en: Metabolic diseases such as diabetes are becoming more prevalent due to sedentary lifestyles and poor nutrition.
metabolic.zh: 由于久坐不动的生活方式和不良营养，糖尿病等代谢性疾病正变得越来越普遍。

metabolism.en: Regular physical exercise can boost your metabolism and help the body burn calories more efficiently throughout the day.
metabolism.zh: 定期的体育锻炼可以促进新陈代谢，帮助身体在一天中更有效地燃烧卡路里。

metal.en: Recycling aluminum and other types of metal significantly reduces the energy consumption required for manufacturing new industrial products.
metal.zh: 回收铝和其他类型的金属显著减少了制造新工业产品所需的能源消耗。

meditate.en: Many people choose to meditate in the morning to reduce stress and improve concentration before starting their day.
meditate.zh: 许多人在早晨选择冥想来减轻压力，并在一天开始前提高专注力。

meditation.en: Regular meditation practice has been shown to have significant benefits for mental health and emotional well-being.
meditation.zh: 定期的冥想练习已被证明对心理健康和情绪健康有显著益处。

mediterranean.en: The Mediterranean climate is characterized by hot summers and mild winters which attract many tourists annually.
mediterranean.zh: 地中海气候的特点是夏季炎热，冬季温和，这每年吸引许多游客。

medium.en: English is often considered the primary medium of instruction in many universities across countries where English is not native.
medium.zh: 英语通常被视为许多英语非母语国家大学的主要教学媒介。

meet.en: Students from different cultural backgrounds have the opportunity to meet and exchange ideas during international exchange programs.
meet.zh: 来自不同文化背景的学生有机会在国际交流项目中相遇并交流想法。

meet up.en: My friends and I usually meet up at the local café every Saturday to discuss our academic progress and share experiences.
meet up.zh: 我和朋友们通常每周六在当地咖啡馆见面，讨论我们的学业进展并分享经验。

meeting.en: The meeting scheduled for tomorrow afternoon has been postponed due to the speaker's unexpected travel arrangements.
meeting.zh: 明天下午安排的会议由于演讲者意外的旅行安排而被推迟。

meetings.en: Back-to-back meetings throughout the day can be exhausting and may reduce overall workplace productivity and creativity.
meetings.zh: 一整天连续不断的会议会让人筋疲力尽，并可能降低整体的工作场所效率和创造力。

melody.en: The soothing melody played by the street musician attracted a crowd of passersby who stopped to appreciate the music.
melody.zh: 街头音乐家演奏的舒缓旋律吸引了一群路人停下来欣赏音乐。

melon.en: Watermelon is particularly refreshing during hot summer months and contains a high percentage of water, making it hydrating.
melon.zh: 西瓜在炎热的夏季特别清爽，含有高比例的水分，使其具有补水作用。

mediate.en: The government appointed a neutral party to mediate between the labor union and the management to resolve the ongoing strike peacefully.
mediate.zh: 政府指定了一个中立方在工会和管理层之间进行调解，以和平方式解决持续进行的罢工事件。

mediator.en: A skilled mediator helped the two warring factions reach a compromise without escalating the conflict into full-scale violence.
mediator.zh: 一位经验丰富的调解员帮助两个交战的派系达成妥协，避免将冲突升级为全面暴力。

medical.en: Advances in medical technology have allowed doctors to diagnose and treat diseases more effectively than ever before.
medical.zh: 医疗技术的进步使医生能够比以往更有效地诊断和治疗疾病。

medical care.en: Accessible medical care remains a significant challenge in remote rural areas where hospitals are few and far between.
medical care.zh: 在偏远农村地区，医院稀少且距离遥远，获得医疗服务仍然是一个重大挑战。

medically.en: Although the patient was medically certified as fit to resume work, she still felt emotionally unprepared for the transition.
medically.zh: 尽管病人已在医学上被确认可以恢复工作，但她仍然感到心理上还没有准备好。

medication.en: Regular intake of prescribed medication combined with a balanced diet has proven far more effective than surgery alone.
medication.zh: 定期服用处方药并配合均衡饮食，已被证明比单纯手术有效得多。

medicinal.en: Many plants with potent medicinal properties have been used by indigenous cultures for centuries before modern pharmaceuticals.
medicinal.zh: 许多具有强大药用价值的植物在被现代制药业发现之前，已经被土著文化使用了数百年。

medicine.en: Modern medicine has advanced greatly, allowing doctors to treat many previously fatal diseases more effectively.
medicine.zh: 现代医学取得了巨大进步，使医生能够更有效地治疗许多以前致命的疾病。

medics.en: The medics arrived at the disaster site within thirty minutes and immediately began providing emergency treatment to the injured.
medics.zh: 医疗人员在三十分钟内到达灾害现场，立即开始为伤者提供紧急治疗。

medieval.en: Many medieval castles have been carefully preserved as historical landmarks, attracting thousands of tourists to the region each year.
medieval.zh: 许多中世纪城堡被精心保存为历史遗迹，每年吸引成千上万的游客前来参观。

measurements.en: The scientists took precise measurements of the samples to ensure the accuracy of their research findings.
measurements.zh: 科学家们对样本进行了精确的测量，以确保研究结果的准确性。

measures.en: The government implemented strict measures to control pollution levels in major urban areas more effectively.
measures.zh: 政府实施了严格措施，以更有效地控制主要城市地区的污染水平。

measuring.en: Measuring the effectiveness of educational programs requires both quantitative data and qualitative feedback from students.
measuring.zh: 衡量教育项目的有效性需要定量数据和来自学生的定性反馈。

meat.en: Studies have shown that excessive consumption of red meat may increase the risk of certain health problems.
meat.zh: 研究表明，过量食用红肉可能会增加某些健康问题的风险。

mechanic.en: When my car broke down, I took it to a qualified mechanic who quickly diagnosed the engine problem.
mechanic.zh: 当我的车抛锚时，我把它送到了一名合格的机械师那里，他很快诊断出了发动机问题。

mechanical.en: The mechanical systems in the old factory need upgrading to ensure safety standards are met by all workers.
mechanical.zh: 旧工厂的机械系统需要升级，以确保所有工人符合安全标准。

mechanics.en: Understanding the mechanics of economic markets helps policymakers make informed decisions about interest rates.
mechanics.zh: 了解经济市场的机制有助于政策制定者在利率方面做出明智的决定。

mechanism.en: The government implemented a new mechanism to ensure that funds are distributed fairly among different social groups.
mechanism.zh: 政府实施了一种新机制，以确保资金在不同社会群体之间公平分配。

medal.en: The athlete was overjoyed when she won the gold medal at the international swimming competition.
medal.zh: 这位运动员在国际游泳比赛中获得金牌时欣喜若狂。

media.en: The media plays a significant role in shaping public opinion regarding political elections and social issues.
media.zh: 媒体在塑造公众对政治选举和社会问题的看法方面发挥着重要作用。

memorize.en: Many language learners believe they must memorize extensive vocabulary lists to achieve fluency in a foreign language.
memorize.zh: 许多语言学习者认为，他们必须记住大量的词汇表才能达到外语流利程度。

memory.en: Human memory often fades over time, which is why reviewing information is crucial for long-term retention.
memory.zh: 人类记忆往往会随着时间流逝而减退，这就是为什么复习信息对于长期保持至关重要。

menace.en: Air pollution has become a serious menace in urban areas, contributing to respiratory diseases and reduced life expectancy.
menace.zh: 空气污染已成为城市地区的严重威胁，导致呼吸系统疾病和预期寿命降低。

mend.en: Community mediation programs can effectively help mend broken relationships between neighbors involved in disputes.
mend.zh: 社区调解项目可以有效地帮助修复卷入纠纷的邻里之间破裂的关系。

mental.en: Schools need to implement better support systems to protect the mental well-being of students facing academic pressure daily.
mental.zh: 学校需要实施更好的支持体系，以保护面临日常学业压力的学生的心理健康。

mental health.en: Governments should allocate more resources to improve mental health services in schools and workplaces.
mental health.zh: 政府应该拨出更多资源来改善学校和工作场所的心理健康服务。

mentality.en: A growth mentality encourages individuals to view challenges as opportunities for learning and personal development.
mentality.zh: 成长型心态鼓励个人将挑战视为学习和个人发展的机会。

mentally.en: People who engage in regular physical exercise tend to perform better mentally in cognitively demanding tasks.
mentally.zh: 经常进行体育锻炼的人在认知要求高的任务中往往表现得更好。

mention.en: It is worth mentioning that technological advancement has revolutionized the way we communicate and access information.
mention.zh: 值得提及的是，技术的进步彻底改变了我们交流和获取信息的方式。

mentioned.en: As previously mentioned in the report, the lack of proper infrastructure remains a major obstacle to development.
mentioned.zh: 正如报告中此前所述，缺乏适当的基础设施仍然是发展的主要障碍。

microorganism.en: Scientists studying the microorganism discovered that it can survive in extreme temperatures and harsh conditions.
microorganism.zh: 研究这种微生物的科学家发现，它能在极端温度和恶劣条件下生存。

microorganisms.en: Microorganisms play a crucial role in breaking down organic waste and maintaining ecological balance.
microorganisms.zh: 微生物在分解有机废物和维持生态平衡方面起着至关重要的作用。

microphone.en: The speaker forgot to check the microphone before the presentation, which caused some initial technical difficulties.
microphone.zh: 演讲者在演讲开始前忘记检查麦克风了，这导致了一些最初的技术问题。

microscope.en: Under the microscope, the cells showed unusual patterns that warranted further investigation by the research team.
microscope.zh: 在显微镜下，这些细胞显示出需要研究团队进一步调查的异常模式。

microwave.en: Using a microwave to heat food is convenient for busy professionals, though some argue it affects nutritional value.
microwave.zh: 对于忙碌的专业人士来说，用微波炉加热食物很方便，尽管有人认为它会影响营养价值。

mid.en: The project is at mid-stage and requires additional funding to proceed according to the original timeline.
mid.zh: 该项目处于中期阶段，需要额外资金才能按照原定时间表继续进行。

midday.en: Many office workers prefer to take a short walk during midday to refresh themselves and improve concentration.
midday.zh: 许多上班族喜欢在中午短暂散步，以提神醒脑并提高注意力。

middle.en: In the middle of the twentieth century, many countries experienced significant economic growth and industrial development.
middle.zh: 在二十世纪中叶，许多国家经历了显著的经济增长和工业发展。

midnight.en: Students preparing for important examinations often study late into the midnight hours to cover all material.
midnight.zh: 为重要考试做准备的学生经常学习到深夜，以涵盖所有材料。

midst.en: In the midst of the economic crisis, the government introduced new policies to support small businesses.
midst.zh: 在经济危机中，政府推出了支持小企业的新政策。

mile.en: The old factory is located approximately a mile from the residential area, causing concerns about environmental pollution.
mile.zh: 那家旧工厂位于住宅区约一英里外，引发了人们对环境污染的担忧。

militant.en: The government has implemented strict security measures to prevent militant groups from destabilizing the region.
militant.zh: 政府已实施严格的安全措施，以防止武装组织破坏该地区的稳定。

military.en: Many developed nations are reducing their military expenditure and investing more in education and healthcare.
military.zh: 许多发达国家正在削减军事开支，转而更多投资于教育和医疗保健。

milk.en: Drinking milk regularly provides essential calcium that is crucial for maintaining healthy bones throughout life.
milk.zh: 定期饮用牛奶可提供人体必需的钙质，对维持一生骨骼健康至关重要。

mill.en: The abandoned textile mill has been transformed into a cultural center, preserving the region's industrial heritage.
mill.zh: 这座废弃的纺织厂已被改造成文化中心，保护了该地区的工业遗产。

millennium.en: At the turn of the millennium, technology started to advance very quickly in many countries around the globe.
millennium.zh: 在千年之交，技术开始在全球许多国家非常迅速地发展。

millimetre.en: Architects must calculate measurements precisely, often down to the nearest millimetre, to ensure structural safety.
millimetre.zh: 建筑师必须精确计算尺寸，通常精确到毫米，以确保结构安全。

million.en: The charity organization raised millions of dollars to provide clean water supplies to remote villages.
million.zh: 该慈善组织筹集了数百万美元，为偏远村庄提供清洁饮用水。

mimic.en: Children tend to mimic the behavior and speech patterns of their parents during early development stages.
mimic.zh: 儿童在早期发育阶段往往倾向于模仿父母的行为和说话方式。

mind.en: It is essential to keep an open mind when studying foreign cultures to avoid cultural misunderstandings.
mind.zh: 在学习外国文化时保持开放的心态对于避免文化误解至关重要。

minimise.en: Governments should minimise plastic waste by implementing stricter regulations on single-use products.
minimise.zh: 政府应通过实施更严格的法规来最大限度地减少一次性产品的塑料垃圾。

minimize.en: Companies can minimize their environmental impact by adopting renewable energy sources and sustainable practices.
minimize.zh: 公司可以通过采用可再生能源和可持续做法来最大限度地减少对环境的影响。

minimum.en: Many countries have established a minimum wage to protect workers from being exploited by employers.
minimum.zh: 许多国家已设定最低工资标准，以保护工人免受雇主的剥削。

mining.en: The environmental impact of coal mining often raises serious concerns among local residents and ecological protection groups.
mining.zh: 煤炭开采对环境的影响经常引起当地居民和生态保护群体的严重担忧。

minister.en: The education minister announced new policies to improve school facilities and enhance learning conditions.
minister.zh: 教育部长宣布了新政策，以改善学校设施并提升学习条件。

ministry.en: The Ministry of Health has launched a nationwide campaign to promote vaccination among vulnerable populations.
ministry.zh: 卫生部发起了一场全国性运动，以促进弱势群体的疫苗接种。

minor.en: Despite having minor disagreements during the meeting, the committee members eventually reached a unanimous decision.
minor.zh: 尽管会议期间有小的分歧，委员会成员最终达成了共识。

minorities.en: The government must implement policies that protect the rights of minorities and promote equal opportunities.
minorities.zh: 政府必须实施保护少数群体权利并促进平等机会的政策。

minority.en: Only a minority of students chose to pursue postgraduate studies after completing their undergraduate degrees.
minority.zh: 只有少数学生在完成本科学位后选择继续攻读研究生。

minors.en: Strict laws prohibit the sale of alcohol and tobacco products to minors in most developed countries.
minors.zh: 在大多数发达国家，严格的法律禁止向未成年人出售酒精和烟草产品。

methods.en: Researchers employed various qualitative research methods to gather accurate data regarding complex consumer behaviour patterns in the market.
methods.zh: 研究人员采用各种定性研究方法来收集有关市场中复杂消费者行为模式的准确数据。

metre.en: Every single metre of the available land was utilized to construct the new sustainable housing complex efficiently.
metre.zh: 每一米可用土地都被用来高效地建造新的可持续住房综合体。

metres.en: The building stands approximately fifty metres tall, making it one of the highest structures in the city.
metres.zh: 这座建筑大约五十米高，使其成为该市最高的建筑之一。

metric.en: The metric system has become the universal standard for measuring length, weight and volume across most countries.
metric.zh: 公制系统已成为大多数国家测量长度、重量和体积的通用标准。

metro.en: The new metro line has significantly reduced commuting time for thousands of residents living in the suburbs.
metro.zh: 新的地铁线路大大缩短了居住在郊区成千上万居民的通勤时间。

metropolitan.en: Metropolitan areas often face common challenges such as traffic congestion, housing shortages and air pollution.
metropolitan.zh: 大都市地区经常面临交通拥堵、住房短缺和空气污染等常见挑战。

mice.en: Laboratory mice are commonly used in scientific experiments to test how new drugs affect living organisms.
mice.zh: 实验室小鼠常被用于科学实验，以测试新药物如何影响生物体。

microbe.en: Scientists discovered a new microbe in the deep ocean that can potentially break down plastic waste efficiently.
microbe.zh: 科学家在深海中发现了一种新的微生物，可能能够有效地分解塑料废物。

microbes.en: Scientists are actively studying how beneficial microbes in the soil contribute to sustainable agricultural practices around the world.
microbes.zh: 科学家们正在积极研究土壤中的有益微生物如何促进世界各地的可持续农业实践。

microbiology.en: She decided to pursue a career in microbiology after completing her undergraduate degree in biological sciences.
microbiology.zh: 在完成生物科学的本科学位后，她决定从事微生物学领域的职业。

mindset.en: Having a growth mindset can significantly improve your ability to learn new languages and adapt to unfamiliar situations in foreign countries.
mindset.zh: 拥有成长型心态可以显著提高你在外国学习新语言和适应陌生环境的能力。

mine.en: The abandoned mine in the northern region has been transformed into a museum that showcases the area's rich industrial heritage.
mine.zh: 北方地区废弃的矿山已被改造成一个展示该地区丰富工业遗产的博物馆。

mineral.en: Many developing nations rely heavily on the export of natural resources, such as coal or any valuable mineral, to sustain their economies.
mineral.zh: 许多发展中国家严重依赖自然资源的出口，如煤炭或任何有价值的矿物，来维持其经济。

mineralogy.en: The field of mineralogy requires extensive scientific training and laboratory experience to identify various geological specimens accurately.
mineralogy.zh: 矿物学领域需要广泛的科学培训和实验室经验才能准确识别各种地质标本。

minerals.en: Developing countries often depend heavily on the export of natural minerals to generate revenue for national infrastructure projects.
minerals.zh: 发展中国家往往严重依赖出口天然矿物来为国家基础设施项目创收。

miners.en: The working conditions for miners in many developing nations remain hazardous, despite improvements in safety regulations and technology.
miners.zh: 尽管安全法规和技术有所改善，但许多发展中国家的矿工工作条件仍然危险。

mingle.en: During the reception, international students had the opportunity to mingle with professors and fellow researchers from diverse academic backgrounds.
mingle.zh: 在招待会上，国际学生有机会与来自不同学术背景的教授和研究伙伴交流。

miniature.en: The science museum features a miniature model of the solar system that demonstrates the relative positions of planets in an engaging way.
miniature.zh: 科学博物馆展示了一个太阳系的微型模型，以引人入胜的方式展示行星的相对位置。

minibus.en: The university operates a fleet of minibuses to transport students between the main campus and the newly built accommodation blocks.
minibus.zh: 大学运营着一队小型巴士，用于在校本部和新建成的生活区之间运送学生。

minimal.en: The environmental impact of this construction project is minimal because the developers used sustainable materials and energy-efficient technologies.
minimal.zh: 这个建设项目的环境影响极小，因为开发商使用了可持续材料和节能技术。

minus.en: The temperature dropped to minus five degrees Celsius overnight, making it extremely challenging for outdoor construction workers to continue their duties.
minus.zh: 夜间气温骤降至零下五摄氏度，给户外建筑工人继续作业带来了极大的挑战。

minute.en: The professor emphasised every minute detail of the research methodology, ensuring students fully understood the experimental procedures.
minute.zh: 教授强调了研究方法中的每一个细节，确保学生充分理解实验程序。

minutes.en: The meeting minutes were promptly distributed to all staff members so that those absent could review the key decisions made.
minutes.zh: 会议记录被迅速分发给所有员工，以便缺席者能够查看所做的关键决定。

miracle.en: Medical professionals often describe the patient's recovery as nothing short of a miracle given the severity of the initial diagnosis.
miracle.zh: 鉴于最初诊断的严重性，医疗专业人员经常将病人的康复描述为简直是奇迹。

mirror.en: Social media platforms serve as a mirror reflecting contemporary cultural values and influencing how younger generations perceive themselves.
mirror.zh: 社交媒体平台充当了一面反映当代文化价值观的镜子，影响着年轻一代对自我的认知。

misconceptions.en: There are widespread misconceptions about the benefits of nuclear energy, which often hinder objective public debate on energy policy.
misconceptions.zh: 关于核能的好处存在广泛误解，这常常阻碍公众对能源政策进行客观辩论。

miserable.en: Living in overcrowded and miserable housing conditions has been linked to increased rates of mental health issues among urban residents.
miserable.zh: 生活在过度拥挤和恶劣的住房条件下与城市居民心理健康问题发病率的增加有关。

misery.en: Poverty creates a cycle of misery that affects not only physical health but also restricts access to quality education and employment opportunities.
misery.zh: 贫困造成了一种痛苦的循环，不仅影响身体健康，还限制了获得优质教育和就业机会的机会。

misfortune.en: Despite facing considerable misfortune early in his career, the author's perseverance eventually led to international literary recognition.
misfortune.zh: 尽管在职业生涯早期遭遇了相当大的不幸，这位作家的坚持最终赢得了国际文学界的认可。

misinterpret.en: Listeners should pay close attention to tone and context to avoid misinterpret the speaker's intended meaning during cross-cultural communication.
misinterpret.zh: 在跨文化交流中，听众应密切注意语气和语境，以避免误解说话者的真实意图。

misinterpreted.en: The survey results were misinterpreted, which caused the government to implement ineffective policies based on flawed conclusions.
misinterpreted.zh: 调查结果被错误解读，导致政府根据有缺陷的结论实施了无效的政策。

mislead.en: Advertisements that mislead consumers should be strictly regulated to protect public trust in commercial messaging.
mislead.zh: 误导消费者的广告应该受到严格监管，以保护公众对商业信息的信任。

miss.en: Students who miss classes regularly tend to perform significantly worse than those with consistent attendance records.
miss.zh: 经常缺课的学生往往比出勤率稳定的学生表现差得多。

missed.en: The missed deadline resulted in the company losing a substantial contract worth millions of dollars.
missed.zh: 错过的最后期限导致该公司损失了一份价值数百万美元的重要合同。

missile.en: The missile crisis highlighted the urgent need for international dialogue to prevent potential nuclear conflicts.
missile.zh: 导弹危机凸显了国际对话对于防止潜在核冲突的迫切需要。

missing.en: The report highlighted several critical missing components that are essential for the project's overall long-term success.
missing.zh: 报告强调了几个关键的缺失部分，这些对于项目的整体长期成功至关重要。

mission.en: The primary mission of the space agency is to explore distant planets while advancing scientific knowledge for humanity.
mission.zh: 该航天机构的主要使命是探索遥远行星，同时推进人类的科学知识。

mist.en: The ancient temple emerged through the morning mist, creating a breathtaking view for early morning visitors.
mist.zh: 古庙从晨雾中浮现，为清晨的游客创造了令人惊叹的景色。

mistake.en: It would be a serious mistake to ignore the environmental impact of rapid urbanization in developing countries.
mistake.zh: 忽视发展中国家快速城市化对环境的影响将是一个严重的错误。

mistaken.en: It is mistaken to assume that technology will solve all educational problems without any human intervention at all.
mistaken.zh: 认为技术将在没有任何人为干预的情况下解决所有教育问题是错误的。

might.en: Climate change might lead to more frequent extreme weather events in coastal regions worldwide.
might.zh: 气候变化可能导致全球沿海地区更频繁地出现极端天气事件。

mighty.en: The mighty rivers of the continent have played a crucial role in the development of ancient civilizations.
mighty.zh: 这片大陆上强大的河流在古代文明的发展中发挥了关键作用。

migraine.en: Many students experience migraines during exam periods due to high stress and lack of sleep.
migraine.zh: 许多学生在考试期间由于高度压力和睡眠不足而出现偏头痛。

migrants.en: The integration of migrants into local communities requires careful planning and cultural understanding.
migrants.zh: 将移民融入当地社区需要细致的规划和文化理解。

migrate.en: Some animals migrate seasonally to find suitable breeding grounds and abundant food sources.
migrate.zh: 一些动物会季节性地迁徙，以寻找合适的繁殖地和充足的食物来源。

migrated.en: The community migrated from rural areas to cities in search of better employment opportunities.
migrated.zh: 这个社区从农村地区迁移到城市，寻找更好的就业机会。

migrating.en: The migrating birds travel thousands of miles southward each autumn to escape harsh winters.
migrating.zh: 这些迁徙的鸟类每年秋天向南飞行数千英里，以躲避严冬。

migration.en: Seasonal migration of birds is often influenced by changes in global climate and food availability patterns.
migration.zh: 鸟类的季节性迁徙通常受到全球气候和食物可用性模式变化的影响。

migratory.en: The construction of barriers along migratory routes has severely impacted the bird population numbers.
migratory.zh: 沿着迁徙路线建造障碍物严重影响了鸟类数量。

mild.en: The climate in this coastal region remains relatively mild throughout the year, attracting many tourists.
mild.zh: 这个沿海地区的气候全年相对温和，吸引了许多游客。

modifications.en: Recent modifications to the curriculum have significantly improved student engagement with complex scientific concepts.
modifications.zh: 课程的最新修改显著提高了学生对复杂科学概念的参与度。

modified.en: The modified teaching approach proved more effective in helping students understand abstract theoretical frameworks.
modified.zh: 修改后的教学方法在帮助学生理解抽象理论框架方面更加有效。

modifies.en: Climate change modifies ecosystems in ways that scientists are still working to fully understand.
modifies.zh: 气候变化正在以科学家仍在努力完全理解的方式改变生态系统。

modify.en: Researchers continue to find ways to modify existing materials to make them more environmentally sustainable.
modify.zh: 研究人员继续寻找方法来改造现有材料，使其更加环保可持续。

modifying.en: The challenge of modifying traditional manufacturing processes requires innovative thinking and substantial investment.
modifying.zh: 改造传统制造工艺的挑战需要创新思维和大量投资。

module.en: Each module of the degree program builds upon the previous one, creating a comprehensive educational experience.
module.zh: 学位课程的每个模块都建立在前一个模块的基础上，创造了一个全面的教育体验。

moist.en: The tropical rainforest's moist environment supports an extraordinary diversity of plant and animal species.
moist.zh: 热带雨林潮湿的环境支持着异常多样的动植物物种。

moisture.en: Scientists measure the moisture content in soil samples to assess the health of agricultural land.
moisture.zh: 科学家测量土壤样本中的水分含量，以评估农业用地的健康状况。

molecular.en: Understanding molecular structures is fundamental to advancing research in pharmaceutical development.
molecular.zh: 理解分子结构对于推进药物研发的研究至关重要。

molecule.en: Each molecule of water contains two hydrogen atoms and one oxygen atom bonded together.
molecule.zh: 每个水分子都包含两个氢原子和一个通过化学键结合的氧原子。

molecules.en: The molecules in water behave differently when the temperature changes, which is why scientists study their properties extensively.
molecules.zh: 水中的分子在温度变化时表现不同，这就是为什么科学家广泛研究它们的特性。

molten.en: The molten rock beneath the Earth's surface can cause devastating volcanic eruptions if it reaches the ground.
molten.zh: 地下的熔岩如果到达地面，可能会导致毁灭性的火山爆发。

moment.en: At that critical moment, the decision made by the committee significantly altered the course of the project.
moment.zh: 在那个关键时刻，委员会做出的决定显著改变了项目的进程。

momentum.en: The renewable energy movement has gained significant momentum in recent years due to growing environmental concerns.
momentum.zh: 由于日益增长的环境问题，可再生能源运动近年来获得了显著的动力。

monarch.en: The British monarch traditionally plays a symbolic role in constitutional governance without holding direct political power.
monarch.zh: 英国君主在宪法治理中传统上扮演象征性角色，不掌握直接的政治权力。

monastery.en: Ancient monasteries in the Himalayas serve as important centers for preserving cultural and religious traditions that date back centuries.
monastery.zh: 喜马拉雅山脉的古修道院是保存可追溯到几个世纪前的文化和宗教传统的重要中心。

monetary.en: The government implemented new monetary policies to control inflation and stabilize the national economy during the crisis.
monetary.zh: 政府在危机期间实施了新的货币政策来控制通货膨胀和稳定国民经济。

money.en: Many economists argue that throwing money at social problems does not necessarily lead to effective solutions.
money.zh: 许多经济学家认为，向社会问题投入资金并不一定能带来有效的解决方案。

monitor.en: Parents should monitor their children's screen time carefully to ensure healthy development and adequate physical activity.
monitor.zh: 父母应该仔细监控孩子的屏幕使用时间，以确保他们健康成长和充足的体育活动。

monitored.en: The patient's vital signs were closely monitored throughout the surgery to ensure their safety and well-being.
monitored.zh: 病人在整个手术过程中生命体征都被密切监测，以确保他们的安全和健康。

mobilize.en: The government launched a campaign to mobilize public support for environmental protection policies across the country.
mobilize.zh: 政府发起了一场运动，在全国范围内动员公众支持环境保护政策。

mock.en: Some students tend to mock their peers who speak with different accents, which creates an unwelcoming learning atmosphere.
mock.zh: 一些学生倾向于嘲笑说话带不同口音的同龄人，这造成了不友好的学习氛围。

mode.en: Many traditional teaching methods are being replaced by an online learning mode in the current digital era.
mode.zh: 在当前的数字时代，许多传统教学方法正被在线学习模式所取代。

model.en: This sustainable economic model is currently used by many countries to grow their wealth without harming the environment.
model.zh: 这种可持续经济模式目前被许多国家用来在不损害环境的情况下增长财富。

modem.en: A high-speed modem is essential for maintaining a stable internet connection when working remotely from a home office.
modem.zh: 高速调制解调器对于在家办公室远程工作时保持稳定的互联网连接至关重要。

moderate.en: Living in regions with moderate climates is preferred by many people who wish to avoid extreme weather conditions.
moderate.zh: 许多人更喜欢生活在气候温和的地区，以避免极端天气条件。

moderately.en: The research indicates that moderately priced restaurants often provide better value for money than expensive establishments.
moderately.zh: 研究表明，价格适中的餐厅往往比昂贵的餐厅提供更好的性价比。

modern.en: Modern technology has revolutionized the way people communicate, yet it has also introduced challenges regarding privacy and face-to-face social interaction skills.
modern.zh: 现代技术彻底改变了人们的交流方式，但也带来了关于隐私和面对面社交互动技能的挑战。

modest.en: Despite her significant contributions to medical research, the scientist remained modest about her achievements and avoided publicity.
modest.zh: 尽管她对医学研究做出了重大贡献，这位科学家仍对自己的成就保持谦虚，避免宣传。

modification.en: The proposed modification to building regulations would require all new constructions to meet stricter environmental standards.
modification.zh: 拟议的建筑法规修改将要求所有新建筑必须满足更严格的环境标准。

mistakes.en: Teachers should encourage students to learn from their mistakes rather than punishing them severely for every error.
mistakes.zh: 老师应该鼓励学生从错误中学习，而不是因为每一个错误都严厉惩罚他们。

mistress.en: The headmistress announced that the school would implement stricter policies regarding student attendance and academic performance.
mistress.zh: 校长宣布学校将实施更严格的关于学生出勤和学业表现的政策。

misunderstand.en: International students may misunderstand cultural references that native speakers take for granted in everyday conversations.
misunderstand.zh: 国际学生可能会误解母语者在日常对话中视为理所当然的文化典故。

mix.en: The ability to mix theoretical knowledge with practical experience is essential for success in today's competitive job market.
mix.zh: 将理论知识与实践经验相结合的能力在当今竞争激烈的就业市场中至关重要。

mixed.en: Public opinion regarding the new policy remains mixed, with some citizens supporting it while others express strong concerns.
mixed.zh: 公众对新政策的意见不一，一些公民支持它，而另一些人则表示强烈担忧。

mixture.en: A mixture of traditional teaching methods and modern technology often creates the most effective learning environment for students.
mixture.zh: 传统教学方法与现代科技的混合往往为学生创造最有效的学习环境。

moan.en: Rather than moan about the challenges they face, successful entrepreneurs focus on finding creative solutions to problems.
moan.zh: 成功的创业者不会抱怨他们面临的挑战，而是专注于寻找问题的创新解决方案。

mobile.en: The widespread use of mobile technology has significantly transformed how people communicate and access information globally.
mobile.zh: 移动技术的广泛使用显著改变了人们全球沟通和获取信息的方式。

mobile phone.en: The excessive use of mobile phones among young people has raised concerns about addiction and reduced face-to-face social interaction.
mobile phone.zh: 年轻人过度使用手机引发了对成瘾和减少面对面社交互动的担忧。

mobility.en: Social mobility remains a significant challenge in many societies, where a person's economic background often determines educational opportunities.
mobility.zh: 社会流动性在许多社会中仍然是一个重大挑战，一个人的经济背景往往决定了教育机会。

more efficient.en: The new manufacturing process is more efficient than the previous one, reducing waste by 30 percent.
more efficient.zh: 新的制造工艺比以前更高效，减少了30%的浪费。

more or less.en: The two cities are more or less the same size, with populations around two million each.
more or less.zh: 这两个城市规模大致相同，人口都在两百万左右。

more quickly.en: Urban areas tend to develop more quickly than rural regions due to better infrastructure and funding.
more quickly.zh: 由于基础设施和资金更好，城市地区往往比农村地区发展得更快。

more than.en: More than 60 percent of students chose to study abroad for their postgraduate degrees last year.
more than.zh: 去年超过60%的学生选择出国攻读研究生学位。

more than half.en: More than half of all marriages in developed countries end in divorce according to recent statistics.
more than half.zh: 根据最近的统计数据，发达国家超过一半的婚姻以离婚告终。

moreover.en: The project requires significant funding; moreover, it demands a team of skilled professionals to ensure successful implementation.
moreover.zh: 该项目需要大量资金；此外，它还需要一支熟练的专业团队来确保成功实施。

morning.en: Many commuters prefer to travel in the morning to avoid heavy traffic during rush hours.
morning.zh: 许多通勤者喜欢在早晨出行，以避开高峰时段的拥堵交通。

mortal.en: All human beings are mortal, which is why it is crucial to leave a positive legacy for future generations.
mortal.zh: 所有人类都是终有一死的，这就是为什么为后代留下积极遗产至关重要。

mortality.en: Researchers discovered a direct link between air quality and mortality rates in urban populations.
mortality.zh: 研究人员发现了空气质量与城市人口死亡率之间的直接联系。

monitoring.en: Continuous monitoring of water quality is essential for preventing public health crises in densely populated urban areas worldwide.
monitoring.zh: 持续监测水质对于防止全球人口稠密的城市地区发生公共卫生危机至关重要。

monitors.en: Environmental scientists monitors wildlife populations in protected areas to track ecosystem health and biodiversity changes over time.
monitors.zh: 环境科学家监测保护区的野生动物种群，以追踪生态系统健康状况和生物多样性的变化。

monitory.en: The teacher gave a monitory look to the students who were not paying attention during the important lecture.
monitory.zh: 老师向那些在重要讲座中不专心听讲的学生投以警告的眼神。

monkey.en: In some Asian countries, trained monkeys are used to harvest coconuts from tall palm trees efficiently and quickly.
monkey.zh: 在一些亚洲国家，受过训练的猴子被用来高效快速地从高高的椰树上采摘椰子。

monkeys.en: Wild monkeys in certain tourist areas have become accustomed to human presence and often beg for food from visitors.
monkeys.zh: 某些旅游区的野生猴子已经习惯了人类的存在，经常向游客乞讨食物。

monopoly.en: The telecommunications company was accused of creating a monopoly that prevented fair competition in the market for years.
monopoly.zh: 这家电信公司被指控垄断市场，多年来阻止了公平竞争。

monotonous.en: Working on an assembly line can become monotonous, leading to boredom and decreased job satisfaction among factory workers.
monotonous.zh: 在流水线上工作可能会变得单调乏味，导致工厂工人感到厌倦和工作满意度下降。

monster.en: The film depicted a terrifying monster that terrorized a small coastal village during the stormy winter nights.
monster.zh: 这部电影描绘了一个可怕的怪物，在暴风雨的冬夜恐吓着一个沿海小村庄。

month.en: The research project is expected to take approximately six months to complete successfully with all the required data.
month.zh: 这个研究项目预计需要大约六个月的时间来收集所有所需数据并成功完成。

monthly.en: Many employees prefer receiving their salaries on a monthly basis rather than weekly payments for better financial planning.
monthly.zh: 许多员工更喜欢按月领薪水，而不是按周领薪，以便更好地进行财务规划。

mosquito.en: The mosquito bite left a red mark on my arm that took several days to heal completely.
mosquito.zh: 蚊子叮咬在我手臂上留下了一个红印，完全愈合需要好几天。

mosquitoes.en: In tropical regions, mosquitoes are considered one of the most dangerous insects due to the diseases they transmit.
mosquitoes.zh: 在热带地区，蚊子被认为是最危险的昆虫之一，因为它们会传播疾病。

moss.en: Ancient stone walls covered in soft green moss create a peaceful atmosphere in traditional gardens.
moss.zh: 被柔软的绿色苔藓覆盖的古石墙在传统花园中营造出一种宁静的氛围。

most.en: Most university students today prefer to use digital resources rather than traditional printed textbooks.
most.zh: 今天大多数大学生更喜欢使用数字资源而不是传统的印刷教科书。

most common.en: The most common cause of air pollution in urban areas is vehicle emissions from private cars.
most common.zh: 城市地区空气污染最常见的原因是私家车排放。

most popular.en: Online learning platforms have become the most popular choice for professional development among working adults.
most popular.zh: 在线学习平台已成为在职成年人职业发展最受欢迎的选择。

mostly.en: The attendees at the international conference were mostly professionals from the healthcare sector seeking new knowledge.
mostly.zh: 参加国际会议的代表大多是寻求新知识的医疗保健部门的专业人士。

motel.en: Budget travelers often choose motels along highways because they offer convenient parking and affordable accommodation.
motel.zh: 预算有限的旅客经常选择高速公路沿线的汽车旅馆，因为它们提供便利的停车和实惠的住宿。

mother.en: My mother encouraged me to pursue higher education, believing that knowledge would open doors to better opportunities.
mother.zh: 我的母亲鼓励我追求高等教育，认为知识会为更好的机会打开大门。

motion.en: The constant motion of the tectonic plates beneath the earth can lead to significant seismic activity.
motion.zh: 地球下方构造板块的持续运动可能导致重大的地震活动。

monument.en: The ancient monument in the city center attracts thousands of tourists every year, serving as a reminder of the country's rich historical heritage.
monument.zh: 这座城市中心的古老纪念碑每年吸引成千上万的游客，成为国家丰富历史遗产的见证。

monumental.en: The monumental task of rebuilding the earthquake-damaged city required the collaboration of engineers and thousands of skilled workers over several years.
monumental.zh: 重建地震受损城市的艰巨任务需要工程师和数千名熟练工人多年的合作。

mood.en: The scientist's mood shifted from optimism to concern after reviewing the latest environmental data showing alarming rates of pollution.
mood.zh: 在审查了显示污染率令人担忧的最新环境数据后，这位科学家的情绪从乐观转为担忧。

moon.en: Landing on the moon was a significant achievement for humanity, demonstrating advanced technological capabilities and inspiring future generations to explore space.
moon.zh: 登月是人类的一项重大成就，展示了先进的技术水平，并激励后代探索太空。

moor.en: The hikers became disoriented while crossing the moor during their expedition, highlighting the need for proper navigation equipment in unfamiliar terrain.
moor.zh: 徒步旅行者在穿越荒野时迷失了方向，凸显了在陌生地形中携带适当导航设备的必要性。

mop.en: The janitor efficiently used a mop to clean the school corridors after the morning classes ended, maintaining a hygienic environment for students.
mop.zh: 看门人在上午课程结束后有效地使用拖把清洁学校走廊，为学生保持一个卫生的环境。

moral.en: Schools should teach moral values alongside academic subjects to help students develop into responsible and ethical members of society.
moral.zh: 学校应该在教学科目之余教授道德价值观，帮助学生发展成为社会中负责任和道德的成员。

morality.en: The decline in morality among some social groups has raised concerns among educators who believe that ethical education should be strengthened in schools.
morality.zh: 一些社会群体道德水准的下降引起了教育工作者的担忧，他们认为学校应该加强道德教育。

more.en: With technological advances, more students are now able to access quality education through online platforms, breaking geographical barriers worldwide.
more.zh: 随着科技进步，越来越多的学生现在可以通过在线平台获得优质教育，打破了世界各地的地理障碍。

more and more.en: More and more urban residents are choosing to live in smaller apartments, reflecting a shift in lifestyle preferences and economic considerations among young people.
