more and more.zh: 越来越多的城市居民选择住在较小的公寓，这反映了年轻人生活方式偏好和经济考虑的变化。

move on to.en: After discussing the causes of climate change, we should move on to examining potential solutions that governments could implement.
move on to.zh: 在讨论气候变化的原因之后，我们应该继续研究各国政府可以实施的潜在解决方案。

movement.en: The global movement towards sustainable living has encouraged many individuals to reduce waste and adopt more environmentally friendly consumption habits.
movement.zh: 全球可持续生活运动鼓励许多人减少浪费并采取更环保的消费习惯。

movements.en: Scientists track the movements of migratory birds to understand their patterns and predict environmental changes.
movements.zh: 科学家追踪候鸟的迁徙活动，以了解它们的模式并预测环境变化。

movie.en: Many students find that watching educational movies helps them retain information better than reading textbooks alone.
movie.zh: 许多学生发现，观看教育电影比仅仅阅读教科书更能帮助他们记住信息。

moving.en: The documentary presented a moving account of the challenges faced by refugees seeking asylum in foreign countries.
moving.zh: 这部纪录片讲述了难民在外国寻求庇护所面临的挑战，感人至深。

much.en: Urban areas have changed much in recent decades due to rapid industrialisation and population growth.
much.zh: 由于快速的工业化和人口增长，城市地区近几十年来发生了很大变化。

much better.en: Living in rural areas offers much better air quality compared to densely populated cities.
much better.zh: 与人口稠密的城市相比，生活在农村地区空气质量要好得多。

much less.en: Many families cannot afford basic healthcare, much less expensive educational programmes for their children.
much less.zh: 许多家庭负担不起基本的医疗保健，更不用说为孩子购买昂贵的教育项目了。

much more.en: Renewable energy sources offer much more sustainable long-term benefits than fossil fuels ever could.
much more.zh: 可再生能源比化石燃料提供更可持续的长期效益。

mud.en: After several days of heavy rain, the hiking trail became impassable due to thick layers of mud.
mud.zh: 连续几天的暴雨之后，由于厚厚的泥层，徒步小径变得无法通行。

motivate.en: Teachers should use various teaching methods to motivate students and help them achieve their full academic potential.
motivate.zh: 教师应该使用各种教学方法来激励学生，帮助他们充分发挥学术潜能。

motivated.en: Students who are highly motivated tend to achieve better academic results in competitive university settings globally.
motivated.zh: 在全球竞争性大学环境中，高度积极的学生往往能取得更好的学业成绩。

motivation.en: High levels of student motivation are often linked to better academic performance and greater engagement in classroom activities.
motivation.zh: 高水平的学生动机通常与更好的学业表现和更大的课堂活动参与度相关。

motive.en: Understanding the motive behind criminal behavior is essential for developing effective crime prevention strategies.
motive.zh: 了解犯罪行为背后的动机对于制定有效的犯罪预防策略至关重要。

motor.en: The development of fine motor skills in early childhood is essential for students to succeed in later academic writing tasks.
motor.zh: 幼儿精细动作技能的发展对于学生在后来的学术写作任务中取得成功至关重要。

motorcycle.en: In many Asian countries, motorcycles remain the primary mode of transportation due to their affordability and convenience.
motorcycle.zh: 在许多亚洲国家，摩托车仍然是主要的交通工具，因为它们经济实惠且方便。

motorway.en: The construction of new motorways can significantly reduce travel time and boost economic growth in rural regions.
motorway.zh: 新高速公路的建设可以显著缩短旅行时间，并促进农村地区的经济增长。

mould.en: Schools play a vital role in moulding young people's characters and preparing them for future responsibilities.
mould.zh: 学校在塑造年轻人的品格和为他们未来的责任做准备方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

mounds.en: The archaeologists discovered ancient artifacts buried beneath the mounds of earth near the historical site.
mounds.zh: 考古学家在历史遗迹附近的土堆下发现了埋藏的古代文物。

mount.en: Public pressure will continue to mount on the government to introduce stricter regulations regarding consumer safety.
mount.zh: 公众压力将继续加剧，要求政府出台更严格的消费者安全法规。

mountain.en: The view from the top of the mountain was absolutely breathtaking, with snow-capped peaks stretching endlessly toward the horizon.
mountain.zh: 从山顶俯瞰的景色令人叹为观止，白雪皑皑的山峰延伸至地平线。

mountainous.en: The mountainous region of Nepal attracts thousands of hikers and climbers every year who seek adventure and physical challenge.
mountainous.zh: 尼泊尔的山区每年吸引着成千上万的徒步旅行者和登山者，他们寻求冒险和身体挑战。

mountains.en: Climbing high mountains requires careful planning and physical training to ensure safety during the challenging expedition.
mountains.zh: 攀登高山需要仔细的计划和体能训练，以确保在具有挑战性的探险过程中的安全。

mourn.en: When the beloved monarch passed away, the entire nation gathered together to mourn and honor her remarkable legacy.
mourn.zh: 当受人爱戴的君主去世时，全国人民聚集在一起哀悼并缅怀她卓越的遗产。

mouse.en: Scientists often use the laboratory mouse in medical research because its genetic makeup shares many similarities with humans.
mouse.zh: 科学家经常在医学研究中使用实验鼠，因为它的基因构成与人类有许多相似之处。

mouses.en: The old barn cat efficiently mouses through the property every night, keeping the rodent population naturally under control.
mouses.zh: 那只旧谷仓猫每晚有效地在农场里捕鼠，将啮齿动物数量自然控制在范围内。

mouth.en: Dental professionals recommend brushing your teeth at least twice daily to maintain good oral health and hygiene.
mouth.zh: 牙科专业人士建议每天至少刷牙两次，以保持良好的口腔健康和卫生。

mouths.en: The river opens into a wide estuary where its waters flow into the sea through multiple sandy mouths.
mouths.zh: 这条河在宽阔的河口处敞开，通过多个沙质河口将河水流入大海。

move into.en: As cities expand and housing becomes more affordable, many young families are choosing to move into suburban areas.
move into.zh: 随着城市扩张和住房变得更加可负担，许多年轻家庭选择搬入郊区。

move on.en: After completing university, graduates must learn to move on and embrace new challenges in the professional world.
move on.zh: 完成大学学业后，毕业生必须学会向前看，拥抱职场中的新挑战。

muddy.en: The muddy path through the forest became completely impassable after several days of continuous rainfall and flooding.
muddy.zh: 在持续数日的降雨和洪水之后，穿过森林的泥泞小径变得完全无法通行。

mug.en: Many students prefer to bring their own reusable mug to the campus café rather than using disposable paper cups.
mug.zh: 许多学生喜欢自带可重复使用的马克杯去校园咖啡馆，而不是使用一次性纸杯。

multi.en: The multi-national corporation implemented a global strategy that required careful coordination across dozens of different markets.
multi.zh: 这家跨国公司实施了全球战略，需要在数十个不同的市场进行仔细协调。

multicultural.en: Living in a multicultural metropolis provides young professionals with valuable opportunities to learn foreign languages and customs.
multicultural.zh: 生活在一个多元文化的大都市为年轻专业人士提供了学习外语和习俗的宝贵机会。

multifunctional.en: The newly built multifunctional sports arena can be transformed into a concert venue or conference hall within hours.
multifunctional.zh: 这座新建的多功能体育馆可以在数小时内改造成音乐会场地或会议厅。

multiple.en: There are multiple reasons why students choose to study abroad, including better career prospects and cultural exposure.
multiple.zh: 学生选择出国留学有多个原因，包括更好的职业前景和文化接触。

multiply.en: If the population continues to multiply at the current rate, cities will need to build significantly more housing and infrastructure.
multiply.zh: 如果人口继续以目前的速度增长，城市将需要建造更多的住房和基础设施。

multitude.en: A multitude of factors, including economic inequality and lack of educational opportunities, contribute to the rising crime rates.
multitude.zh: 包括经济不平等和教育机会不足在内的众多因素导致了犯罪率的上升。

municipal.en: The municipal government announced plans to invest heavily in public transportation to reduce traffic congestion and pollution.
municipal.zh: 市政府宣布计划在公共交通方面加大投资，以减少交通拥堵和污染。

murder.en: The psychological thriller novel explores how a seemingly ordinary community deals with the aftermath of a shocking murder case.
murder.zh: 这本心理惊悚小说探讨了一个看似普通的社区如何应对一起令人震惊的谋杀案的后果。

musicians.en: Many famous musicians from classical conservatories have gone on to achieve international recognition, proving the value of rigorous training.
musicians.zh: 许多来自古典音乐学院的著名音乐家都获得了国际认可，证明了严格训练的价值。

mussels.en: Farmed mussels are considered an environmentally sustainable seafood option because they filter water and require no additional feed.
mussels.zh: 养殖的青口贝被认为是环境可持续的海鲜选择，因为它们可以净化水质且不需要额外的饲料。

must.en: Candidates must demonstrate strong communication skills and analytical abilities if they hope to succeed in job interviews.
must.zh: 候选人如果希望在求职面试中取得成功，就必须展示出强大的沟通能力和分析能力。

mutation.en: Researchers discovered that a specific mutation in the DNA sequence could cause cells to grow abnormally and form tumors.
mutation.zh: 研究人员发现，DNA序列中的某个特定突变可能导致细胞异常生长并形成肿瘤。

mutations.en: Accumulated mutations over generations have contributed to the diversity of species, enabling adaptation to changing environments.
mutations.zh: 跨代积累的突变促成了物种的多样性，使生物能够适应不断变化的环境。

mute.en: In order to maintain examination integrity, all electronic devices must be set to mute or completely turned off.
mute.zh: 为了维护考试完整性，所有电子设备必须设置为静音或完全关闭。

mutter.en: Some people tend to mutter complaints under their breath when they disagree with decisions made by their superiors.
mutter.zh: 有些人在不同意上司做出的决定时，会低声喃喃抱怨。

mutton.en: Traditional mutton dishes remain popular in many cultures, particularly during festive celebrations and religious ceremonies.
mutton.zh: 传统羊肉菜肴在许多文化中仍然很受欢迎，特别是在节日庆典和宗教仪式期间。

mutual.en: The two companies established a mutual agreement to share research findings and collaborate on future development projects.
mutual.zh: 两家公司达成了相互协议，共享研究成果并合作开展未来的开发项目。

mutually.en: The conflicting parties reached a mutually acceptable solution that addressed the concerns of both sides in the dispute.
mutually.zh: 冲突双方达成了一项双方都能接受的解决方案，解决了争端中双方关心的问题。

nanotechnology.en: The rapid advancement of nanotechnology has revolutionized medicine, enabling scientists to deliver drugs directly to cancer cells with unprecedented precision.
nanotechnology.zh: 纳米技术的快速发展革新了医学，使科学家能够以前所未有的精度将药物直接输送到癌细胞。

nap.en: Taking a short nap in the afternoon can significantly improve cognitive function and productivity for students preparing for their exams.
nap.zh: 下午小睡一会儿可以显著提高准备考试的学生们的认知功能和生产力。

napkin.en: Many restaurants have replaced traditional cloth napkins with paper ones to reduce water consumption and environmental impact.
napkin.zh: 许多餐厅用纸餐巾取代传统的布餐巾，以减少用水量和环境影响。

napping.en: Research suggests that napping in the workplace can boost employee morale and reduce stress levels during long working hours.
napping.zh: 研究表明，在工作场所小睡可以提高员工士气，减少长时间工作期间的压力水平。

narrative.en: The narrative structure of the documentary effectively conveyed the struggles faced by immigrants seeking better opportunities in foreign countries.
narrative.zh: 纪录片的叙事结构有效地传达了移民在外国寻求更好机会时所面临的挣扎。

narrator.en: The narrator's engaging storytelling style captivated the audience throughout the entire film, making historical events feel remarkably relevant.
narrator.zh: 叙述者引人入胜的讲故事风格在整个电影中吸引了观众，使历史事件显得非常贴切。

narrow.en: Many historic European cities feature narrow streets that were originally designed for pedestrians rather than modern vehicles.
narrow.zh: 许多历史悠久的欧洲城市拥有狭窄的街道，这些街道最初是为行人而不是现代车辆设计的。

nasa.en: NASA's latest mission aims to search for signs of ancient microbial life on Mars and assess the planet's potential for human colonization.
nasa.zh: 美国宇航局最新的任务旨在寻找火星上古代微生物生命的迹象，并评估该行星人类殖民的潜力。

nasty.en: The nasty weather conditions forced the cancellation of outdoor events, disappointing thousands of spectators who had eagerly anticipated the festivals.
nasty.zh: 恶劣的天气条件迫使户外活动取消，令成千上万热切期待节日的观众感到失望。

nation.en: The economic crisis posed a significant threat to the nation's stability, prompting the government to implement urgent fiscal reforms immediately.
nation.zh: 经济危机对该国的稳定构成重大威胁，促使政府立即实施紧急财政改革。

myself.en: I taught myself how to cook when I was a university student, which saved me a considerable amount of money on dining out.
myself.zh: 我在大学时自学了烹饪，这为我节省了大量外出就餐的费用。

mysterious.en: The mysterious ancient monument has puzzled historians for decades, as no written records exist to explain its original purpose.
mysterious.zh: 这座神秘的古建筑让历史学家困惑了几十年，因为没有任何书面记录来解释它的原始用途。

mystery.en: The origin of the ancient artifact remains a mystery despite extensive research by archaeologists worldwide.
mystery.zh: 尽管全球考古学家进行了广泛研究，这件古代文物的起源仍然是一个谜。

myth.en: It is a common myth that learning a language becomes impossible after childhood, as many adults achieve fluency quite successfully.
myth.zh: 学习语言在童年之后变得不可能是一个常见的迷思，因为许多成年人相当成功地达到了流利程度。

nail.en: Parents should keep their children's fingernails trimmed short and clean to prevent the spread of bacteria and infections.
nail.zh: 父母应该保持孩子的指甲短小干净，以防止细菌和感染的传播。

naive.en: It would be naive to assume that economic problems can be solved simply by increasing public spending without careful planning.
naive.zh: 天真地认为可以通过不加规划地增加公共支出来解决经济问题是不现实的。

naked.en: Some people argue that the naked human body should not be considered inherently offensive in art or public spaces.
naked.zh: 有些人认为裸体在艺术或公共场所中不应被视为本质上具有冒犯性。

name.en: The government plans to name the newly built highway after the famous poet to honor his significant contributions to literature.
name.zh: 政府计划以这位著名诗人的名字命名这条新建的高速公路，以纪念他对文学的重大贡献。

namely.en: The scholarship is available for students studying specific subjects, namely science, technology, engineering, and mathematics.
namely.zh: 这项奖学金面向学习特定学科的学生，即科学、技术、工程和数学。

names.en: Manufacturers are required to list all ingredients and their chemical names on product labels for consumer safety and transparency.
names.zh: 制造商需要在产品标签上列出所有成分及其化学名称，以保障消费者安全和透明度。

murmur.en: The murmur of the crowd grew louder as the speaker approached the stage, building anticipation.
murmur.zh: 当演讲者走近舞台时，人群的低语声越来越大，增添了期待感。

muscle.en: Regular resistance training helps build muscle mass and improves overall physical strength, which is beneficial for long-term health.
muscle.zh: 定期的阻力训练有助于建立肌肉质量并提高整体体力，这对长期健康是有益的。

muscles.en: Strong muscles are essential for athletes who need to perform at peak competitive levels.
muscles.zh: 强壮的肌肉对于需要在最高竞技水平上表现的运动员至关重要。

muscular.en: The muscular physique of the swimmer gave him a significant advantage in competitive events.
muscular.zh: 这位游泳运动员强壮的体格使他在比赛中具有显著优势。

museum.en: Visiting a local museum helps students understand the historical context of their own cultural heritage much better.
museum.zh: 参观当地博物馆有助于学生更好地理解自己文化遗产的历史背景。

mushroom.en: The biologist discovered a rare mushroom species in the rainforest that had unique medicinal properties.
mushroom.zh: 这位生物学家在雨林中发现了一种具有独特药用价值的稀有蘑菇。

mushrooms.en: Many edible mushrooms are commercially cultivated in controlled environments to ensure food safety standards.
mushrooms.zh: 许多可食用蘑菇在受控环境中进行商业化种植，以确保食品安全标准。

music.en: Psychologists have found that listening to classical music can significantly reduce stress levels in students.
music.zh: 心理学家发现，听古典音乐可以显著降低学生的压力水平。

musical.en: Many children develop strong musical abilities when they are exposed to instruments at an early age.
musical.zh: 许多孩子在幼年接触乐器时会培养出强大的音乐能力。

musician.en: The celebrated musician conducted a masterclass where aspiring artists learned advanced performance techniques.
musician.zh: 这位著名音乐家开设了一门大师班，让有抱负的艺术家学习高级表演技巧。

national.en: The government recently implemented a comprehensive national policy designed to improve public health standards across the entire country.
national.zh: 政府最近实施了一项全面的国家政策，旨在提高整个国家的公共卫生标准。

national park.en: Many tourists visit the national park every year to observe wildlife in their natural habitat.
national park.zh: 每年都有许多游客参观国家公园，观察野生动物的自然栖息地。

nationality.en: Applicants must declare their nationality when completing the visa application form online.
nationality.zh: 申请人在网上填写签证申请表时必须申报其国籍。

nations.en: Developed nations should provide significant financial assistance to poorer countries to combat global climate change effectively.
nations.zh: 发达国家应向较贫穷的国家提供重要的财政援助，以有效地应对全球气候变化。

native.en: Protecting native species is crucial for maintaining biodiversity and ensuring the stability of local ecosystems in the region.
native.zh: 保护本土物种对于维持生物多样性和确保该地区当地生态系统的稳定性至关重要。

natural.en: Natural disasters such as earthquakes and floods cause significant damage to communities worldwide.
natural.zh: 地震和洪水等自然灾害对世界各地的社区造成重大损害。

natural gas.en: The transition from coal to natural gas has helped reduce air pollution in many industrial cities.
natural gas.zh: 从煤炭向天然气的转型帮助许多工业城市减少了空气污染。

natural resources.en: Sustainable management of natural resources is essential for preserving ecosystems for future generations.
natural resources.zh: 可持续管理自然资源对为子孙后代保护生态系统至关重要。

naturally.en: Children naturally learn language skills through meaningful interaction with parents and peers.
naturally.zh: 儿童通过与父母和同伴的有意义的互动自然地学习语言技能。

nature.en: Preserving the intrinsic beauty of nature is vital for maintaining ecological balance and global biodiversity levels.
nature.zh: 保护自然的内在美景对于维持生态平衡和全球生物多样性水平至关重要。

net.en: The net effect of the policy changes was a significant reduction in overall carbon emissions globally.
net.zh: 政策变化的净效应是全球碳排放总量的显著减少。

nets.en: Many fishermen use nets to catch fish more efficiently than traditional hook methods.
nets.zh: 许多渔民使用渔网比传统鱼钩方法更高效地捕鱼。

network.en: Building a professional network is crucial for young graduates who want to find employment in competitive industries.
network.zh: 建立专业人脉对于想在竞争激烈的行业找到工作的年轻毕业生至关重要。

networked.en: In modern offices, computers are networked to enable seamless sharing of resources and data.
networked.zh: 在现代办公室里，计算机是联网的，以实现资源和数据的无缝共享。

networking.en: Professional networking plays a crucial role in career development and finding job opportunities.
networking.zh: 职业人脉在职业发展和寻找工作机会方面起着至关重要的作用。

neural.en: Neural networks form the foundation of modern artificial intelligence and machine learning systems.
neural.zh: 神经网络是现代人工智能和机器学习系统的基础。

neurological.en: The patient underwent a comprehensive series of neurological examinations to diagnose the disorder.
neurological.zh: 患者接受了一系列全面的神经系统检查来诊断这种疾病。

neurology.en: Neurology is a fascinating medical specialty that studies the complex workings of the human brain.
neurology.zh: 神经学是一门研究人脑复杂运作方式的迷人医学专业。

neuron.en: Each individual neuron in the brain can form thousands of connections with other neurons.
neuron.zh: 大脑中的每个神经元可以与其他神经元形成数千个连接。

neurons.en: Scientists believe that damaged neurons can potentially be regenerated through innovative treatments.
neurons.zh: 科学家相信，通过创新疗法，受损的神经元有可能再生。

negatives.en: Despite the negatives of urban living, many people still choose cities for better job opportunities and cultural experiences.
negatives.zh: 尽管城市生活有诸多负面影响，但许多人仍然为了更好的工作机会和文化体验而选择留在城市。

neglect.en: The government should not neglect the needs of rural communities when planning infrastructure and public services.
neglect.zh: 政府在规划基础设施和公共服务时不应忽视农村社区的需求。

negligible.en: The impact of small changes in daily habits may seem negligible, but over time they can lead to significant improvements.
negligible.zh: 日常习惯的小变化似乎影响微乎其微，但随着时间的推移，它们可以带来显著的改善。

negotiate.en: Job applicants should learn how to negotiate their salary packages to ensure they receive fair compensation.
negotiate.zh: 求职者应该学会如何协商薪资待遇，以确保获得公平的报酬。

neighbor.en: My neighbor offered to water my plants while I was away on vacation, which I really appreciated.
neighbor.zh: 我度假期间，我的邻居主动提出帮我浇花，我非常感激。

neighborhood.en: The neighborhood where I grew up had a strong sense of community with regular gatherings and local festivals.
neighborhood.zh: 我成长的社区有很强的社区感，经常举办聚会和当地节日活动。

neighborhoods.en: Different neighborhoods within the same city can vary dramatically in terms of income levels and available amenities.
neighborhoods.zh: 同一城市的不同社区在收入水平和可用设施方面可能差异很大。

neighbour.en: My neighbour complained about the noise from our renovation, so we agreed to work only during reasonable hours.
neighbour.zh: 我的邻居抱怨我们装修的噪音，所以我们同意只在合理的时间施工。

neighbourhood.en: The local council is investing in improving the neighbourhood by adding more green spaces and recreational facilities.
neighbourhood.zh: 地方议会正在投资改善社区，增添更多绿地和休闲设施。

neighbourhoods.en: Many neighbourhoods have experienced increased property values as a result of recent urban development projects.
neighbourhoods.zh: 许多社区由于最近的城市开发项目而经历了房产增值。

neuroscience.en: Recent advances in neuroscience have transformed our understanding of how the human brain processes emotions and memories.
neuroscience.zh: 神经科学的最新进展改变了我们对人类大脑如何处理情绪和记忆的理解。

neuroscientist.en: The neuroscientist presented compelling research findings about how sleep deprivation affects cognitive performance in students.
neuroscientist.zh: 这位神经科学家发表了关于睡眠不足如何影响学生认知表现的令人信服的研究发现。

neutral.en: The journalist was expected to maintain a neutral perspective when reporting on controversial political issues.
neutral.zh: 这位记者在报道有争议的政治问题时应该保持中立的观点。

neutron.en: Scientists discovered that neutron stars contain extraordinarily dense matter that cannot be found anywhere on Earth.
neutron.zh: 科学家发现中子星包含在地球上任何地方都找不到的极密集物质。

never.en: We should never ignore the potential long-term consequences of rapid industrial development on environmental sustainability.
never.zh: 我们永远不应该忽视快速工业发展对环境可持续性的潜在长期后果。

nevertheless.en: The economy has slowed down significantly; nevertheless, experts predict a recovery in the coming fiscal year.
nevertheless.zh: 经济显著放缓；然而，专家预测下一财政年度将出现复苏。

new.en: The new methodology adopted by the university has significantly improved students' engagement with laboratory work.
new.zh: 大学采用的新方法显著提高了学生对实验工作的参与度。

new products.en: Companies invest substantial resources in developing new products to gain a competitive edge in the global marketplace.
new products.zh: 公司在开发新产品方面投入大量资源，以在全球市场上获得竞争优势。

newcomer.en: As a newcomer to the country, she faced numerous challenges adapting to different cultural norms and social customs.
newcomer.zh: 作为这个国家的新来者，她面临着适应不同文化规范和社会习俗的众多挑战。

news.en: The latest news about breakthrough medical research has generated widespread public interest and optimism.
news.zh: 关于医学研究突破的最新消息引起了公众的广泛关注和乐观情绪。

nearly.en: I nearly missed my flight because of heavy traffic on the way to the airport, which would have ruined my travel plans completely.
nearly.zh: 由于去机场路上交通拥堵，我差点错过航班，这本会完全打乱我的旅行计划。

neat.en: The neat arrangement of files on the desk helped me quickly locate the important documents I needed for my presentation.
neat.zh: 桌上整齐排列的文件帮助我快速找到了演示文稿所需的重要文件。

nebula.en: Scientists have discovered a new nebula in a distant galaxy using powerful telescopes, which provides valuable insights into star formation.
nebula.zh: 科学家们使用 powerful 望远镜在遥远的星系中发现了一个新的星云，这为了解恒星形成提供了宝贵的见解。

necessarily.en: Higher economic growth does not necessarily result in improved living standards for all citizens within a nation.
necessarily.zh: 较高的经济增长并不一定意味着一个国家内所有公民的生活水平都会提高。

necessary.en: It is absolutely necessary for governments to implement strict regulations to protect the natural environment effectively.
necessary.zh: 政府绝对有必要实施严格的法规以有效地保护自然环境。

necessity.en: Access to clean water has become a basic necessity for communities in developing regions, highlighting global inequality issues.
necessity.zh: 获得清洁水源已成为发展中国家地区的基本需求，这凸显了全球不平等问题。

neck.en: She wore a beautiful silver pendant around her neck for the job interview, which made her look more professional and confident.
neck.zh: 她在求职面试时脖子上戴了一个漂亮的银吊坠，这让她看起来更加专业自信。

necklace.en: The antique necklace belonged to her grandmother and held significant sentimental value, representing an important family heirloom.
necklace.zh: 这条古董项链是她祖母的，承载着重要的情感价值，代表着一件珍贵的家庭传家宝。

need.en: There is an urgent need to address environmental pollution before it causes irreversible damage to ecosystems worldwide.
need.zh: 迫切需要解决环境污染问题，以免对全球生态系统造成不可逆转的损害。

need more.en: Many developing countries need more investment in infrastructure to support sustainable economic growth and improve living standards.
need more.zh: 许多发展中国家需要在基础设施方面加大投资，以支持可持续的经济增长并提高生活水平。

naughty.en: Children who are naughty in class often struggle to concentrate on their studies and may fall behind academically.
naughty.zh: 调皮的孩子们在课堂上往往难以集中精力学习，可能会落后于学业。

nausea.en: Many tourists experience nausea and dizziness when traveling by boat, which is commonly known as seasickness.
nausea.zh: 许多游客乘船旅行时会感到恶心和头晕，这就是通常所说的晕船。

naval.en: The naval fleet conducted a major exercise near the coast to demonstrate the country's maritime defense capabilities.
naval.zh: 海军舰队在海岸附近进行了一次重大演习，以展示该国的海上防御能力。

navigate.en: Students must learn to navigate complex research materials effectively if they want to succeed in academic writing.
navigate.zh: 如果学生想在学术写作方面取得成功，他们必须学会有效地查阅复杂的研究资料。

navigation.en: Modern navigation systems have revolutionized the way people travel, making it easier to reach unfamiliar destinations.
navigation.zh: 现代导航系统彻底改变了人们的出行方式，使到达陌生目的地变得更加容易。

navigators.en: Early navigators relied on the stars and natural landmarks to find their way across vast and dangerous oceans.
navigators.zh: 早期的航海家依靠星星和自然地标在广阔而危险的海洋中找到方向。

navy.en: Joining the navy can provide young people with valuable training and discipline that benefits them throughout their lives.
navy.zh: 加入海军可以为年轻人提供宝贵的训练和纪律，这对他们的终身都有益处。

near.en: Living near parks and green spaces has been proven to have significant benefits for both physical and mental health.
near.zh: 住在公园和绿地附近已被证明对身心健康都有显著益处。

nearby.en: There are several excellent schools and public parks located nearby the new residential complex for families.
nearby.zh: 在这个新的住宅综合体附近有几所优秀的学校和公共公园供家庭使用。

nearest.en: Residents were advised to evacuate to the nearest shelter when the severe storm warning was issued yesterday.
nearest.zh: 当昨天发出严重风暴警告时，建议居民疏散到最近的避难所。

neighbouring.en: The two neighbouring countries have established a free trade agreement to promote economic cooperation and cultural exchange.
neighbouring.zh: 这两个邻国已经建立了自由贸易协定，以促进经济合作和文化交流。

neither.en: Neither the teachers nor the students were satisfied with the recent changes made to the curriculum structure.
neither.zh: 老师和学生对最近对课程结构所做的改变都不满意。

neither...nor.en: Neither the government nor the private sector has been able to fully resolve the housing shortage in major cities.
neither...nor.zh: 无论是政府还是私营部门都未能完全解决主要城市的住房短缺问题。

neolithic.en: Archaeologists discovered neolithic artifacts beneath the site, providing valuable insights into early human civilization.
neolithic.zh: 考古学家在该遗址下发现了新石器时代的文物为了解早期人类文明提供了宝贵的见解。

nephew.en: My nephew recently graduated from university with a degree in environmental science and hopes to work in conservation.
nephew.zh: 我侄子最近从大学毕业，获得了环境科学学位，希望能从事保护工作。

nerve.en: It takes considerable nerve to speak publicly about controversial topics, especially in front of large audiences.
nerve.zh: 在公开场合谈论有争议的话题，尤其是面对大量观众时，需要相当的胆量。

nervous.en: Many students feel nervous before important examinations, which can sometimes negatively affect their performance.
nervous.zh: 许多学生在重要考试前会感到紧张，这有时会对他们的表现产生负面影响。

ness.en: Happiness is often considered a fundamental goal in life, yet its meaning and pursuit vary greatly among different cultures.
ness.zh: 幸福通常被认为是人生的基本目标，然而其含义和追求方式在不同文化间差异很大。

nest.en: Many species construct a secure nest high in the canopy to ensure the safety of their offspring.
nest.zh: 许多物种在树冠高处建造安全的巢穴，以确保后代的安全。

nests.en: Many species of birds build intricate nests using twigs, leaves, and mud to protect their eggs from predators.
nests.zh: 许多鸟类用树枝、树叶和泥土建造复杂的巢穴，以保护它们的蛋免受捕食者的侵害。

need to be able to.en: International students need to be able to demonstrate strong English proficiency before they are accepted into university programs.
need to be able to.zh: 国际学生需要在被大学项目录取之前能够证明自己具备较强的英语水平。

need to have.en: Students who wish to study abroad need to have a reliable internet connection for online courses and research purposes.
need to have.zh: 想要出国学习的学生需要有可靠的互联网连接，以便进行在线课程学习和研究。

needle.en: The acupuncturist inserted a very thin needle into the patient's pressure point to alleviate chronic back pain effectively.
needle.zh: 针灸师将一根非常细的针插入患者的穴位，以有效缓解慢性背痛。

negate.en: Failure to cite sources properly in academic essays can negate months of diligent research and hard work on the project.
negate.zh: 在学术论文中未能正确引用来源可能会否定数月来的勤奋研究和努力工作。

negated.en: The referee's decision was ultimately negated by the official rules, restoring fairness and maintaining the integrity of the game.
negated.zh: 裁判的决定最终被官方规则所否决，恢复了公平性并维护了比赛的完整性。

negates.en: Constant classroom distractions and noise often negates the benefits of even the most carefully designed curriculum by teachers.
negates.zh: 持续的课堂干扰和噪音通常会抵消教师精心设计的课程所带来的好处。

negating.en: Negating the value of traditional knowledge systems can lead to cultural misunderstanding and the loss of ancestral wisdom.
negating.zh: 否定传统知识体系的价值可能导致文化误解和祖先智慧的丧失。

negation.en: The philosopher's argument represented a complete negation of established scientific principles that had been accepted for centuries.
negation.zh: 这位哲学家的论点代表了对已被接受数百年的既定科学原理的完全否定。

negative.en: The negative effects of social media on mental health have been discussed extensively by psychologists recently.
negative.zh: 社交媒体对心理健康的负面影响最近已被心理学家广泛讨论。

negatively.en: Climate change continues to impact agricultural productivity negatively, threatening food security and livelihoods in vulnerable regions.
negatively.zh: 气候变化继续对农业生产力产生负面影响，威胁着脆弱地区的粮食安全和生计。

nonsense.en: The argument presented in the essay was complete nonsense and lacked any credible evidence.
nonsense.zh: 文章中提出的论点完全是胡说八道，缺乏任何可信的证据。

noodles.en: During my stay in Beijing, I tried various types of noodles that differed significantly in texture and flavor.
noodles.zh: 在北京逗留期间，我尝了各种不同质地和口味的面条。

noon.en: The conference is scheduled for noon, so participants should arrive at least thirty minutes early.
noon.zh: 会议安排在中午，所以参与者应该至少提前三十分钟到达。

nor.en: The government did not provide sufficient funding, nor did it offer any meaningful support for the proposed project.
nor.zh: 政府没有提供足够的资金，也没有为拟议的项目提供任何有意义的支持。

norm.en: In many Asian cultures, respect for elders is considered a fundamental social norm.
norm.zh: 在许多亚洲文化中，尊重长辈被视为基本的社会规范。

normal.en: It is normal for students to feel nervous before exams, but preparation can help reduce this anxiety significantly.
normal.zh: 学生在考试前感到紧张是正常的，但准备工作可以帮助显著减少这种焦虑。

normally.en: Normally, students who participate in extracurricular activities tend to perform better academically.
normally.zh: 通常情况下，参加课外活动的学生在学业上往往表现更好。

north.en: Many migratory birds travel south during winter and return to the north when spring arrives.
north.zh: 许多候鸟在冬天飞往南方，春天来临时返回北方。

northeast.en: The coastal areas in the northeast of the country experience heavy rainfall during the monsoon season.
northeast.zh: 该国东北部的沿海地区在季风季节会经历大量降雨。

northern.en: The northern region of the country experiences much colder winters than the south, affecting agricultural production and local infrastructure development significantly.
northern.zh: 该国北部地区的冬季比南部经历得更冷，这显著影响了农业生产和当地基础设施的发展。

newsletter.en: Many companies send out a monthly newsletter to keep their customers informed about new products and services.
newsletter.zh: 许多公司每月发送通讯，以告知客户有关新产品和服务的信息。

newspaper.en: Despite the rise of digital media, many people still prefer reading the newspaper in the morning with their coffee.
newspaper.zh: 尽管数字媒体兴起，许多人仍然喜欢早晨边喝咖啡边看报纸。

newspapers.en: Local newspapers play a vital role in keeping communities informed about events that affect their daily lives.
newspapers.zh: 当地报纸在让社区了解影响日常生活的 events 方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

next.en: The next step in the research process involves analyzing the data collected from the survey participants.
next.zh: 研究过程的下一步包括分析从调查参与者收集的数据。

next to.en: The café is located next to the library, making it a convenient spot for students to study and relax.
next to.zh: 咖啡馆位于图书馆旁边，这使得它成为学生们学习和放松的便利场所。

nice.en: The weather was particularly nice during the outdoor festival, allowing visitors to enjoy the activities comfortably.
nice.zh: 户外节日期间的天气特别好，让游客能够舒适地享受活动。

niche.en: The company identified a niche market for organic pet food and successfully captured a loyal customer base.
niche.zh: 该公司发现了有机宠物食品的利基市场，并成功吸引了一批忠实客户。

nickel.en: Some economists predict that nickel prices will increase due to growing demand for electric vehicle batteries.
nickel.zh: 一些经济学家预测，由于电动汽车电池的需求增长，镍价将会上涨。

niece.en: My niece recently graduated from university with a degree in environmental science and is now seeking employment.
niece.zh: 我的侄女最近大学毕业，获得了环境科学学位，现在正在找工作。

night.en: The city transforms completely at night when the illuminated skyscrapers create a stunning visual display for visitors.
night.zh: 夜晚时这座城市会完全变样，灯火通明的摩天大楼为游客创造出令人惊叹的视觉效果。

nowhere.en: The remote village seemed to be nowhere on any modern map, yet it had been continuously inhabited for centuries.
nowhere.zh: 这个偏远的村庄似乎在任何现代地图上都找不到，但它已经连续有人居住了几个世纪。

nuclear.en: Many countries are currently debating stricter safety regulations surrounding nuclear power plants following recent incidents.
nuclear.zh: 鉴于最近的事件，许多国家正在讨论围绕核电站制定更严格的安全法规。

nuclear energy.en: Proponents argue that nuclear energy is essential for reducing carbon emissions and effectively combating climate change.
nuclear energy.zh: 支持者认为核能对于减少碳排放和有效应对气候变化至关重要。

nucleus.en: The research team discovered that the nucleus of the cell plays a more crucial role in genetic inheritance than previously believed.
nucleus.zh: 研究团队发现，细胞核在遗传中的作用比以前认为的更加重要。

nuisance.en: The constant construction noise outside the library became a serious nuisance for students trying to concentrate on their studies.
nuisance.zh: 图书馆外持续的施工噪音对努力学习的学生造成了严重的干扰。

numb.en: After hours of waiting in the freezing cold, my fingers became completely numb and I could barely hold my pen.
numb.zh: 在寒冷的天气里等了几个小时后，我的手指完全麻木了，几乎握不住笔。

number.en: A growing number of universities are now offering online courses to accommodate students from diverse geographical backgrounds.
number.zh: 越来越多的大学现在提供在线课程，以容纳来自不同地区背景的学生。

numbers.en: Although the statistics showed impressive numbers, the researcher remained skeptical about the methodology used in the study.
numbers.zh: 尽管统计数据显示出令人印象深刻的数字，研究人员对研究中使用的方法论仍持怀疑态度。

numerical.en: The ability to interpret numerical data has become increasingly important in today's increasingly competitive job market.
numerical.zh: 在当今竞争日益激烈的就业市场中，解读数字数据的能力变得越来越重要。

numerous.en: Numerous studies have indicated that regular physical exercise contributes significantly to both mental and physical health improvements.
numerous.zh: 大量研究表明，规律的体育锻炼对身心健康改善都有显著贡献。

northern ireland.en: Northern Ireland has experienced significant economic growth in recent years, particularly in the technology sector.
northern ireland.zh: 北爱尔兰近年来经历了显著的经济增长，特别是在科技领域。

northwest.en: The factory is located in the northwest region of the city, far from residential areas and schools.
northwest.zh: 这家工厂位于城市的西北部，远离居民区和学校。

nose.en: Some researchers believe that animals can literally smell danger with their highly sensitive nose.
nose.zh: 一些研究人员认为，动物可以用其高度敏感的鼻子闻到危险。

not.en: Urbanization does not necessarily lead to the decline of traditional cultural practices in all cases.
not.zh: 城市化并不一定会导致所有情况下传统文化习俗的衰落。

not always.en: Technological solutions are not always the most effective approach to environmental problems.
not always.zh: 技术解决方案并不总是解决环境问题的最有效方法。

not enough.en: The current funding for public education is not enough to meet the growing demands of students.
not enough.zh: 目前公共教育的资金不足以满足学生日益增长的需求。

not only...but also.en: The new policy aims to not only reduce unemployment but also improve workplace conditions.
not only...but also.zh: 新政策不仅旨在降低失业率，还要改善工作条件。

not to mention.en: The city offers excellent public transportation, not to mention its world-class healthcare system.
not to mention.zh: 这座城市提供优质的公共交通，更不用说其世界级的医疗体系了。

not too bad.en: My preparation for the exam was not too bad, though I still need to improve my time management skills.
not too bad.zh: 我为考试做的准备还算不错，尽管我仍需要提高时间管理能力。

notable.en: The most notable achievement of the project has been its positive impact on local communities.
notable.zh: 该项目最显著的成就是其对当地社区产生的积极影响。

nightmare.en: The traffic congestion was a nightmare, causing me to arrive at the examination centre two hours late and miss the listening test.
nightmare.zh: 交通拥堵是一场噩梦，导致我晚了两小时到达考试中心，错过了听力测试。

nine.en: According to the report, nine out of ten students preferred flexible learning schedules over traditional fixed timetables.
nine.zh: 根据报告，十分之九的学生更喜欢灵活的课程安排，而不是传统的固定时间表。

nineteen.en: The study involved nineteen participants from diverse socioeconomic backgrounds to ensure the research findings were comprehensive.
nineteen.zh: 这项研究涉及来自不同社会经济背景的十九名参与者，以确保研究结果的全面性。

ninety.en: Approximately ninety percent of the global population now has access to mobile communication technology in some form.
ninety.zh: 目前全球约百分之九十的人口以某种形式使用移动通讯技术。

nitrogen.en: Nitrogen is essential for plant growth, which is why farmers often apply nitrogen-rich fertilizers to improve crop yields.
nitrogen.zh: 氮气对植物生长至关重要，这就是为什么农民经常施用含氮肥料以提高作物产量。

no.en: There is no definitive evidence that suggests online education produces inferior academic outcomes compared to traditional classroom learning.
no.zh: 没有确凿的证据表明在线教育产生的学术成果比传统课堂学习差。

no charge.en: The public library offers no charge access to digital resources, including e-books, academic journals, and language learning platforms.
no charge.zh: 公共图书馆免费提供数字资源访问，包括电子书、学术期刊和语言学习平台。

no longer.en: Due to rapid technological advancement, traditional manufacturing methods are no longer considered economically viable in many industries.
no longer.zh: 由于技术快速进步，传统制造方法在许多行业不再被认为是经济可行的。

noble.en: The charity organization was praised for its noble mission to provide clean drinking water to underserved communities worldwide.
noble.zh: 该慈善组织因其为全球服务不足社区提供清洁饮用水的崇高使命而受到赞扬。

nobody.en: Nobody anticipated that the newly introduced policy would generate such widespread public debate and passionate disagreement.
nobody.zh: 没有人预料到新推出的政策会产生如此广泛的公众辩论和激烈的异议。

notify.en: The university will notify all applicants of their admission status by the end of this month.
notify.zh: 大学将在本月结束前通知所有申请者他们的录取状态。

notion.en: The common notion that modern technology isolates people is not entirely true in contemporary society.
notion.zh: 现代技术使人们孤立起来的普遍观点在当代社会中并不完全正确。

notions.en: Traditional notions about gender roles have evolved significantly in contemporary society.
notions.zh: 传统性别角色的观念在当代社会已经发生了重大变化。

notorious.en: The area has become notorious for its high crime rate and social instability issues.
notorious.zh: 该地区因犯罪率高和社会不稳定问题而闻名。

notwithstanding.en: Notwithstanding the initial setbacks, the company achieved remarkable success in the competitive market.
notwithstanding.zh: 尽管最初遭遇挫折，这家公司在竞争激烈的市场中取得了显著成功。

nourish.en: Schools should nourish children's intellectual curiosity through engaging and interactive learning experiences.
nourish.zh: 学校应该通过富有吸引力和互动性的学习体验来培养儿童的知识好奇心。

novel.en: The research team proposed a novel approach to solving the energy crisis, which gained significant attention from international experts.
novel.zh: 研究团队提出了一种解决能源危机的新方法，引起了国际专家的广泛关注。

novelty.en: The novelty of the new technology wore off quickly as consumers became accustomed to it.
novelty.zh: 随着消费者逐渐习惯，这种新技术的 novelty 很快就消失了。

now.en: Many universities now offer online courses that allow students to study from anywhere.
now.zh: 许多大学现在提供在线课程，让学生可以随时随地学习。

nowadays.en: Nowadays, renewable energy sources are increasingly adopted as alternatives to fossil fuels globally.
nowadays.zh: 如今， renewable 能源作为化石燃料的替代品在全球范围内越来越被采用。

nocturnal.en: Many nocturnal animals have developed excellent night vision to help them hunt efficiently in complete darkness.
nocturnal.zh: 许多夜行性动物已经进化出极好的夜视能力来帮助它们在完全黑暗的环境中高效捕猎。

nod.en: During the job interview, the applicant gave a slight nod to indicate understanding of the interviewer's question.
nod.zh: 在求职面试期间，申请人对面试官的问题微微点头表示理解。

noise.en: Excessive noise pollution in metropolitan areas can have detrimental effects on residents' physical and mental health.
noise.zh: 大城市的过度噪音污染会对居民的身心健康产生不利影响。

noises.en: Strange noises coming from the abandoned building at night made the neighborhood residents feel increasingly uneasy.
noises.zh: 夜间从废弃建筑传来的奇怪声音让邻居们越来越感到不安。

noisy.en: Living in a noisy environment near a construction site can significantly reduce one's ability to concentrate on important tasks.
noisy.zh: 住在建筑工地附近的嘈杂环境中会大大降低一个人集中精力处理重要事务的能力。

nominal.en: The university charges only a nominal fee for using the library facilities, which benefits students from low-income families.
nominal.zh: 大学对使用图书馆设施只收取象征性费用，这使低收入家庭的学生受益。

nominate.en: The committee decided to nominate the innovative research project for this year's prestigious scientific award.
nominate.zh: 委员会决定提名这个创新研究项目角逐今年的著名科学奖。

non-traditional.en: Non-traditional students, such as single parents and older adults, often face unique challenges when returning to education.
non-traditional.zh: 非传统学生，如单亲家长和成年人，在重返教育领域时经常面临独特的挑战。

none.en: After reviewing all the submitted proposals, the committee decided that none of them met the required standards.
none.zh: 在审查了所有提交的提案后，委员会决定其中没有一个符合所需的标准。

nonetheless.en: The weather forecast predicted heavy rain for the outdoor event; nonetheless, the organizers decided to proceed as scheduled.
nonetheless.zh: 天气预报预测户外活动将有大雨；尽管如此，组织者决定按计划进行。

notably.en: The study found notably higher levels of air pollution in urban areas compared to rural regions, highlighting the urgent need for environmental policies.
notably.zh: 研究发现，城市地区的空气污染水平明显高于农村地区，凸显了制定环境政策的迫切需要。

note.en: It is important to note that economic development and environmental protection can coexist with proper planning and government intervention.
note.zh: 重要的是要注意，经济发展和环境保护可以通过适当的规划和政府干预实现共存。

notebook.en: Many students prefer using a notebook during lectures to jot down key concepts, which helps reinforce their understanding of the material.
notebook.zh: 许多学生在讲座期间喜欢用笔记本记录关键概念，这有助于加强他们对教材内容的理解。

notes.en: Taking comprehensive notes while reading academic articles can significantly improve information retention and exam preparation.
notes.zh: 阅读学术文章时做全面的笔记可以显著提高信息记忆和考试准备效果。

nothing.en: There is nothing more critical than ensuring equal educational opportunities for children from all socioeconomic backgrounds in society.
nothing.zh: 没有什么比确保来自所有社会经济背景的儿童享有平等教育机会更重要的了。

notice.en: Students should notice the submission deadline for their assignments, as late work will result in significant penalty marks.
notice.zh: 学生们应该注意作业的提交截止日期，因为迟交将被扣除大量分数。

notice board.en: The university notice board displays important announcements about scholarships, campus events, and career opportunities for students.
notice board.zh: 大学公告板展示有关奖学金、校园活动和就业机会的重要公告，供学生参考。

noticeable.en: The noticeable improvement in public health outcomes was directly linked to the implementation of nationwide vaccination programmes.
noticeable.zh: 公共卫生状况的显著改善与全国疫苗接种计划的实施直接相关。

noticeboard.en: The library noticeboard provides updated information about available study rooms, new book acquisitions, and workshop schedules.
noticeboard.zh: 图书馆公告板提供有关可用自习室、新书采购和研讨会日程的最新信息。

noticed.en: Teachers noticed that students who participate actively in class tend to achieve higher academic results overall.
noticed.zh: 老师们注意到，积极参与课堂活动的学生往往能取得更高的学业成绩。

obtaining.en: Obtaining a university degree has become increasingly competitive in recent years, requiring more qualifications than ever before.
obtaining.zh: 获得大学学位在近年来变得日益竞争激烈，需要比以往更多的资格证明。

obtains.en: The researcher obtains valuable data through careful observation and systematic analysis of various sources.
obtains.zh: 研究人员通过仔细观察和对各种来源的系统分析获得有价值的数据。

obvious.en: It is obvious that technology plays a crucial role in shaping the future of modern education systems.
obvious.zh: 很明显，技术在塑造现代教育系统的未来方面发挥着关键作用。

occasion.en: On this occasion, the government should invest more in renewable energy to address environmental concerns.
occasion.zh: 在这种情况下，政府应该更多地投资可再生能源以解决环境问题。

occasional.en: Despite occasional setbacks during the experiment, the scientists eventually achieved their desired results.
occasional.zh: 尽管实验过程中偶尔遇到挫折，科学家们最终取得了预期的结果。

occasionally.en: Although I prefer working remotely, I occasionally visit the office to collaborate with colleagues on complex group projects.
occasionally.zh: 虽然我更喜欢远程工作，但我偶尔会去办公室与同事协作处理复杂的小组项目。

occupation.en: Many young people choose their occupation based on salary rather than personal interest or passion.
occupation.zh: 许多年轻人根据薪资而非个人兴趣或热情来选择职业。

occupied.en: During peak hours, most seats in the library are occupied by students preparing for their upcoming final examinations.
occupied.zh: 在高峰时段，图书馆的大多数座位都被准备即将到来的期末考试的学生占用了。

occupy.en: Social media platforms occupy much of our daily time and attention, affecting productivity at work.
occupy.zh: 社交媒体平台占据了我们日常的大部分时间和注意力，影响了工作效率。

occur.en: Serious accidents often occur when established safety protocols are strictly ignored during complex laboratory experiments.
occur.zh: 在复杂的实验室实验期间，如果严格忽视既定的安全协议，严重的事故经常发生。

occurred.en: The environmental disaster occurred when industrial waste was accidentally dumped into the river last summer.
occurred.zh: 那场环境灾难发生在去年夏天，当时工业废料被意外倾倒进了河里。

occurrence.en: The occurrence of extreme weather events has increased significantly over the past decade.
occurrence.zh: 过去十年来，极端天气事件的发生频率显著增加。

occurrences.en: Scientists documented multiple occurrences of unusual marine behaviour during their research expedition.
occurrences.zh: 科学家在研究考察期间记录了多次异常的海洋行为。

occurring.en: The problem occurring in urban areas involves excessive noise pollution from traffic and construction.
occurring.zh: 城市地区发生的问题涉及来自交通和建设的过度噪音污染。

occurs.en: Carbon dioxide occurs naturally in the atmosphere, but human activities have dramatically increased its concentration.
occurs.zh: 二氧化碳自然存在于大气中，但人类活动已大幅增加了其浓度。

ocean.en: Plastic pollution in the ocean poses a severe threat to marine life and disrupts the delicate ecological balance globally.
ocean.zh: 海洋中的塑料污染对海洋生物构成严重威胁，并在全球范围内扰乱脆弱的生态平衡。

ocean floor.en: Research on the ocean floor has revealed previously unknown species living near hydrothermal vents.
ocean floor.zh: 对海底的研究揭示了生活在热液喷口附近的先前未知的物种。

oceans.en: The pollution of oceans poses a serious threat to marine ecosystems and human communities alike.
oceans.zh: 海洋污染对海洋生态系统和人类社会都构成了严重威胁。

odd.en: It seems odd that some developed nations continue to resist implementing stricter environmental regulations.
odd.zh: 一些发达国家继续抵制实施更严格的环境法规，这似乎很奇怪。

odds.en: The odds of finding a solution to climate change improve significantly when nations collaborate effectively.
odds.zh: 当各国有效合作时，找到气候变化解决方案的可能性会显著提高。

official.en: The official announcement regarding changes to the university admission policy was published on the government website yesterday.
official.zh: 关于大学招生政策变化的官方公告昨天发布在政府网站上。

officials.en: Elected government officials are primarily responsible for ensuring that public funds are spent efficiently and transparently.
officials.zh: 民选政府官员主要负责确保公共资金得到高效和透明的使用。

offset.en: Companies are encouraged to plant trees to offset their carbon emissions and contribute to environmental sustainability.
offset.zh: 企业被鼓励种植树木以抵消碳排放，为环境可持续发展做出贡献。

offspring.en: Research shows that parents who encourage creativity in their offspring often produce more innovative and confident individuals.
offspring.zh: 研究表明，鼓励子女发挥创造力的父母往往能培养出更有创新精神和自信的人。

often.en: Young people often underestimate the long-term benefits of learning a second language for their future career prospects.
often.zh: 年轻人经常低估学习第二语言对他们未来职业发展的长期益处。

oil.en: The fluctuation of global oil prices has a significant impact on the economic development of many developing countries.
oil.zh: 全球油价波动对许多发展中国家的经济发展有重大影响。

oil spill.en: The environmental consequences of the oil spill lasted for decades, destroying countless marine habitats and wildlife populations.
oil spill.zh: 石油泄漏的环境后果持续了数十年，摧毁了无数海洋栖息地和野生动物种群。

okay.en: While traditional classroom learning is okay for some students, others thrive better in hands-on practical learning environments.
okay.zh: 虽然传统课堂学习对一些学生来说还可以，但其他学生在动手实践的学习环境中表现更好。

old.en: In many Asian cultures, old people are highly respected for their accumulated wisdom and life experience.
old.zh: 在许多亚洲文化中，老年人因其积累的智慧和生活经验而受到高度尊重。

older.en: Older workers may face challenges in the job market due to age discrimination, despite possessing valuable professional expertise.
older.zh: 年长的工人可能因年龄歧视而在就业市场面临挑战，尽管他们拥有宝贵的专业知识。

observed.en: Researchers observed a significant correlation between regular exercise and improved mental health among participants in the study.
observed.zh: 研究人员观察到定期锻炼与研究参与者心理健康改善之间存在显著相关性。

observer.en: As a passive observer at the meeting, I was able to understand how decisions are made within the organization.
observer.zh: 作为会议的被动观察者，我能够理解该组织如何做出决策。

observers.en: The observers noted significant changes in the animals' behavior after the habitat was modified by researchers.
observers.zh: 观察者们注意到，在研究人员改变栖息地后，动物的行为发生了显著变化。

obsess.en: Many teenagers tend to obsess over their appearance, which can negatively impact their mental health and self-esteem.
obsess.zh: 许多青少年容易对自己的外表过于执着，这可能对他们的心理健康和自尊产生负面影响。

obsession.en: The obsession with achieving high academic scores has led to excessive stress among students in many countries.
obsession.zh: 对取得高学业成绩的执着已导致许多国家的学生承受过度压力。

obstacle.en: The main obstacle to implementing the new policy is the lack of public awareness and understanding.
obstacle.zh: 实施新政策的主要障碍是公众缺乏意识和理解。

obstacles.en: Despite numerous obstacles such as financial constraints and limited resources, the project was completed successfully.
obstacles.zh: 尽管面临财务限制和资源有限等众多障碍，该项目仍成功完成。

obtain.en: It is increasingly difficult for graduates to obtain stable employment in the current competitive job market.
obtain.zh: 对于毕业生来说，在当前竞争激烈的就业市场中获得稳定的工作变得越来越困难。

obtainable.en: The information about scholarship opportunities is easily obtainable through the university's official website and guidance office.
obtainable.zh: 关于奖学金机会的信息可以通过大学官方网站和指导办公室轻松获取。

obtained.en: The researchers obtained valuable data from the survey, which helped them draw important conclusions about consumer behavior.
obtained.zh: 研究人员从调查中获得了宝贵的数据，这帮助他们得出了关于消费者行为的重要结论。

odor.en: The unpleasant odor emanating from the nearby waste treatment plant has become a serious concern for residents living in the surrounding area.
odor.zh: 附近垃圾处理厂散发出的难闻气味已成为周边居民严重关注的问题。

odours.en: Persistent industrial odours have been affecting air quality in the neighborhood, prompting complaints from local residents to environmental authorities.
odours.zh: 持续的工业气味影响了社区的空气质量，促使当地居民向环境部门投诉。

off.en: Parents should ensure their children spend less time off school by encouraging them to participate in extracurricular activities and homework.
off.zh: 家长应该确保孩子花更多时间在学习上，而不是荒废学业，应鼓励他们参加课外活动和完成作业。

offend.en: Tourists visiting foreign countries should be respectful of local customs, as certain behaviors may unintentionally offend cultural sensitivities.
offend.zh: 访问外国的游客应尊重当地习俗，因为某些行为可能会无意中冒犯文化敏感性。

offenders.en: Environmental offenders who illegally dump waste face severe penalties, including heavy fines and potential imprisonment in many countries.
offenders.zh: 非法倾倒废物的环境违法者面临严厉处罚，包括在许多国家可能被处以巨额罚款和监禁。

offense.en: In some cultures, making jokes about religious beliefs is considered a serious offense and can lead to social conflict or legal consequences.
offense.zh: 在某些文化中，拿宗教信仰开玩笑被视为严重冒犯，可能导致社会冲突或法律后果。

offensive.en: The use of offensive language in public discourse is generally condemned and may damage one professional reputation in workplace settings.
offensive.zh: 在公共言论中使用攻击性语言通常会受到谴责，并可能在工作场所损害个人职业声誉。

offer.en: The university will offer additional scholarships to students from low-income families to ensure equal access to higher education opportunities.
offer.zh: 大学将为低收入家庭的学生提供额外奖学金，以确保他们有平等接受高等教育的机会。

office.en: Many employees prefer working from home rather than commuting to a crowded corporate office every single day.
office.zh: 许多员工更喜欢在家工作，而不是每天通勤去拥挤的企业办公室。

officer.en: Police officers play a vital role in maintaining public safety and must undergo rigorous training to handle various emergency situations effectively.
officer.zh: 警察在维护公共安全方面发挥着重要作用，必须接受严格培训以有效处理各种紧急情况。

nuts.en: Many people think I'm nuts for wanting to quit my stable job and start my own business at thirty.
nuts.zh: 很多人觉得我疯了，居然想在三十岁时辞掉稳定的工作去创业。

nylon.en: Nylon is widely used in the textile industry because it is both durable and relatively inexpensive.
nylon.zh: 尼龙在纺织工业中被广泛使用，因为它既耐用又相对便宜。

oak.en: The ancient oak tree in the village square is over 500 years old and attracts numerous tourists annually.
oak.zh: 村子里广场上的那棵古橡树已有500多年的历史，每年都吸引大量游客。

oath.en: Before giving testimony in court, witnesses are required to take an oath promising to tell the truth.
oath.zh: 在法庭作证之前，证人必须宣誓承诺说实话。

obese.en: Medical research indicates that obese individuals are more likely to develop serious health conditions.
obese.zh: 医学研究表明，肥胖的人更容易患上严重的健康疾病。

obesity.en: Obesity has become a growing public health concern in many developed countries around the world.
obesity.zh: 肥胖已成为世界上许多发达国家日益严重的公共健康问题。

obey.en: Citizens are expected to obey the laws of their country in order to maintain social order.
obey.zh: 市民被期望遵守国家的法律，以维护社会秩序。

object.en: The museum's collection includes various objects dating back to ancient civilizations from different continents.
object.zh: 博物馆的收藏包括来自不同大洲的古代文明的各种物品。

object to.en: Local residents strongly object to the government's plan to build a new airport near their community.
object to.zh: 当地居民强烈反对政府在他们社区附近建设新机场的计划。

objection.en: The defence lawyer raised an objection to the prosecutor's question during the courtroom trial.
objection.zh: 辩护律师在法庭审判中对检察官的问题提出了反对。

objective.en: The primary objective of this educational program is to equip students with practical skills needed for the modern workforce effectively.
objective.zh: 该教育计划的主要目标是有效地装备学生现代劳动力所需的实用技能。

objectively.en: The historian objectively analyzed primary sources without allowing her cultural background to affect her interpretation of the events.
objectively.zh: 这位历史学家客观地分析了原始资料，不让她的文化背景影响她对这些事件的解读。

objectives.en: The workshop's main objectives are to help participants develop effective communication skills and build confidence in public speaking.
objectives.zh: 研讨会的主要目标是帮助参与者培养有效的沟通技巧，并在公共演讲中建立自信。

objects.en: Ancient objects found in museums provide valuable insights into the daily lives of people from past civilizations.
objects.zh: 博物馆中发现的古代文物为了解过去文明中人们的日常生活提供了宝贵的见解。

obligation.en: Parents have a legal obligation to ensure their children receive adequate education and necessary medical care.
obligation.zh: 父母有法律义务确保他们的孩子接受适当的教育并获得必要的医疗护理。

oblige.en: The university felt obliged to provide additional support services for international students adapting to a new academic environment.
oblige.zh: 这所大学觉得有义务为适应新学术环境的国际学生提供额外的支持服务。

obscure.en: The scientist's groundbreaking discovery was initially obscured by the academic community's resistance to new and unconventional theories.
obscure.zh: 这位科学家的突破性发现最初被学术界对新理论和非常规理论的抵制所掩盖。

observation.en: Careful observation of animal behavior in the wild provides researchers with crucial data regarding social structures and survival strategies.
observation.zh: 仔细观察野生动物的行为为研究人员提供了有关社会结构和生存策略的关键数据。

observatory.en: The newly built observatory allows astronomers to observe distant galaxies and collect data about the universe's expansion.
observatory.zh: 新建的天文台让天文学家能够观测遥远的星系并收集有关宇宙膨胀的数据。

observe.en: Students visiting the nature reserve will observe how wildlife adapts to urban expansion and habitat fragmentation.
observe.zh: 参观自然保护区的学生将观察野生动物如何适应城市扩张和栖息地碎片化。

nurse.en: Many countries are experiencing a significant shortage of qualified nurse professionals in their public healthcare systems.
nurse.zh: 许多国家的公共医疗系统正面临合格护士专业人员严重短缺的问题。

nursery.en: The government has invested substantial funds in building nursery schools to provide early childhood education programs.
nursery.zh: 政府已投入大量资金建设幼儿园，以提供儿童早期教育项目。

nursing.en: Pursuing a career in nursing can be challenging, but it offers rewarding opportunities for those passionate about healthcare.
nursing.zh: 从事护理职业可能具有挑战性，但为那些热爱医疗保健的人提供了有意义的机会。

nurture.en: Parents play a crucial role in nurturing their children's creativity and critical thinking skills from a very young age.
nurture.zh: 父母在培养孩子年幼时的创造力和批判性思维技能方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

nut.en: Research has shown that consuming nuts in moderation can help reduce the risk of heart disease in adults.
nut.zh: 研究表明，适量食用坚果有助于降低成年人患心脏病的风险。

nutrient.en: Scientists are studying how specific nutrient deficiencies can contribute to the development of chronic diseases.
nutrient.zh: 科学家正在研究特定营养素缺乏如何导致慢性疾病的发生。

nutrients.en: A balanced diet is essential because it provides the necessary nutrients for maintaining overall physical health.
nutrients.zh: 均衡的饮食至关重要，因为它提供维持整体身体健康所需的营养。

nutrition.en: The study of nutrition has become increasingly important as researchers explore links between diet and longevity.
nutrition.zh: 随着研究人员探索饮食与长寿之间的联系，营养学研究变得愈发重要。

nutritional.en: Many fast food chains face criticism for selling products with poor nutritional value that contribute to obesity.
nutritional.zh: 许多快餐连锁店因销售营养价值低且导致肥胖的产品而受到批评。

nutritious.en: Health experts recommend that students eat nutritious breakfasts before exams to maintain optimal concentration levels.
nutritious.zh: 健康专家建议学生在考试前食用有营养的早餐，以保持最佳专注力水平。

organ.en: The human body contains numerous vital organs, each performing specific functions essential for survival and overall health.
organ.zh: 人体包含许多重要器官，每个器官执行维持生命和整体健康所必需的特殊功能。

organic.en: Consumers are increasingly choosing organic food products because they believe these items are healthier and safer.
organic.zh: 消费者越来越多地选择有机食品，因为他们认为这些物品更健康更安全。

organic farming.en: Organic farming methods avoid synthetic pesticides and focus on natural soil enrichment techniques to grow crops sustainably.
organic farming.zh: 有机农业方法避免使用合成农药，专注于使用自然土壤改良技术来可持续地种植作物。

organisation.en: The charity organisation provides educational support and learning materials to underprivileged children in rural communities worldwide.
organisation.zh: 这个慈善组织为世界各地农村社区的贫困儿童提供教育支持和学习材料。

organisational.en: Strong organisational skills are essential for managing complex projects with multiple deadlines and diverse team members.
organisational.zh: 强大的组织能力对于管理具有多个截止日期和不同团队成员的复杂项目至关重要。

organisations.en: Many large organisations contribute significant funding to support educational projects in remote areas of the country annually.
organisations.zh: 许多大型组织贡献了大量资金，以每年支持该国偏远地区的教育项目。

organise.en: Students must learn to organise their study time effectively to achieve high scores in the examination.
organise.zh: 学生必须学会有效地组织他们的学习时间，以便在考试中取得高分。

organised.en: A well-organised study schedule helps students manage their time effectively, ensuring they cover all necessary topics before the final assessments.
organised.zh: 一个组织良好的学习计划帮助学生有效管理时间，确保他们在最终评估前涵盖所有必要主题。

organiser.en: The event organiser ensured that all conference participants received clear information about the venue and session timings.
organiser.zh: 活动组织者确保所有与会者收到关于场地和会议时间的清晰信息。

organism.en: Every living organism requires nutrients, water, and energy to maintain its biological processes and ensure survival.
organism.zh: 每个生物体都需要营养、水和能量来维持其生物过程并确保生存。

opened.en: The new shopping mall was opened last month, attracting thousands of visitors to the area.
opened.zh: 新的购物中心上个月开业，吸引了成千上万的游客来到该地区。

opening.en: The opening ceremony of the Olympics was broadcast to millions of viewers worldwide.
opening.zh: 奥运会的开幕式向全球数百万观众进行了直播。

opening hours.en: Many museums extend their opening hours during the summer holiday to accommodate tourists.
opening hours.zh: 许多博物馆在暑假期间会延长开放时间，以满足游客的需求。

opera.en: Attending an opera performance can be a valuable cultural experience for international students.
opera.zh: 观看歌剧演出对国际学生来说是宝贵的文化体验。

operate.en: The hospital needs to operate around the clock to provide adequate emergency services.
operate.zh: 医院需要全天候运营以提供足够的紧急医疗服务。

operated.en: The company has operated successfully in Southeast Asia for over twenty years.
operated.zh: 这家公司在东南亚成功运营了二十多年。

operation.en: The smooth operation of public transport systems is essential for reducing traffic congestion in major metropolitan areas worldwide.
operation.zh: 公共交通系统的顺畅运作对于减少世界主要大都市的交通拥堵至关重要。

operational.en: All computers in the laboratory must be fully operational before the examination begins.
operational.zh: 实验室里所有电脑必须在考试开始前完全正常运行。

operator.en: The call centre operator handled the customer's complaint with great patience and professionalism.
operator.zh: 呼叫中心的接线员以极大的耐心和专业精神处理了客户的投诉。

operators.en: Machine operators require comprehensive training to handle complex equipment safely within the modern manufacturing industry environment.
operators.zh: 机器操作员需要全面的培训，才能在现代制造业环境中安全地操作复杂设备。

optimal.en: The optimal solution requires balancing economic growth with environmental protection in policy decisions.
optimal.zh: 最佳解决方案需要在政策决策中平衡经济增长与环境保护。

optimism.en: Despite facing economic challenges, the report expressed cautious optimism about future market prospects.
optimism.zh: 尽管面临经济挑战，报告对未来的市场前景表达了谨慎的乐观态度。

optimistic.en: Many education experts are optimistic that online learning platforms will improve access to quality education worldwide.
optimistic.zh: 许多教育专家乐观地认为，在线学习平台将改善全球获得优质教育的机会。

optimists.en: Optimists argue that technological innovation will create more job opportunities than it eliminates in the long term.
optimists.zh: 乐观主义者认为，从长远来看，技术创新创造的就业机会将超过其消除的数量。

optimum.en: Finding the optimum balance between work and family life remains a significant challenge for modern professionals.
optimum.zh: 找到工作与家庭生活的最佳平衡仍然是现代职场人士面临的重大挑战。

option.en: The government should seriously consider the option of introducing congestion charges to reduce urban traffic.
option.zh: 政府应该认真考虑引入拥堵费以减少城市交通的选项。

optional.en: While attendance at the workshop is optional, students who participate tend to perform better in exams.
optional.zh: 虽然参加该研讨会是可选的，但参与的学生往往在考试中表现更好。

options.en: Students should consider all available options carefully before choosing a university for their higher education studies abroad.
options.zh: 学生在选择海外高等教育大学之前应仔细考虑所有可用的选项。

or.en: Governments must invest in renewable energy sources or face increasingly severe consequences from climate change.
or.zh: 各国政府必须投资可再生能源，否则将面临气候变化带来的日益严重的后果。

oral.en: Developing strong oral communication skills is essential for success in most professional environments today.
oral.zh: 培养强大的口语交流能力对当今大多数职业环境的成功至关重要。

orange.en: I prefer drinking orange juice every morning because it contains essential vitamins that boost my immune system.
orange.zh: 我更喜欢每天早上喝橙汁，因为它含有增强免疫系统的必需维生素。

orbit.en: The satellite was successfully placed into orbit around Earth, allowing scientists to collect valuable climate data.
orbit.zh: 卫星成功进入地球轨道，使科学家能够收集宝贵的气候数据。

orcas.en: Orcas are highly intelligent marine mammals that live in complex social groups and communicate through unique sounds.
orcas.zh: 虎鲸是高度智慧的海洋哺乳动物，它们生活在复杂的社会群体中，通过独特的声音进行交流。

orchards.en: Many tourists visit the apple orchards during autumn to experience picking fresh fruit directly from trees.
orchards.zh: 许多游客在秋季参观苹果园，体验直接从树上采摘新鲜水果的乐趣。

orchestra.en: The symphony orchestra performed an extraordinary piece that moved the audience to tears with its beautiful melody.
orchestra.zh: 交响乐团演奏了一首非凡的乐曲，其优美的旋律使观众感动落泪。

order.en: The professor asked students to submit their assignments in order of arrival to ensure a fair marking process.
order.zh: 教授要求学生按到达顺序提交作业，以确保公平的评分过程。

ordering.en: The ordering system for this restaurant has been modernised, making it much easier for customers to place orders.
ordering.zh: 这家餐厅的订购系统已经现代化，使顾客下单变得更加便捷。

ordinary.en: Many experts believe that ordinary daily habits significantly impact long-term physical health and overall mental well-being.
ordinary.zh: 许多专家认为，普通的日常习惯会显著影响长期的身体健康和整体心理健康。

ordinary people.en: Ordinary people often find it challenging to afford housing in major cities where property prices continue to rise.
ordinary people.zh: 普通人常常发现难以负担主要城市不断上涨的房价。

ore.en: Australia is extremely rich in mineral ore resources, which significantly contribute to the country's export economy.
ore.zh: 澳大利亚拥有极其丰富的矿砂资源，这对国家的出口经济做出了重大贡献。

on the coast.en: Many tourists prefer to live on the coast during summer because they enjoy the fresh sea breeze and beach activities.
on the coast.zh: 许多游客更喜欢在夏季住在海边，因为他们喜欢新鲜的海风和海滩活动。

on the contrary.en: Some people believe that technology reduces face-to-face communication; on the contrary, it has enabled us to connect more easily.
on the contrary.zh: 一些人认为科技减少了面对面交流；恰恰相反，它使我们更容易联系。

on the other hand.en: Working from home offers great flexibility; on the other hand, it may lead to social isolation and reduced work-life balance.
on the other hand.zh: 在家工作提供了很大的灵活性；另一方面，它可能导致社交孤立和工作生活平衡的减少。

on time.en: Students are expected to submit their assignments on time to receive full marks and demonstrate good time management skills.
on time.zh: 学生被期望准时提交作业以获得满分，并展示良好的时间管理能力。

on top of.en: On top of his demanding job, he volunteers at a local charity every weekend to help underprivileged children.
on top of.zh: 除了繁忙的工作之外，他每个周末都在当地慈善机构做志愿者，帮助贫困儿童。

once.en: Once the new airport is completed, it will significantly improve transportation links between major cities in the region.
once.zh: 一旦新机场建成，它将大大改善该地区主要城市之间的交通联系。

once a month.en: My family tries to gather for dinner once a month to strengthen our bonds and share quality time together.
once a month.zh: 我的家人每个月都会聚在一起吃晚餐，以加强我们的感情并共度美好时光。

one.en: One of the main challenges facing developing countries is providing adequate healthcare services to rural populations.
one.zh: 发展中国家面临的主要挑战之一是为农村人口提供足够的医疗服务。

one month.en: The university requires international students to complete their orientation program within one month of arrival on campus.
one month.zh: 大学要求国际学生在到校后一个月内完成入学指导项目。

one third.en: One third of the global population currently lives in urban areas, and this proportion continues to increase every year.
one third.zh: 目前全球三分之一的人口居住在城市地区，而且这一比例每年都在持续增加。

opinion.en: While everyone is entitled to their own opinion, evidence-based arguments are more persuasive in academic writing.
opinion.zh: 虽然每个人都有权拥有自己的观点，但在学术写作中，基于证据的论点更具说服力。

opponent.en: During the debate, each opponent presented compelling arguments to support their respective positions on environmental protection policies.
opponent.zh: 在辩论中，每位对手都提出了令人信服的论点来支持各自在环境保护政策上的立场。

opportunity.en: Studying abroad provides students with a unique opportunity to experience different cultures and improve their language skills significantly.
opportunity.zh: 出国留学为学生提供了一个独特的机会去体验不同的文化并显著提高他们的语言技能。

oppose.en: Many citizens choose to oppose the proposed legislation due to concerns about its potential impact on civil liberties.
oppose.zh: 许多市民因担心拟议立法对公民自由的潜在影响而选择反对该法案。

opposed.en: Many local residents were strongly opposed to the construction of the new factory near their private residential properties.
opposed.zh: 许多当地居民强烈反对在他们私人住宅物业附近建造新工厂。

opposite.en: The bank is located opposite the main post office, making it easily accessible for all city residents.
opposite.zh: 银行位于主邮局对面，使所有城市居民都能轻松到达。

opposition.en: The opposition party has voiced strong criticism of the government's economic reform package, arguing it favours large corporations over ordinary citizens.
opposition.zh: 反对党对政府的经济改革方案提出了强烈批评，认为该方案偏向大企业而非普通公民。

oppress.en: Throughout history, authoritarian regimes have sought to oppress dissenting voices through censorship and intimidation of independent media outlets.
oppress.zh: 纵观历史，专制政权一直试图通过审查和恐吓独立媒体来压制异议声音。

opt.en: Young professionals often opt to work in metropolitan areas because of the greater career advancement opportunities available in major corporations.
opt.zh: 年轻的专业人士往往选择在大城市工作，因为大公司提供更多的职业发展机会。

optical.en: Recent advances in optical technology have revolutionised medical diagnostics, enabling doctors to detect diseases at much earlier stages than previously possible.
optical.zh: 光学技术的最新进展彻底改变了医学诊断，使医生能够比以前更早地发现疾病。

one way.en: There is one way to solve this problem, and that is to gather more empirical data before drawing conclusions.
one way.zh: 解决这个问题只有一个方法，那就是在得出结论之前收集更多的经验数据。

ongoing.en: The ongoing debate about climate change has led to many significant policy changes in developed countries.
ongoing.zh: 关于气候变化的持续辩论已导致发达国家许多重大的政策变化。

onion.en: When cooking, the onion releases a chemical compound that causes tears in the eyes of the chef.
onion.zh: 烹饪时，洋葱会释放一种导致厨师眼睛流泪的化学化合物。

online.en: The popularity of online shopping has grown rapidly because it offers consumers greater convenience and saves considerable time.
online.zh: 网上购物的普及率迅速增长，因为它为消费者提供了更大的便利并节省了相当多的时间。

only.en: It is only through continuous practice that language learners can achieve true fluency in a foreign language.
only.zh: 只有通过持续练习，语言学习者才能在外语中达到真正的流利程度。

only a few.en: Only a few participants managed to complete the marathon despite the extremely challenging weather conditions.
only a few.zh: 尽管天气条件极具挑战性，只有少数参与者设法完成了马拉松。

onset.en: The onset of symptoms usually occurs within 24 hours after a person has been exposed to the virus.
onset.zh: 症状的出现通常发生在一个人接触病毒后的24小时内。

onto.en: The researcher transferred the data onto a secure server to prevent any potential loss of information.
onto.zh: 研究人员将数据传输到安全服务器上，以防止任何潜在的信息丢失。

onwards.en: The company plans to expand its business operations onwards into emerging markets across Southeast Asia.
onwards.zh: 该公司计划将业务进一步扩展到东南亚的新兴市场。

olds.en: The cultural traditions that have been preserved by the elderly in rural communities are slowly disappearing due to modernization and urban migration.
olds.zh: 由于现代化和城市迁移，农村社区老年人保存下来的文化传统正在慢慢消失。

olive.en: The olive tree has been cultivated in Mediterranean countries for thousands of years, providing both food and oil that are essential to local cuisine.
olive.zh: 橄榄树在地中海国家已经种植了数千年，提供的食物和油是当地美食的重要组成部分。

olympic.en: The Olympic Games bring together athletes from over two hundred countries around the world to compete in various sporting events.
olympic.zh: 奥运会汇集了来自世界各地两百多个国家的运动员，在各种体育赛事中展开竞争。

omit.en: Students should not omit any important details when writing their research papers, as this could significantly affect the credibility of their arguments.
omit.zh: 学生在写研究论文时不应遗漏任何重要细节，因为这可能会严重影响他们论点的可信度。

on.en: On arriving at the university, new students are required to attend an orientation session where they can learn about campus facilities and resources.
on.zh: 新生到达大学后必须参加迎新会，在那里他们可以了解校园设施和资源。

on account of.en: Many outdoor events were cancelled on account of the heavy rainfall that had been forecast for several days in advance by meteorologists.
on account of.zh: 由于气象学家提前预报的大雨，许多户外活动被取消了。

on average.en: On average, university students spend approximately four hours daily on homework and self-study, which can vary depending on individual workload.
on average.zh: 平均而言，大学生每天大约花四个小时做作业和自学，这可能会因个人工作量而有所不同。

on behalf of.en: The ambassador spoke on behalf of the government during the international conference, emphasizing the need for global cooperation on climate issues.
on behalf of.zh: 大使在国际会议上代表政府发言，强调了在气候问题上进行全球合作的必要性。

on campus.en: The university offers various student services on campus, including counseling, career guidance, and health services to support student wellbeing.
on campus.zh: 大学在校内提供多种学生服务，包括咨询、职业指导和健康服务，以支持学生的身心健康。

on sale.en: The new textbook edition will be on sale at the campus bookstore next week, with a special discount available for students who purchase early.
on sale.zh: 新版教科书下周将在校园书店发售，提前购买的学生可享受特别折扣。

our.en: The government should invest more in our education system to prepare young people for future challenges.
our.zh: 政府应该加大对我国教育系统的投资，为年轻人应对未来挑战做准备。

ours.en: The library provides more resources than theirs, so ours is the better choice for academic research purposes.
ours.zh: 这家图书馆提供的资源比他们的多，所以我们的图书馆是学术研究的更好选择。

ourselves.en: We must ask ourselves whether current educational systems truly prepare students for the significant challenges of the modern workforce.
ourselves.zh: 我们必须问问自己，当前的教育体系是否真正为学生应对现代劳动力的重大挑战做好了准备。

out.en: Many young people grow out of their bad habits as they mature and gain more life experience over time.
out.zh: 许多年轻人随着成熟和时间的推移会改掉他们的坏习惯。

out of.en: The survey revealed that three out of five respondents preferred remote working to commuting to an office.
out of.zh: 调查显示五分之三的受访者更喜欢远程工作而非通勤到办公室。

out of town.en: My professor is currently out of town attending an international conference on renewable energy research.
out of town.zh: 我的教授目前出差参加一个关于可再生能源研究的国际会议。

outbreak.en: The outbreak of the disease prompted the government to implement strict quarantine measures nationwide.
outbreak.zh: 这种疾病的爆发促使政府在全国范围内实施严格的隔离措施。

outcome.en: The outcome of the experiment showed that participants who slept adequately performed significantly better.
outcome.zh: 实验结果表明睡眠充足的参与者表现明显更好。

outcomes.en: The desired outcomes of the new policy were not achieved due to insufficient funding and poor planning by the committee.
outcomes.zh: 新政策的预期结果未能实现，因为委员会资金不足且规划不善。

outdoor.en: Outdoor activities such as hiking and cycling can significantly improve both physical and mental health.
outdoor.zh: 徒步旅行和骑自行车等户外活动可以显著改善身心健康。

organisms.en: Many marine organisms are increasingly threatened by industrial pollution and rising ocean temperatures around the globe.
organisms.zh: 许多海洋生物正日益受到全球工业污染和海洋温度上升的威胁。

organization.en: Effective organization of workplace resources can dramatically improve employee productivity and job satisfaction.
organization.zh: 有效地组织工作场所资源可以显著提高员工的生产力和工作满意度。

organize.en: University students must learn to organize their time efficiently to balance academic work and social activities.
organize.zh: 大学生必须学会有效地安排时间，以平衡学业和社交活动。

organizing.en: The organizing committee has spent months planning the international conference to accommodate thousands of delegates.
organizing.zh: 组织委员会花了数月时间策划这次国际会议，以容纳数千名代表。

organs.en: Modern medical technology has made organ transplantation a common procedure that saves countless lives annually.
organs.zh: 现代医疗技术使器官移植成为每年拯救无数生命的常规手术。

orient.en: Most universities provide orientation programs to orient new students with campus facilities and academic expectations.
orient.zh: 大多数大学提供迎新项目，帮助新生熟悉校园设施和学术期望。

oriental.en: The museum's exhibition on oriental art attracted visitors interested in traditional ceramics and calligraphy from East Asia.
oriental.zh: 博物馆关于东方艺术的展览吸引了对东亚传统陶瓷和书法感兴趣的游客。

orientate.en: Companies should orientate new employees with their corporate culture during the initial weeks of employment.
orientate.zh: 公司应在员工入职最初几周内让他们熟悉公司文化。

orientated.en: Many modern universities are increasingly orientated towards practical research that addresses real-world problems.
orientated.zh: 许多现代大学越来越倾向于从事解决现实世界问题的实用研究。

orientates.en: The building's design orientates all offices towards the north to maximize natural light and reduce energy consumption.
orientates.zh: 建筑设计将所有办公室朝向北方，以最大化自然采光并减少能源消耗。

overdue.en: The library imposed a additional fine because the book was already two weeks overdue and no renewal was processed.
overdue.zh: 图书馆收取了额外罚款，因为这本书已经逾期两周未还，且没有办理续借手续。

overestimate.en: Many candidates tend to overestimate their English proficiency before taking the actual IELTS examination.
overestimate.zh: 许多考生在参加实际雅思考试前往往会高估自己的英语水平。

overflow.en: During major holidays, the city's waste management system often overflows due to the dramatic increase in population.
overflow.zh: 在重大节假日期间，由于人口的急剧增加，城市的垃圾处理系统经常超负荷运转。

overhead.en: Entrepreneurs must carefully calculate all overhead costs before determining the final price of their products.
overhead.zh: 企业家在确定产品的最终价格之前，必须仔细计算所有运营开支。

overhear.en: I happened to overhear two strangers discussing the controversial topic of climate change policy on the train.
overhear.zh: 我在火车上偶然听到两个陌生人在讨论气候变化政策这个有争议的话题。

overlap.en: There is considerable overlap between the academic requirements for biology and environmental science programmes.
overlap.zh: 生物学和环境科学课程的学术要求之间有相当大的重叠。

overlook.en: City officials sometimes overlook the significance of preserving historical architecture while pursuing modern development.
overlook.zh: 城市官员在追求现代化发展时，有时会忽视保护历史建筑的重要性。

overlooked.en: The contributions of indigenous peoples to sustainable farming practices have been largely overlooked by mainstream history.
overlooked.zh: 土著居民对可持续农业实践的贡献在主流历史中很大程度上被忽视了。

overlooking.en: The newly opened hotel, overlooking the spectacular coastline, quickly became the most popular destination for tourists.
overlooking.zh: 这家新建的酒店俯瞰着壮观的海岸线，迅速成为游客最受欢迎的目的地。

overnight.en: The social media campaign went viral overnight and attracted millions of viewers from across the globe.
overnight.zh: 这个社交媒体活动一夜之间走红，吸引了来自世界各地的数百万观众。

outer.en: The outer layer of the building provides essential protection against harsh weather conditions.
outer.zh: 建筑的外层为恶劣天气条件提供了必要的保护。

outfit.en: Many young professionals prefer to purchase their work outfit from high street stores rather than expensive boutiques.
outfit.zh: 许多年轻专业人士更喜欢从商业街商店而不是昂贵的精品店购买工作服装。

outlet.en: The shopping outlet located on the outskirts of the city offers significant discounts on branded goods.
outlet.zh: 位于城市郊区的购物中心提供名牌商品的重大折扣。

outline.en: Before writing the academic essay, students should create a clear outline to organize their main arguments.
outline.zh: 在写学术论文之前，学生应该创建一个清晰的提纲来组织他们的主要论点。

outlook.en: The economic outlook for the coming year appears positive according to recent financial analyses.
outlook.zh: 根据最近的金融分析，明年经济前景看起来是积极的。

output.en: Increasing industrial output without considering environmental consequences can lead to severe pollution problems in urban areas.
output.zh: 不考虑环境后果而增加工业产出可能导致城市地区严重的污染问题。

outrage.en: The public outrage over the environmental pollution incident led to immediate government action and investigations.
outrage.zh: 公众对环境污染事件的强烈愤慨促使政府立即采取行动并展开调查。

outset.en: From the outset, it was clear that the research project would require substantial funding and specialized equipment.
outset.zh: 从一开始就很清楚，这个研究项目需要大量资金和专业设备。

outside.en: Factors outside the control of the management team often influence the overall success of large-scale construction projects significantly.
outside.zh: 管理团队控制范围之外的因素往往会影响大型建筑项目的整体成功。

outsiders.en: Newcomers to a community often feel like outsiders until they establish meaningful social connections and relationships.
outsiders.zh: 社区的新来者通常在建立有意义的社会联系和关系之前会感到像外人一样。

orientating.en: The university runs an orientating programme to help new students adapt to campus life during their first semester.
orientating.zh: 大学开设迎新项目，帮助新生在第一学期适应校园生活。

orientation.en: Cultural orientation is essential for immigrants who want to integrate successfully into their new communities abroad.
orientation.zh: 文化适应对于想要成功融入海外新社区的移民来说至关重要。

oriented.en: The curriculum is heavily oriented towards practical skills that students can directly apply in the workplace.
oriented.zh: 课程 heavily 侧重于实用技能，学生可以直接应用到工作中。

orienting.en: The instructor spent the first week orienting international students to the academic expectations and grading system.
orienting.zh: 讲师在第一周花时间帮助国际学生熟悉学术期望和评分系统。

orients.en: A good map orients travellers and helps them navigate unfamiliar cities with confidence and ease.
orients.zh: 好的地图能为旅行者定位，帮助他们自信便捷地 navigate 陌生的城市。

origin.en: Researchers are studying the origin of the virus to understand how it spread across different continents.
origin.zh: 研究人员正在研究病毒的起源，以了解它如何传播到不同的大洲。

original.en: The original proposal submitted by the research committee was significantly modified before the final approval process officially began.
original.zh: 研究委员会提交的原始提案在最终批准过程正式开始之前进行了重大修改。

originally.en: The historic building was originally constructed in the nineteenth century as a railway station for the city.
originally.zh: 这座历史建筑 originally 建于19世纪，作为城市的火车站。

originate.en: Many traditional customs and festivals originate from ancient agricultural practices that have been passed down through generations.
originate.zh: 许多传统习俗和节日源自古代农业 practices，世代相传。

originated.en: The trade dispute originated from disagreements over import tariffs between the two neighbouring countries several years ago.
originated.zh: 这场贸易争端 originated 于几年前两个邻国之间关于进口关税的分歧。

outskirts.en: Many affordable housing developments are located on the outskirts of major cities, where land prices are significantly lower than in central areas.
outskirts.zh: 许多经济实惠的住房开发项目位于大城市的郊区，那里的土地价格明显低于市中心地区。

outstanding.en: The university acknowledged her outstanding academic achievements and offered her a full scholarship for postgraduate studies.
outstanding.zh: 大学认可了她杰出的学术成就，并为她提供了研究生学习的全额奖学金。

outward.en: Although his outward appearance seemed confident, he privately struggled with anxiety about his upcoming job interview.
outward.zh: 尽管他外表看起来自信，但私下里他对即将到来的求职面试感到焦虑。

oval.en: The architect designed an elegant conference room with a large oval table that could accommodate up to twelve participants.
oval.zh: 建筑师设计了一间优雅的会议室，配有一张可容纳十二人的大型椭圆形桌子。
