premise.en: The entire theory is built on the premise that human behavior is primarily shaped by environmental factors rather than genetics.
premise.zh: 整个理论建立在一个前提之上，即人类行为主要由环境因素而非遗传因素塑造。

poverty.en: Many developing countries are still struggling to reduce poverty despite significant economic growth over the past decade.
poverty.zh: 尽管过去十年经济显著增长，许多发展中国家仍在努力减少贫困。

powder.en: The government has implemented strict regulations on milk powder products to ensure consumer safety standards are met.
powder.zh: 政府已对奶粉产品实施严格监管，以确保消费者安全标准得到满足。

powerful.en: Social media has become a powerful tool for influencing public opinion and shaping political discourse worldwide.
powerful.zh: 社交媒体已成为影响公众舆论和塑造全球政治话语的强大工具。

powerpoint.en: While PowerPoint presentations are commonly used in universities, some educators believe they may limit student creativity.
powerpoint.zh: 虽然PPT演示在大学中很常见，但一些教育工作者认为它们可能会限制学生的创造力。

powers.en: The judicial powers in democratic countries serve as a crucial check on government authority to prevent abuse.
powers.zh: 民主国家的司法权力是对政府权力至关重要的制衡，以防止权力滥用。

practical.en: While theoretical knowledge is important, employers value candidates who possess practical skills relevant to the specific job role.
practical.zh: 虽然理论知识很重要，但雇主更看重具备与特定工作岗位相关的实际技能的候选人。

practically.en: Practically every household in urban areas now has access to the internet and smartphone technology.
practically.zh: 城市地区几乎每个家庭现在都能使用互联网和智能手机技术。

practice.en: Remote working has become a common practice among technology companies since the global pandemic began.
practice.zh: 自全球疫情开始以来，远程工作已成为科技公司的常见做法。

practise.en: Students should regularly practise speaking English to significantly improve their pronunciation and overall fluency.
practise.zh: 学生应定期练习英语口语，以显著提高发音和整体流利度。

practising.en: By practising mindfulness meditation regularly, individuals can effectively manage stress and improve mental wellbeing.
practising.zh: 通过定期练习正念冥想，个人可以有效地管理压力并改善心理健康。

predict.en: It is difficult to predict how technology will evolve over the next decade due to rapid advancements.
predict.zh: 由于快速的进步，很难预测技术在未来十年将如何演变。

predictable.en: The results of the standardized test were entirely predictable given the students' consistent preparation efforts.
predictable.zh: 鉴于学生们持续的备考努力，标准化考试的结果完全在预料之中。

prediction.en: Despite the researcher's careful prediction, the market trends did not follow the expected pattern at all.
prediction.zh: 尽管研究人员做出了仔细的预测，市场趋势完全没有按照预期的模式发展。

predictions.en: Many economists made gloomy predictions about the global economy during the peak of the financial crisis.
predictions.zh: 在金融危机高峰期，许多经济学家对全球经济做出了悲观的预测。

predictor.en: Education level is widely regarded as one of the strongest predictors of career success in modern society.
predictor.zh: 在现代社会中，教育水平被广泛认为是职业成功最有力的预测指标之一。

predominant.en: English has become the predominant language of international business communications in the twenty-first century.
predominant.zh: 英语已成为二十一世纪国际商业交流的主要语言。

predominantly.en: The population in many coastal regions is predominantly engaged in fishing and related industries.
predominantly.zh: 许多沿海地区的人口主要从事渔业及相关产业。

preface.en: In the preface of his groundbreaking book, the author pays tribute to the mentors who inspired his research.
preface.zh: 在这位作者开创性著作的序言中，他向激励他研究的导师们致以敬意。

prefer.en: International students often prefer to live in shared accommodations to reduce living expenses while studying abroad.
prefer.zh: 国际学生通常更喜欢合租公寓，以降低留学期间的居住费用。

prefer to.en: Many young professionals prefer to live in metropolitan cities where career advancement opportunities are more plentiful.
prefer to.zh: 许多年轻专业人士更喜欢住在大城市，因为那里有更多的职业发展机会。

postcode.en: Please ensure you write the correct postcode on your application form to avoid any delays in receiving your documents.
postcode.zh: 请确保您在申请表上填写正确的邮政编码，以避免收到文件时出现任何延误。

poster.en: The poster advertising the university open day was designed creatively by students from the art department.
poster.zh: 宣传大学开放日的海报是由艺术系的学生创意设计的。

posters.en: The conference hall was decorated with colorful posters highlighting the key research findings from various departments.
posters.zh: 会议厅装饰着彩色海报，突出展示各部门的关键研究发现。

postgraduate.en: Many postgraduate students choose to specialize in research areas that offer promising career opportunities after graduation.
postgraduate.zh: 许多研究生选择专攻那些毕业后提供良好职业机会的研究领域。

postman.en: The postman delivers letters and parcels to our neighborhood every morning at approximately nine o'clock sharp.
postman.zh: 邮递员每天早上大约九点准时向我们的社区投递信件和包裹。

postpone.en: Due to the unexpected storm warning, the outdoor graduation ceremony has been postponed to the following week.
postpone.zh: 由于意外的暴风雨预警，户外毕业典礼已推迟到下周。

posts.en: The university has created several new academic posts to accommodate the growing number of international students each year.
posts.zh: 大学创建了多个新的学术职位，以适应每年不断增加的国际学生数量。

posture.en: Maintaining good posture while studying for long hours can significantly reduce the risk of developing back problems.
posture.zh: 长时间学习时保持良好的姿势可以显著降低患背部问题的风险。

postures.en: Different sitting postures can affect both physical health and concentration levels during extended study sessions.
postures.zh: 不同的坐姿会影响长时间学习过程中的身体健康和注意力水平。

pot.en: The clay pot in the garden contains various herbs that are commonly used in traditional cooking recipes.
pot.zh: 花园里的陶罐里装着各种常用于传统烹饪食谱的香草。

practitioner.en: Many medical practitioners recommend regular exercise as a way to maintain good health and prevent chronic diseases.
practitioner.zh: 许多医疗从业者建议定期锻炼作为保持健康和预防慢性疾病的方式。

practitioners.en: Experienced practitioners in the field suggest that hands-on experience is equally valuable as theoretical knowledge for career success.
practitioners.zh: 该领域的资深从业者认为，实践经验与理论知识对职业成功同等重要。

praise.en: Despite receiving widespread praise for his innovative teaching methods, the professor remained humble about his achievements.
praise.zh: 尽管因其创新的教学方法受到广泛赞扬，这位教授仍对自己的成就保持谦虚。

pray.en: In some cultures, people pray before meals as a way of expressing gratitude for the food they are about to receive.
pray.zh: 在一些文化中，人们在饭前祈祷，以表达对即将获得的食物的感激之情。

prayer.en: The school introduced a moment of silence each morning, allowing students to engage in quiet reflection or prayer if they wished.
prayer.zh: 学校每天早晨引入片刻沉默，让学生可以进行安静的反思或祈祷。

pre.en: Students must complete all pre-course assignments before attending the first lecture to ensure they are adequately prepared for discussion.
pre.zh: 学生必须在参加第一次讲座之前完成所有课前作业，以确保他们为讨论做好了充分准备。

preach.en: Parents may preach the importance of hard work, but children often learn better through observation and imitation.
preach.zh: 父母可能会宣扬勤奋的重要性，但孩子们通常通过观察和模仿学得更好。

precaution.en: As a precaution against identity theft, individuals should regularly monitor their financial statements and report suspicious activity.
precaution.zh: 作为防范身份盗用的预防措施，个人应定期监控其财务对账单并报告可疑活动。

precede.en: The opening ceremony will precede the main sporting events, setting an inspirational tone for the entire competition.
precede.zh: 开幕式将在主要体育赛事之前举行，为整个比赛奠定鼓舞人心的基调。

precedent.en: This landmark court ruling sets a significant precedent that may influence future decisions on similar environmental protection cases.
precedent.zh: 这一里程碑式的法庭裁决开创了一个重要先例，可能会影响未来类似环境保护案件的判决。

precious.en: Time is the most precious resource, which is why effective time management is essential for achieving academic success.
precious.zh: 时间是最宝贵的资源，这就是为什么有效的时间管理对取得学业成功至关重要。

precipitation.en: The data shows precipitation levels varying significantly across seasons, with heavy rainfall in summer and minimal amounts in winter.
precipitation.zh: 数据显示降水水平在不同季节差异显著，夏季降雨量大，冬季降水量极少。

precise.en: Providing precise data is essential for researchers who aim to draw valid conclusions from their studies.
precise.zh: 提供精确的数据对于旨在从其研究中得出有效结论的研究人员至关重要。

precisely.en: The two cities are not precisely the same in size; one has a population of approximately 500,000 while the other has 480,000.
precisely.zh: 这两个城市规模并不完全相同：一个人口约50万，另一个约48万。

precision.en: Scientific research demands a high degree of precision in measurement and methodology to ensure reliable and valid results.
precision.zh: 科学研究要求在测量和方法上具有高度精确性，以确保获得可靠和有效的结果。

preclude.en: The lack of adequate funding may preclude the government from implementing all of the proposed environmental protection measures.
preclude.zh: 资金不足可能使政府无法实施所有拟议的环境保护措施。

predator.en: The disappearance of the predator from the ecosystem has created an imbalance, leading to overpopulation of certain prey species.
predator.zh: 捕食者从生态系统中消失造成了失衡，导致某些猎物物种的数量过多。

predators.en: In many ecosystems, the removal of top predators often leads to an imbalance in the natural food chain.
predators.zh: 在许多生态系统中，顶级捕食者的移除往往会导致自然食物链的不平衡。

predecessor.en: The new policy differs significantly from its predecessor, introducing stricter regulations on industrial waste disposal practices.
predecessor.zh: 新政策与前任政策有很大不同，在工业废物处理方面引入了更严格的法规。

predecessors.en: Unlike their predecessors, today's university graduates face a much more competitive global job market with higher expectations.
predecessors.zh: 与他们的前辈不同，今天的大学毕业生面临竞争更加激烈的全球就业市场，期望值也更高。

premises.en: The company moved to new premises in the city centre to accommodate its growing workforce.
premises.zh: 公司搬到了市中心的新 premises，以容纳其不断增长的员工队伍。

premium.en: Students are often willing to pay a premium for courses that offer better employment prospects.
premium.zh: 学生们通常愿意为能提供更好就业前景的课程支付 premium 价格。

preoccupy.en: Environmental issues continue to preoccupy policymakers and the general public alike.
preoccupy.zh: 环境问题继续 preoccupy 政策制定者和普通公众。

preparation.en: Adequate preparation is essential for achieving high scores in the IELTS examination.
preparation.zh: 充分的 preparation 对于在雅思考试中取得高分至关重要。

prepare.en: Universities should prepare students for the challenges they will face in their careers.
prepare.zh: 大学应该 prepare 学生应对他们在职业生涯中将面临的挑战。

prepare for.en: Candidates must prepare for interviews thoroughly if they want to secure the position.
prepare for.zh: 候选人如果想获得这个职位，就必须彻底地 prepare for 面试。

prepared.en: Governments must be prepared to implement strict regulations if pollution levels continue to rise beyond acceptable safety limits.
prepared.zh: 如果污染水平继续上升到可接受的安全限值之外，政府必须准备好实施严格的法规。

preposition.en: Understanding how to use prepositions correctly is essential for English writing.
preposition.zh: 理解如何正确使用 preposition 对英语写作至关重要。

prerequisite.en: A bachelor's degree is often a prerequisite for admission to postgraduate programmes.
prerequisite.zh: 学士学位通常是进入研究生课程的 prerequisite。

pretty.en: The garden was pretty impressive during spring, featuring a wide variety of colorful flowers blooming everywhere.
pretty.zh: 春天时花园相当令人印象深刻，到处都是各种盛开的彩色花朵。

prevail.en: In many developing countries, traditional farming methods still prevail over modern agricultural techniques.
prevail.zh: 在许多发展中国家，传统农业方法仍然比现代农业技术更普遍。

prevailing.en: The prevailing winds in this region blow from the west, bringing moisture and affecting local agriculture.
prevailing.zh: 这个地区盛行的风从西边吹来，带来湿气并影响当地农业。

prevalent.en: Cybercrime has become increasingly prevalent in modern society due to our growing dependence on technology.
prevalent.zh: 由于我们对科技的日益依赖，网络犯罪在现代社会变得越来越普遍。

prevent.en: Regular medical check-ups can help prevent serious illnesses by detecting potential health issues at an early stage.
prevent.zh: 定期体检有助于预防严重疾病，通过在早期阶段发现潜在的健康问题。

prevent from.en: Heavy traffic and unexpected road closures prevented us from arriving at the conference on time.
prevent from.zh: 拥堵的交通和意外的封路使我们无法准时到达会议现场。

preventative.en: Taking preventative measures such as regular health check-ups can help detect diseases at an early stage.
preventative.zh: 采取预防措施，如定期体检，可以帮助在早期发现疾病。

prevention.en: The prevention of infectious diseases requires a combination of vaccination programs and public education.
prevention.zh: 预防传染病需要疫苗接种计划和公众教育的结合。

previous.en: My previous experience as a volunteer has greatly influenced my decision to pursue a career in healthcare.
previous.zh: 我之前的志愿者经历极大地影响了我从事医疗保健职业的决定。

previously.en: The company previously operated only in domestic markets before expanding its business to several international regions.
previously.zh: 该公司此前仅在国内市场运营，然后才将业务扩展到几个国际地区。

printers.en: Many universities now provide printers for students, although the cost of ink and paper can add up significantly over time.
printers.zh: 许多大学现在为学生提供打印机，尽管墨盒和纸张的费用会随着时间的推移而大量增加。

prior.en: Students require prior knowledge of basic concepts before they can understand complex academic theories fully and correctly.
prior.zh: 学生在完全且正确地理解复杂的学术理论之前，需要先掌握基本概念的知识。

prior to.en: Prior to starting university, I spent six months traveling abroad, which broadened my perspective on different cultures.
prior to.zh: 在开始大学学习之前，我花了六个月在国外旅行，这拓宽了我对不同文化的看法。

priorities.en: Young people often struggle to balance competing priorities, such as studying, working part-time, and maintaining social relationships.
priorities.zh: 年轻人经常努力平衡相互竞争的优先事项，比如学习、做兼职和维持社交关系。

priority.en: Governments should make improving public transportation systems a top priority to effectively reduce traffic congestion.
priority.zh: 政府应将改善公共交通系统作为首要任务，以有效减少交通拥堵。

prison.en: Some argue that prison is not always the most effective solution for non-violent offenders, as it may increase recidivism rates.
prison.zh: 一些人认为监狱并不总是处理非暴力罪犯最有效的解决方案，因为它可能会增加再犯率。

prisoner.en: Each prisoner should have access to educational programs, as this can help reduce reoffending rates upon release.
prisoner.zh: 每位囚犯都应该有机会接受教育项目，因为这有助于降低获释后的再犯率。

privacy.en: Social media users are increasingly concerned about privacy, as companies collect and sell personal data without explicit consent.
privacy.zh: 社交媒体用户越来越关注隐私问题，因为公司在未经明确同意的情况下收集和出售个人数据。

private.en: Many individuals prefer to keep their financial information private to protect themselves from potential identity theft risks.
private.zh: 许多人喜欢保持其财务信息私密，以保护自己免受潜在的身份盗窃风险。

privilege.en: Access to quality education is a privilege that not everyone enjoys, and governments should work to ensure equal opportunities.
privilege.zh: 接受优质教育是一种并非每个人都能享有的特权，政府应该努力确保人人有平等的机会。

primates.en: Studies of primates have provided valuable insights into the evolution of human behavior and social structures in ancient communities.
primates.zh: 对灵长类动物的研究为了解古老社会中人类行为和社会结构的进化提供了宝贵的见解。

prime.en: The prime reason for migrating to urban areas is often the availability of better employment opportunities and public services.
prime.zh: 迁移到城市地区的主要原因通常是更好的就业机会和公共服务的可用性。

primitive.en: While primitive societies had limited technology, they developed sophisticated art forms and complex belief systems over centuries.
primitive.zh: 虽然原始社会的技术有限，但他们在几个世纪中发展出了精湛的艺术形式和复杂的信仰体系。

prince.en: The young prince has taken on increasing responsibilities in preparation for his future role as national leader.
prince.zh: 这位年轻的王子已经承担了越来越多的责任，为将来担任国家领导人做准备。

princess.en: The princess dedicated much of her time to charitable causes, particularly those benefiting underprivileged children worldwide.
princess.zh: 这位公主将大量时间投入到慈善事业中，特别是那些惠及全世界弱势儿童的事业。

principal.en: The principal of our school believes that fostering creativity is equally important as academic achievement for students.
principal.zh: 我们学校的校长认为，培养创造力与学生的学业成就同等重要。

principle.en: The fundamental principle of sustainable development requires balancing economic growth with environmental protection and social equity.
principle.zh: 可持续发展的基本原则要求在经济增长、环境保护和社会公平之间取得平衡。

principled.en: As a principled leader, she consistently made ethical decisions that prioritized the welfare of her community over personal gain.
principled.zh: 作为一位有原则的领导者，她始终坚持做出优先考虑社区福祉而非个人利益的道德决策。

principles.en: Strict ethical principles should guide all scientific research to ensure that experiments do not harm human subjects unnecessarily.
principles.zh: 严格的伦理原则应指导所有科学研究，以确保实验不会不必要地伤害人类受试者。

print.en: Many readers still prefer to read a physical print version of the newspaper rather than viewing it online.
print.zh: 许多读者仍然喜欢阅读报纸的实体印刷版，而不是在网上查看。

prescribe.en: In many countries, doctors can prescribe alternative medicines to patients with chronic conditions.
prescribe.zh: 在许多国家，医生可以为患有慢性疾病的患者开具替代药物的处方。

prescribed.en: The prescribed dosage of this medication must be followed carefully to avoid potential side effects.
prescribed.zh: 必须仔细遵守这种药物的处方剂量，以避免潜在的副作用。

prescription.en: You will need a valid prescription from your doctor before purchasing this antibiotic from the pharmacy.
prescription.zh: 在药店购买这种抗生素之前，你需要医生开具的有效处方。

presence.en: The presence of adequate funding is essential for the successful implementation of any community project.
presence.zh: 充足的资金对于任何社区项目的成功实施都是必不可少的。

presentation.en: During the presentation, the speaker clearly outlined the main findings of the scientific research.
presentation.zh: 在演讲中，演讲者清晰地概述了这项科学研究的主要发现。

presentations.en: Many students find that practicing presentations beforehand significantly improves their confidence and delivery.
presentations.zh: 许多学生发现事先练习演讲能显著提高他们的信心和表达能力。

presenter.en: The presenter skillfully engaged the audience by using interactive examples and thought-provoking questions.
presenter.zh: 演讲者巧妙地运用互动案例和发人深省的问题来吸引观众。

presently.en: Presently, the government is reviewing policies related to environmental protection in urban areas.
presently.zh: 目前，政府正在审查与城市环境保护相关的政策。

presents.en: Climate change presents a significant challenge that requires immediate action from all nations worldwide.
presents.zh: 气候变化给全世界所有国家提出了一个需要立即采取行动的重大挑战。

preservation.en: The preservation of historical buildings requires both financial resources and public awareness of their cultural value.
preservation.zh: 历史建筑的保护需要财政资源和公众对其文化价值的认识。

preserve.en: Governments must take immediate action to preserve natural habitats, as biodiversity loss poses a significant threat to ecological balance worldwide.
preserve.zh: 政府必须立即采取行动保护自然栖息地，因为生物多样性丧失对全球生态平衡构成重大威胁。

preside.en: The experienced judge will preside over the trial and ensure that both sides receive a fair hearing.
preside.zh: 这位经验丰富的法官将主持审判，并确保双方都能得到公平的陈述机会。

president.en: The president announced a new policy aimed at improving economic stability and reducing unemployment rates significantly.
president.zh: 总统宣布了一项旨在提高经济稳定性并显著降低失业率的新政策。

press.en: Freedom of the press is essential for maintaining transparency within government operations and ensuring accountability among public officials.
press.zh: 新闻自由对于维持政府运作内的透明度以及确保公职人员之间的问责制至关重要。

pressure.en: The pressure to conform to strict social norms can sometimes hinder individual creativity and personal expression.
pressure.zh: 遵从严格社会规范的压力有时可能会阻碍个人的创造力和自我表达。

prestige.en: Graduating from a prestigious university can significantly enhance one's career prospects and earning potential.
prestige.zh: 从一所 prestigious 大学毕业可以显著提升一个人的职业前景和收入潜力。

presumably.en: Presumably, the construction project will be completed by the end of this year, assuming no unexpected delays occur.
presumably.zh: presumably，这个建设项目将在今年年底前完成，假设没有发生意外延误。

presume.en: I would not presume to tell experienced professionals how to conduct their research in their own field of expertise.
presume.zh: 我不会 presum e to tell experienced professionals how to conduct their research in their own field of expertise.

pretend.en: Some teenagers pretend to study while actually spending hours on social media applications on their devices.
pretend.zh: 一些青少年假装学习，而实际上却在他们的设备上花数小时使用社交媒体应用程序。

pretext.en: The meeting was arranged under the pretext of discussing team projects, but it was actually about budget cuts.
pretext.zh: 这次会议是在讨论团队项目的借口下安排的，但实际上是为了削减预算。

privileged.en: As a student from a privileged background, she had access to the best educational resources and extracurricular activities.
privileged.zh: 作为一名来自特权家庭的学生，她能够获得最好的教育资源和课外活动机会。

prize.en: The Nobel Prize is awarded annually to individuals who have conferred the greatest benefit to humankind in various fields.
prize.zh: 诺贝尔奖每年授予在各个领域为人类带来最大益处的个人。

prizes.en: Many international prizes are awarded annually to researchers who make significant contributions to medical science and technology.
prizes.zh: 许多国际奖项每年都会颁发给对医学科学和技术做出重大贡献的研究人员。

probability.en: There is a high probability that climate change will continue to affect agricultural productivity in many regions.
probability.zh: 气候变化继续影响许多地区农业生产力的可能性很高。

probable.en: A probable consequence of rapid population growth is increased demand for housing and public services.
probable.zh: 人口快速增长的可能后果是对住房和公共服务的需求增加。

probably.en: Without immediate action, we will probably see more species becoming endangered in the coming decades.
probably.zh: 如果不立即采取行动，我们可能会在未来几十年看到更多物种濒临灭绝。

probe.en: The investigative committee decided to probe the causes of the sudden decline in student academic performance.
probe.zh: 调查委员会决定深入调查学生学业成绩突然下降的原因。

problem.en: One of the main problems facing modern society is how to manage electronic waste in an environmentally friendly way.
problem.zh: 现代社会面临的主要问题之一是如何以环保的方式处理电子垃圾。

problem solving.en: Effective problem solving skills are essential for managers who need to address complex workplace challenges daily.
problem solving.zh: 有效的解决问题能力对于需要每天处理复杂职场挑战的管理者来说至关重要。

problems.en: Many problems arise when cities expand too rapidly without proper urban planning and infrastructure development.
problems.zh: 当城市扩张过快而没有适当的城市规划和发展基础设施时，会出现许多问题。

prey.en: In many ecosystems, smaller animals serve as prey for larger predators, maintaining the natural balance of nature.
prey.zh: 在许多生态系统中，较小的动物作为较大捕食者的猎物，维持着自然的平衡。

prices.en: Rising fuel prices have significantly impacted transportation costs and contributed to inflation in many countries.
prices.zh: 不断上涨的燃油价格严重影响了运输成本，并导致许多国家出现通货膨胀。

prick.en: The nurse used a sterile needle to prick the patient's finger to obtain a small blood sample for testing.
prick.zh: 护士用无菌针轻轻刺破病人的手指，以获取少量血液样本进行检测。

pride.en: The community takes great pride in its local library, which has served as an educational hub for over fifty years.
pride.zh: 社区为其当地图书馆感到非常自豪，该图书馆五十多年来一直是教育中心。

priest.en: The village priest has been providing spiritual guidance and support to families throughout the region for decades.
priest.zh: 这位乡村神父几十年来一直为该地区的家庭提供精神指导和帮助。

priests.en: The ancient temple was once guarded by priests who dedicated their lives to preserving sacred religious traditions.
priests.zh: 这座古老的寺庙曾由祭司守护，他们一生致力于保护神圣的宗教传统。

primacy.en: The company emphasized the primacy of customer satisfaction over profit maximization in its business philosophy.
primacy.zh: 公司在其商业理念中强调客户满意度的重要性优先于利润最大化。

primarily.en: The new policy is primarily designed to protect the rights of minority groups in the education system.
primarily.zh: 新政策主要旨在保护教育体系中少数群体的权利。

primary.en: The primary reason for the decline in sales was the sudden increase in production costs last year.
primary.zh: 销售额下降的主要原因是去年生产成本的突然增加。

primary school.en: Children typically begin their formal education at primary school, where they learn fundamental skills like reading and arithmetic.
primary school.zh: 孩子们通常在小学开始接受正规教育，在那里学习阅读和算术等基本技能。

procedural.en: The procedural requirements for the examination must be followed carefully by all candidates to avoid disqualification.
procedural.zh: 考试的所有程序要求必须被所有考生认真遵守以避免被取消资格。

procedure.en: Understanding the proper procedure for visa application is essential for international students planning to study abroad.
procedure.zh: 了解正确的签证申请程序对计划出国深造的国际学生至关重要。

procedures.en: Strict safety procedures are implemented in laboratories to prevent hazardous chemicals from causing accidental harm to staff.
procedures.zh: 实验室实施了严格的安全程序，以防止危险化学品对工作人员造成意外伤害。

proceed.en: Before we proceed to the next section, I would like to summarise the key points we have covered so far.
proceed.zh: 在我们继续下一节之前，我想总结一下到目前为止我们讨论的要点。

proceeded.en: The meeting proceeded smoothly after the chairperson addressed the concerns raised by the committee members.
proceeded.zh: 在主席解决了委员会成员提出的担忧后，会议顺利进行。

proceeding.en: Before proceeding with the experiment, the researcher ensured that all equipment was properly calibrated.
proceeding.zh: 在继续实验之前，研究人员确保所有设备都已正确校准。

proceedings.en: The legal proceedings attracted considerable media attention because of the unprecedented nature of the case.
proceedings.zh: 由于案件的空前性质，这场法律诉讼引起了媒体的高度关注。

proceeds.en: The proceeds from the charity concert will be donated to organisations supporting education in rural areas.
proceeds.zh: 慈善音乐会的收入将捐给支持农村教育的组织。

process.en: The application process for universities in the United Kingdom typically takes several months to complete.
process.zh: 英国大学的申请程序通常需要几个月才能完成。

processed.en: All applications will be processed in the order they are received, and candidates will be notified within two weeks.
processed.zh: 所有申请将按收到顺序处理，考生将在两周内收到通知。

productivity.en: Improving employee productivity often requires a balanced approach between work demands and sufficient rest periods for staff.
productivity.zh: 提高员工生产力通常需要在工作需求和员工充足休息之间取得平衡。

profession.en: Choosing a profession requires careful consideration of personal interests, skills, and long-term career prospects.
profession.zh: 选择职业需要仔细考虑个人兴趣、技能和长期职业前景。

professional.en: Maintaining a professional attitude in the workplace is essential for building trust among colleagues and achieving long-term career success.
professional.zh: 在工作场所保持专业态度对于建立同事间的信任和实现长期职业成功至关重要。

professor.en: The professor delivered a compelling lecture on climate change that inspired many students to pursue environmental research.
professor.zh: 这位教授发表了一场关于气候变化的精彩演讲，激发了许多学生从事环境研究。

proficiency.en: Language proficiency in English is increasingly important for international business communication and career opportunities.
proficiency.zh: 英语语言熟练程度对于国际商务交流和职业机会越来越重要。

profile.en: Creating a strong professional profile on networking platforms can significantly expand career opportunities and connections.
profile.zh: 在社交平台上创建一个强大的职业简介可以显著扩展职业机会和人脉。

profit.en: Many companies prioritize short-term profit over long-term sustainability, which can lead to significant environmental damage eventually.
profit.zh: 许多公司优先考虑短期利润而非长期可持续性，这最终可能导致重大的环境破坏。

profitable.en: E-commerce has become a highly profitable business model, transforming traditional retail practices worldwide.
profitable.zh: 电子商务已成为一个利润丰厚的商业模式，正在改变全球的传统零售实践。

profits.en: Rising profits in the technology sector have attracted numerous investors seeking high returns on their capital.
profits.zh: 技术部门利润的上升吸引了许多寻求高资本回报的投资者。

profound.en: The internet has had a profound impact on how people communicate, learn, and access information globally.
profound.zh: 互联网对全球人们的交流、学习和获取信息方式产生了深远的影响。

program.en: The new educational program was specifically designed to enhance critical thinking skills among secondary high school students.
program.zh: 新的教育计划是专门设计用来增强高中生批判性思维技能的。

progress.en: Significant progress has been made in renewable energy technology over the past decade across the globe.
progress.zh: 在过去十年中，全球在可再生能源技术方面取得了显著进展。

progressive.en: Progressive approaches to education that incorporate technology are transforming the way teachers deliver lessons.
progressive.zh: 融入技术的先进教育方法正在改变教师授课的方式。

prohibit.en: Many countries prohibit the use of mobile phones while driving to reduce the risk of traffic accidents.
prohibit.zh: 许多国家禁止在驾驶时使用手机，以减少交通事故的风险。

prohibit from.en: The strict dress code prohibits students from wearing casual clothing such as shorts and tank tops.
prohibit from.zh: 严格的着装规定禁止学生穿着短裤和背心等休闲服装。

project.en: The urban development project aims to create more green spaces and improve air quality in metropolitan areas.
project.zh: 这个城市发展项目旨在在大城市创造更多绿地并改善空气质量。

projector.en: During the presentation, the speaker used a projector to display detailed charts and statistical data.
projector.zh: 在演讲过程中，演讲者使用投影仪展示详细的图表和统计数据。

prolong.en: Regular exercise and a healthy diet can help prolong life expectancy and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
prolong.zh: 经常锻炼和健康饮食可以帮助延长预期寿命并降低慢性病的风险。

prolonged.en: Prolonged exposure to excessive noise can cause permanent hearing damage and various health problems.
prolonged.zh: 长时间暴露在过度噪音中可能导致永久性听力损伤和各种健康问题。

prominent.en: The conference attracted several prominent scientists who shared their research findings on climate change.
prominent.zh: 这次会议吸引了几位著名科学家，他们分享了关于气候变化的研究成果。

proposed.en: The government proposed a new policy aimed at reducing carbon emissions through stricter regulations on industrial factories.
proposed.zh: 政府提出了一项新政策，旨在通过对工业工厂实施更严格的法规来减少碳排放。

proposition.en: The proposition that technology enhances learning is supported by numerous research studies conducted worldwide.
proposition.zh: 技术能够促进学习这一观点得到了全球众多研究的支持。

prose.en: Unlike poetry, prose typically follows conventional grammatical structures and flows in a natural narrative manner.
prose.zh: 与诗歌不同，散文通常遵循传统的语法结构，以自然的方式进行叙事。

prosecute.en: The government has decided to prosecute individuals found guilty of serious environmental violations in the region.
prosecute.zh: 政府已决定起诉在该地区犯下严重环境违法行为的人。

prospect.en: The prospect of finding a well-paid job after graduation motivates many students to study harder daily.
prospect.zh: 毕业后找到高薪工作的前景激励着许多学生每天更加努力地学习。

prospective.en: Prospective employees must demonstrate both technical skills and strong interpersonal abilities during interviews.
prospective.zh: 未来的员工在面试中必须展示技术能力和良好的人际交往能力。

prospectus.en: Before enrolling, prospective students should carefully review the university's academic prospectus for detailed course information.
prospectus.zh: 在入学前，准学生应仔细阅读大学的学术招生简章以获取详细的课程信息。

prosper.en: Countries that invest heavily in renewable energy and education are likely to prosper in the coming decades.
prosper.zh: 在未来几十年，大力投资可再生能源和教育的国家可能会繁荣发展。

prosperity.en: Economic prosperity does not always correlate with increased happiness and life satisfaction among citizens.
prosperity.zh: 经济繁荣并不总是与公民幸福感和生活满意度的提高相关联。

prosperous.en: The prosperous coastal region has attracted significant foreign investment and created numerous employment opportunities.
prosperous.zh: 这个繁荣的沿海地区吸引了大量外国投资，创造了众多就业机会。

promise.en: The government made a promise to improve public transportation by investing in new infrastructure and reducing traffic congestion in major cities.
promise.zh: 政府承诺通过投资新基础设施和减少主要城市的交通拥堵来改善公共交通。

promising.en: The new technology shows promising results in reducing carbon emissions, which is crucial for future environmental sustainability plans.
promising.zh: 这项新技术在减少碳排放方面显示出有望的结果，这对未来的环境可持续性计划至关重要。

promote.en: Schools should promote healthy eating habits among children to prevent obesity and ensure better physical development during their formative years.
promote.zh: 学校应在儿童中推广健康的饮食习惯，以防止肥胖并确保他们在成长期间更好的身体发育。

promoted.en: After years of dedication and exceptional performance, she was promoted to a managerial position where she now oversees a team of twenty.
promoted.zh: 经过多年的奉献和出色表现，她被提升到管理职位，现在负责管理一个二十人的团队。

promotion.en: The marketing department launched a global promotion campaign to raise awareness about the company's new product line and expand its market share.
promotion.zh: 市场部发起了一场全球推广活动，以提高人们对该公司新产品线的认识并扩大其市场份额。

prompt.en: The government should take prompt action to address climate change before the environmental damage becomes irreversible and affects future generations.
prompt.zh: 政府应该采取迅速行动应对气候变化，以免环境损害变得不可逆转并影响后代。

prompted.en: The recent increase in pollution levels has prompted the government to implement stricter regulations on industrial emissions and vehicle usage.
prompted.zh: 最近污染水平的上升促使政府对工业排放和车辆使用实施更严格的法规。

promptly.en: Customers expect their complaints to be addressed promptly by companies, as timely responses can significantly improve overall satisfaction and brand loyalty.
promptly.zh: 客户希望公司能迅速处理他们的投诉，因为及时回复可以显著提高整体满意度和品牌忠诚度。

prone.en: Coastal areas are particularly prone to flooding during natural disasters, which is why many governments are investing in protective infrastructure.
prone.zh: 沿海地区在自然灾害期间特别容易发生洪水，这就是为什么许多政府正在投资防护基础设施。

pronoun.en: Understanding the role of pronouns is essential for improving English writing skills, as they help avoid repetition and create more coherent sentences.
pronoun.zh: 理解代词的作用对于提高英语写作能力至关重要，因为它们有助于避免重复并创建更连贯的句子。

processes.en: The manufacturing processes have been streamlined to reduce waste and increase efficiency in factories worldwide.
processes.zh: 制造业的流程已经得到简化，以减少浪费并提高全球工厂的效率。

processing.en: Data processing requires sophisticated computer systems to analyze large volumes of information quickly and accurately.
processing.zh: 数据处理需要复杂的计算机系统来快速准确地分析大量信息。

procession.en: The royal procession moved slowly through the crowded streets as citizens gathered along the route to watch.
procession.zh: 皇家车队缓缓穿过拥挤的街道，公民们沿途聚集观看。

processors.en: Modern processors can perform billions of calculations per second, fundamentally revolutionizing how we approach complex problems.
processors.zh: 现代处理器每秒可以执行数十亿次计算，从根本上改变了我们处理复杂问题的方式。

proclaim.en: The government should proclaim clear environmental policies to address pollution concerns affecting major urban areas.
proclaim.zh: 政府应该宣布明确的环境政策，以解决影响主要城市地区的污染问题。

procrastination.en: Procrastination often leads to poor time management, which negatively affects academic performance and overall productivity.
procrastination.zh: 拖延通常会导致时间管理不善，这会对学业成绩和整体生产力产生负面影响。

produce.en: Local farmers produce organic vegetables that are sold directly at community markets, supporting sustainable food systems.
produce.zh: 当地农民生产有机蔬菜，直接在社区市场销售，支持可持续粮食系统。

product.en: The new product launch was highly successful, exceeding initial sales expectations within the first quarter.
product.zh: 新产品的推出非常成功，在第一季度就超过了最初的销售预期。

production.en: Mass production of electronic devices has made technology more affordable for average consumers worldwide.
production.zh: 电子设备的大规模生产使技术对全球普通消费者来说更加负担得起。

productive.en: Implementing flexible working hours can make employees feel more trusted, resulting in a more productive and motivated workforce overall.
productive.zh: 实施灵活的工作时间可以让员工感到更受信任，从而总体上形成更高效、更有动力的劳动力。

property.en: The property market has experienced significant fluctuations over the past decade, affecting both residential and commercial sectors.
property.zh: 房地产市场在过去十年经历了重大波动，影响了住宅和商业领域。

prophet.en: Some economists have been described as prophets for accurately predicting the 2008 financial crisis before it occurred.
prophet.zh: 一些经济学家因准确预测2008年金融危机而被称为预言家。

proportion.en: A significant proportion of the national budget is allocated to education to improve the quality of teaching staff.
proportion.zh: 国家预算的很大一部分被分配给教育，以提高教学质量。

proportional.en: The voting power should be directly proportional to the population size of each region in a fair democratic system.
proportional.zh: 在公平的民主制度中，投票权应与每个地区的人口规模成正比。

proportionally.en: If the company increases its workforce, it should also increase its budget for training proportionally.
proportionally.zh: 如果公司增加员工，也应按比例增加培训预算。

proportionate.en: The punishment should be proportionate to the crime committed, ensuring that justice is served fairly and appropriately in all cases.
proportionate.zh: 惩罚应与所犯罪行相称，确保在所有案件中公平公正地伸张正义。

proportionately.en: Countries should contribute proportionately to international aid efforts based on their economic capabilities and available resources.
proportionately.zh: 各国应根据其经济能力和可用资源，按比例向国际援助工作作出贡献。

proportions.en: The problem has reached alarming proportions, requiring immediate action from governments and international organizations worldwide.
proportions.zh: 这个问题已达到惊人的规模，需要各国政府和国际组织立即采取行动。

proposal.en: The government submitted a comprehensive proposal to improve public transportation infrastructure in major urban areas across the country.
proposal.zh: 政府提交了一份全面提案，以改善全国主要城市地区的公共交通基础设施。

propose.en: Many environmental experts and scientists propose that renewable energy sources should gradually replace fossil fuels to effectively combat climate change.
propose.zh: 许多环境专家和科学家建议，应逐步用可再生能源替代化石燃料，以有效应对气候变化。

pump.en: The mechanic had to manually pump air into the tires after the machine stopped working.
pump.zh: 机器停止工作后，机械师不得不手动给轮胎充气。

pumped.en: After completing the marathon, she felt completely pumped and ready to celebrate.
pumped.zh: 跑完马拉松后，她感到浑身充满力量，准备庆祝。

pumpkin.en: In Western countries, children traditionally carve pumpkins into jack-o'-lanterns for Halloween celebrations.
pumpkin.zh: 在西方国家，孩子们传统上会在万圣节时把南瓜雕刻成杰克灯来庆祝。

punch.en: The boxer delivered a powerful punch that immediately knocked his opponent to the ground.
punch.zh: 拳击手打出了一记有力的直拳，立即将对手击倒在地。

punctual.en: Being punctual is highly valued in professional environments, as it demonstrates respect for others' time.
punctual.zh: 在职业环境中，守时是非常重要的，因为它体现了对他人时间的尊重。

punish.en: Some educators believe that teachers should not punish students for making honest mistakes.
punish.zh: 一些教育工作者认为，教师不应该因为学生犯了诚实的错误而惩罚他们。

punished.en: The company was severely punished for repeatedly violating environmental protection regulations.
punished.zh: 该公司因反复违反环境保护法规而受到严厉处罚。

pupil.en: Each pupil in the school is required to attend at least one extracurricular activity per week.
pupil.zh: 学校里的每个学生每周必须参加至少一项课外活动。

pupils.en: Teachers often encourage pupils to participate actively in class discussions to enhance their critical thinking and communication skills effectively.
pupils.zh: 老师经常鼓励学生积极参与课堂讨论，以有效地提高他们的批判性思维和沟通技巧。

puppet.en: Critics accused the new leader of being a puppet controlled by powerful business interests.
puppet.zh: 批评人士指责这位新领导人是被强大的商业利益集团控制的傀儡。

purchase.en: Many consumers prefer to purchase goods online due to the convenience and wider selection available compared to traditional stores.
purchase.zh: 许多消费者更喜欢在线购买商品，因为与传统商店相比，在线购物更方便且选择更广泛。

purchased.en: The university recently purchased new laboratory equipment to enhance students' practical learning experience significantly.
purchased.zh: 大学最近购买了新的实验室设备，以显著加强学生的实践学习体验。

purchaser.en: The purchaser should carefully examine all property documents before completing the transaction to avoid potential disputes.
purchaser.zh: 购买者应在完成交易前仔细检查所有房产文件，以避免潜在的纠纷。

purchasers.en: First-time home purchasers often face challenges navigating mortgage applications and understanding complex financial requirements.
purchasers.zh: 首次购房者经常在办理抵押贷款申请和理解复杂的财务要求时面临挑战。

purchases.en: Online purchases have increased dramatically over the past decade due to the convenience of digital shopping platforms.
purchases.zh: 由于数字购物平台的便利性，过去十年网上购物的数量急剧增加。

purchasing.en: Purchasing organic produce supports sustainable farming practices and promotes better health outcomes for consumers.
purchasing.zh: 购买有机农产品支持可持续农业实践，并促进消费者的健康。

pure.en: The remote village offers pure mountain air and scenic landscapes that attract many tourists seeking natural beauty.
pure.zh: 偏远的村庄提供纯净的山间空气和风景优美的景观，吸引许多追求自然之美的游客。

purely.en: The decision to study abroad was not purely academic; many students also seek cultural immersion and independence.
purely.zh: 出国学习的决定并非纯粹出于学术原因；许多学生也寻求文化沉浸和独立性。

purification.en: Water purification technology has improved significantly, providing communities with access to safe and clean drinking water.
purification.zh: 水净化技术已显著改善，为社区提供安全和清洁的饮用水。

purify.en: Indoor plants can naturally purify air quality by absorbing toxins and releasing oxygen into living spaces.
purify.zh: 室内植物可以通过吸收毒素并向生活空间释放氧气来自然净化空气质量。

protect.en: Strict laws are necessary to protect endangered species from illegal hunting and the destruction of their natural habitats.
protect.zh: 严格的法律对于保护濒危物种免受非法狩猎及其自然栖息地的破坏是必要的。

protection.en: The government provides strong legal protection for endangered species to prevent them from disappearing completely soon.
protection.zh: 政府为濒危物种提供强有力的法律保护，以防止它们很快完全消失。

protective.en: Parents naturally feel protective towards their children and want to ensure they grow up in a safe environment.
protective.zh: 父母对子女有自然的保护欲，希望确保他们在安全的环境中成长。

protein.en: While protein is essential for muscle growth and repair, many people consume more than their daily recommended intake.
protein.zh: 虽然蛋白质对肌肉生长和修复至关重要，但许多人的摄入量超过了每日推荐摄入量。

protest.en: Thousands of workers gathered in the city center to protest against the proposed changes to employment laws.
protest.zh: 数以千计的工人在市中心聚集，抗议拟议中的劳动法修改。

protocol.en: The research team must follow strict laboratory protocols to ensure the accuracy and reliability of their experimental results.
protocol.zh: 研究团队必须遵循严格的实验室协议，以确保实验结果的准确性和可靠性。

prototype.en: Engineers are currently testing the prototype of a new electric vehicle that could potentially revolutionise sustainable transportation.
prototype.zh: 工程师们目前正在测试一款可能彻底改变可持续交通的新型电动汽车原型。

proud.en: University graduates feel immensely proud when they receive their degrees after years of dedicated academic study.
proud.zh: 经过多年的专心学业，大学生在获得学位时会感到非常自豪。

prove.en: Scientists need to prove their hypothesis through rigorous experimentation and comprehensive data analysis before publication.
prove.zh: 科学家在发表之前，需要通过严格的实验和全面的数据分析来证明他们的假设。

proved.en: The new scientific theory proved to be fundamentally incorrect after several independent researchers conducted further experiments on the subject.
proved.zh: 在几位独立研究人员对该主题进行进一步实验后，新的科学理论被证明是根本错误的。

pushed.en: The government pushed for stricter regulations to ensure that high environmental standards were maintained across all industries.
pushed.zh: 政府推动更严格的法规，以确保所有行业都维持高的环境标准。

put.en: The university decided to put a new scholarship program in place to attract talented students.
put.zh: 这所大学决定实施一个新的奖学金项目以吸引优秀学生。

put away.en: It is wise to put away at least ten percent of your income as savings for the future.
put away.zh: 明智的做法是把至少百分之十的收入存起来以备将来使用。

put down.en: After careful consideration, the committee decided to put down their initial objections to the proposal.
put down.zh: 经过仔细考虑，委员会决定放下对提案的初步反对意见。

put forward.en: Several experts put forward recommendations to improve the current education system.
put forward.zh: 几位专家提出了改善当前教育体系的建议。

put in.en: Students who want to succeed must put in extra hours of study and practice.
put in.zh: 想要成功的学生必须投入额外的时间学习和练习。

put off.en: Many people put off making important decisions because they fear making mistakes.
put off.zh: 许多人拖延做出重要决定，因为他们害怕犯错。

put on.en: The government will put on a series of public events to celebrate the national anniversary.
put on.zh: 政府将举办一系列公共活动来庆祝国庆纪念日。

put together.en: It requires careful planning and coordination to put together a successful international conference.
put together.zh: 成功举办国际会议需要精心策划和协调配合。

put up with.en: Living in densely populated areas, residents often have to put up with traffic congestion and noise.
put up with.zh: 生活在人口密集地区，居民经常不得不忍受交通拥堵和噪音。

psychologist.en: A qualified psychologist can help individuals manage stress and develop healthier coping mechanisms for daily challenges.
psychologist.zh: 合格的心理学家可以帮助个人管理压力并为日常挑战发展更健康的应对机制。

psychology.en: Understanding human psychology is essential for modern marketers who want to influence consumer behavior effectively in competitive markets.
psychology.zh: 理解人类心理学对于想要在现代竞争市场中有效影响消费者行为的营销人员至关重要。

psychometric.en: The psychometric test is widely used by large corporations to evaluate candidates' cognitive abilities and personality traits.
psychometric.zh: 心理测量测试被大公司广泛用于评估候选人的认知能力和性格特征。

pub.en: In Britain, people often gather at a local pub after work to socialize with friends and discuss daily matters.
pub.zh: 在英国，人们经常在下班后聚集在当地酒吧与朋友社交并讨论日常事务。

public.en: The government should allocate more resources to improve public facilities such as parks, libraries, and community centers.
public.zh: 政府应该拨出更多资源来改善公共设施，如公园、图书馆和社区中心。

public health.en: Investments in public health campaigns have significantly reduced the spread of infectious diseases in developing countries.
public health.zh: 公共卫生运动的投资已大大减少了传染病在发展中国家的传播。

public transport system.en: A reliable and affordable public transport system is essential for reducing traffic congestion and environmental pollution.
public transport system.zh: 一个可靠且负担得起的公共交通系统对于减少交通拥堵和环境污染至关重要。

publication.en: The recent publication of this scientific study has sparked intense debate among experts regarding environmental policy changes.
publication.zh: 这项科学研究的最近出版引发了专家之间关于环境政策变化的激烈辩论。

publicity.en: The widespread publicity surrounding the celebrity scandal generated intense public debate about privacy and media ethics.
publicity.zh: 围绕名人丑闻的广泛报道引发了关于隐私和媒体伦理的激烈公众讨论。

publish.en: Academic researchers are under increasing pressure to publish their findings in high-impact journals to advance their careers.
publish.zh: 学术研究者面临越来越大压力，需要在高影响力期刊上发表他们的发现以推进职业发展。

purple.en: The purple flowers in the botanical garden attracted numerous visitors during the spring exhibition, creating a stunning visual display.
purple.zh: 植物园里的紫色花朵在春季展览期间吸引了众多游客，创造了迷人的视觉景观。

purpose.en: The main purpose of this essay is to examine the causes and effects of urbanization trends.
purpose.zh: 本文的主要目的是考察城市化趋势的原因和影响。

purse.en: Many tourists prefer to carry a small purse to keep their valuables safe while exploring crowded marketplaces abroad.
purse.zh: 许多游客喜欢携带小钱包，在国外逛拥挤的集市时保管贵重物品。

pursue.en: Many young professionals choose to pursue career advancement by acquiring additional qualifications and gaining practical experience.
pursue.zh: 许多年轻专业人士选择通过获取额外资格和积累实践经验来追求职业发展。

pursued.en: The detective pursued the suspect through several narrow alleyways before finally catching him near the train station.
pursued.zh: 侦探追捕嫌疑人穿过几条狭窄的小巷，最终在火车站附近将其抓获。

pursues.en: She pursues her passion for music by attending concerts regularly and practicing piano for several hours every day.
pursues.zh: 她通过定期参加音乐会和每天练习钢琴数小时来追求自己对音乐的热爱。

pursuing.en: The ambitious student is pursuing a master's degree in environmental science to directly address global climate change challenges.
pursuing.zh: 这位雄心勃勃的学生正在攻读环境科学硕士学位，以直接应对全球气候变化挑战。

pursuit.en: The pursuit of academic excellence requires dedication, discipline, and a systematic approach to learning over many years.
pursuit.zh: 追求学术卓越需要奉献精神、自律能力，以及多年来系统化的学习方法。

pursuits.en: Her various artistic pursuits include painting, sculpting, and photography, which she practices diligently during her leisure time.
pursuits.zh: 她的各种艺术追求包括绘画、雕塑和摄影，她利用业余时间勤奋练习。

push.en: Parents should encourage their children to push beyond their comfort zones in order to develop resilience and self-confidence.
push.zh: 父母应该鼓励孩子超越自己的舒适区，以培养韧性和自信心。

published.en: The research paper was published in a prestigious international journal, gaining attention from scientists worldwide.
published.zh: 这篇研究论文发表在一本著名的国际期刊上，引起了全世界科学家的关注。

publisher.en: The publisher rejected the initial proposal but offered constructive feedback on how the manuscript could be improved for future consideration.
publisher.zh: 出版商拒绝了最初的提案，但提供了建设性的反馈，说明如何改进手稿以供将来考虑。

publishers.en: Many academic publishers are shifting towards open-access models to ensure research is available to a wider audience globally.
publishers.zh: 许多学术出版商正转向开放获取模式，以确保研究成果可供全球更广泛的受众使用。

publishes.en: The prestigious university publishes a monthly magazine featuring groundbreaking research from its faculty members and notable alumni.
publishes.zh: 这所著名的大学每月出版一份杂志，介绍其教职员工和杰出校友的开创性研究成果。

publishing.en: She decided to pursue a career in publishing after gaining valuable internship experience at a leading literary agency in London.
publishing.zh: 在伦敦一家领先的文学代理公司获得宝贵的实习经验后，她决定从事出版事业。

pudding.en: Traditional sticky toffee pudding remains one of the most popular desserts in British restaurants, attracting both locals and international tourists.
pudding.zh: 传统的太妃糖布丁仍然是英国餐厅中最受欢迎的甜点之一，吸引着当地人和国际游客。

pull.en: The government needs to implement effective policies that can pull the country out of the current economic recession as soon as possible.
pull.zh: 政府需要实施有效的政策，尽快将国家从当前的经济衰退中拉出来。

pull up.en: The bus driver suddenly pulled up at the roadside when he noticed a child running dangerously close to the moving traffic.
pull up.zh: 当注意到一个孩子危险地靠近行驶中的车辆时，公交车司机突然把车停在路边。

pulled.en: The researcher pulled data from several reliable sources to ensure the accuracy of the final statistical report.
pulled.zh: 研究人员从几个可靠的来源提取数据，以确保最终统计报告的准确性。

pulse.en: Medical professionals recommend checking your pulse regularly to monitor heart health and detect any irregularities at an early stage.
pulse.zh: 医疗专业人员建议定期检查脉搏，以监测心脏健康并在早期发现任何异常情况。

rafting.en: Many tourists choose river rafting as an exciting adventure activity during their summer holidays.
rafting.zh: 许多游客在暑假期间选择激流漂流作为一项刺激的冒险活动。

rag.en: The cleaning staff used an old rag to wipe the dust off the classroom tables.
rag.zh: 清洁人员用一块旧抹布擦掉教室桌子上的灰尘。

rage.en: The manager's sudden rage at the employee was inappropriate and unprofessional.
rage.zh: 经理对员工突然发怒是不恰当的，也是不专业的。

raid.en: Police conducted a raid on the suspected drug operation early yesterday morning.
raid.zh: 警方昨天清晨对涉嫌毒品交易场所进行了突击搜查。

rail.en: Passengers must stay behind the yellow safety rail while waiting for the train.
rail.zh: 乘客在等候火车时必须站在黄色安全栏杆后面。

railroad.en: The cross-country railroad system connects major cities across the continent efficiently.
railroad.zh: 跨国铁路系统高效地连接了大陆各地的主要城市。

railway.en: Investing in a modern railway network can significantly reduce reliance on private cars and lower pollution levels.
railway.zh: 投资现代铁路网络可以显著减少对私家车的依赖并降低污染水平。

rain.en: Despite the heavy rain, the outdoor concert continued as scheduled with covered stages.
rain.zh: 尽管下大雨，室外音乐会仍在有顶棚的舞台条件下按原计划进行。

rainbow.en: After the storm passed, a beautiful rainbow appeared in the sky, attracting many photographers.
rainbow.zh: 暴风雨过后，天空出现了一道美丽的彩虹，吸引了许多摄影师。

raincoat.en: Remember to bring your raincoat when you visit the rainforest during the wet season.
raincoat.zh: 在雨季游览热带雨林时，记得带上雨衣。

question.en: Before answering any question in the reading section, I always read the passage thoroughly to understand the context.
question.zh: 在回答阅读部分的任何问题之前，我总是仔细阅读文章以理解上下文。

questionnaire.en: The researcher distributed a detailed questionnaire to gather information about students' study habits and preferences.
questionnaire.zh: 研究人员分发了详细的问卷，以收集关于学生学习习惯和偏好的信息。

queue.en: Customers had to stand in a long queue outside the store for several hours to purchase the discounted products.
queue.zh: 顾客们不得不在商店外排了几个小时的队来购买打折商品。

quick.en: A quick response from the government during natural disasters can significantly reduce the number of casualties.
quick.zh: 自然灾害期间政府的快速响应可以显著减少伤亡人数。

quickly.en: Urban areas are expanding quickly, leading to significant challenges in housing and infrastructure planning.
quickly.zh: 城市地区正在迅速扩张，导致住房和基础设施规划方面面临重大挑战。

quiet.en: Residents prefer living in quiet neighborhoods where noise pollution is minimal, allowing children to study and adults to relax after work.
quiet.zh: 居民更喜欢住在噪音污染极少的安静社区，让孩子能够学习，让成年人下班后能够放松。

quilt.en: The antique quilt displayed in the museum represents the cultural heritage and traditional craftsmanship of the region.
quilt.zh: 博物馆里展示的这床古董被子代表了该地区的文化遗产和传统工艺。

quit.en: After suffering from work-related stress for years, she made the difficult decision to quit her well-paid job.
quit.zh: 在承受了多年的工作压力后，她做出了艰难的决定辞去那份高薪工作。

quite.en: The remote village is quite isolated during winter months when heavy snow makes transportation extremely difficult.
quite.zh: 这个偏远的村庄在冬季月份相当封闭，因为大雪使交通变得极其困难。

quiver.en: Despite her nervousness during the interview, she managed to keep her voice steady without allowing it to quiver.
quiver.zh: 尽管面试时很紧张，她还是设法保持声音稳定，没有让它颤抖。

quantitative.en: The study relies on quantitative data collected through surveys and interviews to support its conclusions.
quantitative.zh: 该研究依靠通过调查和访谈收集的定量数据来支持其结论。

quantities.en: Large quantities of plastic waste are dumped into the ocean, causing severe harm to marine life.
quantities.zh: 大量塑料废物被倾倒进海洋，对海洋生物造成严重危害。

quantity.en: While quality is important, the sheer quantity of products manufactured daily is remarkable.
quantity.zh: 虽然质量很重要，但每天制造的 产品数量却相当惊人。

quarrel.en: The neighbors had a quarrel over the boundary line of their properties last week.
quarrel.zh: 上周邻居们因为房产边界线的问题发生了争吵。

quart.en: The recipe calls for a quart of milk to make the sauce properly.
quart.zh: 食谱要求加一夸脱牛奶才能正确制作酱汁。

quarter.en: Nearly a quarter of the annual budget was allocated to improving public healthcare services in the city.
quarter.zh: 几乎四分之一的年度预算被拨款用于改善该市公共卫生服务。

quay.en: The cargo ships were loaded with exported goods as they waited patiently at the quay.
quay.zh: 货船在码头等待时装载着出口货物。

queen.en: The queen addressed the nation in her annual Christmas speech delivered from the palace.
queen.zh: 女王在王宫发表的年度圣诞讲话中向全国发表讲话。

queer.en: The artist's queer interpretation of traditional themes challenged viewers' conventional perspectives.
queer.zh: 艺术家对传统主题的独特诠释挑战了观众 conventional 的视角。

quest.en: The quest for sustainable energy solutions has led to significant technological breakthroughs.
quest.zh: 对可持续能源解决方案的追求带来了重大的技术突破。

puzzle.en: The researcher was faced with the puzzle of explaining the sudden change in consumer behavior patterns.
puzzle.zh: 研究人员面临着解释消费者行为模式突然变化的难题。

puzzled.en: Many students were puzzled by the complex terminology and theoretical concepts used in the academic article.
puzzled.zh: 许多学生对学术文章中使用的复杂术语和理论概念感到困惑。

pyramid.en: In many ancient civilizations, the pyramid structure symbolized the hierarchical nature of society.
pyramid.zh: 在许多古代文明中，金字塔结构象征着社会的等级性质。

qualification.en: Having the right qualification is often the first step toward securing a desirable job in today's competitive market.
qualification.zh: 在当今竞争激烈的市场中，拥有合适的资质通常是获得理想工作的第一步。

qualifications.en: Employers increasingly value soft skills alongside traditional academic qualifications when hiring new staff.
qualifications.zh: 雇主在招聘新员工时，越来越重视软技能以及传统的学术资质。

qualified.en: Only qualified professionals should be permitted to operate complex medical equipment to ensure patient safety.
qualified.zh: 只有合格的医务人员才应被允许操作复杂的医疗设备，以确保患者安全。

qualify.en: To qualify for the scholarship, applicants must demonstrate both academic excellence and financial need.
qualify.zh: 要获得奖学金，申请人必须展示学术卓越和经济需求。

qualitative.en: The study employed qualitative research methods to gain deeper insights into participants' personal experiences.
qualitative.zh: 该研究采用定性研究方法，以更深入地了解参与者的个人经历。

quality.en: Access to quality education is essential for personal development and plays a significant role in shaping future career prospects.
quality.zh: 获得优质教育对个人发展至关重要，并在塑造未来职业前景方面发挥着重要作用。

quantify.en: Researchers found it challenging to quantify the precise impact of social media on teenagers' mental health.
quantify.zh: 研究人员发现很难量化社交媒体对青少年心理健康的准确影响。

rainfall.en: The annual rainfall in this tropical region has decreased significantly due to the prevailing effects of climate change.
rainfall.zh: 由于气候变化的普遍影响，这一热带地区的年降雨量显著减少。

rainforest.en: The destruction of the Amazon rainforest poses a significant threat to global biodiversity and climate stability.
rainforest.zh: 亚马逊雨林的破坏对全球生物多样性和气候稳定构成重大威胁。

rainforests.en: Protecting tropical rainforests is crucial because they play a vital role in regulating the global climate system.
rainforests.zh: 保护热带雨林至关重要，因为它们在调节全球气候系统方面发挥着重要作用。

rainwater.en: Harvesting rainwater is an effective strategy for addressing water scarcity in arid regions worldwide.
rainwater.zh: 收集雨水是解决全球干旱地区水资源短缺的有效策略。

raise.en: Universities should raise student awareness about mental health issues through comprehensive support programs.
raise.zh: 大学应该通过全面的支持计划提高学生对心理健康问题的认识。

raised.en: Concerns about environmental protection were raised by several members during the discussion on urban development plans.
raised.zh: 在关于城市发展计划的讨论中，几名成员提出了关于环境保护的担忧。

rake.en: Before planting the new seedlings, the gardener used a rake to clear away dead leaves and debris.
rake.zh: 在种植新苗之前，园丁用耙子清除枯叶和杂物。

rally.en: Thousands of citizens gathered to rally in support of environmental protection policies proposed by the government.
rally.zh: 数千名公民聚集起来集会，支持政府提出的环境保护政策。

random.en: Participants were selected at random to ensure the survey results accurately represented the general population.
random.zh: 参与者是随机选择的，以确保调查结果能准确代表一般人群。

ranged.en: The survey responses ranged from strongly agree to strongly disagree, showing diverse public opinions.
ranged.zh: 调查回答从强烈同意到强烈不同意不等，显示出公众意见的多样性。

quiz.en: The teacher announced that the end-of-term quiz would cover chapters one through five of the textbook.
quiz.zh: 老师宣布期末测验将涵盖教科书的第一到第五章。

quota.en: Many countries have implemented immigration quotas to manage the number of people entering their borders each year.
quota.zh: 许多国家实施了移民配额来管理每年进入其边境的人数。

quotations.en: When writing academic essays, students should include relevant quotations from authoritative sources to support their arguments.
quotations.zh: 写学术论文时，学生应包含来自权威来源的相关引文来支持他们的论点。

quote.en: If you want to quote an expert in your research paper, always provide proper citations to avoid plagiarism.
quote.zh: 如果你想在研究论文中引用专家观点，应始终提供适当的引用以避免抄袭。

rabbit.en: The study found that rabbits bred in captivity develop different behavioral patterns compared to those living in the wild.
rabbit.zh: 研究发现，在笼中饲养的兔子与野生兔子表现出不同的行为模式。

race.en: The technology race between major nations has accelerated innovation but also raised concerns regarding privacy and ethical standards recently.
race.zh: 主要国家之间的技术竞赛加速了创新，但最近也引发了对隐私和道德标准的担忧。

races.en: The horse races have been a traditional form of entertainment in British culture for centuries.
races.zh: 赛马在英国文化中一直是传统的娱乐形式，已有数百年的历史。

racial.en: Laws against racial discrimination have been strengthened in many countries to promote greater equality in society.
racial.zh: 许多国家加强了反种族歧视的法律，以促进社会更大的平等。

racism.en: Combating racism requires sustained efforts from both governments and individuals to create truly inclusive communities.
racism.zh: 打击种族主义需要政府和个人的持续努力，以创建真正包容的社区。

rack.en: The clothing rack in the store displayed a wide range of winter jackets for customers to choose from.
rack.zh: 商店里的衣架展示了一系列冬季夹克供顾客选择。

ranges.en: The price ranges from $50 to $500 depending on the quality, brand and origin of the product.
ranges.zh: 产品的价格从50美元到500美元不等，取决于质量、品牌和产地。

ranging.en: The participants, ranging from university students to retired professionals, shared diverse perspectives on healthcare reform.
ranging.zh: 参与者从大学生到退休专业人士不等，对医疗改革发表了不同的观点。

rank.en: Many sociologists argue that wealth should not rank as the sole measure of an individual's social status.
rank.zh: 许多社会学家认为，财富不应该被视为衡量个人社会地位的唯一标准。

ranked.en: The university was ranked highly due to its exceptional research output and outstanding teaching quality overall.
ranked.zh: 这所大学因其卓越的研究产出和整体的出色教学质量而排名很高。

ranking.en: The university's global ranking improved significantly after the new research funding was allocated to the science department.
ranking.zh: 在新的研究资金分配给科学系后，该大学的全球排名显著提高。

rap.en: Hip-hop and rap music have become increasingly popular among young people worldwide, influencing fashion and language.
rap.zh: 嘻哈和说唱音乐在全世界年轻人中越来越受欢迎，影响了时尚和语言。

rapid.en: The rapid advancement of artificial intelligence has raised concerns about job displacement in various industries.
rapid.zh: 人工智能的快速发展引发了各行业对失业问题的担忧。

rapidly.en: The population of the city is growing rapidly, which puts immense pressure on existing infrastructure and housing.
rapidly.zh: 该市人口正在迅速增长，这给现有基础设施和住房带来了巨大压力。

rare.en: It is becoming increasingly rare to find untouched natural habitats due to rapid urban expansion and industrial development.
rare.zh: 由于快速的城市扩张和工业发展，寻找未受破坏的自然栖息地正变得越来越罕见。

rarely.en: Governments rarely implement effective policies to address the root causes of environmental degradation and pollution.
rarely.zh: 政府很少实施有效的政策来解决环境退化和污染的根本原因。

racket.en: The neighbors complained that the construction work outside was making such a racket that they couldn't concentrate on their work at all.
racket.zh: 邻居们抱怨说外面的建筑施工发出了如此大的噪音，使他们根本无法专心工作。

radar.en: The new surveillance system operates like a radar, detecting movement and objects within a wide area with remarkable precision.
radar.zh: 新的监控系统像雷达一样运作，以卓越的精度探测大范围内的移动和物体。

radiate.en: Heat radiates from the central heating system throughout the entire building during the cold winter months.
radiate.zh: 在寒冷的冬季，热量从中央供暖系统散发到整栋建筑。

radiation.en: Scientists have warned that prolonged exposure to radiation can cause serious health problems including cancer and genetic mutations.
radiation.zh: 科学家警告说，长期暴露在辐射下可能导致严重的健康问题，包括癌症和基因突变。

radical.en: The company proposed a radical change in its marketing strategy to attract a younger demographic audience.
radical.zh: 公司提议对其营销策略进行根本性改变，以吸引更年轻的受众群体。

radically.en: The internet has radically transformed the way people access information and communicate with each other globally.
radically.zh: 互联网彻底改变了人们获取信息和与全球各地的人交流的方式。

radio.en: Many elderly people still prefer listening to the radio for news rather than relying solely on digital media platforms today.
radio.zh: 许多老年人仍然更喜欢听广播获取新闻，而不是仅仅依赖当今的数字媒体平台。

radioactive.en: The government faced criticism over the safe disposal of radioactive waste from the nuclear power plant.
radioactive.zh: 政府因核电站放射性废物的安全处理问题而受到批评。

radiocarbon.en: Archaeologists use radiocarbon dating to determine the age of ancient organic materials found at excavation sites.
radiocarbon.zh: 考古学家使用放射性碳定年法来确定挖掘现场发现的古代有机物质的年龄。

radius.en: The search party expanded their radius to ten kilometers to ensure they covered all possible areas where the hiker could be.
radius.zh: 搜救队将搜索范围扩大到十公里，以确保覆盖徒步旅行者可能所在的所有区域。

received.en: The proposal received widespread support from community members who believed it would benefit local residents greatly.
received.zh: 该提案获得了社区成员的广泛支持，他们认为这将极大地造福当地居民。

receiver.en: The telephone receiver on the old rotary phone was heavy and required effort to hold during long conversations.
receiver.zh: 那台老式旋转电话的听筒很重在长时间通话时需要用力握住。

recent.en: In recent years there has been a significant increase in the number of international students choosing to study abroad.
recent.zh: 近年来选择出国留学的国际学生数量显著增加。

recently.en: The university has recently introduced new scholarship programs to attract more talented students from developing countries.
recently.zh: 这所大学最近推出了新的奖学金项目以吸引更多来自发展中国家的优秀学生。

reception.en: The reception desk at the hotel is staffed 24 hours a day to assist guests with their needs and inquiries.
reception.zh: 酒店的前台24小时有人值班以帮助客人满足需求和解答咨询。

receptionist.en: The receptionist greeted the visitors politely and directed them to the appropriate office on the third floor.
receptionist.zh: 接待员礼貌地问候了访客并指引他们去三楼的相应办公室。

receptive.en: A receptive attitude towards new ideas and different cultures is essential for anyone planning to work abroad.
receptive.zh: 对新的想法和不同的文化持开放的态度对于计划在国外工作的人是必不可少的。

recession.en: During the global recession many companies were forced to downsize and reduce their workforce significantly.
recession.zh: 在全球经济衰退期间许多公司被迫裁员并大幅减少员工数量。

recipe.en: Following a traditional family recipe she prepared a delicious three-course meal for her guests on Sunday evening.
recipe.zh: 按照传统的家庭食谱她在周日晚上为客人准备了一顿美味的三道菜晚餐。

recipes.en: Many cooking shows share innovative recipes that combine ingredients from different culinary traditions around the world.
recipes.zh: 许多烹饪节目分享创新食谱将来自世界各地不同烹饪传统的食材结合在一起。

recipient.en: The scholarship recipient was required to submit a detailed progress report outlining their academic achievements.
recipient.zh: 奖学金获得者需要提交一份详细的进度报告，概述他们的学业成就。

reciprocal.en: The two universities established a reciprocal exchange programme allowing students to study abroad for one year.
reciprocal.zh: 这两所大学建立了一个互惠交换项目，允许学生出国学习一年。

recitation.en: The English teacher organised a poetry recitation competition to help students improve their pronunciation and confidence.
recitation.zh: 英语老师组织了一场诗歌朗诵比赛，以帮助学生提高发音和自信心。

recite.en: Candidates who can recite key definitions accurately will demonstrate a thorough understanding of the subject matter.
recite.zh: 能够准确背诵关键定义的学生将展示对该学科的深入理解。

reckless.en: Reckless construction practices have caused significant damage to historical buildings in many developing countries.
reckless.zh: 鲁莽的建筑施工方式已经对许多发展中国家的历史建筑造成了重大破坏。

reckon.en: Many climate scientists reckon that global temperatures will continue rising if emissions remain uncontrolled.
reckon.zh: 许多气候科学家认为，如果排放得不到控制，全球气温将继续上升。

recognise.en: Governments worldwide must recognise the critical importance of investing in renewable energy sources to combat global climate change effectively.
recognise.zh: 世界各国政府必须认识到投资可再生能源对于有效应对全球气候变化至关重要。

recognised.en: The importance of mental health is now widely recognised by governments and educational institutions across the developed world.
recognised.zh: 心理健康的重要性现在被发达世界的政府和教育机构广泛认可。

recognition.en: The scientist received international recognition for her groundbreaking research on renewable energy sources presented at the conference.
recognition.zh: 这位科学家因其在会议上提出的关于可再生能源的开创性研究而获得了国际认可。

recognize.en: We must recognize that effective environmental policies require collaboration between governments, businesses, and citizens.
recognize.zh: 我们必须认识到，有效的环境政策需要政府、企业和公民之间的合作。

realm.en: In the digital realm, young people are increasingly exposed to various perspectives from around the world.
realm.zh: 在数字领域，年轻人越来越容易接触到来自世界各地的不同观点。

realms.en: Social media has transformed communication across different realms, including business, education, and personal relationships.
realms.zh: 社交媒体已经改变了不同领域的交流方式，包括商业、教育和人际关系。

reap.en: Students who dedicate time to regular practice will ultimately reap the benefits of improved language proficiency.
reap.zh: 那些投入时间进行定期练习的学生最终将获得语言能力提高的好处。

rear.en: In many traditional societies, grandparents play a significant role in helping to rear the younger generation.
rear.zh: 在许多传统社会中，祖父母在帮助抚养年轻一代方面发挥着重要作用。

reasonable.en: A reasonable approach to environmental protection should balance ecological concerns with economic development.
reasonable.zh: 环境保护的合理方法应该平衡生态关切与经济发展。

reasonably.en: The cost of living in major cities can be reasonably managed with careful financial planning and budgeting.
reasonably.zh: 通过仔细的财务规划和预算，主要城市的生活成本可以得到合理的控制。

reassess.en: Governments should regularly reassess their policies to ensure they remain effective in addressing current challenges.
reassess.zh: 政府应定期重新评估其政策，以确保它们在应对当前挑战时保持有效。

reassessed.en: The value of the property was reassessed after significant improvements were made to the neighborhood.
reassessed.zh: 在社区进行了重大改善之后，房产价值被重新评估了。

reassessing.en: Many companies are currently reassessing their strategies in light of changing market conditions.
reassessing.zh: 鉴于市场条件的变化，许多公司正在重新评估其战略。

reassessment.en: A comprehensive reassessment of the education system is necessary to meet the demands of the 21st century.
reassessment.zh: 对教育系统进行全面重新评估对于满足21世纪的需求是必要的。

ray.en: A single ray of sunlight broke through the clouds, casting a golden glow over the entire valley below.
ray.zh: 一缕阳光穿透云层，在下面的整个山谷投下金色的光芒。

razor.en: The invention of the safety razor in the 20th century revolutionised personal grooming practices worldwide.
razor.zh: 20世纪安全剃须刀的发明彻底改变了全球个人护理的习惯。

reach.en: Universities should strive to reach students from diverse backgrounds to ensure equal access to higher education and promote social mobility within society.
reach.zh: 大学应努力接触来自不同背景的学生，以确保平等接受高等教育的机会并促进社会流动。

react.en: Children often react differently to stress compared to adults, requiring unique support systems to help them cope with emotional challenges effectively.
react.zh: 儿童对压力的反应往往与成人不同，需要独特的支持系统来帮助他们有效应对情感挑战。

reacted.en: The stock market reacted violently to the unexpected announcement, with prices falling dramatically within hours.
reacted.zh: 股市对这一意外的公告反应剧烈，价格在几小时内大幅下跌。

reacting.en: Instead of reacting impulsively to criticism, political leaders should take time to evaluate the merits of the argument.
reacting.zh: 政治领袖不应冲动地对批评做出反应，而应该花时间评估论点的价值。

reaction.en: The immediate reaction to the proposed urban development plan was one of strong opposition from local residents.
reaction.zh: 当地居民对拟议的城市发展计划的直接反应是强烈反对。

reactionaries.en: Throughout history, reactionaries have consistently opposed social reforms that threaten established hierarchical structures.
reactionaries.zh: 纵观历史，反动派一直反对威胁既定等级制度的社会改革。

reactionary.en: Critics argue that the education minister's policies represent a reactionary approach that undermines progressive values.
reactionary.zh: 批评者认为教育部长的政策代表了一种损害进步价值观的反动做法。

reactions.en: Chemical reactions in the atmosphere contribute to climate change, necessitating urgent international cooperation to reduce greenhouse gas emissions significantly worldwide.
reactions.zh: 大气中的化学反应导致气候变化，需要国际社会紧急合作以显著减少全球温室气体排放。

reading list.en: The professor provided a comprehensive reading list at the beginning of the semester to help students prepare for the course.
reading list.zh: 教授在学期初提供了一份全面的阅读清单，以帮助学生为课程做准备。

readinglist.en: I'll add this article to my digital readinglist for future reference and deeper research on the topic.
readinglist.zh: 我会把这篇文章添加到我的电子阅读清单中，以便将来参考和更深入地研究这个主题。

real.en: The internet has created new challenges for maintaining real social interactions in an increasingly digital world.
real.zh: 互联网在日益数字化的世界中为维持真正的社交互动带来了新的挑战。

realise.en: Many people do not realise how much plastic waste they generate until they track their consumption.
realise.zh: 许多人直到追踪自己的消耗量之前，并没有意识到他们产生了多少塑料废物。

realism.en: The artist moved away from romanticism towards realism in her later works, depicting ordinary people honestly.
realism.zh: 这位艺术家在后期作品中从浪漫主义转向现实主义，诚实地描绘普通人的生活。

realistic.en: It is important to set realistic goals when learning a new language to avoid disappointment and frustration.
realistic.zh: 学习新语言时设定现实的目标很重要，以避免失望和沮丧。

realistically.en: Realistically, most students need at least six months of dedicated study to achieve conversational fluency.
realistically.zh: 现实地说，大多数学生需要至少六个月的专心学习才能达到会话流利的水平。

reality.en: In reality, achieving a healthy work and life balance is much harder for employees than most employers publicly admit.
reality.zh: 实际上，实现健康的工作与生活平衡对员工来说比大多数雇主公开承认的要难得多。

realize.en: I did not realize how challenging the writing task would be until I actually started working on it.
realize.zh: 直到我真正开始写作任务时，我才意识到它有多困难。

really.en: The new environmental policy has really changed public attitudes towards sustainable development in the country.
really.zh: 新的环境政策真正改变了国民对可持续发展的态度。

rascal.en: The young boy in the story was depicted as a rascal who constantly played tricks on his neighbors but eventually learned important lessons about honesty.
rascal.zh: 故事里的这个小男孩被描绘成一个调皮鬼，经常捉弄邻居，但最终学会了诚实的重要性。

rat.en: The research facility uses rats to test new medications before they can be approved for human use in clinical trials.
rat.zh: 该研究机构使用老鼠来测试新药物，然后才能在临床试验中获批用于人体。

rather.en: The survey results were rather unexpected, as they contradicted the predictions made by most market analysts.
rather.zh: 调查结果相当出乎意料，因为它们与大多数市场分析师的预测相矛盾。

rather than.en: Modern education should focus on developing critical thinking skills rather than simply requiring students to memorize facts.
rather than.zh: 现代教育应该注重培养批判性思维能力，而不是简单地要求学生死记硬背。

ratio.en: The ratio of students to computers in many underfunded schools is far below the recommended international standard.
ratio.zh: 许多资金不足的学校中学生与电脑的比例远低于国际推荐标准。

rational.en: A rational approach to environmental protection requires balancing economic development with conservation efforts.
rational.zh: 理性的环境保护方法需要在经济发展与保护工作之间取得平衡。

rationally.en: Citizens should evaluate political candidates rationally by examining their policies rather than being swayed by emotional rhetoric.
rationally.zh: 公民应该理性地评估政治候选人，关注他们的政策，而不是被情绪化的言辞所左右。

rats.en: Urban planners must address the issue of rats in city centers to prevent the spread of disease among local residents.
rats.zh: 城市规划者必须解决市中心的老鼠问题，以防止疾病在当地居民中传播。

raw.en: Many developing nations rely on exporting raw materials rather than finished goods, which limits their potential for significant economic growth and stability.
raw.zh: 许多发展中国家依赖出口原材料而不是成品，这限制了它们显著经济增长和稳定的潜力。

raw materials.en: Many African countries continue to export raw materials at low prices instead of processing them domestically to create higher-value products.
raw materials.zh: 许多非洲国家继续以低价出口原材料，而不是在国内进行加工以创造更高价值的产品。

reactive.en: Children are often reactive to changes in their environment, adapting quickly when circumstances shift unexpectedly.
reactive.zh: 孩子们通常对环境变化反应灵敏，能在情况意外变化时迅速适应。

reactivity.en: The reactivity of certain chemicals requires careful handling and proper storage procedures in laboratories.
reactivity.zh: 某些化学物质的反应性需要在实验室中小心处理和适当的储存程序。

reactor.en: The government announced plans to build a new nuclear reactor to meet increasing energy demands.
reactor.zh: 政府宣布计划建造新的核反应堆以满足日益增长的能源需求。

reacts.en: She reacts calmly to stress, which makes her an excellent team leader during crisis situations.
reacts.zh: 她面对压力时反应冷静，这使她成为危机期间的出色团队领导者。

read.en: I read extensively about climate change before writing my essay on environmental policy reform.
read.zh: 在写关于环境政策改革的论文之前，我广泛阅读了有关气候变化的资料。

read about.en: I read about the new educational reforms and found the proposed changes quite innovative.
read about.zh: 我阅读了关于新教育改革的资料，发现提议的变革相当创新。

reader.en: A skilled reader can extract key information quickly and identify the author's main argument efficiently.
reader.zh: 熟练的读者能够快速提取关键信息，并有效地识别作者的主要论点。

readers.en: Modern digital platforms allow readers to access a vast array of news articles from around the world instantly on their phones.
readers.zh: 现代数字平台允许读者即时在手机上去访问来自世界各地的各种新闻文章。

readily.en: Information is readily available on the internet, making academic research much easier for students than in previous decades.
readily.zh: 信息在互联网上随处可见，使学生的学术研究比过去几十年容易得多。

reading.en: Regular reading improves vocabulary and enhances critical thinking skills essential for academic success.
reading.zh: 经常阅读能提高词汇量，并增强对学业成功至关重要的批判性思维能力。

reassure.en: The teacher tried to reassure the anxious students that the upcoming exam was not as difficult as they feared it would be.
reassure.zh: 老师试图安慰那些焦虑的学生，让他们相信即将到来的考试并没有他们担心的那么难。

reassuring.en: The doctor's reassuring words helped calm the patient's nerves significantly before the important surgical procedure began.
reassuring.zh: 医生令人安心的话语在重要外科手术开始前有效地平复了病人的紧张情绪。

rebel.en: Some young people tend to rebel against traditional values and seek alternative lifestyles that differ from their parents' expectations.
rebel.zh: 一些年轻人往往会对传统价值观产生反叛心理，寻求与父母期望不同的另类生活方式。

rebellion.en: The historical rebellion against colonial rule inspired many subsequent independence movements throughout the developing world.
rebellion.zh: 历史上反抗殖民统治的起义激发了发展中世界许多后来的独立运动。

rebuilding.en: The rebuilding of the earthquake-damaged city took several years and required substantial international aid and cooperation.
rebuilding.zh: 地震毁坏城市的重建工作耗时数年，并需要大量的国际援助与合作。

recall.en: I cannot recall the exact name of the author who wrote that influential book on environmental protection I read last year.
recall.zh: 我想不起去年读的那本有影响力的环保书籍的作者确切的名字了。

recalls.en: My grandmother often recalls her childhood spent in the countryside with great fondness and vivid detail of daily life.
recalls.zh: 我的祖母经常满怀深情地回忆她在乡下度过的童年时光，以及当时日常生活的生动细节。

recede.en: As the floodwaters began to recede, residents cautiously started returning to their homes to assess the extensive damage.
recede.zh: 随着洪水开始退去，居民们谨慎地开始返回家园评估严重的损失。

receipt.en: Always keep your purchase receipt in a safe place in case you need to return or exchange the item later.
receipt.zh: 务必将购买收据妥善保管，以防日后需要退换商品时使用。

receive.en: Students who receive scholarships are often required to maintain a minimum GPA and participate in community service activities.
receive.zh: 获得奖学金的学生通常需要保持最低平均绩点，并参与社区服务活动。

refuse.en: Many job applicants refuse to answer personal questions during interviews because they fear discrimination.
refuse.zh: 许多求职者在面试时拒绝回答个人问题，因为他们害怕受到歧视。

refused.en: The planning committee refused the construction proposal due to environmental concerns raised by local residents.
refused.zh: 规划委员会拒绝了这项建设提案，原因是当地居民提出了环境方面的担忧。

refute.en: Researchers must carefully design experiments to refute existing theories and provide stronger evidence for new ones.
refute.zh: 研究人员必须仔细设计实验来反驳现有理论，并为新理论提供更有力的证据。

regard.en: Most educators regard critical thinking skills as fundamental to student success in higher education.
regard.zh: 大多数教育工作者认为批判性思维能力是学生在高等教育中取得成功的根本。

regarded.en: Education is widely regarded as a fundamental right that should be accessible to every child regardless of background.
regarded.zh: 教育被广泛认为是一项基本权利，每个儿童都应享有，无论其背景如何。

regarding.en: The professor provided extensive feedback regarding the thesis structure and citation methods.
regarding.zh: 教授就论文结构和引用方法提供了大量反馈。

regardless.en: Many commuters continue to use their cars regardless of rising fuel prices and environmental awareness campaigns.
regardless.zh: 许多通勤者无视不断上涨的油价和环保宣传活动，继续使用私家车。

regardless of.en: Regardless of socioeconomic background, every child deserves equal access to quality education opportunities.
regardless of.zh: 无论社会和经济背景如何，每个孩子都应该享有平等获得优质教育的机会。

regenerate.en: The government plans to regenerate the abandoned industrial zone into a modern commercial district.
regenerate.zh: 政府计划将废弃的工业区重建为现代化的商业区。

regime.en: The new environmental protection regime requires all factories to reduce their carbon emissions by fifty percent.
regime.zh: 新的环境保护制度要求所有工厂将碳排放量减少百分之五十。

recorder.en: The data recorder on the weather station has been monitoring temperature changes for over a decade.
recorder.zh: 气象站的数据记录器已经监测温度变化超过十年了。

recording.en: The recording of traditional folk songs is essential for preserving intangible cultural heritage.
recording.zh: 录制传统民歌对于保护非物质文化遗产至关重要。

records.en: Historical records suggest that climate patterns have significantly influenced agricultural development.
records.zh: 历史记录表明，气候模式对农业发展产生了重大影响。

recover.en: It often takes several years for a local economy to fully recover after a significant natural disaster impacts the region.
recover.zh: 在当地经济受到重大自然灾害影响后，通常需要数年时间才能完全恢复。

recovery.en: The economic recovery following the global pandemic was slower than anticipated due to ongoing supply chain disruptions and inflation rates.
recovery.zh: 由于持续的供应链中断和通货膨胀率，全球疫情后的经济复苏比预期要慢。

recreation.en: Many urban residents believe that recreation areas should be expanded to improve quality of life.
recreation.zh: 许多城市居民认为应该扩大娱乐活动区域以提高生活质量。

recreational.en: Recreational activities such as hiking and cycling have become increasingly popular among young people.
recreational.zh: 徒步旅行和骑自行车等娱乐活动在年轻人中变得越来越受欢迎。

recruit.en: The organisation aims to recruit volunteers from diverse backgrounds to promote social inclusion.
recruit.zh: 该组织旨在招募不同背景的志愿者，以促进社会包容。

recruited.en: The research team was recruited from leading universities to investigate renewable energy solutions.
recruited.zh: 研究团队是从顶尖大学招募而来，以研究可再生能源解决方案。

recruitment.en: The recruitment process for this position includes multiple stages of assessment and interviews.
recruitment.zh: 该职位的招聘流程包括多个评估和面试阶段。

recruits.en: The company recruits graduates who demonstrate strong analytical skills and leadership potential for management positions.
recruits.zh: 公司招聘那些展现出强分析能力和领导潜力的毕业生担任管理职位。

rectangle.en: The architect designed a building with a distinctive rectangular shape that maximises the use of office space.
rectangle.zh: 建筑师设计了一座具有独特矩形形状的建筑，以最大限度地利用办公空间。

rectangular.en: The classroom features rectangular desks arranged in orderly rows to create an optimal learning environment.
rectangular.zh: 教室配备了排列整齐的矩形桌子，以创造最佳学习环境。

rectify.en: Governments must take immediate action to rectify the environmental damage caused by industrial pollution.
rectify.zh: 政府必须立即采取行动来纠正工业污染造成的环境损害。

recur.en: Similar problems tend to recur when adequate preventive measures are not implemented in time.
recur.zh: 当没有及时采取适当的预防措施时，类似的问题往往会再次发生。

recyclable.en: Many manufacturers now prioritise recyclable materials to reduce their environmental footprint.
recyclable.zh: 许多制造商现在优先使用可回收材料以减少对环境的影响。

recyclables.en: Households are encouraged to separate recyclables from general waste to improve waste management efficiency.
recyclables.zh: 鼓励家庭将可回收物与一般垃圾分开，以提高废物管理效率。

recycle.en: The local council provides special bins for residents to recycle paper, plastic and glass products.
recycle.zh: 地方议会为居民提供专用垃圾桶，以回收纸张、塑料和玻璃制品。

recycled.en: The artist created stunning sculptures using recycled materials collected from construction sites.
recycled.zh: 艺术家使用从建筑工地收集的回收材料创作了令人惊叹的雕塑。
