recycling.en: Community recycling programmes have significantly reduced the amount of waste sent to landfills over the past decade.
recycling.zh: 在过去十年中，社区回收计划大大减少了送往垃圾填埋场的废物量。

refrain.en: During the formal presentation, audience members were asked to refrain from making any comments until the Q&A session.
refrain.zh: 在正式演讲期间，观众被要求在问答环节之前不要发表任何评论。

refresh.en: Students should refresh their memory of basic concepts by reviewing notes before attending the advanced workshop.
refresh.zh: 学生应该在参加高级研讨会前通过复习笔记来更新对基本概念的记忆。

refreshment.en: After the exhausting examination period, a week of vacation provided much-needed refreshment for the exhausted students.
refreshment.zh: 在紧张的考试期结束后，一周的假期为疲惫的学生提供了急需的休整。

refreshments.en: Light refreshments will be served during the break, including tea, coffee, and a variety of pastries.
refreshments.zh: 休息期间将提供茶、咖啡和各种糕点等轻食和饮料。

refrigeration.en: The invention of refrigeration has revolutionised the way we store food and transport perishable goods over long distances.
refrigeration.zh: 冷藏技术的发明彻底改变了我们储存食物和长距离运输易腐烂商品的方式。

refrigerator.en: Most modern households rely heavily on refrigerators to preserve fresh produce and prevent food from spoiling.
refrigerator.zh: 大多数现代家庭严重依赖冰箱来保鲜农产品并防止食物变质。

refuge.en: The ancient temple served as a refuge for travellers seeking shelter from the unexpected storm.
refuge.zh: 这座古老的寺庙为寻求躲避意外风暴的旅行者提供了庇护。

refugee.en: The government has established new policies to help refugees integrate more successfully into the local community.
refugee.zh: 政府已经制定了新政策，以帮助难民更成功地融入当地社区。

refund.en: If the airline cancels your flight, you are entitled to a full refund of the ticket price within seven days.
refund.zh: 如果航空公司取消您的航班，您有权在七天内获得机票的全额退款。

refusal.en: Despite the manager's initial refusal to consider flexible working hours, the proposal was eventually approved.
refusal.zh: 尽管经理最初拒绝考虑弹性工作时间，该提案最终还是获得了批准。

reeds.en: The reeds growing along the riverbank provide a natural habitat for various bird species throughout the year.
reeds.zh: 沿河岸生长的芦苇为各种鸟类全年提供天然的栖息地。

reefs.en: Coral reefs support approximately twenty-five percent of all marine life despite covering less than one percent of the ocean.
reefs.zh: 珊瑚礁虽然只覆盖不到百分之一的海洋面积，却支撑着大约百分之二十五的海洋生物。

refectory.en: Many students prefer studying in the university refectory because it offers a comfortable and social learning environment.
refectory.zh: 许多学生喜欢在大学食堂学习，因为它提供了舒适且具社交性的学习环境。

refer.en: When writing an academic essay, students should refer to reliable sources to support their arguments effectively.
refer.zh: 在撰写学术论文时，学生应该参考可靠的资料来有效地支持他们的论点。

refer to.en: The lecturer asked students to refer to the supplementary reading materials before the next tutorial session.
refer to.zh: 讲师要求学生在下次辅导课前查阅补充阅读材料。

referee.en: The referee made a controversial decision during the football final that sparked intense debate among spectators.
referee.zh: 裁判在足球决赛中做出一个有争议的判罚，引发了观众们的激烈争论。

reference.en: Students must include a complete list of reference materials at the end of their academic essays to avoid plagiarism accusations.
reference.zh: 学生必须在学术论文末尾包含完整的参考资料列表，以避免被指控抄袭。

reference books.en: The university library maintains an extensive collection of reference books for students conducting academic research.
reference books.zh: 大学图书馆为进行学术研究的学生维护着大量参考书。

reference room.en: The reference room on the third floor provides computers and databases for students to search scholarly resources.
reference room.zh: 三楼的参考资料室为学生提供电脑和数据库，以便搜索学术资源。

references.en: Before submitting your thesis, ensure all references are formatted correctly according to the citation guidelines.
references.zh: 在提交论文之前，请确保所有参考文献都按照引用规范正确格式。

referred.en: The professor referred to several recent studies to support his argument about climate change impacts on agriculture.
referred.zh: 教授引用了几项最近的研究来支持他关于气候变化对农业影响的论点。

refine.en: Scientists must refine their experimental methods to obtain more accurate and reliable results in future studies.
refine.zh: 科学家必须改进他们的实验方法，以在未来的研究中获得更准确和可靠的结果。

refined.en: Many processed foods contain refined sugars that contribute to health problems such as obesity and diabetes.
refined.zh: 许多加工食品含有精制糖，这些糖会导致肥胖和糖尿病等健康问题。

reflect.en: A nation's cultural policies should reflect the diverse values and traditions of its multicultural society.
reflect.zh: 一个国家的文化政策应该反映其多元文化社会的多样化价值观和传统。

reflected.en: The recent decline in sales figures clearly reflected the changing consumer preferences towards more sustainable and environmentally friendly global products.
reflected.zh: 最近销售数据的下降清楚地反映了消费者偏好向更可持续和环保的全球产品的转变。

reflection.en: Self-reflection plays a crucial role in personal development and helps individuals identify areas for improvement.
reflection.zh: 自我反思在个人发展中起着至关重要的作用，并帮助个人识别需要改进的领域。

reflex.en: The body's natural reflex responses allow humans to protect themselves from sudden environmental dangers.
reflex.zh: 身体的自然反射反应使人类能够保护自己免受突然的环境危险。

reforestation.en: Reforestation efforts in damaged forest areas have significantly contributed to biodiversity conservation and carbon absorption.
reforestation.zh: 受损森林地区的重新造林工作对生物多样性保护和碳吸收做出了重大贡献。

reform.en: Educational reform is essential for adapting curricula to meet the demands of an increasingly competitive global market.
reform.zh: 教育改革对于调整课程以满足日益竞争的全球市场需求至关重要。

refraction.en: The refraction of light through a prism creates the spectrum of colors visible in a rainbow.
refraction.zh: 光通过棱镜的折射产生了彩虹中可见的光谱颜色。

recollect.en: I recollect that my grandmother used to tell stories about her childhood during the war, which fascinated me greatly.
recollect.zh: 我记得我的祖母过去常常给我讲她童年时期战争年代的故事，这让我非常着迷。

recommend.en: I would recommend that university students spend at least two hours daily practicing English to improve their speaking fluency significantly.
recommend.zh: 我建议大学生每天至少花两个小时练习英语，以显著提高他们的口语流利度。

recommended.en: Doctors strongly recommended that patients exercise regularly to improve their overall health and physical fitness levels.
recommended.zh: 医生强烈建议患者定期锻炼，以提高他们的整体健康和身体健康水平。

reconcile.en: It is often difficult for former rivals to reconcile their differences after years of bitter competition and mutual distrust.
reconcile.zh: 曾经的对手在经历多年的激烈竞争和相互不信任后，往往很难化解彼此的分歧。

reconciliation.en: The reconciliation between the two neighboring countries required many years of diplomatic negotiations and genuine mutual understanding.
reconciliation.zh: 这两个邻国之间的和解需要多年的外交谈判和真诚的相互理解。

reconstruct.en: Historians work painstakingly to reconstruct ancient civilizations by analyzing archaeological evidence and examining written records from the past.
reconstruct.zh: 历史学家通过分析考古证据和研究古代文献，煞费苦心地重建古代文明。

reconstructed.en: The historical building was carefully reconstructed using traditional materials and techniques to preserve its original architectural features.
reconstructed.zh: 这座历史建筑使用传统材料和技术进行了精心重建，以保留其原有的建筑特色。

reconstruction.en: The reconstruction of the damaged city after the earthquake took several years and required substantial international aid and funding.
reconstruction.zh: 地震后受损城市的重建工作历时数年，需要大量的国际援助和资金支持。

record.en: The researcher decided to record all experimental observations in a detailed journal to ensure the accuracy and reproducibility of results.
record.zh: 研究人员决定在一份详细的期刊中记录所有实验观察结果，以确保结果的准确性和可重复性。

recorded.en: The highest temperature ever recorded in this region was observed during the summer heatwave that occurred five years ago.
recorded.zh: 该地区曾有记录的最高气温是在五年前发生的夏季热浪期间观测到的。

red.en: The red flags raised by environmentalists have prompted the government to reconsider its environmental protection policies and allocate more resources to conservation efforts.
red.zh: 环保人士竖起的红旗促使政府重新考虑其环境保护政策，并拨出更多资源用于保护工作。

redeem.en: Many argue that education programs can help redeem young offenders by teaching them valuable skills and preparing them for future employment opportunities.
redeem.zh: 许多人认为教育项目可以通过教授他们宝贵的技能和为他们未来的就业机会做准备来帮助拯救年轻的罪犯。

redefine.en: Modern technology has forced educators to redefine their teaching methods to accommodate students' changing learning preferences and digital habits.
redefine.zh: 现代技术迫使教育工作者重新定义他们的教学方法，以适应学生不断变化的学习偏好和数字习惯。

redefined.en: The traditional boundaries between work and personal life have been redefined by the widespread adoption of smartphones and remote working arrangements.
redefined.zh: 传统的工作与个人生活界限已被智能手机的广泛采用和远程工作安排的普及重新定义。

redefining.en: E-commerce platforms are continuously redefining how retailers approach customer service, inventory management, and overall marketing strategies in modern markets.
redefining.zh: 电子商务平台正在不断重新定义零售商如何在现代市场中处理客户服务、库存管理和整体营销策略。

redevelopment.en: The ambitious redevelopment project in the city center aims to transform abandoned warehouses into modern housing complexes and vibrant shopping districts.
redevelopment.zh: 市中心雄心勃勃的重新开发项目旨在将废弃的仓库改造成现代住宅区和充满活力的购物区。

reduce.en: Companies should implement sustainable strategies to reduce their carbon footprint and protect the global environment.
reduce.zh: 公司应实施可持续战略，以减少碳足迹并保护全球环境。

reduction.en: The company announced a significant reduction in carbon emissions following the installation of new energy-efficient machinery.
reduction.zh: 在安装新的节能机器后，该公司宣布大幅减少碳排放。

redundant.en: The automation of routine administrative tasks has made many clerical positions redundant, forcing workers to acquire new skills or seek employment in different sectors.
redundant.zh: 日常行政任务的自动化使许多文书职位变得多余，迫使工人获取新技能或在不同的行业寻找就业机会。

reed.en: The reed beds along the riverbank provide essential habitats for various species of waterfowl and help filter harmful pollutants from the water supply.
reed.zh: 河岸边的芦苇床为各种水鸟提供重要的栖息地，并帮助过滤供水中的有害污染物。

reinforcement.en: Positive reinforcement is widely considered an effective method for encouraging desired behavior in children at school.
reinforcement.zh: 积极强化法被广泛认为是鼓励儿童在学校养成良好行为的有效方法。

reintroduced.en: The government recently reintroduced the ban on single-use plastics in an effort to protect the marine environment.
reintroduced.zh: 政府最近重新推出了一次性塑料禁令，以保护海洋环境。

reintroduction.en: The reintroduction of traditional crafts into the school curriculum has helped preserve cultural heritage for future generations.
reintroduction.zh: 将传统手工艺重新纳入学校课程有助于为后代保留文化遗产。

reject.en: Employers should not reject job applicants solely based on their age or gender during the recruitment process.
reject.zh: 雇主在招聘过程中不应仅仅基于年龄或性别拒绝求职者。

relapse.en: Despite receiving treatment, the patient experienced a relapse and had to return to hospital for further medical care.
relapse.zh: 尽管接受了治疗，病人还是复发了，不得不回到医院接受进一步治疗。

relate.en: It can be difficult for students to relate abstract theories to real-world situations without practical examples from their teachers.
relate.zh: 如果没有老师提供实际例子，学生很难将抽象理论与现实情况联系起来。

relate to.en: The documentary resonated with audiences because it related to their own personal experiences and struggles in daily life.
relate to.zh: 这部纪录片引起了观众的共鸣，因为它与他们在日常生活中的个人经历和挣扎有关。

related.en: Many students choose courses related to their future career prospects rather than personal interest alone.
related.zh: 许多学生选择与未来职业前景相关的课程，而不是仅仅基于个人兴趣。

relation.en: There appears to be a direct relation between the amount of time spent on social media and increased levels of anxiety among teenagers.
relation.zh: 花在社交媒体上的时间与青少年焦虑程度之间似乎存在直接关系。

relations.en: International relations play a crucial role in maintaining global peace and fostering economic cooperation between nations.
relations.zh: 国际关系在维护全球和平和促进国家间经济合作方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

regimes.en: Many authoritarian regimes have faced international criticism for human rights violations over the past decades.
regimes.zh: 许多专制政权在过去几十年里因侵犯人权而面临国际批评。

region.en: Many people in this specific region speak different languages and maintain unique cultural traditions throughout history.
region.zh: 在这个特定地区，许多人说着不同的语言，并在整个历史中保持着独特的文化传统。

regional.en: Regional economic integration has significantly boosted trade between neighboring countries in recent years.
regional.zh: 区域经济一体化近年来显著促进了邻国之间的贸易。

regionally.en: The charity organization operates regionally, providing aid to communities across different states.
regionally.zh: 这个慈善机构在区域范围内运作，为不同州的社区提供援助。

regions.en: Different regions have developed unique cultural identities shaped by their historical backgrounds and climates.
regions.zh: 不同地区由于历史背景和气候条件形成了独特的文化特征。

register.en: International students must register with the local immigration office within seven days of arrival.
register.zh: 国际学生必须在抵达后七天内向当地移民局登记。

registered.en: The property was officially registered under the new owner's name after completing all legal procedures.
registered.zh: 在完成所有法律程序后，该房产已正式登记在新业主名下。

registering.en: The university is currently registering students for the upcoming semester's language proficiency courses.
registering.zh: 这所大学目前正在为即将到来的学期的语言能力课程进行学生注册。

registers.en: The temperature in this area often registers above 35 degrees during the peak summer months.
registers.zh: 该地区在夏季高峰期的温度经常超过35度。

registrar.en: The university registrar processed over five thousand enrollment applications during the admission period.
registrar.zh: 大学注册主任在招生期间处理了五千多份入学申请。

release.en: The government announced the release of the long-awaited environmental report on pollution levels in major cities.
release.zh: 政府宣布发布了人们期待已久的关于主要城市污染水平的环境报告。

released.en: The latest statistics released by the Census Bureau indicate a significant shift in urban population demographics.
released.zh: 人口普查局发布的最新统计数据表明城市人口结构发生了显著变化。

relevance.en: Many students question the relevance of studying classical literature when they need practical job skills.
relevance.zh: 许多学生质疑学习古典文学的相关性，因为他们需要实用的工作技能。

relevant.en: Students must ensure that all academic sources cited in their essays are directly relevant to the specific topic.
relevant.zh: 学生必须确保论文中引用的所有学术来源都与特定主题直接相关。

reliability.en: The reliability of scientific findings depends heavily on the methodology and sample size used in the research.
reliability.zh: 科学发现的可靠性很大程度上取决于研究中使用的方法和样本量。

reliable.en: It is important to find reliable sources of information when writing an academic research paper for university.
reliable.zh: 在为大学撰写学术研究论文时，寻找可靠的信息来源很重要。

reliably.en: Modern technology can reliably predict weather patterns several days in advance with remarkable accuracy.
reliably.zh: 现代技术能够可靠地以显著的准确性提前几天预测天气模式。

reliance.en: The increasing reliance on digital devices has fundamentally changed how people communicate and form relationships.
reliance.zh: 对数字设备的日益依赖从根本上改变了人们的沟通方式和建立关系的方式。

reliant.en: Rural communities in developing countries remain heavily reliant on agriculture as their primary source of income.
reliant.zh: 发展中国家的农村社区仍然严重依赖农业作为主要收入来源。

relied.en: Early human civilizations relied on natural resources such as rivers and forests to meet their basic survival needs.
relied.zh: 早期人类文明依赖河流和森林等自然资源来满足基本生存需求。

relocation.en: The relocation of the company's headquarters to a new city created uncertainty among employees who worried about commuting distances and housing costs.
relocation.zh: 公司将总部迁至新城市的做法给员工带来了不确定性，他们担心通勤距离和住房成本。

reluctance.en: Despite clear evidence supporting the policy change, there remains considerable reluctance among policymakers to implement the reforms.
reluctance.zh: 尽管有明确的证据支持政策变革，政策制定者在实施改革方面仍存在相当大的抵触情绪。

reluctant.en: Young people from rural areas are often reluctant to return to their hometowns after studying in universities abroad.
reluctant.zh: 来自农村地区的年轻人在国外大学学习后，往往不愿回到自己的家乡。

rely.en: Many developing nations still rely heavily on agricultural exports to sustain their economic growth and support local populations.
rely.zh: 许多发展中国家仍然严重依赖农业出口来维持经济增长并支持当地人口。

rely on.en: Children should learn to rely on their own problem-solving abilities rather than always seeking help from teachers and parents.
rely on.zh: 孩子们应该学会依靠自己的解决问题的能力，而不是总是寻求老师和父母的帮助。

relying.en: By relying on renewable energy sources such as solar and wind power, countries can significantly reduce their carbon footprint.
relying.zh: 通过依赖太阳能和风能等可再生能源，各国可以显著减少其碳足迹。

remain.en: Although technology has transformed many aspects of daily life, the fundamental importance of face-to-face communication remains unchanged.
remain.zh: 尽管技术改变了日常生活的许多方面，但面对面交流的根本重要性仍未改变。

remainder.en: After allocating funds to healthcare and education, the government spent the remainder of the budget on infrastructure development.
remainder.zh: 在将资金分配给医疗保健和教育之后，政府将剩余预算用于基础设施建设。

remark.en: During the conference, the scientist made an interesting remark about how climate patterns have shifted over the past decade.
remark.zh: 在会议期间，这位科学家就过去十年气候模式如何变化发表了一个有趣的评论。

remarkable.en: There has been a remarkable improvement in public health standards due to advancements in medical technology.
remarkable.zh: 由于医疗技术的进步，公共卫生标准有了显著的改善。

relief.en: Many people felt a tremendous sense of relief when the government announced new policies to address the housing crisis affecting thousands of families.
relief.zh: 当政府宣布解决影响数千家庭住房危机的新政策时，许多人感到如释重负。

relies.en: The success of any business relies heavily on its ability to adapt to changing market conditions and consumer preferences.
relies.zh: 任何企业的成功在很大程度上取决于其适应不断变化的市场条件和消费者偏好的能力。

relieve.en: The new healthcare program aims to relieve the financial burden on low-income families by providing affordable medical services.
relieve.zh: 新的医疗计划旨在通过提供可负担的医疗服务来减轻低收入家庭的经济负担。

relieved.en: Students were relieved to discover that the examination results were more favorable than they had initially expected.
relieved.zh: 学生们如释重负地发现考试结果比他们最初预期的要好。

religion.en: The study of religion provides valuable insights into human behavior, cultural traditions, and the historical development of civilizations.
religion.zh: 宗教研究为了解人类行为、文化传统和文明的历史发展提供了宝贵的见解。

religious.en: In many traditional societies, religious ceremonies play a central role in marking important life events such as births and marriages.
religious.zh: 在许多传统社会中，宗教仪式在标记出生和结婚等重要人生事件中起着核心作用。

relish.en: Elderly people often relish the opportunity to share their life experiences and wisdom with younger generations.
relish.zh: 老年人通常乐于与年轻一代分享他们的人生经验和智慧。

relocate.en: Due to economic restructuring, many workers will need to relocate to different regions where new employment opportunities are available.
relocate.zh: 由于经济重组，许多工人将需要搬迁到有新的就业机会的不同地区。

relocated.en: After the factory was relocated to a suburban area, local residents complained about the increased traffic and environmental concerns.
relocated.zh: 工厂搬迁到郊区后，当地居民抱怨交通增加和环境问题。

relocating.en: Relocating to a foreign country for work requires careful consideration of cultural differences, language barriers, and family adjustments.
relocating.zh: 为了工作搬迁到外国需要仔细考虑文化差异、语言障碍和家庭适应问题。

registration.en: All prospective students must complete the online registration process for the course before the specified deadline arrives.
registration.zh: 所有准学生必须在规定截止日期之前完成课程的在线注册流程。

regret.en: I deeply regret not having studied harder for the examination when I had sufficient time available.
regret.zh: 我深感遗憾的是，在有足够时间的时候没有更加努力学习备考。

regular.en: Maintaining a regular exercise routine is essential for improving both physical health and mental well-being in the long term.
regular.zh: 保持规律的锻炼习惯对于长期改善身心健康至关重要。

regulate.en: It is necessary for authorities to regulate industrial emissions to prevent further damage to the atmosphere.
regulate.zh: 当局有必要监管工业排放，以防止对大气造成进一步损害。

regulated.en: The banking industry is heavily regulated by international standards to prevent financial crises and protect consumers.
regulated.zh: 银行业受到国际标准的严格监管，以防止金融危机并保护消费者。

regulates.en: The hormone insulin regulates blood sugar levels in the human body through a complex process of glucose management.
regulates.zh: 胰岛素激素通过复杂的葡萄糖管理过程调节人体内的血糖水平。

regulating.en: Regulating traffic flow in major cities requires careful urban planning and sophisticated technological infrastructure.
regulating.zh: 管理大城市的交通流量需要精心规划的城市设计和复杂的科技基础设施。

regulation.en: Government regulation of heavy industries is necessary to minimize environmental pollution and protect the health of local communities effectively.
regulation.zh: 政府对重工业的监管对于最大限度地减少环境污染并有效保护当地社区的健康是必要的。

regulations.en: Strict regulations govern the safety standards of pharmaceutical products to ensure consumer protection.
regulations.zh: 严格的法规规范药品的安全标准，以确保消费者得到保护。

regulator.en: The independent energy regulator monitors prices to ensure fair competition among utility companies in the market.
regulator.zh: 独立的能源监管机构监控价格，以确保市场上公用事业公司之间的公平竞争。

regulators.en: Environmental regulators have implemented stricter guidelines to control industrial pollution and protect natural ecosystems.
regulators.zh: 环境监管机构已经实施了更严格的准则来控制工业污染并保护自然生态系统。

regulatory.en: The regulatory framework for financial institutions has become increasingly complex in recent decades.
regulatory.zh: 近几十年来，金融机构监管框架变得越来越复杂。

rehabilitation.en: The rehabilitation of offenders through education and vocational training programs has proven effective in reducing recidivism rates.
rehabilitation.zh: 通过教育和职业培训项目对罪犯进行康复改造已被证明能有效降低再犯率。

rehearsal.en: Regular rehearsal of presentation skills can significantly improve students' confidence and academic performance.
rehearsal.zh: 定期排练演讲技巧能显著提高学生的信心和学业表现。

rehearsing.en: The candidates are rehearsing their responses to potential interview questions before the formal assessment begins.
rehearsing.zh: 候选人正在正式评估开始前排练他们对可能出现的面试问题的回答。

reign.en: The reign of the Tudor dynasty lasted for over a century and fundamentally shaped English political development.
reign.zh: 都铎王朝的统治持续了一个多世纪，从根本上塑造了英格兰的政治发展。

reigns.en: Uncertainty still reigns among young graduates regarding career opportunities in an increasingly competitive job market.
reigns.zh: 在竞争日益激烈的就业市场中，年轻毕业生对职业机会仍普遍感到不确定。

rein.en: The government must rein in excessive consumer spending to prevent economic instability and inflation.
rein.zh: 政府必须控制过度的消费者支出，以防止经济不稳定和通货膨胀。

reinforce.en: Schools should reinforce the importance of environmental awareness through practical conservation activities.
reinforce.zh: 学校应该通过实际的保护活动来加强环境意识的重要性。

reinforced.en: Recent scientific studies reinforced the urgent need for stronger policies to address climate change impacts.
reinforced.zh: 最近的科学研究证实了制定更有力政策以应对气候变化影响的迫切需要。

replacement.en: The replacement of traditional textbooks with digital resources has transformed how students learn in modern classrooms.
replacement.zh: 用数字资源取代传统教科书已经改变了现代课堂中学生的学习方式。

replicate.en: Researchers attempt to replicate the study's findings in different cultural contexts to validate the conclusions.
replicate.zh: 研究人员试图在不同文化背景下复制该研究的发现，以验证其结论。

replied.en: The government spokesperson replied to journalists' questions about the new environmental policy during the conference.
replied.zh: 政府发言人在会议期间回答了记者们关于新环境政策的问题。

reply.en: Candidates must craft a thoughtful reply to the examiner's questions to demonstrate strong communication skills.
reply.zh: 考生必须对考官的问题给出深思熟虑的回答，以展示强大的沟通能力。

reporter.en: The reporter interviewed several residents to understand how the new highway construction affected their daily lives.
reporter.zh: 记者采访了几位居民，以了解新高速公路建设如何影响他们的日常生活。

reporters.en: Several reporters gathered outside the courthouse, eager to cover the highly anticipated verdict of the celebrity trial.
reporters.zh: 几名记者聚集在法院外，急于报道这场备受关注的名人审判裁决。

represent.en: These figures represent the total amount of energy consumed by households, highlighting the need for more sustainable power solutions.
represent.zh: 这些数据代表了家庭消耗的能源总量，突显了对更可持续电力解决方案的需求。

representations.en: Different cultural representations in media influence how various social groups perceive themselves and others in society.
representations.zh: 媒体中不同的文化表现形式影响着各个社会群体如何看待自己和社会中的他人。

representative.en: A representative sample of the population was selected to participate in the nationwide survey on employment preferences.
representative.zh: 选取了具有代表性的人口样本参与全国就业偏好调查。

repression.en: The historical repression of free speech in certain regimes has led to long-term consequences for artistic expression.
repression.zh: 某些政权历史上对言论自由的压制已经对艺术表达产生了长期影响。

remarkably.en: The results were remarkably good, showing significant improvement in students' performance over the academic year.
remarkably.zh: 结果非常出色，显示了学生一整年表现的显著进步。

remarks.en: The professor made several insightful remarks about the importance of critical thinking in academic success.
remarks.zh: 教授对批判性思维在学业成功中的重要性发表了几点富有洞察力的评论。

remedy.en: Many people believe that education is the most effective remedy for reducing social inequality in developing countries.
remedy.zh: 许多人认为教育是减少发展中国家社会不平等的最有效方法。

remember.en: I still remember the first day of university when I felt both excited and nervous about starting a new chapter.
remember.zh: 我仍然记得大学第一天，那天我对开始新篇章既感到兴奋又紧张。

remind.en: Teachers often remind students that regular practice is essential for mastering a foreign language.
remind.zh: 教师经常提醒学生，定期练习对于掌握一门外语至关重要。

reminder.en: The deadline extension served as a helpful reminder that we should manage our time more effectively.
reminder.zh: 截止日期的延长作为一个有用的提醒，提醒我们应该更有效地管理时间。

reminding.en: She kept reminding him about the importance of submitting his assignment before the final deadline.
reminding.zh: 她不断提醒他按时提交作业的重要性。

reminiscent.en: The modern architecture of the new museum is reminiscent of traditional designs from ancient civilizations.
reminiscent.zh: 新博物馆的现代建筑风格让人联想到古代文明的设计。

remote.en: Many people choose to work from remote locations because technology allows them to stay connected with their office colleagues easily.
remote.zh: 许多人选择从远程地点工作，因为技术使他们能够轻松地与办公室同事保持联系。

removable.en: Modern electronic devices increasingly feature removable batteries, which allows consumers to replace them easily.
removable.zh: 现代电子设备越来越多地采用可拆卸电池，这让消费者可以轻松更换。

require.en: Students who wish to study abroad often require a certain level of English proficiency before admission.
require.zh: 想要出国留学的学生在入学前通常需要达到一定的英语水平。

requirement.en: The main requirement for this scholarship is that applicants demonstrate outstanding academic achievement.
requirement.zh: 这项奖学金的主要要求是申请者展现出卓越的学术成就。

requirements.en: University entrance requirements often include specific academic grades and language proficiency test scores for international applicants.
requirements.zh: 大学入学要求通常包括特定的学术成绩和国际申请者的语言能力测试分数。

requires.en: Success in any professional field requires dedication, continuous learning, and strong interpersonal skills.
requires.zh: 在任何专业领域取得成功都需要奉献精神、持续学习和强大的人际交往能力。

requiring.en: The new regulations, requiring all companies to reduce carbon emissions, have been met with mixed reactions.
requiring.zh: 要求所有公司减少碳排放的新法规引发了不同的反应。

requisite.en: Having the requisite qualifications is essential when applying for senior management positions in any organization.
requisite.zh: 具备必要的资质条件对于申请任何组织的高级管理职位都至关重要。

rescue.en: The government launched an emergency rescue operation to save residents trapped by the rising floodwaters.
rescue.zh: 政府启动了紧急救援行动，营救被上涨的洪水困住的居民。

research.en: Extensive research has shown that early childhood education has a profound impact on cognitive development.
research.zh: 大量研究表明，幼儿教育对认知发展有着深远的影响。

researcher.en: The lead researcher presented compelling evidence that suggests a strong link between diet and mental health.
researcher.zh: 首席研究员提供了令人信服的证据，表明饮食与心理健康之间存在密切联系。

researchers.en: Researchers from different countries collaborated on a study examining the effects of social media on youth.
researchers.zh: 来自不同国家的研究人员合作开展了一项研究，探讨社交媒体对年轻人的影响。

repair.en: The government needs to repair the damaged roads after the heavy rain to ensure safety for all drivers.
repair.zh: 政府需要修复大雨后受损的道路，以确保所有驾驶员的安全。

repay.en: Graduates should repay their student loans responsibly once they secure stable employment after completing their studies.
repay.zh: 毕业生在完成学业并获得稳定工作后，应该负责任地偿还学生贷款。

repeat.en: Students should not simply repeat information from textbooks but instead analyze concepts to deepen their understanding effectively.
repeat.zh: 学生不应仅仅重复教科书中的信息，而应分析概念以有效地加深理解。

repeated.en: The repeated failure of the government policy suggests that a fundamentally different approach is required to solve the issue immediately.
repeated.zh: 政府政策的反复失败表明，需要一种根本不同的方法来立即解决这个问题。

repeatedly.en: Scientists have repeatedly warned that immediate action is necessary to prevent irreversible damage to the planet's ecosystem.
repeatedly.zh: 科学家们反复警告，必须立即采取行动以防止对地球生态系统造成不可逆转的损害。

repel.en: Natural remedies such as certain herbs can repel mosquitoes, reducing the need for chemical-based insect repellents.
repel.zh: 某些草药等天然疗法可以驱蚊，减少对化学杀虫剂的需求。

repertoire.en: A versatile performer must continuously expand their repertoire to meet the diverse expectations of modern audiences worldwide.
repertoire.zh: 多才多艺的表演者必须不断扩展自己的表演曲目，以满足全球现代观众的多样化期望。

repetition.en: Academic writing requires avoiding unnecessary repetition, as it weakens arguments and diminishes the overall quality of essays.
repetition.zh: 学术写作需要避免不必要的重复，因为这会削弱论点并降低文章的整体质量。

replace.en: Electric vehicles are beginning to replace traditional petrol-powered cars as governments worldwide promote sustainable transportation options.
replace.zh: 随着世界各国政府推广可持续交通选择，电动汽车开始取代传统的汽油动力汽车。

replaced.en: The old factory was replaced by a modern shopping center, which significantly changed the local economic landscape during the last decade.
replaced.zh: 那座旧工厂被一个现代化的购物中心所取代，这在过去的十年里显著改变了当地的经济格局。

resemblance.en: There is a striking resemblance between traditional farming methods and modern sustainable agriculture in terms of resource conservation.
resemblance.zh: 传统农业方法和现代可持续农业在资源保护方面有着惊人的相似之处。

resemble.en: Urban areas increasingly resemble shopping centers as they integrate retail spaces with residential and recreational facilities.
resemble.zh: 城市地区越来越像购物中心，因为它们将零售空间与住宅和娱乐设施整合在一起。

resent.en: Many residents resent the government's decision to relocate historical monuments for urban development projects.
resent.zh: 许多居民对政府为了城市发展项目而搬迁历史遗迹的决定感到愤恨。

reservation.en: Despite my initial reservation about online education, I acknowledge its potential for reaching remote learners.
reservation.zh: 尽管我对在线教育最初持保留意见，但我承认它在帮助偏远学习者方面的潜力。

reservations.en: Some critics have raised serious reservations about the long-term environmental impact of hydraulic fracturing technology.
reservations.zh: 一些批评者对水力压裂技术对环境的长期影响表示严重保留意见。

reserve.en: The museum decided to reserve a portion of its collection for educational programs targeting underprivileged children.
reserve.zh: 博物馆决定将部分收藏品留给面向贫困儿童的教育项目。

reserves.en: Many countries maintain strategic oil reserves to protect themselves against sudden and unpredictable global price fluctuations.
reserves.zh: 许多国家维持战略石油储备，以保护自己免受突然且不可预测的全球价格波动的影响。

reservoir.en: The new reservoir will provide a reliable water supply for agricultural irrigation in the surrounding region.
reservoir.zh: 新水库将为周边地区的农业灌溉提供可靠的水源。

reside.en: According to recent census data, a significant proportion of immigrants choose to reside in metropolitan areas.
reside.zh: 根据最近的人口普查数据，相当比例的移民选择在大城市居住。

residence.en: Students are required to report any change of residence to the university administration within thirty days.
residence.zh: 学生需要在三十天内向大学管理部门报告任何住址变更。

reproach.en: The teacher reproached the students for their lack of effort on the assignment, emphasizing the importance of consistent practice.
reproach.zh: 老师责备学生们作业上缺乏努力，强调持续练习的重要性。

reproduce.en: Scientists have developed techniques to reproduce rare plant species in laboratories to prevent their extinction in the wild.
reproduce.zh: 科学家们已经开发出在实验室中繁殖稀有植物物种的技术，以防止它们在野外灭绝。

reproduction.en: The museum exhibit explained the process of reproduction in various marine organisms through detailed diagrams and interactive displays.
reproduction.zh: 博物馆展览通过详细的图表和互动展示解释了各种海洋生物的繁殖过程。

reptile.en: The reptile at the zoo attracted many visitors due to its unusual coloring and the keeper's fascinating feeding demonstrations.
reptile.zh: 动物园里的爬行动物因其不寻常的颜色和饲养员引人入胜的喂食演示吸引了许多游客。

reptiles.en: Reptiles are cold-blooded animals that rely on external heat sources to regulate their body temperature throughout the day.
reptiles.zh: 爬行动物是冷血动物，它们依靠外部热源来调节一天中的体温。

republic.en: The republic has implemented new educational policies aimed at improving literacy rates in rural and urban areas alike.
republic.zh: 该共和国实施了新的教育政策，旨在提高农村和城市地区的识字率。

republican.en: The republican candidate outlined plans for economic reform during the televised debate, focusing on job creation and tax reduction.
republican.zh: 这位共和党候选人在电视辩论中概述了经济改革计划，重点关注创造就业机会和减税。

reputation.en: The university's strong reputation for research excellence has attracted talented academics and substantial funding from international organizations.
reputation.zh: 这所大学在研究方面的卓越声誉吸引了许多才华横溢的学者和来自国际组织的大量资金。

request.en: The committee made a formal request for additional funding to support the ongoing conservation project in the national park.
request.zh: 委员会正式请求额外资金以支持国家公园正在进行的保护项目。

requests.en: The department receives numerous requests from students seeking clarification about examination procedures and grading criteria each semester.
requests.zh: 该部门每学期都会收到许多学生的请求，要求澄清考试程序和评分标准。

removal.en: The removal of outdated immigration policies has sparked intense debate among lawmakers and citizens alike, revealing deep societal divisions.
removal.zh: 过时的移民政策的废除引发了立法者和公民之间的激烈辩论，揭示了深刻的社会分歧。

removals.en: The removals industry has grown substantially in recent years, driven by increasing numbers of people relocating for work opportunities.
removals.zh: 搬迁行业近年来增长显著，主要是由越来越多因工作机会而搬迁的人推动的。

remove.en: Universities should remove barriers that prevent students from disadvantaged backgrounds accessing higher education and academic resources.
remove.zh: 大学应该消除阻碍弱势背景学生接受高等教育和学术资源的障碍。

removed.en: Once the plastic waste is completely removed from the beach, the local ecosystem can begin recovering very slowly.
removed.zh: 一旦塑料废物被完全从海滩上清除，当地生态系统才能开始非常缓慢地恢复。

removes.en: The new automated system removes the need for repetitive administrative tasks, allowing staff to focus on more complex responsibilities.
removes.zh: 新的自动化系统消除了重复性行政任务的需要，使员工能够专注于更复杂的职责。

removing.en: Removing subsidies from traditional energy sources could accelerate investment in sustainable alternatives and reduce carbon emissions significantly.
removing.zh: 取消对传统能源的补贴可以加速对可持续替代能源的投资，并显著减少碳排放。

renaissance.en: The city is experiencing a cultural renaissance, with new galleries, theatres and performance spaces revitalising previously neglected neighbourhoods.
renaissance.zh: 这座城市正在经历一场文化复兴，新的画廊、剧院和表演空间正在重振以前被忽视的社区。

render.en: Without adequate professional training, young graduates may find it difficult to render quality services to clients and stakeholders.
render.zh: 如果没有足够的专业培训，年轻的毕业生可能会发现难以向客户和利益相关者提供优质服务。

rendering.en: The rendering of historical events in some textbooks tends to oversimplify complex social and political circumstances of different eras.
rendering.zh: 一些教科书中对历史事件的阐述往往过于简化了不同时代复杂的社会和政治环境。

renew.en: Environmental groups are calling on authorities to renew their commitment to protecting endangered species and preserving natural habitats.
renew.zh: 环保组织呼吁当局重新承诺保护濒危物种和维护自然栖息地。

renewable.en: Investing in renewable energy sources like solar and wind power is crucial for reducing carbon emissions and combating climate change globally.
renewable.zh: 投资太阳能和风能等可再生能源对于减少碳排放和全球对抗气候变化至关重要。

renewed.en: After the initial setback, the team showed renewed determination to achieve their goals despite numerous challenges ahead.
renewed.zh: 初次挫折后，尽管面临诸多挑战，团队表现出实现目标的renewed决心。

renovate.en: The city council plans to renovate the old town centre to attract more tourists and boost the local economy.
renovate.zh: 市政委员会计划翻新旧城中心，以吸引更多游客并促进当地经济发展。

renown.en: The scientist gained international renown for her groundbreaking research on climate change and its devastating effects.
renown.zh: 这位科学家因其关于气候变化及其破坏性影响的开创性研究而获得国际声誉。

renowned.en: Oxford University, renowned for its academic excellence, attracts thousands of international students seeking world-class education.
renowned.zh: 以学术卓越著称的牛津大学吸引了数千名寻求世界级教育的国际学生。

rent.en: Many young professionals struggle to afford rent in major cities where housing prices continue to rise dramatically.
rent.zh: 许多年轻专业人士难以负担大城市的租金，那里的房价持续大幅上涨。

rental.en: The sharp increase in rental prices has made it increasingly difficult for low-income families to find affordable housing.
rental.zh: 租金价格的急剧上涨使低收入家庭越来越难以找到负担得起的住房。

reoccur.en: If similar problems reoccur in the future, the company will need to implement more stringent quality control measures.
reoccur.zh: 如果类似问题将来再次发生，公司将需要实施更严格的质量控制措施。

reopen.en: The museum will reopen next month after extensive renovations, showcasing new exhibits featuring ancient civilizations.
reopen.zh: 经过大规模翻新后，这座博物馆将于下月重新开放，展示以古代文明为主题的新展览。

repainted.en: The landlord had the apartment repainted in neutral colours to make it more attractive to potential tenants.
repainted.zh: 房东将公寓重新粉刷成中性色调，以使其对潜在租户更具吸引力。

restoration.en: The restoration of the historic castle cost millions of dollars but successfully preserved an important cultural landmark for future generations.
restoration.zh: 这座历史城堡的修复耗资数百万美元，但成功地为子孙后代保护了一个重要的文化地标。

restore.en: The government plans to restore the historic building to its original condition before the next festival.
restore.zh: 政府计划在下一个节日之前将这栋历史建筑恢复到其原始状态。

restored.en: The restored cathedral, featuring its original medieval architecture, now attracts thousands of tourists every year.
restored.zh: 这座修复后的大教堂保留了其中世纪原始建筑风格，如今每年吸引成千上万的游客。

restrain.en: Security forces had to restrain angry demonstrators to prevent violence from spreading to other parts of the city.
restrain.zh: 安全部队不得不控制愤怒的示威者，以防止暴力蔓延到城市的其他地区。

restraint.en: Despite public criticism, the prime minister showed considerable restraint in responding to the opposition's harsh allegations.
restraint.zh: 尽管受到公众批评，首相在回应反对派的严厉指控时表现出了相当大的克制。

restrict.en: Many developed countries restrict the use of certain pesticides to minimize damage to wildlife and human health.
restrict.zh: 许多发达国家限制使用某些杀虫剂，以减少对野生动物和人类健康的损害。

restricted.en: Access to the confidential files was restricted to senior management only, ensuring data security within the corporation.
restricted.zh: 机密文件的访问权限仅限于高级管理人员，以确保公司内的数据安全。

restricting.en: Some economists argue that restricting trade between nations could ultimately harm global economic prosperity.
restricting.zh: 一些经济学家认为，限制国家间的贸易最终可能损害全球经济繁荣。

restriction.en: The new restriction on plastic bags was introduced to reduce environmental pollution and encourage sustainable shopping habits.
restriction.zh: 这项新的塑料袋限制措施旨在减少环境污染并鼓励可持续的购物习惯。

restrictions.en: Travel restrictions during the pandemic severely impacted the tourism industry and left many hospitality workers unemployed.
restrictions.zh: 疫情期间实施的旅行限制严重影响了旅游业，并导致许多酒店业工人失业。

response.en: The government's immediate response to the economic crisis involved implementing strict regulations on financial institutions.
response.zh: 政府对经济危机的立即回应涉及对金融机构实施严格的规定。

responses.en: Different cultures have varied responses to environmental issues, reflecting their unique values and priorities.
responses.zh: 不同文化对环境问题有不同的反应，反映出他们独特的价值观和优先事项。

responsibility.en: Parents share the responsibility of teaching children basic life skills and moral values.
responsibility.zh: 父母共同承担教孩子基本生活技能和道德价值观的责任。

responsible.en: Individuals are responsible for reducing their carbon footprint by recycling and using public transportation more often.
responsible.zh: 个人有责任通过回收和更频繁地使用公共交通工具来减少碳足迹。

responsive.en: A responsive education system should adapt quickly to changing societal needs and technological advancements.
responsive.zh: 一个反应灵敏的教育体系应该能够迅速适应不断变化的社会需求和技术进步。

responsiveness.en: The responsiveness of customer service often determines whether customers remain loyal to a brand.
responsiveness.zh: 客户服务的响应速度往往决定着顾客是否会对某个品牌保持忠诚。

rest.en: After a long week of work, I usually spend Sundays at home to rest and recharge.
rest.zh: 经过一周漫长的工作后，我通常会在周日待在家里休息和恢复精力。

restaurant.en: The new restaurant in our neighborhood offers a wide variety of international cuisines.
restaurant.zh: 我们社区附近新开的餐厅提供各种国际美食。

restaurants.en: Many people enjoy exploring different restaurants to experience various cultural cuisines.
restaurants.zh: 许多人喜欢探索不同的餐厅来体验各种文化美食。

restless.en: The restless students found it difficult to concentrate during the lecture on such a hot afternoon.
restless.zh: 焦躁不安的学生们在如此炎热的下午发现很难集中注意力听讲座。

resident.en: The average resident in this metropolitan area spends approximately two hours commuting to work every day.
resident.zh: 这个都市地区的普通居民每天花费大约两个小时通勤上班。

residential.en: The new residential development includes parks, shopping facilities, and community centers for residents.
residential.zh: 新的住宅区为居民配备了公园、购物设施和社区中心。

residents.en: Local residents have expressed strong opposition to the proposed construction of a highway near their homes.
residents.zh: 当地居民对在住所附近修建高速公路的提议表示强烈反对。

resign.en: Several senior managers decided to resign after the company announced significant budget cuts.
resign.zh: 公司宣布大幅削减预算后，几位高级经理决定辞职。

resignation.en: The unexpected resignation of the team leader created uncertainty about the project's future direction.
resignation.zh: 团队负责人的意外辞职给项目的未来方向带来了不确定性。

resilience.en: The resilience of the local community was demonstrated through their rapid recovery after the natural disaster.
resilience.zh: 当地社区的韧性在自然灾害后的快速恢复中得到了体现。

resilient.en: Despite facing numerous challenges, the resilient entrepreneur managed to establish a successful business.
resilient.zh: 尽管面临诸多挑战，这位坚韧不拔的企业家还是成功创办了一家成功的企业。

resist.en: Many traditional industries continue to resist technological changes that could improve their efficiency.
resist.zh: 许多传统行业继续抵制可能提高效率的技术变革。

resistance.en: Bacteria frequently develop dangerous resistance to antibiotics when medicines are used incorrectly by patients in hospitals.
resistance.zh: 当医院里的病人不正确使用药物时，细菌经常会对抗生素产生危险的抗药性。

resistance to.en: The development of resistance to antibiotics poses a serious threat to public health systems worldwide.
resistance to.zh: 抗生素耐药性的发展对全球公共卫生系统构成了严重威胁。

resume.en: After working for two years, I decided to resume my studies at the university to complete my degree.
resume.zh: 工作两年后，我决定回到大学继续学习以完成学位。

retail.en: The retail industry has undergone significant transformation due to the rapid growth of e-commerce platforms.
retail.zh: 由于电子商务平台的快速发展，零售业经历了重大变革。

retailer.en: Traditional retailers are facing intense competition from online stores and must innovate to survive.
retailer.zh: 传统零售商正面临网店的激烈竞争，必须创新才能生存。

retain.en: It is difficult for small businesses to retain skilled employees when larger corporations offer higher salaries and better benefits.
retain.zh: 当大公司提供更高的薪水和更好的福利时，小企业很难留住熟练员工。

retention.en: Universities are increasingly concerned about student retention rates and are investing in support services.
retention.zh: 大学越来越关注学生留存率，正在投资支持服务。

retire.en: My father plans to retire at sixty-five after working for over forty years in education.
retire.zh: 我的父亲计划在教育领域工作四十多年后于六十五岁退休。

retired.en: The retired teacher volunteers at the community center every week, helping children with their homework.
retired.zh: 那位退休的教师每周在社区中心做志愿者，帮助孩子们做作业。

retirement.en: Proper financial planning is essential to ensure a comfortable and stress-free retirement for everyone.
retirement.zh: 适当的财务规划对于确保每个人都能安享舒适的退休生活至关重要。

retort.en: When the interviewer challenged her experience, she gave a confident retort that impressed the panel.
retort.zh: 当面试官质疑她的经验时，她自信地回击，给评审团留下了深刻印象。

retreat.en: After a demanding project deadline, the team went on a retreat to recharge and reflect on their goals.
retreat.zh: 在紧张的项目截止日期后，团队去度假放松并反思他们的目标。

retrieve.en: Researchers must retrieve data from various sources to support their academic arguments effectively.
retrieve.zh: 研究人员必须从各种来源检索数据，以有效地支持他们的学术论点。

retrospect.en: In retrospect, I realize that studying abroad was one of the most beneficial decisions I have made.
retrospect.zh: 回想起来，我意识到出国学习是我做出的最有益的决定之一。

return.en: Investors typically expect a significant financial return on their capital after funding the new technology development program.
return.zh: 投资者通常在资助新的技术发展计划后，期望他们的资本获得显著的财务回报。

return ticket.en: It is advisable to book a return ticket in advance to secure more affordable travel prices.
return ticket.zh: 建议提前预订返程票以获得更实惠的旅行价格。

return to.en: After a relaxing vacation, it can be difficult to return to the demanding routine of work.
return to.zh: 经过一个轻松的假期后，很难回到紧张的工作日常。

reunion.en: The family reunion brought together relatives who had not seen each other for over a decade.
reunion.zh: 这次家庭团聚让十多年未见的亲戚们聚在了一起。

reuse.en: Governments should encourage citizens to reuse plastic bags and reduce environmental pollution.
reuse.zh: 政府应该鼓励市民重复使用塑料袋，减少环境污染。

reveal.en: The archaeological discovery may reveal important information about ancient civilizations.
reveal.zh: 这一考古发现可能会揭示有关古代文明的重要信息。

revealed.en: The recent scientific study revealed that excessive sugar consumption significantly contributes to various health issues among teenagers.
revealed.zh: 最近的科学研究揭示，过量摄入糖分会导致青少年出现各种健康问题。

revelation.en: The scientific revelation about climate change has fundamentally altered how we view environmental protection.
revelation.zh: 关于气候变化的科学发现从根本上改变了我们对环境保护的看法。

resistant.en: Many bacteria have become resistant to antibiotics, posing a significant threat to global public health systems worldwide.
resistant.zh: 许多细菌已对抗生素产生耐药性，对全球公共卫生系统构成重大威胁。

resolute.en: The government remained resolute in its commitment to reduce carbon emissions despite facing strong opposition from industrial lobby groups.
resolute.zh: 尽管面临工业游说团体的强烈反对，政府仍坚定地致力于减少碳排放。

resolution.en: The United Nations General Assembly passed a resolution calling for increased international cooperation on climate change mitigation strategies.
resolution.zh: 联合国大会通过了一项决议，呼吁加强国际合作以制定气候变化缓解战略。

resolve.en: Individuals who resolve to learn new skills throughout their lives tend to adapt more successfully to changing economic circumstances.
resolve.zh: 那些决心终身学习新技能的人往往能更成功地适应不断变化的经济环境。

resonance.en: The documentary's powerful message about environmental protection had a profound resonance with audiences across different cultural backgrounds.
resonance.zh: 这部纪录片关于环境保护的有力信息在不同文化背景的观众中引起了深刻的共鸣。

resort.en: Using force should be considered a last resort when diplomatic negotiations fail to resolve the conflict.
resort.zh: 当外交谈判未能解决冲突时，使用武力应被视为最后的手段。

resource.en: Many developing countries lack the financial resources necessary to implement comprehensive healthcare and education systems nationwide.
resource.zh: 许多发展中国家缺乏在全国范围内实施全面医疗和教育体系所需的财政资源。

resourced.en: The research project was well resourced with adequate funding and access to state-of-the-art laboratory equipment and expertise.
resourced.zh: 这个研究项目获得了充足的资源，包括充足的资金和先进的实验室设备及专业知识。

resourcing.en: Effective resourcing of public libraries remains a critical issue for local authorities seeking to promote literacy and community development.
resourcing.zh: 为促进识字率和社区发展，公共图书馆的有效资源配备仍然是地方当局面临的关键问题。

respect.en: It is essential to show respect for cultural differences when traveling to foreign countries for business purposes.
respect.zh: 出国经商时，必须尊重文化差异。

restrictive.en: Some countries have restrictive immigration policies that limit the number of foreign workers entering their borders.
restrictive.zh: 一些国家实施了限制性的移民政策，限制了进入该国的外国工人数量。

restricts.en: The lack of adequate funding restricts the school's ability to provide modern facilities and resources.
restricts.zh: 资金不足限制了学校提供现代设施和资源的能力。

restructure.en: The government aims to restructure the healthcare system to ensure all citizens have access to affordable treatment.
restructure.zh: 政府打算重组医疗体系，以确保所有公民都能获得负担得起的治疗。

restructured.en: After the company was completely restructured, employee morale improved significantly and overall productivity increased.
restructured.zh: 公司完全重组后，员工士气显著提高，整体生产力也有所提升。

restructuring.en: The restructuring of the education system has faced significant opposition from teachers' unions and parents' groups.
restructuring.zh: 教育体系的重组面临着教师工会和家长团体的强烈反对。

result.en: The result of this comprehensive research will be published in a leading scientific journal next month.
result.zh: 这项综合研究的结果将于下个月发表在一份权威的科学期刊上。

result from.en: Many chronic health problems result from poor dietary habits and lack of regular physical exercise.
result from.zh: 许多慢性健康问题源于不良的饮食习惯和缺乏规律的体育锻炼。

result in.en: Uncontrolled urban expansion can result in severe environmental degradation and loss of agricultural land.
result in.zh: 不受控制的城市扩张可能导致严重的环境退化和农业用地的流失。

resultant.en: The earthquake and its resultant tsunami caused widespread destruction across coastal communities in the region.
resultant.zh: 地震及其引发的海啸对该地区沿海社区造成了大范围的破坏。

results.en: The results of the survey indicated a clear preference among students for online learning over traditional classroom instruction.
results.zh: 调查结果显示，学生明显倾向于在线学习而非传统课堂授课。

respective.en: After the lecture, students returned to their respective dormitories to prepare for the evening study session.
respective.zh: 讲座结束后，学生们返回各自的宿舍，准备晚间学习。

respectively.en: The two largest cities, Tokyo and London, reported population increases of 2.3 percent and 1.8 percent, respectively, last year.
respectively.zh: 去年，东京和伦敦这两个最大城市的人口分别增长了2.3%和1.8%。

respiratory.en: Medical experts warn that prolonged exposure to air pollution can cause serious respiratory illnesses including chronic bronchitis.
respiratory.zh: 医学专家警告说，长期暴露在空气污染中会导致严重的呼吸系统疾病，包括慢性支气管炎。

respond.en: Governments must respond quickly to emerging health crises to prevent the spread of infectious diseases globally.
respond.zh: 政府必须迅速应对新出现的健康危机，以防止传染病在全球传播。

respond to.en: Governments should respond to public concerns about climate change by implementing stricter environmental regulations.
respond to.zh: 政府应该通过实施更严格的环境法规来回应公众对气候变化的担忧。

responded.en: Almost three quarters of the respondents responded positively when asked about their satisfaction with the new curriculum.
responded.zh: 当被问及对新课程的满意度时，近四分之三的受访者给予了积极回应。

respondent.en: Each respondent was required to complete a detailed questionnaire about their daily commuting habits and preferences.
respondent.zh: 每位受访者都需要完成一份关于日常通勤习惯和偏好的详细问卷。

respondents.en: The researchers selected five hundred respondents from various socioeconomic backgrounds to ensure the survey's validity.
respondents.zh: 研究人员从不同的社会经济背景中挑选了500名受访者，以确保调查的有效性。

responding.en: By responding promptly to customer complaints, businesses can maintain their reputation and build lasting consumer trust.
responding.zh: 通过对客户投诉做出迅速回应，企业可以维护其声誉并建立持久的消费者信任。

responds.en: The human body responds to regular physical exercise by improving cardiovascular function and strengthening muscles.
responds.zh: 人体通过改善心血管功能和增强肌肉来对定期锻炼做出反应。

rewarding.en: Volunteering in the local community can be a highly rewarding experience that fosters personal growth and social connection.
rewarding.zh: 在当地社区做志愿者可能是一次非常有回报的经历，能促进个人成长和社会联系。

rheumatism.en: Elderly people suffering from rheumatism often experience difficulties with daily activities during cold weather.
rheumatism.zh: 患有风湿病的老年人在寒冷天气里经常在日常活动中遇到困难。

rhyming.en: Children who regularly participate in rhyming activities tend to develop stronger phonological awareness and literacy skills.
rhyming.zh: 定期参与押韵活动的儿童往往能培养更强的音韵意识和读写能力。

rhythm.en: The rhythm of modern life in metropolitan cities can be quite different from the more relaxed pace in rural areas.
rhythm.zh: 大都市现代生活的节奏与农村地区更为轻松的节奏可能完全不同。

rhythms.en: Many migratory birds follow natural rhythms determined by seasonal changes and daylight hours throughout the year.
rhythms.zh: 许多候鸟遵循由季节变化和日照时间决定的自然节律。

rib.en: Medical students use anatomical models to carefully study the position and function of each rib in the human body.
rib.zh: 医学生使用解剖模型来仔细研究人体每根肋骨的位置和功能。

ribbon.en: The official ribbon-cutting ceremony marked the grand opening of the new community library in our neighbourhood.
ribbon.zh: 正式的剪彩仪式标志着我们社区新图书馆的盛大开业。

rice.en: Rice cultivation has been a fundamental agricultural practice in many Asian countries for thousands of years.
rice.zh: 水稻种植几千年来一直是许多亚洲国家的基本农业实践。

rich.en: The coastal region is rich in natural resources, including abundant fisheries and valuable mineral deposits.
rich.zh: 沿海地区自然资源丰富，包括丰富的渔业和宝贵的矿藏。

rid.en: The government launched a new initiative to help the community get rid of air pollution caused by factories.
rid.zh: 政府启动了一项新举措，帮助社区清除工厂造成的空气污染。

rigorous.en: The rigorous research methodology required extensive data collection and careful analysis of multiple sources.
rigorous.zh: 严谨的研究方法需要广泛的数据收集和对多个来源的仔细分析。

rim.en: The cup was filled to the rim with coffee, threatening to spill over at the slightest movement.
rim.zh: 杯子里的咖啡满到杯沿,稍有移动就会溢出来。

ring.en: The sudden ring of the alarm clock disrupted my sleep, preventing me from getting sufficient rest required before the important examination.
ring.zh: 闹钟突然响起扰乱了我的睡眠，防止我在重要考试前获得足够的休息。

ringing.en: The constant ringing in his ears after the concert was a warning sign of potential hearing damage.
ringing.zh: 演唱会后持续的耳鸣是潜在听力损伤的警告信号。

rink.en: Many students enjoy spending their leisure time at the ice rink, where they can practice skating.
rink.zh: 许多学生喜欢在冰场度过休闲时光,在那里他们可以练习滑冰。

riot.en: Historical records indicate that economic hardship often triggered riots among the working-class population.
riot.zh: 历史记录表明,经济困难经常引发工人阶级的骚乱。

rip.en: The strong wind caused the tent to rip open, leaving the campers exposed to the heavy rain.
rip.zh: 强风导致帐篷撕裂,露营者暴露在暴雨中。

ripe.en: The tomatoes are now ripe enough to harvest, and farmers are preparing for the autumn collection.
ripe.zh: 番茄现在已经成熟可以收获了,农民们正在准备秋季的采摘工作。

rise.en: The rise in university tuition fees has sparked widespread debate among students and their families.
rise.zh: 大学学费的上涨引发了学生及其家人的广泛讨论。

risk.en: Young people who take risks often discover their true potential through challenging experiences.
risk.zh: 敢于冒险的年轻人往往通过挑战性经历发现自己的真正潜力。

risky.en: The risky investment strategy proved disastrous when the market crashed unexpectedly and investors lost millions.
risky.zh: 冒险的投资策略在市场意外崩盘时被证明是灾难性的，投资者损失了数百万美元。

ritual.en: Many families maintain the ritual of gathering for dinner together every Sunday evening to strengthen family bonds.
ritual.zh: 许多家庭保持着每周日晚上聚餐的惯例，以加强家庭纽带。

rival.en: The company launched a new product to compete directly with its main rival in the increasingly saturated global market.
rival.zh: 该公司推出了一款新产品，旨在与日益饱和的全球市场中的主要竞争对手直接竞争。

rivals.en: In the modern business world, companies often view their competitors as direct rivals in the global market.
rivals.zh: 在现代商业世界中，公司经常将竞争对手视为全球市场中的直接竞争者。

river.en: The river flows through the heart of the ancient city, providing essential water for agriculture and transportation.
river.zh: 这条河流经古城的中心，为农业和交通运输提供重要的水源。

riverside.en: Tourists frequently enjoy walking along the picturesque riverside and taking photographs of the scenic landscape.
riverside.zh: 游客们经常喜欢沿着风景如画的河畔散步，拍摄风景如画的美景照片。

road.en: Construction of the new road has significantly reduced travel time between the capital and the coastal regions.
road.zh: 新道路的建设大大缩短了首都和沿海地区之间的旅行时间。

roads.en: The severe winter storms made the mountain roads extremely dangerous and caused numerous traffic accidents.
roads.zh: 严重的冬季暴风雪使山区道路变得极其危险，并导致了众多交通事故。

roaming.en: With roaming charges eliminated, travellers can now use their mobile phones abroad without worrying about high costs.
roaming.zh: 随着漫游费的取消，旅行者现在可以在国外使用手机而无需担心高额费用。

roar.en: The sudden roar of the lion echoed through the safari park, startling tourists who were nearby.
roar.zh: 突然响起的狮子吼声回荡在野生动物园里，吓到了附近的游客。

revenge.en: Many people believe that seeking revenge tends to perpetuate cycles of violence rather than resolve underlying conflicts.
revenge.zh: 许多人认为寻求报复往往会延续暴力循环，而不是解决潜在的冲突。

revenue.en: The government plans to increase tax revenue by implementing new fiscal policies to support public services.
revenue.zh: 政府计划通过实施新的财政政策来增加税收，以支持公共服务。

revenues.en: Declining revenues from tourism have forced many local businesses to close permanently in recent years.
revenues.zh: 旅游业收入下降，迫使许多当地企业在近年来永久关闭。

reverse.en: Governments must take immediate action to reverse the trend of declining biodiversity in protected natural regions.
reverse.zh: 政府必须立即采取行动，扭转受保护自然区域生物多样性下降的趋势。

revert.en: If the contract expires without renewal, the property rights will revert to the original owner automatically.
revert.zh: 如果合同到期而没有续签，产权将自动归还给原所有者。

revert to.en: When children revert to bad habits during stressful periods, parents should address the root causes patiently.
revert to.zh: 当孩子在压力时期恢复坏习惯时，父母应该耐心处理根本原因。

review.en: The committee decided to review the proposed legislation before implementing any significant changes to the law.
review.zh: 委员会决定在实施任何重大法律变革之前审查拟议的立法。

reviews.en: Online reviews have become a powerful factor influencing consumer purchasing decisions in modern society.
reviews.zh: 在线评论已成为影响现代社会中消费者购买决策的一个强大因素。

revise.en: Authors often revise their manuscripts multiple times before submitting them for final publication consideration.
revise.zh: 作者在提交最终出版考虑之前，通常会多次修改手稿。

revising.en: Revising the entire proposal took longer than expected because new data required significant structural changes.
revising.zh: 修改整个提案花费的时间比预期的要长，因为新数据需要重大的结构变更。

riddle.en: The scientist presented a riddle about climate patterns, challenging students to deduce the answer using logical reasoning.
riddle.zh: 科学家提出了一个关于气候模式的谜题，挑战学生们用逻辑推理来推断答案。

ride.en: During my trip to London, I took a ride on the famous double-decker bus to explore the city.
ride.zh: 在伦敦旅行期间，我乘坐了著名的双层巴士来游览这座城市。

ridge.en: The hiking trail led us along a steep ridge, offering breathtaking views of the surrounding mountain range.
ridge.zh: 徒步路线沿着陡峭的山脊前行，提供了周围山脉的壮丽景色。

ridiculous.en: Some people think it is ridiculous to spend so much money on space exploration when global poverty exists.
ridiculous.zh: 有些人认为在存在全球贫困的情况下，花费这么多钱进行太空探索是荒谬的。

riding.en: Riding a bicycle to work is considered a healthy way to reduce daily carbon emissions significantly.
riding.zh: 骑自行车上班被认为是一种显著减少日常碳排放的健康方式。

rifle.en: The museum's new exhibition features historical rifles from the 18th century, demonstrating the evolution of firearms.
rifle.zh: 博物馆的新展览展示了18世纪的历史步枪，展示了对火器的演变。

rigging.en: The crew carefully checked the rigging on the stage before the theatrical performance began.
rigging.zh: 在戏剧表演开始前，工作人员仔细检查了舞台上的索具。

right.en: The researcher was right to question the validity of the outdated study methods used in the experiment.
right.zh: 研究者质疑实验中使用的过时研究方法的正确性是正确的。

right now.en: Right now, many universities are adapting their teaching methods to accommodate online learning platforms.
right now.zh: 现在，许多大学正在调整教学方法以适应在线学习平台。

rigid.en: Some argue that rigid examination systems fail to assess students' true creative abilities and problem-solving skills.
rigid.zh: 一些人认为僵化的考试制度无法评估学生真正的创造力和解决问题的能力。

rocks.en: The ancient rocks contain valuable minerals that geologists study to understand the Earth's formation over millions of years.
rocks.zh: 古代岩石含有有价值的矿物质，地质学家研究这些矿物质以了解地球数百万年来的形成过程。

rod.en: The fishing rod broke unexpectedly while he was trying to catch salmon in the fast-flowing river.
rod.zh: 当他在湍急的河流中试图捕捉鲑鱼时，钓鱼竿意外地断了。

role.en: Teachers play a vital role in shaping students' critical thinking skills and intellectual development.
role.zh: 教师在培养学生批判性思维能力和智力发展方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

roles.en: Traditional gender roles in the workplace have been gradually evolving with increasing awareness of equality.
roles.zh: 工作场所的传统性别角色随着平等意识的增强而逐渐发生变化。

roll.en: The ball continued to roll across the field until it finally stopped near the goal post.
roll.zh: 球继续滚过球场，直到最后停在球门柱附近。

rollers.en: Paint rollers are more efficient than brushes for covering large surface areas like walls and ceilings.
rollers.zh: 对于覆盖墙壁和天花板等大面积区域来说，油漆滚筒比刷子更有效。

rolls.en: The bakery is famous for its freshly baked rolls that attract customers from every corner of the neighbourhood.
rolls.zh: 这家面包店以其新鲜出炉的小面包卷而闻名，吸引了来自社区各个角落的顾客。

roman.en: The ancient Roman architecture influenced many modern buildings, showcasing durable engineering techniques and grand aesthetic designs.
roman.zh: 古罗马建筑影响了许多现代建筑，展示了耐久的工程技术和宏大的美学设计。

romance.en: Many tourists visit Venice to experience the romance that the city has been famous for throughout history.
romance.zh: 许多游客来到威尼斯体验这座城市历史上闻名的浪漫氛围。

romantic.en: Couples often prefer romantic settings with candlelit dinners for celebrating important anniversaries together.
romantic.zh: 情侣们经常选择有烛光晚餐的浪漫环境来一起庆祝重要的纪念日。

revisions.en: After several revisions, the manuscript was finally accepted for publication by the academic journal.
revisions.zh: 经过多次修改后，这篇手稿终于被学术期刊接受发表。

revival.en: The revival of traditional crafts has created new employment opportunities in rural communities across the country.
revival.zh: 传统工艺的复兴为全国各地的农村社区创造了新的就业机会。

revive.en: The government introduced new policies to revive the declining manufacturing sector and boost economic growth.
revive.zh: 政府推出了新政策来重振衰退的制造业并促进经济增长。

revolt.en: Historical records show that peasants' revolt against unfair taxation eventually led to significant political reforms.
revolt.zh: 历史记录表明，农民对不公平税收的反抗最终导致了重大的政治改革。

revolution.en: The digital revolution has transformed how individuals communicate, allowing instant connection across vast geographical distances without significant cost.
revolution.zh: 数字革命改变了个人的沟通方式，允许在不产生重大成本的情况下跨越广阔的地理距离进行即时连接。

revolutionary.en: Einstein's revolutionary theories fundamentally changed our understanding of physics and the nature of the universe.
revolutionary.zh: 爱因斯坦的革命性理论从根本上改变了我们对物理和宇宙本质的理解。

revolutionised.en: The internet has revolutionised education by making knowledge accessible to millions of students worldwide.
revolutionised.zh: 互联网通过让全球数百万学生能够获取知识，彻底改变了教育。

revolve.en: Many traditional economies revolve around agriculture and seasonal cycles of planting and harvesting crops.
revolve.zh: 许多传统经济以农业为中心，围绕着种植和收获农作物的季节周期运转。

revolves.en: A successful marketing campaign revolves around understanding the target audience and their purchasing behaviours.
revolves.zh: 一个成功的营销活动核心在于了解目标受众及其购买行为。

reward.en: Students who demonstrate consistent effort and dedication are more likely to receive academic rewards and recognition.
reward.zh: 表现出持续努力和奉献精神的学生更有可能获得学业奖励和认可。

roast.en: The family gathered around the table to enjoy a traditional Sunday roast with all the trimmings and fresh vegetables.
roast.zh: 全家人围坐在桌旁享用配有各色配菜的传统周日烤肉。

roasting.en: The roasting of coffee beans is a delicate process that significantly affects the final flavor and aroma of the drink.
roasting.zh: 咖啡豆的烘焙是一个精细的过程，会显著影响最终饮品的口味和香气。

rob.en: Police are warning citizens to remain vigilant as thieves continue to rob shops and businesses in the city centre.
rob.zh: 警方警告市民保持警惕，因为小偷继续在市中心抢劫商店和企业。

robbery.en: The bank robbery last night resulted in extensive damage to the building and frightened several customers who were inside.
robbery.zh: 昨晚的银行抢劫案导致建筑物遭受大面积损坏，吓坏了在里面的几名顾客。

robe.en: In many cultures, the traditional robe is worn during ceremonial occasions to signify respect and cultural identity.
robe.zh: 在许多文化中，传统长袍在仪式场合穿着，以表示尊重和文化身份认同。

robot.en: Many factories now utilize advanced robots to automate repetitive tasks, significantly increasing production efficiency while reducing human error rates.
robot.zh: 许多工厂现在利用先进的机器人来自动化重复性任务，显著提高了生产效率，同时降低了人为错误率。

robotic.en: Many employees expressed concerns about the increasing use of robotic systems in the workplace and its impact on job security.
robotic.zh: 许多员工表达了对工作场所日益使用机器人系统的担忧，以及这对工作保障的影响。

robust.en: A robust economy requires careful planning, investment in infrastructure, and policies that support sustainable growth.
robust.zh: 一个稳健的经济需要谨慎的规划、基础设施投资以及支持可持续增长的政策。

rock.en: Despite facing numerous challenges, the country's rock music scene has continued to thrive and attract international audiences.
rock.zh: 尽管面临众多挑战，这个国家的摇滚乐坛仍在继续蓬勃发展并吸引国际观众。

rocket.en: Housing prices in the capital city have rocketed in recent years, making it increasingly difficult for young people to buy property.
rocket.zh: 首都的房价近年来飞速上涨，使年轻人买房变得越来越困难。

rotate.en: The committee members rotate their responsibilities every six months to ensure fairness and fresh perspectives.
rotate.zh: 委员会成员每六个月轮换一次职责，以确保公平并带来新的视角。

rotating.en: The rotating display in the museum showcases different artifacts each week, attracting repeat visitors.
rotating.zh: 博物馆的旋转展品每周展示不同的文物，吸引了回头客。

rotation.en: The rotation of seasons significantly affects agricultural cycles and food production worldwide.
rotation.zh: 季节的更替显著影响着全球的农业周期和粮食生产。

rotten.en: The rotten smell emanating from the kitchen indicated that the food had been left out too long.
rotten.zh: 从厨房散发出的腐烂气味表明食物放得太久了。

rough.en: The rough terrain of the mountainous region made it difficult for researchers to conduct their fieldwork.
rough.zh: 山区粗糙的地形使研究人员难以进行野外工作。

roughly.en: The total budget for the construction project is roughly estimated at five million dollars currently.
roughly.zh: 该建设项目的总预算目前大致估计为五百万美元。

round.en: After a lengthy round of negotiations, the representatives finally reached an agreement on the terms of the international trade deal.
round.zh: 经过一轮漫长的谈判，代表们终于就国际贸易协议的条款达成了共识。

round trip.en: A round trip ticket to London costs significantly less than two one-way tickets purchased separately.
round trip.zh: 往返伦敦的机票比单独购买两张单程票要便宜得多。

rouse.en: The sudden noise was enough to rouse the sleeping students from their afternoon nap.
rouse.zh: 突如其来的噪音足以把正在午睡的学生惊醒。

route.en: Choosing the most efficient route for public transportation requires careful planning to minimize traffic congestion and reduce carbon emissions.
route.zh: 选择最有效的公共交通路线需要仔细规划，以最大限度地减少交通拥堵并减少碳排放。

routine.en: Establishing a consistent daily routine helps individuals manage their time effectively and reduces stress levels associated with unpredictable work schedules.
routine.zh: 建立一致的日常惯例有助于个人有效地管理时间，并减少与不可预测的工作时间表相关的压力水平。

row.en: The students were asked to sit in a neat row while waiting for the examination to begin.
row.zh: 学生们被要求在等待考试开始时整齐地坐成一排。

royal.en: The royal family plays a ceremonial role in the constitutional monarchy, representing national unity during official state events.
royal.zh: 皇室在君主立宪制中扮演礼仪角色，在官方国家活动期间代表国家团结。

royalty.en: Many musicians earn a substantial income from royalty payments when their songs are played on the radio.
royalty.zh: 许多音乐人在他们的歌曲在电台播放时能从版税中获得可观的收入。

rub.en: If you accidentally rub your eyes with dirty hands, you may introduce bacteria and cause an infection.
rub.zh: 如果你不小心用脏手揉眼睛，可能会带入细菌并导致感染。

rubber.en: Rubber trees are primarily cultivated in tropical regions where the climate is warm and humid throughout the year.
rubber.zh: 橡胶树主要在全年气候温暖潮湿的热带地区种植。

rubbish.en: The local council has introduced new recycling schemes to reduce the amount of rubbish sent to landfills.
rubbish.zh: 地方议会推出了新的回收计划，以减少送往填埋场的垃圾量。

rude.en: It is considered extremely rude to speak loudly on your mobile phone in public places such as libraries.
rude.zh: 在图书馆等公共场所大声接听手机被认为是极其无礼的行为。

ruin.en: The financial scandal threatened to ruin his professional reputation and destroy his career completely.
ruin.zh: 这起金融丑闻威胁要毁掉他的职业声誉，彻底摧毁他的事业。

ruins.en: The ancient Roman ruins attract millions of tourists every year who are fascinated by the historical architecture.
ruins.zh: 古罗马遗迹每年吸引数百万对历史建筑着迷的游客前来参观。

salty.en: The salty taste of the ocean air made the fresh cookies less appealing during our coastal hike.
salty.zh: 海岸徒步时，海洋空气的咸味让新鲜饼干变得不那么吸引人了。

salute.en: The soldiers stood in perfect formation to salute the national flag during the official ceremony.
salute.zh: 在正式仪式上，士兵们站成完美的队列向国旗敬礼。

salvation.en: Many people find salvation from modern stress through regular meditation and mindfulness practices.
salvation.zh: 许多人通过定期冥想和正念练习来寻找摆脱现代压力的救赎之道。

same.en: Despite coming from different cultural backgrounds, the students shared the same passion for academic excellence.
same.zh: 尽管来自不同的文化背景，学生们对学术卓越有着相同的热情。

sample.en: The researcher collected a sample of water from the river to analyze its chemical composition.
sample.zh: 研究员从河中采集了一个水样来分析其化学成分。

samples.en: In scientific experiments, it is crucial to ensure that all collected samples represent the population accurately.
samples.zh: 在科学实验中，确保所有收集的样本准确地代表总体是至关重要的。

sanction.en: The international community decided to impose economic sanctions to pressure the government to change its policies.
sanction.zh: 国际社会决定实施经济制裁，向政府施压以迫使其改变政策。

sanctuary.en: The wildlife sanctuary provides a protected habitat for endangered species to thrive and reproduce safely.
sanctuary.zh: 野生动物保护区为濒危物种提供受保护的栖息地，使其能够安全地繁衍生息。

sand.en: Children enjoyed building elaborate sandcastles on the beach during their summer vacation with great enthusiasm.
sand.zh: 孩子们在暑假期间以极大的热情在海滩上建造复杂的沙堡。

sandbanks.en: Sailors must carefully navigate around the dangerous sandbanks to avoid running their boats aground.
sandbanks.zh: 水手们必须小心地在危险的沙洲周围航行，以避免船只搁浅。

rule.en: The fundamental rule of academic writing is to support your arguments with credible evidence and logical reasoning.
rule.zh: 学术写作的基本规则是用可信的证据和逻辑推理来支持你的论点。

ruler.en: The ancient ruler was respected for implementing policies that significantly improved living standards of ordinary citizens.
ruler.zh: 这位古代统治者因实施显著改善普通公民生活水平的政策而受到尊敬。

rules.en: Strict traffic rules have been proven effective in reducing accidents and ensuring the safety of all road users.
rules.zh: 严格的交通规则已被证明能有效减少事故并确保所有道路使用者的安全。

rumor.en: The rumor about the university increasing tuition fees spread quickly among students, causing widespread concern.
rumor.zh: 关于大学提高学费的传言在学生中迅速传播，引起了广泛关注。

run.en: The charity organization runs on donations from the public and depends heavily on the generosity of supporters.
run.zh: 这个慈善组织依靠公众捐款运营，严重依赖支持者的慷慨解囊。

run out of.en: Many developing countries are running out of clean water resources due to increasing population and pollution.
run out of.zh: 许多发展中国家由于人口增长和污染，正面临清洁水资源枯竭的困境。

running.en: Regular running has been shown to improve cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of chronic diseases.
running.zh: 经常跑步已被证明能改善心血管健康并降低慢性病的风险。

runway.en: The new runway at the international airport has significantly increased the capacity for handling large aircraft.
runway.zh: 国际机场的新跑道大大增加了处理大型飞机的能力。

rural.en: Many young people are migrating from rural areas to cities to find better employment opportunities.
rural.zh: 许多年轻人正从农村地区迁移到城市以寻找更好的就业机会。

rural areas.en: The government is investing heavily in infrastructure development in rural areas to reduce urban-rural inequalities.
rural areas.zh: 政府正在大力投资农村地区的基础设施建设，以减少城乡差距。

roof.en: The construction company promised to repair the damaged roof before the heavy rainy season begins next month.
roof.zh: 建筑公司承诺在下个月雨季开始之前修复受损的屋顶。

rooftops.en: From the rooftops of the old town, tourists can enjoy breathtaking panoramic views of the surrounding landscape.
rooftops.zh: 从古镇的屋顶上，游客可以欣赏到周围景色的壮丽全景。

room.en: The newly built research centre provides ample room for scientists to conduct experiments and collaborate effectively.
room.zh: 新建的研究中心为科学家提供了充足的空间来进行实验和有效合作。

roommate.en: My roommate and I have developed a close friendship over the past three years of university life together.
roommate.zh: 在过去三年的大學生活中，我和室友建立了亲密的友谊。

root.en: The root cause of traffic congestion in metropolitan areas is often attributed to inadequate public transportation systems.
root.zh: 城市地区交通拥堵的根本原因通常归因于公共交通系统的不完善。

roots.en: When people emigrate to a new country, they often struggle to maintain their cultural roots and traditions.
roots.zh: 当人们移民到一个新国家时，他们经常努力保持自己的文化根源和传统。

rope.en: The rescue team quickly descended the cliff using a strong rope to save the injured hiker.
rope.zh: 救援队用一根结实的绳子迅速下到悬崖去救受伤的徒步旅行者。

ropes.en: In traditional rope-making workshops, artisans still use centuries-old techniques passed down through generations.
ropes.zh: 在传统的绳索制作作坊里，工匠们仍然使用代代相传的几个世纪前的技术。

rose.en: The temperature rose dramatically during the summer months, making it uncomfortable for people to work outdoors.
rose.zh: 夏季气温急剧上升，使得人们在户外工作变得不舒服。

roses.en: The botanical garden features a stunning collection of roses that bloom in various colours throughout the spring season.
roses.zh: 植物园收藏了令人惊叹的玫瑰品种，在整个春季以各种颜色绽放。

safe.en: The government has implemented strict regulations to ensure that drinking water remains safe for all citizens.
safe.zh: 政府实施了严格的规定，以确保饮用水对所有公民保持安全。

safety.en: Workplace safety standards have been significantly improved, resulting in fewer accidents and injuries.
safety.zh: 工作场所的安全标准已显著改善，事故和伤害数量随之减少。

safety belt.en: Statistics show that wearing a safety belt dramatically reduces the risk of fatal injury in car accidents.
safety belt.zh: 统计数据显示，系安全带能显著降低车祸中致命伤害的风险。

sail.en: European explorers in the fifteenth century learned to sail across the Atlantic using advanced navigation techniques.
sail.zh: 十五世纪的欧洲探险家使用先进的导航技术学会了穿越大西洋航行。

sailing.en: Learning the skills required for sailing involves understanding wind patterns and navigation techniques which can be challenging for beginners.
sailing.zh: 学习航行所需的技能涉及理解风模式和导航技术，这对初学者来说可能具有挑战性。

sailor.en: My grandfather served as a sailor in the navy for over twenty years before retiring with full honors.
sailor.zh: 我祖父在海军服役二十多年后退役，荣誉退休。

sailors.en: Ancient sailors relied on the stars and natural wind patterns to navigate across unknown seas.
sailors.zh: 古代水手依靠星星和自然风向在未知的海域中航行。

saint.en: The cathedral was built in honor of a saint who was believed to have miraculous healing powers.
saint.zh: 这座大教堂是为纪念一位被认为具有神奇治愈能力的圣人而建的。

sake.en: For the sake of improving public health, the government should invest more in preventive medical care.
sake.zh: 为了改善公共健康，政府应该在预防性医疗方面加大投入。

salad.en: Health experts recommend eating a fresh salad daily to ensure an adequate intake of essential vitamins.
salad.zh: 健康专家建议每天吃新鲜沙拉，以确保摄入足够的必需维生素。

salary.en: Although the initial salary was modest, the comprehensive benefits package made the position quite attractive to applicants seeking job security.
salary.zh: 虽然初始工资不高，但优厚的福利待遇使这个职位对追求工作稳定的求职者很有吸引力。

sale.en: The annual sale at the department store attracted thousands of bargain hunters eager to purchase discounted electronics and designer clothing.
sale.zh: 百货公司的年度促销吸引了成千上万的折扣爱好者，他们急于购买打折的电子产品和高档服装。

sales.en: The company reported a significant increase in sales figures following the launch of their new marketing campaign last month.
sales.zh: 该公司报告称，在上个月推出新的营销活动后，销售数据显著增加。

salesman.en: The experienced salesman skillfully demonstrated the product's features, which helped him build rapport with even the most skeptical customers.
salesman.zh: 这位经验丰富的推销员巧妙地展示了产品的特点，这帮助他甚至与最持怀疑态度的顾客建立了融洽关系。

salespeople.en: Modern salespeople must possess excellent communication skills and a thorough understanding of digital marketing strategies to succeed.
salespeople.zh: 现代销售人员必须具备出色的沟通能力和对数字营销策略的深入了解才能取得成功。

salient.en: The researcher focused on the salient characteristics of urban migration patterns to explain population shifts in major cities worldwide.
salient.zh: 研究人员专注于城市迁移模式的主要特征，以解释全球主要城市的人口变化。

saline.en: Medical professionals recommend using a saline solution for nasal irrigation to relieve congestion and reduce sinus inflammation effectively.
saline.zh: 医疗专业人员建议使用盐水溶液进行鼻腔冲洗，以有效缓解充血并减轻鼻窦炎症。

salinity.en: Rising salinity levels in agricultural regions pose a serious threat to crop yields and require immediate environmental intervention measures.
salinity.zh: 农业地区不断上升的盐度水平对作物产量构成严重威胁，需要立即采取环境干预措施。

salmon.en: Overfishing and habitat destruction have led to a dramatic decline in wild salmon populations across northern Pacific coastal regions.
salmon.zh: 过度捕捞和栖息地破坏导致太平洋北部沿海地区野生三文鱼数量急剧下降。

salt.en: High consumption of salt is often linked to increased health risks such as hypertension in adults.
salt.zh: 高盐摄入通常与成年人高血压等健康风险增加有关。

rush.en: Many commuters rush to catch the last train at the underground station every evening, which can be dangerous during peak hours.
rush.zh: 每天晚上，许多通勤者都在地铁站赶最后一班火车，这在高峰时段可能很危险。

rust.en: The abandoned cars in the desert have gradually become covered with rust due to the humid climate and lack of maintenance.
rust.zh: 由于气候潮湿且缺乏维护，沙漠中废弃的汽车逐渐被锈迹覆盖。

sable.en: The sable, a small dark-furred animal native to Siberia, has been hunted extensively for its valuable coat.
sable.zh: 紫貂是一种原产于西伯利亚的深色毛皮小动物，因其珍贵的毛皮而遭到大量猎杀。

sack.en: The company decided to sack the employee after he was found guilty of repeatedly violating workplace safety regulations.
sack.zh: 在该员工被认定多次违反工作场所安全规定后，公司决定解雇他。

sacks.en: Farmers traditionally stored grain in large sacks to protect it from insects and moisture during the harvest season.
sacks.zh: 农民传统上在收获季节用大麻袋储存谷物，以保护其免受昆虫和潮湿的侵害。

sacred.en: Many indigenous cultures consider certain forests sacred, and they are protected from logging and development.
sacred.zh: 许多土著文化认为某些森林是神圣的，因此它们免受砍伐和开发。

sacrifice.en: Parents often sacrifice their personal aspirations to invest more time and resources in their children's education.
sacrifice.zh: 父母经常牺牲个人抱负，在子女教育上投入更多时间和资源。

sad.en: It is sad to witness how urbanization has led to the disappearance of traditional communities and their unique cultural heritage.
sad.zh: 看着城市化的推进如何导致传统社区及其独特文化遗产的消失，令人感到难过。

saddle.en: Before riding across the vast grassland, the cowboy carefully checked the leather saddle to ensure it was properly secured.
saddle.zh: 骑马穿越广阔草原之前，牛仔仔细检查了皮革马鞍以确保其正确固定。

sadness.en: A deep sense of sadness often accompanies the loss of a beloved pet, highlighting the strong emotional bond between humans and animals.
sadness.zh: 深深的悲伤感常常伴随着心爱宠物的离去，突显了人与动物之间强烈的情感纽带。

scarcity.en: The scarcity of clean water has become a major challenge affecting public health in many developing nations.
scarcity.zh: 清洁水的稀缺已成为影响许多发展中国家公众健康的主要挑战。

scare.en: The sudden loud noise did not scare the experienced hikers who were well-prepared for the challenging journey.
scare.zh: 突然的巨响并没有吓到那些为艰难旅程做好充分准备的资深徒步者。

scarf.en: During the cold winter months, many people wear a warm scarf to protect themselves from biting winds.
scarf.zh: 在寒冷的冬季，许多人戴上保暖的围巾来保护自己免受刺骨寒风的侵袭。

scary.en: The horror film was so scary that several audience members left the cinema before the final scene.
scary.zh: 那部恐怖片如此吓人，以至于一些观众在最后一个场景之前就离开了电影院。

scatter.en: When birds sense danger, they will scatter in different directions to avoid predators efficiently.
scatter.zh: 当鸟类感知到危险时，它们会向不同方向散开以有效地躲避捕食者。

scattered.en: The archaeological dig revealed scattered fragments of pottery that historians believe date back centuries.
scattered.zh: 考古发掘揭示了散落的陶片碎片，历史学家认为这些碎片可追溯到几个世纪前。

scenario.en: In the worst-case scenario, rising sea levels could displace millions of people from low-lying coastal areas.
scenario.zh: 在最坏的情况下，海平面上升可能导致数百万人从低洼沿海地区流离失所。

scene.en: Police officers cordoned off the scene of the accident to ensure public safety while investigators collected crucial evidence for the report.
scene.zh: 警察封锁了事故现场以确保公共安全，同时调查人员收集了报告所需的关键证据。

scenery.en: Tourists frequently travel great distances to admire the breathtaking scenery of remote mountainous regions.
scenery.zh: 游客们经常长途跋涉去欣赏偏远山区令人惊叹的风景。

scenes.en: The documentary captured authentic scenes of daily life in traditional villages across various Asian countries.
scenes.zh: 这部纪录片捕捉了亚洲各国传统村庄中真实的日常生活场景。

scientist.en: The scientist conducted extensive research to understand the effects of climate change on marine ecosystems.
scientist.zh: 这位科学家进行了广泛的研究，以了解气候变化对海洋生态系统的影响。

scissors.en: Students should bring their own scissors and glue sticks for the art class project to avoid delays.
scissors.zh: 学生应该为美术课项目自带剪刀和胶棒，以避免延误。

scold.en: Parents should avoid the tendency to scold children for minor mistakes during their learning process.
scold.zh: 父母应该避免在孩子学习过程中因小错误而责备他们的倾向。

scope.en: The scope of this research project is limited by available funding and strict time constraints.
scope.zh: 该研究项目的范围受到可用资金和严格时间限制的制约。

score.en: Many universities require international applicants to score at least 6.5 in IELTS for admission consideration.
score.zh: 许多大学要求国际申请者的雅思成绩至少达到6.5分才会考虑录取。

scores.en: Students who achieve high scores on standardized tests often have better opportunities for university admissions abroad.
scores.zh: 在标准化测试中取得高分的学生通常有更好的机会获得海外大学录取。

scorn.en: The proposal was met with scorn from committee members who questioned its feasibility and practical applications.
scorn.zh: 该提案遭到了委员会成员的蔑视，他们质疑其可行性和实际应用。
