window seat.en: I always try to book a window seat when flying so I can enjoy the spectacular views from above the clouds.
window seat.zh: 乘坐飞机时，我总是尽量预订靠窗座位，这样我可以欣赏云端之上的壮丽景色。

windows.en: Many modern offices have large windows that allow natural light to flood the workspace, reducing the need for artificial lighting throughout the day.
windows.zh: 许多现代办公室都有大窗户，让自然光充分照入工作空间，减少了对人工照明的需求。

windy.en: The windy conditions during the winter months make it uncomfortable for pedestrians to walk along the exposed coastal pathways.
windy.zh: 冬季的刮风天气让行人在暴露的海滨小路上行走感到不舒适。

wine.en: France is renowned worldwide for its wine production, and millions of tourists visit the vineyards each year to sample the local varieties.
wine.zh: 法国以葡萄酒生产闻名于世，每年有数百万游客参观葡萄园品尝当地的葡萄酒。

wing.en: The new hospital wing was constructed to accommodate the increasing number of patients requiring emergency medical treatment.
wing.zh: 新建的医院侧楼是为了容纳需要紧急医疗的越来越多的病人。

wings.en: According to some economists, creative industries have the wings to drive economic growth in the post-industrial era.
wings.zh: 一些经济学家认为，创意产业有潜力在后工业时代推动经济增长。

winner.en: The Olympic winner received a gold medal as recognition of years of rigorous training and unwavering dedication to the sport.
winner.zh: 奥运冠军获得金牌，这是对多年严格训练和对运动不懈奉献的认可。

wife.en: My wife and I recently moved to a new city, where we are gradually building a supportive social network.
wife.zh: 我和我的妻子最近搬到了一个新城市，在那里我们正在逐步建立支持性的社交网络。

wild.en: Conservationists argue that preserving habitats is essential for species surviving in the wild without human intervention.
wild.zh: 保护主义者认为，保护栖息地对于物种在没有人类干预的情况下在野外生存至关重要。

wilderness.en: Many environmental organizations are working tirelessly to protect the remaining wilderness areas from human development.
wilderness.zh: 许多环保组织正在不知疲倦地工作，保护剩余的荒野地区免受人类开发的破坏。

wildlife.en: Conservation efforts are absolutely essential to protect endangered wildlife from the serious threats of habitat loss.
wildlife.zh: 保护工作对于保护濒危野生动物免受栖息地丧失的严重威胁至关重要。

will.en: With consistent practice and dedication, I am confident that I will achieve the required band score for university admission.
will.zh: 通过坚持不懈的练习和努力，我有信心达到大学录取所需的分数。

willing.en: Companies should be willing to adopt sustainable practices to reduce their environmental impact on the planet.
willing.zh: 公司应该愿意采取可持续的做法，以减少对地球的环境影响。

win.en: The marketing team developed an innovative strategy that helped the company win a significant market share.
win.zh: 营销团队制定了创新策略，帮助该公司赢得了重要的市场份额。

wind.en: The strong wind during the storm caused widespread power outages across the coastal region.
wind.zh: 风暴期间的强风导致沿海地区大范围停电。

wind energy.en: Wind energy has become one of the most promising renewable sources for meeting growing electricity demands.
wind energy.zh: 风能已成为满足日益增长的电力需求最有前景的可再生能源之一。

wind farm.en: The proposed wind farm will generate sufficient clean electricity to power approximately fifty thousand households.
wind farm.zh: 拟建的风力发电场将产生足够的清洁电力，为大约五万户家庭供电。

women.en: Women remain underrepresented in senior leadership positions across many industries despite significant progress in workplace equality.
women.zh: 尽管在工作场所平等方面取得了重大进展，女性在许多行业的高级领导职位中仍然人数不足。

wonder.en: Many tourists visit the site to wonder at the incredible engineering skills displayed by the ancient builders.
wonder.zh: 许多游客参观该遗址，惊叹于古代建造者展示的令人难以置信的工程技术。

wonderful.en: The museum offers a wonderful opportunity for visitors to explore interactive exhibits showcasing human technological achievements.
wonderful.zh: 这家博物馆为游客提供了探索展示人类技术成就的互动展览的绝佳机会。

wonderfully.en: The documentary was wonderfully crafted, presenting complex scientific concepts in an accessible and engaging manner for general audiences.
wonderfully.zh: 这部纪录片制作得非常精彩，以普通观众易于理解和引人入胜的方式呈现了复杂的科学概念。

wondering.en: Many students are wondering whether traditional examination methods accurately measure true language ability and potential.
wondering.zh: 许多学生在思考传统的考试方法是否准确衡量了真正的语言能力和潜力。

wood.en: The ancient temple was constructed entirely of wood, demonstrating remarkable craftsmanship from builders centuries ago.
wood.zh: 这座古老的寺庙完全由木材建造，展示了几个世纪前建筑者卓越的工艺。

wooden.en: Traditional houses in that region were constructed using wooden beams, which provided natural insulation against the cold weather.
wooden.zh: 该地区传统的房屋是用木梁建造的，这提供了抵御寒冷天气的天然隔热效果。

woodland.en: The woodland ecosystem supports countless species of plants and animals that rely on each other for survival.
woodland.zh: 森林生态系统支持着无数依赖彼此生存的动植物物种。

woods.en: Taking a leisurely walk through the woods can significantly reduce stress levels and improve overall mental health.
woods.zh: 在树林中悠闲漫步可以显著降低压力水平并改善整体心理健康。

wool.en: Sheep wool is a sustainable material that has been used for thousands of years to create warm clothing.
wool.zh: 羊毛是一种可持续材料，几千年来一直被用来制作保暖衣物。

workers.en: Many workers in the manufacturing sector are currently facing redundancy due to rapidly advancing automation technologies.
workers.zh: 制造业部门的许多工人目前正面临因快速进步的自动化技术而导致的冗余。

workforce.en: The ageing population presents a serious challenge to the future workforce in many developed countries worldwide.
workforce.zh: 人口老龄化给世界各地许多发达国家的未来劳动力带来了严峻挑战。

workload.en: Managing a heavy workload while studying full-time can be extremely challenging for university students.
workload.zh: 对于大学生来说，在全日制学习的同时管理繁重的工作量可能非常困难。

workloads.en: Many employees complain that increasing workloads have negatively affected their work-life balance and mental health.
workloads.zh: 许多员工抱怨工作量的增加对他们的工作与生活平衡及心理健康产生了负面影响。

workman.en: The workman carefully repaired the damaged road to ensure the safety of pedestrians and drivers.
workman.zh: 工人仔细修复了损坏的道路，以确保行人和驾驶员的安全。

workout.en: Regular daily workouts at the gym have significantly improved my physical fitness and energy levels.
workout.zh: 定期每天去健身房锻炼显著改善了我的身体素质和精力水平。

workplace.en: Maintaining a healthy work-life balance is essential for productivity and morale in any modern workplace environment.
workplace.zh: 保持健康的工作与生活平衡对于任何现代工作场所环境的生产力和士气都至关重要。

workshop.en: The educational workshop taught participants valuable skills in time management and effective communication.
workshop.zh: 教育研讨会向参与者传授了宝贵的时间管理和有效沟通技巧。

workshops.en: Many universities offer workshops that help students develop practical skills for their future careers.
workshops.zh: 许多大学提供研讨会，帮助学生培养未来职业所需的实践技能。

world.en: Travelling around the world allows people to experience diverse cultures and broaden their perspectives.
world.zh: 环游世界让人们能够体验不同的文化并拓宽视野。

worldwide.en: Many multinational corporations implement standardized policies worldwide to maintain consistency across their various international branches and offices.
worldwide.zh: 许多跨国公司在全球范围内实施标准化政策，以保持其各个国际分支和办事处的一致性。

worm.en: The fisherman carefully used a worm as bait to catch fresh fish in the nearby river.
worm.zh: 渔夫小心地用虫子作诱饵，在附近的河里钓新鲜的鱼。

worms.en: Professional gardeners often use worms to improve soil quality and promote healthy plant growth.
worms.zh: 专业的园丁经常使用蚯蚓来改善土壤质量，促进植物健康生长。

worry.en: There is growing concern among scientists who worry that climate change will irreversibly damage delicate ecosystems across the globe.
worry.zh: 科学家们越来越担心气候变化将不可逆转地破坏全球脆弱的生态系统。

worry about.en: Many students worry about their exam results because these scores significantly influence their future academic opportunities.
worry about.zh: 许多学生担心他们的考试成绩，因为这些分数极大地影响他们未来的学业机会。

worry n..en: The biggest worry for elderly people living alone is often whether they can maintain their independence as they age.
worry n..zh: 独居老人最大的担忧通常是随着年龄增长他们是否能够保持独立性。

worrying.en: It is quite worrying that the unemployment rate among young graduates continues to rise despite government interventions.
worrying.zh: 令人相当担忧的是，尽管政府介入，年轻毕业生的失业率仍在持续上升。

worship.en: In many traditional societies, people worship their ancestors as a way of preserving cultural heritage and family values.
worship.zh: 在许多传统社会中，人们崇拜祖先作为保存文化遗产和家庭价值观的一种方式。

worst.en: The worst environmental disaster in recent history occurred when an oil tanker spilled millions of gallons into the ocean.
worst.zh: 最近历史上最严重的环境灾难发生在一艘油轮泄漏了数百万加仑石油进入海洋时。

worth.en: The project is definitely worth the investment because it will provide long-term benefits for the local community and economy.
worth.zh: 这个项目绝对值得投资，因为它将为当地社区和经济提供长期利益。

with regard to.en: With regard to renewable energy sources, many countries are now investing heavily in solar and wind power.
with regard to.zh: 关于可再生能源，许多国家目前正在大力投资太阳能和风能。

with respect to.en: With respect to gender equality, significant progress has been made in education and employment opportunities.
with respect to.zh: 在性别平等方面，教育和就业机会方面已取得重大进展。

with the help of.en: With the help of advanced satellite technology, scientists can monitor deforestation patterns across the Amazon.
with the help of.zh: 在先进卫星技术的帮助下，科学家可以监测亚马逊地区的森林砍伐模式。

withdraw.en: Students who wish to withdraw from the program must submit their request before the academic deadline.
withdraw.zh: 希望退出该项目的学生必须在学术截止日期前提交申请。

withdrawal.en: The withdrawal of funding from the project forced researchers to abandon their experiments halfway through the academic year.
withdrawal.zh: 项目的资金撤回迫使研究人员在学年中途放弃了实验。

withstand.en: Architects must design buildings that can withstand extreme weather conditions and natural disasters over many decades.
withstand.zh: 建筑师必须设计能够承受极端天气条件和自然灾害数十年的建筑。

witness.en: Thousands of tourists gathered at the site to witness the spectacular total solar eclipse that occurs only once per century.
witness.zh: 成千上万的游客聚集在该地点观看这一世纪才出现一次的壮观日全食。

witnessed.en: The twentieth century witnessed unprecedented technological advancements that transformed how humans communicate and interact more globally.
witnessed.zh: 二十世纪见证了前所未有的技术进步，这些进步改变了人类如何更全球地沟通和互动。

wolf.en: The reintroduction of wolves to certain ecosystems has paradoxically helped restore natural balance by controlling deer populations.
wolf.zh: 将狼重新引入某些生态系统 paradoxically 有助于通过控制鹿群来恢复自然平衡。

woman.en: The remarkable woman who founded the charity has helped provide education to over fifty thousand children in rural areas.
woman.zh: 这位杰出的女性慈善创始人在农村地区帮助为数万儿童提供了教育。

word.en: The examiner advised using precise academic vocabulary to improve the coherence and lexical resource score.
word.zh: 考官建议使用精确的学术词汇来提高连贯性和词汇资源分数。

work hard.en: Candidates who work hard and maintain consistent study habits generally achieve higher band scores on the IELTS.
work hard.zh: 刻苦学习并保持持续学习习惯的考生通常在雅思考试中取得更高的分数。

work on.en: International students must work on their pronunciation and fluency to meet university admission requirements.
work on.zh: 国际学生必须提高他们的发音和流利度，以满足大学录取要求。

work out.en: Regular physical exercise can help students work out stress accumulated from intensive examination preparation.
work out.zh: 定期的体育锻炼可以帮助学生释放因紧张备考而积累的压力。

work placement.en: Many universities now require students to complete a work placement before graduation to gain practical industry experience.
work placement.zh: 许多大学现在要求学生在毕业前完成工作实习，以获得实际的行业经验。

work together.en: International students must learn to work together with classmates from diverse cultural backgrounds to complete group projects.
work together.zh: 国际学生必须学会与来自不同文化背景的同学合作完成小组项目。

work with.en: New graduates need to work with experienced mentors to develop professional skills and industry knowledge effectively.
work with.zh: 应届毕业生需要与经验丰富的导师合作，以有效地培养专业技能和行业知识。

workbook.en: The accompanying workbook provides additional exercises that reinforce the key vocabulary and grammar structures from each unit.
workbook.zh: 配套的工作手册提供了额外的练习，以加强每个单元的关键词汇和语法结构。

workbooks.en: Language workbooks are essential resources for self-study, allowing learners to practice reading and writing skills independently.
workbooks.zh: 语言工作手册是自学的重要资源，让学习者能够独立练习阅读和写作技能。

worker.en: Automation has significantly transformed the role of the average worker in manufacturing, reducing the need for manual labor.
worker.zh: 自动化已经显著改变了制造业中普通工人的角色，减少了对体力劳动的需求。

zebra.en: The zebra's black and white stripes serve as a form of camouflage, confusing predators in the African savanna.
zebra.zh: 斑马的黑白条纹起到伪装作用，在非洲草原上迷惑捕食者。

zero.en: Many immigrants begin their professional lives with zero savings and gradually build successful careers abroad.
zero.zh: 许多移民在零积蓄的情况下开始职业生涯，并在国外逐渐建立起成功的事业。

zone.en: The city council designated the industrial area as a restricted zone to protect residents from harmful pollution levels.
zone.zh: 市议会指定该工业区为限制区，以保护居民免受有害污染水平的侵害。

zones.en: Modern cities typically divide urban areas into distinct zones for residential, commercial, and industrial purposes.
zones.zh: 现代城市通常将城区划分为不同的区域，用于住宅、商业和工业目的。

zoology.en: She decided to pursue a degree in zoology because she wanted to contribute to wildlife conservation efforts.
zoology.zh: 她决定攻读动物学学位，因为她想为野生动物保护工作做出贡献。

zoosignificant.en: The breeding program for pandas is zoosignificant because it helps prevent the species from becoming extinct.
zoosignificant.zh: 大熊猫的繁殖计划具有重要的动物学意义，因为它有助于防止该物种灭绝。

young children.en: Young children often learn foreign languages more quickly than adults due to their flexible neural pathways.
young children.zh: 幼儿通常由于其灵活的神经通路而比成人更快地学习外语。

young people.en: Many young people today prefer to pursue higher education before entering the workforce.
young people.zh: 如今，许多年轻人更喜欢在进入职场之前追求高等教育。

youngsteramount.en: The youngsteramount in urban areas has increased significantly over the past decade.
youngsteramount.zh: 过去十年中，城市地区的年轻人数量显著增加。

youngsters.en: Parents should guide youngsters toward healthy hobbies rather than excessive screen time.
youngsters.zh: 父母应该引导年轻人培养健康爱好，而不是过度使用电子产品。

yourapproach.en: Your approach to problem-solving should be systematic and evidence-based for the best results.
yourapproach.zh: 你解决问题的方法应该是系统的、基于证据的，以获得最佳效果。

yoursacross.en: The tradition of yoursacross different regions varies considerably depending on local customs.
yoursacross.zh: 你们在跨不同地区的传统因当地习俗而有很大差异。

yourself.en: You should ask yourself whether your lifestyle choices are truly sustainable in the long term.
yourself.zh: 你应该问自己，你的生活方式选择是否长期可持续。

youth.en: The government should invest more in programmes that support youth employment opportunities.
youth.zh: 政府应该更多地投资于支持青年就业机会的项目。

youth hostel.en: Staying at a youth hostel is an affordable option for budget-conscious travellers exploring new cities.
youth hostel.zh: 对于精打细算的旅行者来说，住在青年旅舍是探索新城市的经济实惠选择。

zealhappens.en: When zealhappens in workplace settings, it can sometimes lead to burnout if not managed properly.
zealhappens.zh: 当工作场所出现过度热情时，如果管理不当，有时会导致倦怠。

worthwhile.en: Volunteering abroad can be a worthwhile experience for young people seeking to broaden their cultural understanding.
worthwhile.zh: 对于希望拓宽文化视野的年轻人来说，出国志愿服务可能是一次有意义的经历。

worthy.en: The charity organization was recognized as a worthy cause that has helped thousands of underprivileged children.
worthy.zh: 该慈善组织被公认为一项有价值的事业，已经帮助了成千上万的贫困儿童。

would.en: If I were given the opportunity to study abroad, I would choose to attend a university in a European country.
would.zh: 如果我有机会出国学习，我会选择去一个欧洲国家的大学就读。

wound.en: The physical wound on his leg healed completely after several weeks of proper medical treatment and rest.
wound.zh: 他腿上的伤口经过几周的适当医疗和休息后完全愈合了。

wrap.en: Shoppers should wrap their purchases securely to prevent damage during transportation back to their homes.
wrap.zh: 购物者应该把购买的东西包装牢固，以防止在运回家途中损坏。

wrapped.en: The ancient scrolls were carefully wrapped in protective cloth to preserve them for future generations.
wrapped.zh: 古代卷轴被仔细地用保护布包裹起来，以保存给后代。

wrath.en: The wrath of nature was demonstrated when the earthquake destroyed entire cities within minutes.
wrath.zh: 当地震在几分钟内摧毁整座城市时，大自然的威力得到了充分展示。

wreath.en: The memorial ceremony concluded with a beautiful floral wreath being placed at the war memorial by veterans.
wreath.zh: 退伍军人在战争纪念碑前摆放了美丽的花圈，标志着纪念仪式的结束。

wreck.en: The environmental scientists studied the ship wreck to understand how it affected the local marine ecosystem.
wreck.zh: 环境科学家研究了沉船残骸，以了解它如何影响当地海洋生态系统。

wrecked.en: The old abandoned building was finally wrecked after years of debates about whether to preserve or demolish it.
wrecked.zh: 经过多年关于保护还是拆除的争论后，这座废弃建筑最终被拆除了。

wrench.en: The sudden news of his failure made him wrench his face in disappointment and walk away silently.
wrench.zh: 突然听到失败的消息，他痛苦地扭曲着脸，默默地走开了。

wrestle.en: Young athletes must learn to wrestle with difficult opponents while maintaining respect and good sportsmanship.
wrestle.zh: 年轻运动员必须学会在保持尊重和良好体育道德的同时与强劲对手较量。

wretched.en: Many families still live in wretched poverty despite government efforts to improve their living conditions.
wretched.zh: 尽管政府努力改善生活条件，许多家庭仍然生活在极度贫困中。

wrinkle.en: The researcher noticed a new wrinkle in his theory that required further investigation and analysis.
wrinkle.zh: 研究人员注意到他的理论中出现了一个需要进一步调查和分析的新问题。

wrist.en: The athlete wore a supportive brace on his wrist to prevent further injury during the upcoming international competition.
wrist.zh: 这名运动员在即将到来的国际比赛中佩戴了护腕以防止手腕进一步受伤。

write.en: Students are encouraged to write clearly and concisely when answering academic questions in their final examinations.
write.zh: 学生们在期末考试中回答学术问题时，被鼓励写得清晰简洁。

write down.en: During the important lecture, I always write down the key points to ensure I can review them thoroughly later.
write down.zh: 在重要的讲座期间，我总是记下关键点，以确保以后能够彻底复习。

write up.en: Researchers are expected to write up their experimental findings in a formal report suitable for academic publication.
write up.zh: 研究人员需要将实验结果整理成适合学术发表的正式报告。

writer.en: The writer argues that renewable energy sources are essential for reducing global carbon emissions effectively today.
writer.zh: 作者认为可再生能源对于当今有效减少全球碳排放至关重要。

writers.en: Many successful writers emphasize the importance of reading extensively to develop and improve their own writing skills.
writers.zh: 许多成功的作家都强调广泛阅读对于培养和提高自身写作技巧的重要性。

yellow.en: The yellow warning signs posted along the coastline alert swimmers to dangerous currents and potential hazards.
yellow.zh: 沿海岸线张贴的黄色警告标志提醒游泳者注意危险的洋流和潜在危险。

yellow fever.en: Travelers arriving from regions where yellow fever is endemic must provide proof of vaccination before entry.
yellow fever.zh: 来自黄热病流行地区的旅行者必须在入境前提供疫苗接种证明。

yes.en: Although some economists initially disagreed, they eventually said yes to the proposed fiscal reforms.
yes.zh: 尽管一些经济学家最初持反对意见，但他们最终同意了提议的财政改革。

yesterday.en: The archaeological discoveries made yesterday have fundamentally changed our understanding of ancient civilizations.
yesterday.zh: 昨天取得的考古发现从根本上改变了我们对古代文明的理解。

yet.en: Electric vehicles are becoming increasingly popular, yet many consumers remain hesitant about making the switch.
yet.zh: 电动汽车越来越受欢迎，但许多消费者仍然对转换持犹豫态度。

yieldrange.en: Scientists study the yieldrange of various crops to determine which varieties are best suited for different climates.
yieldrange.zh: 科学家研究各种农作物的产量范围，以确定哪些品种最适合不同的气候。

yields.en: Sustainable farming methods often produce higher crop yields while preserving the natural quality of the soil.
yields.zh: 可持续的耕作方法往往能产生更高的作物产量，同时保持土壤的自然质量。

yoga.en: Many corporations now offer yoga classes as part of their employee wellness programs to reduce workplace stress.
yoga.zh: 许多公司现在将瑜伽课程作为员工健康计划的一部分，以减轻工作场所的压力。

youhanded.en: The youhanded invitation to the exclusive exhibition was delivered to our office this morning by special courier.
youhanded.zh: 您亲笔签署的展览邀请函今天早上由特快专递送到我们办公室。

young.en: Young entrepreneurs often bring innovative ideas that challenge traditional business models and drive economic growth.
young.zh: 年轻的企业家经常带来挑战传统商业模式并推动经济增长的创新理念。

writing.en: The writing section of the IELTS exam requires candidates to produce two essays within a one-hour time limit.
writing.zh: 雅思考试的写作部分要求考生在一小时的时间限制内完成两篇作文。

written language.en: Written language differs significantly from spoken language, as it demands greater precision in grammar and vocabulary.
written language.zh: 书面语言与口语有很大不同，因为它需要更高的语法和词汇精确度。

wrong.en: Many students make the wrong assumption that memorizing template essays can replace genuine language practice.
wrong.zh: 许多学生错误地认为背诵模板作文可以取代真正的语言练习。

x-ray.en: The doctor recommended an x-ray examination to determine whether the patient's injury was more serious than expected.
x-ray.zh: 医生建议进行X光检查，以确定患者的伤势是否比预期的更严重。

yacht.en: The wealthy businessman purchased a luxury yacht that was approximately fifty feet long for his summer vacation.
yacht.zh: 那位富商购买了一艘大约五十英尺长的豪华游艇，用于他的暑假度假。

yard.en: The small yard behind the apartment provided just enough space for a few potted plants and outdoor seating.
yard.zh: 公寓后面的小院子空间刚好够放置几盆盆栽和户外座椅。

yawn.en: During the long lecture, several students could not help yawning despite their efforts to remain attentive.
yawn.zh: 在漫长的讲座期间，尽管几位学生努力保持专注，但他们还是忍不住打哈欠。

year.en: After completing a year of intensive language training, international students are better prepared for academic challenges.
year.zh: 在完成一年的强化语言训练后，国际学生能更好地应对学术挑战。

yearly.en: The museum organizes a yearly exhibition showcasing artwork created by local artists from the surrounding region.
yearly.zh: 博物馆每年组织一次展览，展示当地艺术家的艺术作品。

yell.en: The sudden yell from the nearby playground indicated that the children were involved in an exciting game.
yell.zh: 附近游乐场突然传来的喊叫声表明孩子们正在进行一个刺激的游戏。

frame.en: It is important to frame the debate around economic growth in terms of long-term sustainability rather than short-term profits.
frame.zh: 重要的是要将围绕经济增长的辩论框定在长期可持续性方面，而不是短期利润。

framework.en: The legal framework of a country must evolve to address the challenges posed by emerging technologies.
framework.zh: 一个国家的法律框架必须不断演变，以应对新兴技术带来的挑战。

group.en: A group of researchers conducted a long-term study on the effects of urbanisation on local communities.
group.zh: 一组研究人员对城市化对当地社区的影响进行了一项长期研究。

groups.en: Different interest groups often hold conflicting views on how natural resources should be managed.
groups.zh: 不同的利益群体通常对自然资源应该如何管理持有相互冲突的观点。

groves.en: The ancient groves were considered sacred by the local community and served as places for religious ceremonies.
groves.zh: 古老的树林被当地社区视为圣地，并作为宗教仪式的场所。

grow.en: Children grow and develop at different rates, which is why individualised learning approaches are important.
grow.zh: 孩子们以不同的速度成长和发育，这就是个性化学习方法重要的原因。

grow up.en: Children who grow up in bilingual households often demonstrate stronger cognitive flexibility.
grow up.zh: 在双语家庭中长大的孩子通常表现出更强的认知灵活性。

growers.en: Local growers are encouraged to adopt sustainable practices to protect the environment while increasing their crop yields.
growers.zh: 鼓励当地种植者采用可持续做法，以增加作物产量的同时保护环境。

growing.en: There is a growing awareness of mental health issues among young people in modern society.
growing.zh: 现代社会年轻人对心理健康问题的认识日益增强。

guarantee.en: While a university degree does not guarantee employment, it significantly improves career prospects.
guarantee.zh: 虽然大学学位不能保证就业，但它大大改善了职业前景。

provision.en: The government has made provision for affordable housing in the new urban development plan to help low-income families.
provision.zh: 政府已在新城市发展计划中为经济适用房做出规定，以帮助低收入家庭。

provoke.en: The controversial advertisement was designed to provoke public discussion about environmental issues in society.
provoke.zh: 这个有争议的广告旨在引发公众对社会环境问题的讨论。

psychiatry.en: He decided to pursue a career in psychiatry after witnessing the mental health struggles of his family members.
psychiatry.zh: 在目睹家庭成员的心理健康问题后，他决定从事精神病学事业。

psychological.en: Many athletes suffer from psychological stress due to the immense pressure of competing at an international level.
psychological.zh: 许多运动员因在国际层面竞争的巨大压力而遭受心理压力。

psychologically.en: Living in crowded urban conditions can psychologically affect individuals, leading to increased stress and anxiety levels.
psychologically.zh: 生活在拥挤的城市环境中可能在心理上影响个人，导致压力和焦虑水平增加。

relationship.en: There is a strong relationship between regular exercise and improved mental health among young adults today.
relationship.zh: 如今，规律运动与年轻人心理健康改善之间存在着强烈的关系。

relative.en: In relative terms, the cost of living in rural areas is significantly lower than in major metropolitan cities.
relative.zh: 从相对角度来看，农村地区的生活成本明显低于主要大城市。

relatively.en: The cost of living in this city is relatively low compared to other major metropolitan areas nearby.
relatively.zh: 与附近其他主要大都市区相比，这座城市的生活成本相对较低。

relatives.en: Many elderly people prefer to live near their relatives so they can receive emotional support and practical assistance.
relatives.zh: 许多老年人喜欢住在亲戚附近，以便获得情感支持和实际帮助。

relativity.en: According to Einstein's theory of relativity, space and time are interconnected in ways that affect our universe.
relativity.zh: 根据爱因斯坦的相对论，空间和时间以影响宇宙的方式相互关联。

firm.en: The company took a firm approach to reducing waste by implementing comprehensive recycling programs across all departments.
firm.zh: 该公司采取坚定的措施，通过在所有部门实施全面的回收计划来减少废物。

foyer.en: The hotel's elegant foyer features marble floors and a grand staircase that impresses guests upon their arrival.
foyer.zh: 酒店优雅的门厅设有大理石地板和宏伟的楼梯，让客人抵达时印象深刻。

fraction.en: Only a small fraction of the world's population has access to clean drinking water, highlighting global inequality.
fraction.zh: 世界上只有一小部分人口能够获得清洁饮用水，这突显了全球不平等现象。

fracture.en: Medical experts warn that osteoporosis can increase the risk of bone fracture among elderly populations.
fracture.zh: 医学专家警告说，骨质疏松症会增加老年人骨折的风险。

fragile.en: The fragile balance of marine ecosystems can be disrupted by overfishing and ocean acidification.
fragile.zh: 海洋生态系统的脆弱平衡可能因过度捕捞和海洋酸化而被打破。

fragment.en: The archaeologist carefully examined a single fragment of ancient pottery to understand the culture's artistic traditions.
fragment.zh: 考古学家仔细检查了一块古代陶器的碎片，以了解该文化的艺术传统。

fragments.en: The explosion scattered fragments of glass across the street, requiring several hours to clean up completely.
fragments.zh: 爆炸将玻璃碎片散落在街道上，需要几个小时才能完全清理干净。

fragrant.en: The fragrant smell of fresh flowers in the botanical garden creates a peaceful atmosphere for visitors to enjoy.
fragrant.zh: 植物园里鲜花的芬芳为游客创造了宁静的享受氛围。

frail.en: Frail patients recovering from surgery often require home care assistance to perform daily activities safely.
frail.zh: 手术后恢复的体弱患者通常需要家庭护理协助才能安全地完成日常活动。

address.en: Governments must address the rising levels of pollution immediately to prevent irreversible damage to the natural environment and public health.
address.zh: 政府必须立即解决日益严重的污染水平，以防止对自然环境和公众健康造成不可逆转的损害。

adept.en: Students who become adept at critical thinking often perform better in academic assessments.
adept.zh: 擅长批判性思维的学生通常在学术评估中表现更好。

adequacy.en: The adequacy of healthcare services in rural areas continues to be a pressing issue.
adequacy.zh: 农村地区医疗服务的充足性仍然是一个紧迫的问题。

adequate.en: Ensuring adequate access to clean drinking water is considered a fundamental human right for people worldwide.
adequate.zh: 确保充分获得清洁饮用水被认为是全世界人民的一项基本人权。

adequately.en: Universities must adequately prepare graduates for the competitive global job market.
adequately.zh: 大学必须充分为毕业生应对竞争激烈的全球就业市场做好准备。

adjacent.en: The new sports complex is located adjacent to the university campus.
adjacent.zh: 新的体育中心位于大学校园旁边。

adjust.en: Employees need to adjust their skills to meet the changing demands of the industry.
adjust.zh: 员工需要调整自己的技能以满足行业不断变化的需求。

adjustable.en: Many modern office chairs come with adjustable height settings for user comfort.
adjustable.zh: 许多现代办公椅都配有可调节的高度设置，以提供用户舒适感。

adjustment.en: The adjustment period for immigrants moving to a new country can be quite challenging.
adjustment.zh: 移民到一个新国家的适应期可能会相当具有挑战性。

administer.en: Trained professionals should administer the examinations to ensure consistency and fairness.
administer.zh: 训练有素的专业人员应该负责管理考试，以确保一致性和公平性。

guideline.en: The government has issued new guidelines regarding environmental protection standards that all factories must follow.
guideline.zh: 政府发布了关于所有工厂必须遵守的环境保护标准的新指南。

guidelines.en: Students should carefully read the guidelines provided in the examination handbook before entering the test room.
guidelines.zh: 学生在进入考场前应仔细阅读考试手册中提供的指南。

mortgage.en: Many young couples in urban areas struggle to afford a mortgage for their first home due to rising property prices.
mortgage.zh: 由于房价上涨，城市地区的许多年轻夫妇难以负担第一套住房的抵押贷款。

open.en: The new shopping centre will be open to the public next month, offering a wide range of retail and dining options.
open.zh: 新的购物中心将于下月向公众开放，提供各种零售和餐饮选择。

preschool.en: Research indicates that children who attend quality preschool programs tend to perform better academically later.
preschool.zh: 研究表明，就读高质量学前教育项目的儿童日后学业表现往往更好。

pronounce.en: English learners often find it challenging to pronounce certain vowel sounds that do not exist in their native language.
pronounce.zh: 英语学习者经常发现发某些母语中不存在的元音很有挑战性。

pronounced.en: There is a pronounced difference in living standards between rural and urban areas in developing countries.
pronounced.zh: 发展中国家的农村和城市地区之间存在明显的生活水平差异。

pronunciation.en: In the speaking test, examiners assess both pronunciation and vocabulary usage to determine the overall score.
pronunciation.zh: 在口语考试中，考官评估发音和词汇使用情况以确定总分。

proof.en: The scientist provided sufficient proof to validate the hypothesis, convincing the academic community of the new theory.
proof.zh: 科学家提供了足够的证据来验证假设，使学术界相信了这一新理论。

proofreading.en: Proofreading is an essential step in academic writing, as it helps eliminate grammatical errors and improves clarity.
proofreading.zh: 校对是学术写作中必不可少的一步，因为它有助于消除语法错误并提高清晰度。

relax.en: Students should learn to relax during exam periods to maintain good mental health and focus.
relax.zh: 学生应该在考试期间学会放松，以保持良好的心理健康和专注力。

relaxation.en: Many companies now recognize the importance of relaxation techniques for improving employee productivity.
relaxation.zh: 许多公司现在认识到放松技巧对提高员工工作效率的重要性。

relaxed.en: After the final examination, the students felt significantly relaxed and ready to enjoy their summer holiday break.
relaxed.zh: 期末考试结束后，学生们感到显著放松，并准备好享受他们的暑假假期。

relaxing.en: I find that reading books is a relaxing way to unwind after a long day of intensive study.
relaxing.zh: 我发现阅读书籍是紧张学习一整天后放松的好方法。

relay.en: The relay race requires not only physical speed but also effective teamwork and strategic coordination.
relay.zh: 接力赛不仅需要身体速度，还需要有效的团队合作和策略协调。

sorting.en: Sorting recyclable materials from general waste remains a significant challenge in many urban areas.
sorting.zh: 在许多城市地区，将可回收材料从一般垃圾中分类仍然是一个重大挑战。

sought.en: The government has sought public opinion on the proposed environmental protection policies this year.
sought.zh: 政府今年就拟议的环境保护政策征求了公众意见。

soul.en: Many philosophers throughout history have attempted to understand the fundamental nature of the human soul.
soul.zh: 纵观历史，许多哲学家都试图理解人类灵魂的基本本质。

sound.en: A sound night's sleep is essential for teenagers as their bodies and brains continue developing rapidly.
sound.zh: 充足良好的睡眠对青少年至关重要，因为他们的身体和大脑正在快速发育。

sounds.en: The strange sounds coming from the abandoned building attracted the attention of local residents.
sounds.zh: 从废弃建筑传来的奇怪声音引起了当地居民的注意。

propagate.en: Social media platforms have enabled information to propagate rapidly across borders, changing how people communicate.
propagate.zh: 社交媒体平台使信息能够跨越国界迅速传播，改变了人们的交流方式。

propel.en: Technological innovation can propel economic growth and create new employment opportunities for society.
propel.zh: 技术创新能够推动经济增长，为社会创造新的就业机会。

proper.en: Students should develop proper time management skills to balance academic responsibilities and personal life.
proper.zh: 学生应该培养 proper 时间管理技能，以平衡学业责任和个人生活。

properly.en: Waste must be disposed of properly to prevent serious environmental pollution and protect natural habitats effectively.
properly.zh: 必须妥善处理废物，以防止严重的环境污染并有效保护自然栖息地。

properties.en: Scientists are investigating the chemical properties of this new material for various medical applications in hospitals.
properties.zh: 科学家正在研究这种新材料的化学性质以用于医院的各种医疗应用。

proverb.en: The proverb 'actions speak louder than words' reminds us that what we do matters more than what we say.
proverb.zh: 谚语'行动胜于言辞'提醒我们，做的比说的更重要。

provide.en: Universities should provide adequate support services to help international students adjust to their new environment.
provide.zh: 大学应该提供 adequate 支持服务，帮助国际学生适应新环境。

provided.en: Students can achieve excellent results, provided that they maintain consistent study habits throughout the term.
provided.zh: 只要学生在整个学期保持一致的学习习惯，就能取得优异的成绩。

province.en: Each province in the country has developed its own unique traditions and cultural practices over centuries.
province.zh: 这个国家的每个省份在几个世纪以来都发展出了自己独特的传统和文化习俗。

provincial.en: Some critics argue that provincial governments should not have excessive power over regional economic decisions.
provincial.zh: 一些批评者认为，省级政府不应该对区域经济决策拥有过多的权力。

guard.en: Wearing a helmet can guard cyclists against severe head injuries when they are involved in unexpected traffic accidents.
guard.zh: 佩戴头盔可以保护骑自行车的人在遭遇意外交通事故时免受严重的头部伤害。

guardian.en: In many cultures, parents are considered the natural guardians of their children's education and welfare.
guardian.zh: 在许多文化中，父母被视为孩子教育和福利的天然监护人。

guardians.en: The guardians of ancient traditions play a vital role in preserving cultural heritage for future generations.
guardians.zh: 古老传统的守护者在为后代保留文化遗产方面发挥着至关重要的作用。

guess.en: Rather than making a wild guess, students should spend time analyzing the question carefully before attempting an answer.
guess.zh: 学生不应该胡乱猜测，而应该花时间仔细分析问题后再作答。

guest.en: The guest speaker at the conference shared valuable insights about sustainable development in urban areas.
guest.zh: 会议上的客座演讲者分享了关于城市可持续发展方面的宝贵见解。

guests.en: The hotel's VIP guests receive personalized services, including complimentary breakfast, airport transfers, and spa treatments.
guests.zh: 酒店的贵宾客人享受个性化服务，包括免费早餐、机场接送和水疗护理。

guidance.en: Under the careful guidance of their professors, graduate students learn to conduct rigorous academic research.
guidance.zh: 在教授的悉心指导下，研究生学会进行严谨的学术研究。

guide.en: A knowledgeable local guide can help tourists understand the historical significance of famous architectural landmarks.
guide.zh: 一位知识渊博的当地导游可以帮助游客理解著名建筑的历史意义。

guidebook.en: Before traveling abroad, I always purchase a comprehensive guidebook to learn about local customs and etiquette.
guidebook.zh: 在出国旅行之前，我总是购买一本全面的指南书来了解当地的风俗习惯和礼仪。

guided tour.en: The guided tour of the famous art gallery provided detailed explanations of each painting's artistic techniques.
guided tour.zh: 这座著名美术馆的导览 tour 详细解释了每幅画的艺术技巧。

superiority.en: The superiority of traditional teaching methods over modern technology remains a topic of heated debate among educators worldwide.
superiority.zh: 传统教学方法相对于现代技术的优越性仍然是全球教育工作者之间激烈争论的话题。

supermarket.en: Many consumers prefer shopping at the supermarket because it offers a wider variety of products at competitive prices.
supermarket.zh: 许多消费者更喜欢在超市购物，因为它提供更多种类的产品，价格也更具竞争力。

supersave.en: During the supersave promotion, customers can enjoy discounts of up to fifty percent on household appliances and electronics.
supersave.zh: 在超省钱促销期间，顾客可以享受家用电器和电子产品高达五折的优惠。

supersonic.en: The supersonic aircraft can travel at speeds exceeding seven hundred kilometres per hour, dramatically reducing travel time.
supersonic.zh: 超音速飞机可以以超过每小时七百公里的速度飞行，大大缩短旅行时间。

superstition.en: Despite scientific advancements, superstition still influences the behaviour and decision-making of many people in modern society.
superstition.zh: 尽管科学不断进步，迷信仍然影响着现代社会中许多人的行为和决策。

supervise.en: The project manager will supervise all team members to ensure that the deadline is met without compromising quality standards.
supervise.zh: 项目经理将监督所有团队成员，以确保在不影响质量标准的情况下按时完成任务。

soup.en: Many students skip breakfast and just grab a cup of soup on their way to university, which is not nutritionally adequate for their busy schedules.
soup.zh: 许多学生不吃早餐，只在去大学的路上喝一杯汤，这对他们的繁忙日程来说营养是不够的。

sour.en: The milk had turned sour after being left out overnight, so I had to throw it away and buy fresh milk from the supermarket.
sour.zh: 牛奶在室外放了一夜后变酸了，所以我不得不把它扔掉，去超市买新鲜牛奶。

source.en: Solar power is becoming an increasingly reliable source of energy for nations seeking sustainable development goals.
source.zh: 对于寻求可持续发展目标的国家来说，太阳能正成为一种越来越可靠的能源来源。

sourced.en: The restaurant proudly advertises that all its ingredients are locally sourced from organic farms within a fifty-kilometer radius.
sourced.zh: 这家餐厅自豪地宣传，所有食材都来自五十公里范围内的当地有机农场。

sources.en: Researchers should consult multiple credible sources before drawing any conclusions about complex social phenomena in their studies.
sources.zh: 研究人员在得出关于复杂社会现象的任何结论之前，应该查阅多个可靠来源。

sprinkle.en: Some teachers believe that instructors should sprinkle humor throughout their lectures to maintain students' attention and make learning enjoyable.
sprinkle.zh: 一些教师认为，教师应该在整个讲座中穿插幽默，以保持学生的注意力并使学习变得愉快。

sprout.en: After several days of warm weather, small green shoots began to sprout from the seeds we had planted in the garden last week.
sprout.zh: 经过几天的温暖天气，我们上周在花园里种下的种子开始冒出小小的绿色嫩芽。

spur.en: Financial incentives can spur innovation in technology companies, encouraging them to develop groundbreaking products that meet consumer demands.
spur.zh: 经济激励可以刺激科技公司的创新，鼓励它们开发满足消费者需求的突破性产品。

spy.en: The documentary explored the life of a spy who worked covertly during the Cold War to gather intelligence for his government.
spy.zh: 这部纪录片探索了一位间谍的生活，他在冷战期间秘密为政府收集情报。

squad.en: The football squad trained rigorously throughout the season, which ultimately helped them win the national championship trophy.
squad.zh: 这支足球队在整个赛季都进行严格的训练，这最终帮助他们赢得了全国冠军奖杯。

square.en: The central square serves as a vital communal space where residents gather for cultural events and social interactions.
square.zh: 中央广场作为一个重要的公共空间，居民们在此聚集参加文化活动和社交互动。

squash.en: If you squeeze the squash too hard, it will lose its fresh texture and become mushy.
squash.zh: 如果你把南瓜压得太用力，它就会失去新鲜的口感，变得糊状。

squeeze.en: Many commuters have to squeeze into crowded trains during peak hours in major cities every day.
squeeze.zh: 在主要城市，许多通勤者每天不得不在高峰时段挤进拥挤的火车。

squeezed.en: Due to budget cuts, the education department was squeezed between meeting demands and reducing costs.
squeezed.zh: 由于预算削减，教育部门在满足需求和降低成本之间被夹在中间。

squirrel.en: Like a squirrel storing nuts for winter, humans should save money for unexpected emergencies.
squirrel.zh: 像松鼠为冬天储藏坚果一样，人类应该为意外紧急情况存钱。

strive.en: Students must strive to develop both analytical skills and practical knowledge to succeed academically.
strive.zh: 学生必须努力培养分析技能和实践知识，才能在学业上取得成功。

superficial.en: A superficial understanding of complex topics is truly insufficient for solving real-world problems effectively.
superficial.zh: 对复杂主题的肤浅理解确实不足以有效地解决现实世界的问题。

superintendent.en: The school superintendent announced new policies to improve student performance across all districts.
superintendent.zh: 学校校长宣布了新政策，以提高所有地区的学生成绩。

superior.en: Some consumers believe that locally sourced ingredients are superior to imported goods due to their freshness and reduced environmental impact during transport.
superior.zh: 一些消费者认为本地采购的原料优于进口商品，因为其新鲜度以及在运输过程中减少的环境影响。

superior to.en: Technology alone is not superior to traditional methods in all educational contexts and situations.
superior to.zh: 在所有教育环境和情况下，技术本身并不优于传统方法。

vehicle.en: Many commuters rely on their personal vehicle to travel to work every day due to inadequate public transportation in the city.
vehicle.zh: 由于城市公共交通不足，许多通勤者每天依赖私家车上下班。

vehicles.en: The widespread adoption of electric vehicles is crucial for significantly reducing urban air pollution levels globally.
vehicles.zh: 广泛采用电动汽车对于全球显著减少城市空气污染水平至关重要。

veil.en: The ancient temple was partially hidden beneath a veil of fog, creating a mysterious and enchanting atmosphere for visitors.
veil.zh: 古老的寺庙隐没在薄雾之中，为游客营造出神秘而迷人的氛围。

vein.en: The doctor carefully examined the swollen vein on the patient's arm to determine the underlying medical condition.
vein.zh: 医生仔细检查了病人手臂上肿胀的静脉，以确定潜在的医学病因。

velocity.en: The velocity of technological change has accelerated dramatically in recent decades, transforming how we live and work.
velocity.zh: 近几十年来，技术变革的速度显著加快，彻底改变了我们的生活和工作方式。

velvet.en: The royal palace featured luxurious velvet curtains that added significantly to its grandeur and elegant appearance.
velvet.zh: 皇家宫殿装饰着奢华的天鹅绒窗帘，显著增添了宏伟壮丽的外观。

vegetable.en: Including a variety of vegetable in one's daily diet can significantly reduce the risk of certain diseases.
vegetable.zh: 在日常饮食中包含各种蔬菜可以显著降低某些疾病的风险。

vegetables.en: Consuming a variety of fresh vegetables daily is crucial for maintaining a balanced diet and promoting overall long-term health.
vegetables.zh: 每天食用各种新鲜蔬菜对于保持均衡饮食和促进整体长期健康至关重要。

vegetarian.en: Many young people are choosing a vegetarian lifestyle for ethical reasons related to animal welfare.
vegetarian.zh: 许多年轻人出于与动物福利相关的道德原因选择素食生活方式。

vegetation.en: The destruction of native vegetation often disrupts local ecosystems and threatens the survival of various endangered animal species.
vegetation.zh: 本地植被的破坏往往扰乱当地生态系统，并威胁各种濒危动物物种的生存。

vigorous.en: The government has launched a vigorous campaign to promote renewable energy and reduce dependence on fossil fuels.
vigorous.zh: 政府发起了一场有力的运动，推广可再生能源并减少对化石燃料的依赖。

web.en: The World Wide Web has revolutionized how individuals access information, enabling instant communication across vast geographical distances effectively.
web.zh: 万维网彻底改变了个人获取信息的方式，有效地实现了跨越广阔地理距离的即时通讯。

website.en: Many universities now offer virtual campus tours through their official website, allowing prospective students to explore facilities remotely.
website.zh: 许多大学现在通过官方网站提供虚拟校园 tour，让潜在学生可以远程探索校园设施。

wedding.en: The wedding ceremony featured a beautiful blend of traditional customs and modern elements that reflected the couple's diverse cultural backgrounds.
wedding.zh: 婚礼仪式融合了传统习俗和现代元素，体现了这对夫妇多元化的文化背景。

wedge.en: The carpenter inserted a small wooden wedge between the loose floorboard and the subfloor to prevent it from squeaking.
wedge.zh: 木匠在小地板和底层地板之间插入了一个小木楔，以防止它发出吱吱声。

weed.en: The garden was full of weed, making it difficult for the flowers to grow properly.
weed.zh: 花园里杂草丛生，使得花朵难以正常生长。

week.en: I have been studying for this exam for almost a week now and feel well prepared.
week.zh: 我已经为这次考试学习了将近一周的时间，感觉准备得很充分。

weekday.en: On weekdays, I usually wake up at six in the morning to avoid the morning rush hour.
weekday.zh: 在工作日，我通常早上六点起床以避开早高峰。

weekdays.en: Most offices are open throughout the weekdays but may close early on Fridays.
weekdays.zh: 大多数办公室在整个工作日都营业，但在星期五可能会提前关门。

weekend.en: Many young people prefer to spend their weekend relaxing with friends rather than studying.
weekend.zh: 许多年轻人更喜欢在周末与朋友放松，而不是学习。

weekends.en: I like to go hiking on weekends to escape the stress of daily urban life.
weekends.zh: 我喜欢在周末去徒步旅行，以摆脱日常城市生活的压力。

welfare.en: The government has implemented several programs to support the welfare of disadvantaged families in rural communities.
welfare.zh: 政府已实施了几项计划来支持农村社区困难家庭的福利。

welfares.en: Some economists argue that welfares provided by the state should be reduced to encourage individual self-reliance and productivity.
welfares.zh: 一些经济学家认为，国家提供的福利应该减少，以鼓励个人自力更生和提高生产力。

well.en: University graduates generally perform well in job interviews because they have developed strong communication and analytical skills.
well.zh: 大学毕业生通常在求职面试中表现良好，因为他们已经培养了较强的沟通和分析能力。

well done.en: The professor told the class that the research paper was well done and worthy of publication in an academic journal.
well done.zh: 教授告诉全班同学，这篇研究论文做得很好，值得在学术期刊上发表。

well-known.en: The well-known author gave a compelling lecture on climate change at the international conference.
well-known.zh: 这位著名作家在国际会议上就气候变化发表了一场引人入胜的演讲。

wellness.en: Many companies now prioritize employee wellness programs to improve workplace satisfaction and productivity.
wellness.zh: 许多公司现在重视员工的健康项目，以提高工作场所的满意度和生产力。

west.en: The ancient city, located to the west of the modern capital, attracts thousands of tourists annually.
west.zh: 这座古城位于现代首都的西侧，每年吸引成千上万的游客。

western.en: Western cultures often emphasize individualism, whereas many Eastern societies prioritize community harmony and strong collective responsibilities.
western.zh: 西方文化通常强调个人主义，而许多东方社会则优先考虑社区和谐与强烈的集体责任。

wet.en: The wet weather in London often discourages tourists from visiting outdoor attractions during spring.
wet.zh: 伦敦潮湿的天气常常阻止游客在春季参观户外景点。

wetlands.en: Wetlands serve as natural filters that purify water and provide essential habitats for migratory birds.
wetlands.zh: 湿地作为天然过滤器，净化水质并为迁徙鸟类提供重要的栖息地。

language.en: The acquisition of a second language can significantly enhance cognitive flexibility and improve cross-cultural communication skills in an increasingly globalized world.
language.zh: 第二语言的习得能够显著增强认知灵活性，并在日益全球化的世界中改善跨文化交流技能。

according.en: According to the latest government report, unemployment rates have decreased by 2% over the past year.
according.zh: 根据最新的政府报告，过去一年失业率下降了2%。

understanding.en: Having a thorough understanding of cultural differences is essential for anyone working in international business, as it helps build stronger professional relationships.
understanding.zh: 对文化差异有透彻的理解对于在国际商务领域工作的人来说至关重要，因为这有助于建立更强的职业关系。

allow.en: The government should allow more flexibility in working hours to help parents balance their professional and family responsibilities.
allow.zh: 政府应该允许工作时间有更大的灵活性，以帮助父母平衡职业和家庭责任。

activities.en: The school offers a wide range of extracurricular activities, including sports, music, and drama, which help students develop important social skills.
activities.zh: 学校提供多种课外活动，包括体育、音乐和戏剧，这些活动帮助学生培养重要的社交技能。

term.en: The initial term of the lease agreement is set for three years, after which tenants can negotiate renewal terms.
term.zh: 租赁协议的初始期限设定为三年，之后租户可以协商续约条款。

reason.en: The main reason for the decline in traditional manufacturing jobs is the widespread automation of production processes worldwide.
reason.zh: 传统制造业工作岗位减少的主要原因是全球范围内生产过程的广泛自动化。

evidence.en: The overwhelming evidence suggests that regular exercise significantly improves mental health outcomes in both adolescents and adults.
evidence.zh: 压倒性的证据表明，定期锻炼能显著改善青少年和成人的心理健康状况。

ability.en: Many employers believe that the ability to work collaboratively in diverse teams is more valuable than technical skills alone.
ability.zh: 许多雇主认为，在多元化团队中协作工作的能力比单纯的技术技能更有价值。

environment.en: Governments should invest more in protecting the natural environment by implementing stricter regulations on industrial pollution and promoting sustainable practices.
environment.zh: 政府应该加大对自然环境的保护投资，通过实施更严格的工业污染法规和推广可持续做法。

following.en: Students should read the following instructions carefully before beginning the examination to ensure they understand all the requirements.
following.zh: 学生应在开始考试前仔细阅读以下说明，以确保他们理解所有要求。

brain.en: The human brain is capable of processing vast amounts of information simultaneously, which explains why we can perform complex tasks without conscious effort.
brain.zh: 人类大脑能够同时处理大量信息，这解释了为什么我们能够在无意识的情况下完成复杂的任务。

without.en: Many traditional customs are disappearing without anyone realizing their cultural significance until it is too late.
without.zh: 许多传统习俗正在消失，却没有人意识到它们的文化意义，直到为时已晚。

within.en: Most major cities have implemented noise pollution regulations, which require construction activities to be completed within designated hours to minimize disturbance to residents.
within.zh: 大多数主要城市都实施了噪音污染法规，要求建筑活动在规定的时间内完成，以减少对居民的干扰。

business.en: Some business leaders argue that globalization has created more job opportunities in developing countries, while others believe it has widened the wealth gap between nations.
business.zh: 一些商业领袖认为全球化在发展中国家创造了更多就业机会，而另一些人则认为它扩大了国家间的贫富差距。

required.en: Universities often require students to submit multiple documents, including academic transcripts, reference letters, and a personal statement, as these are required for the admission process.
required.zh: 大学通常要求学生提交多份文件，包括成绩单、推荐信和个人陈述，因为这些是入学申请所必需的。

likely.en: It is likely that climate change will continue to affect agricultural productivity in developing countries over the coming decades.
likely.zh: 气候变化很可能在未来几十年继续影响发展中国家的农业生产力。

period.en: During the Victorian period, British society underwent significant transformations in industry, culture, and social norms.
period.zh: 在维多利亚时期，英国社会在工业、文化和社会规范方面经历了重大变革。

remains.en: The archaeological remains found at the excavation site provide valuable insights into the daily lives of ancient civilizations.
remains.zh: 在发掘现场发现的考古遗迹为了解古代文明的日常生活提供了宝贵的见解。

almost.en: The factory has almost completed its transition to renewable energy, which should significantly reduce its carbon emissions.
almost.zh: 这家工厂几乎完成了向可再生能源的转型，这将大大减少其碳排放。

market.en: The government should regulate the housing market to ensure that property prices remain affordable for first-time buyers.
market.zh: 政府应该监管房地产市场，以确保房价对首次购房者来说是可以承受的。

control.en: Government control over media content has become increasingly strict, with many arguing that such regulations limit freedom of expression.
control.zh: 政府对媒体内容的管控日益严格，许多人认为这些规定限制了言论自由。

brought.en: Technological advancement has brought about significant changes in the way people communicate and access information worldwide.
brought.zh: 技术进步给人们的沟通方式和全球范围内获取信息的方式带来了重大变化。

power.en: The government should regulate the power of large corporations to prevent them from exploiting consumers and damaging the environment.
power.zh: 政府应该监管大公司的权力，以防止它们剥削消费者并破坏环境。

until.en: The government should not implement new environmental policies until sufficient research has been conducted to assess their potential impact.
until.zh: 政府不应实施新的环境政策，直到有足够的研究来评估其潜在影响。

tested.en: The hypothesis was thoroughly tested through a series of controlled experiments conducted over several months.
tested.zh: 这个假设通过一系列在数月内进行的受控实验进行了彻底检验。

considered.en: Speed limits in urban areas are generally considered effective in reducing traffic accidents and protecting pedestrians.
considered.zh: 城市地区的限速规定通常被认为能有效减少交通事故和保护行人。

conditions.en: Under the current economic conditions, many small businesses are struggling to survive and maintain their workforce.
conditions.zh: 在当前的经济条件下，许多小企业正艰难维持运营并保住员工。

technology.en: Modern technology has revolutionized the way we communicate, making it possible to connect with people across the globe instantly.
technology.zh: 现代科技彻底改变了我们的沟通方式，使我们能够即时与世界各地的人们建立联系。

continue.en: Despite facing numerous obstacles, the government has decided to continue funding the research program to ensure its long-term success.
continue.zh: 尽管面临众多障碍，政府仍决定继续资助该研究项目以确保其长期成功。

subjects.en: The subjects covered in the examination include mathematics, science, and literature, which provide students with a well-rounded education.
subjects.zh: 考试涵盖的科目包括数学、科学和文学，这些为学生提供了全面的教育。

products.en: The company has expanded its range of products to meet the diverse needs of consumers across different age groups.
products.zh: 这家公司扩大了产品范围，以满足不同年龄段消费者的多样化需求。

potential.en: The government should invest more in renewable energy research to unlock its full potential as a sustainable alternative to fossil fuels.
potential.zh: 政府应该加大对可再生能源研究的投资，以释放其作为化石燃料可持续替代方案的的全部潜力。

several.en: Several factors have contributed to the increase in urban population, including better employment opportunities and improved healthcare services.
several.zh: 几个因素导致了城市人口的增加，包括更好的就业机会和改善的医疗服务。

factors.en: Various factors such as economic conditions, family background, and educational opportunities can significantly influence a person's career choices and professional development.
factors.zh: 各种因素，如经济状况、家庭背景和教育机会，会显著影响一个人的职业选择和职业发展。

among.en: Among the various factors contributing to urban pollution, vehicle emissions remain the most significant concern for city authorities worldwide.
among.zh: 在导致城市污染的各种因素中，车辆排放仍然是全球城市当局最关注的主要问题。

held.en: The annual conference held in the capital city brought together experts from various fields to discuss environmental challenges.
held.zh: 在首都举行的年度会议汇集了来自各领域的专家，讨论环境挑战。

report.en: The research report indicates that climate change has significantly affected agricultural productivity in developing countries over the past decade.
report.zh: 这份研究报告表明，在过去十年中，气候变化显著影响了发展中国家的农业生产力。

present.en: The researcher will present her findings on climate change at the international conference next month.
present.zh: 研究人员将在下个月举行的国际会议上展示她关于气候变化的发现。

community.en: The local community has come together to support the new recycling program, demonstrating how collective action can address environmental challenges.
community.zh: 当地社区团结起来支持新的回收项目，展示集体行动如何应对环境挑战。

whether.en: Many people are uncertain whether they should pursue higher education or enter the workforce directly after finishing secondary school.
whether.zh: 许多人不确定在中学毕业后应该继续接受高等教育还是直接进入就业市场。

major.en: One of the major challenges facing modern cities is how to accommodate rapid population growth while preserving environmental quality.
major.zh: 现代城市面临的主要挑战之一是如何在保护环境质量的同时容纳快速增长的人口。

industry.en: The tourism industry has experienced significant growth over the past decade, contributing substantially to the local economy.
industry.zh: 旅游业在过去十年经历了显著增长，为当地经济做出了重大贡献。

rate.en: The unemployment rate has increased significantly over the past decade, causing widespread concern among economists and policymakers alike.
rate.zh: 过去十年来，失业率显著上升，引起了经济学家和决策者的广泛关注。

exist.en: Many endangered species exist only in isolated ecosystems that face increasing threats from human encroachment.
exist.zh: 许多濒危物种仅存在于那些面临人类入侵日益威胁的孤立生态系统中。

already.en: Many students have already begun preparing for their university applications several months before the deadline.
already.zh: 许多学生在截止日期前几个月就已经开始准备大学申请了。

science.en: Advancements in science have transformed healthcare, enabling doctors to treat diseases that were once considered incurable and saving millions of lives worldwide.
science.zh: 科学的进步已经改变了医疗保健，使医生能够治疗曾经被认为无法治愈的疾病，在全球范围内挽救了数百万人的生命。

resources.en: Governments should invest more resources in renewable energy research to reduce dependence on fossil fuels and combat climate change effectively.
resources.zh: 政府应该将更多资源投入可再生能源研究，以减少对化石燃料的依赖并有效应对气候变化。

society.en: Modern society places increasing pressure on young people to succeed academically, often at the expense of their mental health and creativity.
society.zh: 现代社会给年轻人施加了越来越大的学业压力，这往往以他们的心理健康和创造力为代价。

view.en: From my perspective, the government should take a much broader view of environmental policies to ensure long-term sustainability for future generations.
view.zh: 在我看来，政府应该对环境政策采取更广泛的视角，以确保为后代带来长期的可持续性。

growth.en: The rapid growth of the technology sector has significantly influenced the economic landscape of many developing nations over the past decade.
growth.zh: 科技部门的快速增长显著影响了许多发展中国家过去十年的经济格局。

focus.en: Students should focus on developing critical thinking skills rather than simply memorizing facts for their upcoming academic examinations.
focus.zh: 学生应该专注于培养批判性思维技能，而不是仅仅为即将到来的学术考试死记硬背事实。

support.en: Many local communities rely on government support to maintain essential public services such as healthcare and education systems.
support.zh: 许多当地社区依靠政府支持来维持基本公共服务，如医疗和教育系统。

significant.en: There has been a significant increase in the number of people choosing to work remotely since the pandemic began.
significant.zh: 自疫情开始以来，选择远程工作的人数有了显著增加。

range.en: The university offers a wide range of courses designed to meet the diverse needs of international students seeking higher education.
range.zh: 这所大学提供广泛的课程，旨在满足寻求高等教育的国际学生的多样化需求。

handed.en: The responsibility for managing the project was handed to a senior manager who had extensive experience in leading large teams.
handed.zh: 管理项目的责任被交给了一位在领导大型团队方面拥有丰富经验的高级经理。

amount.en: A large amount of money is invested annually in research aimed at finding cures for various chronic diseases affecting humans.
amount.zh: 每年都有大量资金投入到旨在寻找影响人类的各种慢性疾病疗法的研究中。

approach.en: Teachers need to adopt a flexible approach when dealing with students who have different learning styles and academic requirements.
approach.zh: 教师在对待具有不同学习风格和学术要求的学生时，需要采取灵活的方法。

across.en: Pollution levels vary significantly across different regions, indicating that local industrial activities play a major role in environmental degradation.
across.zh: 污染水平在不同地区之间差异显著，表明当地工业活动在环境退化中起着主要作用。

happens.en: When rapid urbanization happens without proper planning, it often leads to significant infrastructure problems and decreased quality of life for residents.
happens.zh: 当快速城市化在没有适当规划的情况下发生时，往往会导致重大的基础设施问题和居民生活质量下降。
